C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
开拓者每日登录游戏后，可在「旅情事记」中领取当日奖励。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
奖励将根据开拓者累计登录天数依次解锁，当日奖励将在<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）刷新。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
禁闭舱段中「阮•梅」造物居然自发产生了自己的社会文明！艾丝妲对此很感兴趣，她委托你前去调查它们的培育原理。她与螺丝咕姆甚至为你准备了「生命烘焙箱」与「保姆机器人」……

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「异宠拾遗」活动中，开拓者可以通过组合搭配，培育自己心仪的「阮•梅」造物。
● 在培育过程中，有概率发生突变，获得新的造物特征或「稀有造物」。
● 完成冒险任务「异宠拾遗」和在「禁闭舱段」中自由探索，皆可获得基础的造物特征。

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过获得新的造物特征、培育「稀有造物」等方式，可提升研究等级。
● 通过提升研究等级，可获取对应奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
In an unexpected turn of events, Ruan Mei's creations in the seclusion zone have spontaneously developed their own social civilization! Intrigued by this phenomenon, Asta has entrusted you with the task of investigating the nurturing principles. She and Screwllum have even prepared a "Lifeform Oven" and a "Helper Robot" for you...

◆ Event Rules ◆
● During the Critter Pick event, Trailblazers can nurture their own desired creations via combination and pairing.
● Mutations may occur during the nurturing process, leading to new creation traits or even rare creations.
● Basic creation traits can be obtained from completing the Adventure Mission "Critter Pick" and exploring the Seclusion Zone.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● You can raise your Research Level via a variety of means, such as obtaining new creation traits and nurturing rare creations.
● Raising your Research Level earns you the corresponding rewards.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
● 匹诺康尼圣杯战争已经结束，而天才们却为圣杯赋予了全新的机能。在晖长石号的一隅，一场全新的拟似圣杯战争即将开幕！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「命运/今晚留下来」中，开拓者将与7位模拟角色共同参与圣杯战争，经过多轮1v1对战，最终决出胜者。  

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过游玩「命运/今晚留下来」，可以获得奖励积分，奖励积分达到不同档位时可领取【积分奖励】中的常驻奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● The Penaconian Holy Grail War has concluded. Yet, the geniuses have imbued the Holy Grail with new functions. In a corner of the Radiant Feldspar, a new simulated Holy Grail War will soon begin!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In Fate/stay night, the Trailblazer will participate in the Holy Grail War alongside 7 simulated characters. After multiple 1v1 showdowns, a final victor will be decided.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● You can accumulate points by playing Fate/stay night. Once your points reach certain ranks, you can obtain regular rewards from Point Rewards.

C: 目前没有储备的奇美拉。

C: 你和杨叔陪三月七一起调查了很久，可直到最后，你们也没能搞清罗刹是否清白。\n但小三月玩得很开心，这就足够了，不是吗？
E: Accompanied by March 7th, you and Mr. Yang conducted a lengthy investigation but failed to determine if Luocha is innocent or not.\nNonetheless, March 7th enjoyed the experience, and that's what matters most, right?

C: 你顺利解决了「放生帮」带来的社会问题，地衡司很感激。但钟珊到底是什么人啊？她为什么要帮你戏耍这几位善人呢？
E: You have successfully resolved the social issues caused by "The Unshackled," and the Realm-Keeping Commission is grateful for your assistance. However, who exactly is Zhongshan? And why did she help you play a prank on those people?

C: 你在黑天鹅留下的记忆中，深度体验了「花火大人的推理剧场」。\n你最好别对花火好不容易想出来的诡计挑三拣四，小心她拄杖无时夜叩门。
E: In the memories left behind by Black Swan, you experienced deeply "Miss Sparkle's Detective Theater."\nBest not to nitpick at the intricacies of the plan she thought so hard to come up with, lest her cane knocks on your doors at unexpected times.

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克曾是一位天才科学家，然而他主导研发的「虚数坍缩脉冲」却夺走了千万人的家园和生命。\n他穷尽余生渴望救赎，却在肉体消亡后的数百年才得到了应有的归宿。
E: Calderon Chadwick was once a brilliant scientist. However, the "Imaginary Implosion Pulse" he developed led to the loss of homes and lives for innumerable individuals.\nHe spent the remainder of his life yearning for redemption, and it took several centuries after his physical demise for him to find the rightful place he deserved.

C: 你放走了「妻子」，你希望他们能度过短暂但愉快的余生。\n依「妻子」所请，岁阳回到绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: You have released the "wife," wishing them a short yet blissful life.\nAs per her request, you have returned the heliobus to the suppression tower in the Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>感动</color>获取量×#2

E: The Bombheads were ignited by the sun's embers, and their explosions ignited the extinguished sun. Light and heat return to the land, but Master Hat will not be returning to The Compass ever again.

C: 钟表小子讲了个假面小丑说过的笑话，哈努兄弟发出了忍俊不禁的*哼*。\n「哼哼…」
E: Clockie rattles off a joke from the Masked Clowns. Brother Hanu cannot stop himself from giving a grunt.\n"*hmph*..."

C: 哈努兄弟拒绝了石头老板的要求，石头老板非常生气，把之前的资助全部撤销了。\n「兄弟，没标签的礼物是最贵的商品！」
E: Brother Hanu rejects Boss Stone's request, and Boss Stone becomes furious, withdrawing all previous funding.\n"Brother, unlabeled gifts are the most expensive ones of all!"

C: 钟表小子被旋风卷到了很远的地方，不得不翻山越岭才能回到美梦小镇。\n「滴答，这滴答是哪呀！」
E: Clockie is swept off by the hurricane to a faraway land, and to traverse mountains and valleys to return to Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, where in the tick-tock am I!?"

C: 要让小镇的居民们安心，就必须彻底解决小镇的生存问题。
E: We have to completely take care of the town's survivability issues to reassure all the residents of the town.

C: 一声巨响过后，木头老爷的房子轰然倒塌，折纸小鸟与猫头鹰老师救出了他，但他最威风的树枝被炸断了……
E: A deafening roar is heard, and Old Man Wood's house collapses in an instant. Origami Birds and Professor Owl manage to rescue him, but his most majestic branch is tragically blown off in the explosion...

C: 木头老爷希望大家能够好好相处，不要在美好的小镇中争斗，但这份劝告却让他们把矛头对准了木头老爷……\n「咳咳，怪我都怪我，就怪我是木头！」
E: Old Man Wood wished everyone could get along nicely instead of fighting in Dreamville, but his advice eventually made him the target of everyone's resentment...\n"Ahem, go ahead and pin the blame on me. It's because I'm only a piece of wood!"

C: 钟表小子把黑狗的秘密拍进了影片，引来了他的追杀，躲进垃圾桶里才逃过一劫。\n「滴答，待在垃圾桶里的感觉…好像还不错……」
E: Clockie made the Black Hound's secret into a film. As a result, Clockie had to hide in a trashcan to make a narrow escape from Black Hound's pursuit.\n"Tick-tock, it's actually quite nice to be inside a trashcan..."

C: 钟表小子把这里叫作「清醒村」，他希望能有越来越多的人清醒过来，来到这里。\n「滴答，这儿才是美梦小镇最初的样子，你们忘了吗？」
E: Clockie named the place "Rouseville," hoping more, and more people would wake up and come here.\n"Tick-tock, this is how Dreamville used to look like in the beginning. Did you all forget about it?"

C: 钟表小子把这里叫作「清醒村」，他希望能有越来越多的人清醒过来，来到这里。\n「滴答，这儿才是美梦小镇最初的样子，你们忘了吗？」
E: Clockie named the place "Rouseville," hoping more, and more people would wake up and come here.\n"Tick-tock, this is how Dreamville used to look like in the beginning. Did you all forget about it?"

C: 木头老爷没收了他的泪水，美梦小镇不能郁郁寡欢。\n「滴答，治标又治本！」
E: Old Man Wood confiscated the person's tears. Depression was not allowed in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, this solves the root of the problem!"

C: 不，美梦小镇没有质疑。\n「因为他是对的。」
E: No. There was no skepticism in Dreamville.\n"Because he's right."

C: 钟表小子夜里在皇宫乱转，撞上了一位充满好奇心的镜子小姐。她是这里的公主，知识渊博，但从来没有离开过皇宫……
E: Clockie strolls throughout the palace by night, and bumps into a rather curious Miss Mirror. She's the princess here with a breathtakingly vast knowledge — despite having never ever left the palace before.

C: 擅长筑巢的猫头鹰非常熟悉小镇的构造，他提出了一个作战方案：把小镇的屋子拆掉，他来搭建一个无坚不摧的碉堡……
E: Skilled at building nests, the owl is also very familiar with the town's design. He puts forward a battle plan: Demolish the buildings in the town, and build an impenetrable bunker...

C: 在钟表小子的保护下，小树快速地成长为参天的巨树。郁郁葱葱的枝叶挡住大风，树冠漏下的阳光唤醒了迷雾中的镇民。
E: Under Clockie's protection, the sapling quickly grows into a towering giant tree. Its lush foliage blocks the wind, and the sunlight filtering through the canopy arouses the townsfolk from the fog.

C: 为了引开镇民们的注意力，钟表小子让黄金公子搭建了一座「钟表公园」，大家可以来这里玩各种各样的游戏……
E: To divert the townsfolk's attention, Clockie enlisted the help of Young Master Gold to build the Clock Garden for recreational purposes.

C: 本片的「剧情阶段」中，每一幕会存在两张情节卡片，仅需选择其中一张进行剧情剪辑。

C: 钟表小子找来了木头老爷，终结了噩梦般的灾难。面对狭小贫瘠的美梦小镇，他们决定叫来世界各处的牛仔，一起开辟镇外奇妙的荒原……
E: Clockie brought Old Man Wood to end the nightmarish disasters. Left with the small and barren Dreamville, they decided to call cowboys across the world to explore the strange wilderness outside the town together...

C: 当然，这不代表着我离开罗盘号——等到美梦小镇成为了真正的*美梦*，我就会回去的！
E: Of course, it doesn't mean that I've left The Compass — when Dreamville finally becomes a true dream, I'll return for sure!

C: 走吧，朋友——别想太多了，先让我们在这里玩个痛快吧，滴答！
E: Come, friend. No need to overthink it. Let us first enjoy the heck out of this place, tick-tock!

C: 滴答，帽子师傅、安乐椅男孩、镜子公主、左轮队长…他们的「罗盘号」现在开到哪了呢……

且说那龙尊丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝钟造化之神秀，集天地之灵气，禀天命之机缘降生凡世。{NICKNAME}寻思，璞玉待雕凿，良材期工造，若不能觅得贤师益友，保不齐丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝要堕入黑暗面，步上一任饮月君的后尘。自己与龙尊虽无血亲之份，却有养育之责，为此{F#她}{M#他}召来四位伙伴，探问教育方略，欲为年纪尚幼的龙尊丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝谋一个光明的未来。

<color=#f29e38ff>勇士一</color>道：「龙尊乃持明一族之尊，若无兵法武艺傍身，岂能上奉天旨，下建功勋，未来又何以服众？闻得景元将军精擅兵法，乃剑首高徒，不如奉将军为师？」

<color=#f29e38ff>勇士二</color>道：「此言差矣，育化英才怎可囿于杀伐？吾闻太卜司太卜符玄大人法眼无遗，长于庙算，更患有掉书袋的不治之症，兼且好为所有人师。若能得符太卜为师，丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝必可上演天象，下通人事！」

<color=#f29e38ff>勇士三</color>大摇其头：「所谓名师出高徒，碌碌之辈岂能教出天纵英才？吾有一策，素闻湛蓝星黑塔空间站有天才黑塔女士，得遍智天君博识尊垂青而晋令使之阶，旗下有空间站七十二贤，研究员三千，所掌奇物更不可胜数！{NICKNAME}可称丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝为奇物，远渡星海拜谒黑塔，晓之以奇，动之以萌，定能令黑塔大师心痒难耐，甘当丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝良师。」

<color=#f29e38ff>勇士四</color>垂目静坐，片刻后睁眼道：「古语有云，近朱者赤，近墨者黑——听闻迦梨落六号上有奇童名曰漆黑的虎克大人，幼而极慧，广举贤能组建义侠团体『鼹鼠党』。丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝童真质朴，若奉成人为师，必受熏染。不如交予鼹鼠党，与之终日嬉游，天然化育。{NICKNAME}以为如何？幼儿教育哪家强？我独看好鼹鼠党！」

听罢众人你一言我一语的胡扯，{NICKNAME}相信，凭诸位伙伴的努力和丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝的天分，他定能被养育成一位了不起的龙尊。

It was said the High Elder Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe was the living embodiment of nature's pinnacle and the breathing epitome of heaven's zenith, and was set by divine destiny to be born into this mortal world. {NICKNAME} reckons "a diamond must be cut and polished before it can shine — without a wise teacher and good friends, Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe could well join the dark side and follow in the footsteps of the predecessor, Imbibitor Lunae." Though {NICKNAME} had no blood relation to the High Elder, they had the responsibility to raise the High Elder. And so, {F#she}{M#he} summoned their four companions to inquire about how to best educate the young Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe, desirous of giving him a bright future.

<color=#f29e38ff>Warrior 1</color> said: "This is the future leader of the Vidyadhara — if he has not mastered the art of warfare and combat, how can he live up to the mandate of the heaven or claim earthly glory by war? How will he maintain his power over his people? I hear that General Jing Yuan excels in the art of war and is the Sword Champion's disciple. Why not ask the general to be the teacher?"

<color=#f29e38ff>Warrior 2</color> said: "That won't do! How can the cultivation of an outstanding person be confined to slaughter? What about Lady Fu Xuan, master diviner of the Divination Commission — the one also known as Omniscia Spares None? She is a genius at tactics and strategy, and also literate and eloquent to a fault. She even possesses the hobby of desiring to be everyone's teacher. If Master Diviner Fu can be the teacher, Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe will become adept in the ways of the cosmos and of worldly affairs!"

<color=#f29e38ff>Warrior 3</color> shook their head heavily: "It's said you need a famous teacher to train a great student — how can a hero be cultivated by such mediocre characters? If I may offer a better suggestion — I have caught wind that there is a certain genius named Madam Herta, whose space station orbits The Blue. She has even gained the favor of Nous the Wisdomwalker and reached the level of becoming their Emanator. Her domain, the space station, is home to <unbreak>72</unbreak> sages, three thousand researchers, and more Curios than could ever be counted! {NICKNAME} could inform Herta that Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe is a Curio from far across the stars and ask for her audience this way. When you meet her, convince her with rarity and appeal to her with cuteness. That would surely pique Madam Herta's curiosity and make her eager to become Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe's teacher."

<color=#f29e38ff>Warrior 4</color> sat and pondered deeply with their eyes downcast, and after a few moments looked up and said: "As the old saying goes, 'He who dwells with the virtuous will become virtuous, he who dwells with the wicked will become wicked.' I heard that on "Ya Li Luo-VI" there is a miracle child named Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, who is wise beyond her years — she even recruited persons of upstanding character to form a gallant group called The Moles. Being tutored by an adult would surely spoil Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe's childlike innocence and simplicity — why not entrust him to The Moles and let him grow into his own person in a natural way, spending his childhood in careless play? So, what does {NICKNAME} think? When it comes to pre-school education, aren't the Moles the best? After all, the Moles are supercalifragilisticexpialidocious!"

After hearing everyone's eager contributions of balderdash, {NICKNAME} firmly believed that with the combined efforts of their companions and Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe's innate talent, they would surely be able to raise Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe as an outstanding High Elder of the Vidyadhara.

E: For each point of HP lost by all allies, Castorice gains 1 "Newbud". When "Newbud" reaches its maximum, Ultimate can be activated. When allies lose HP, damage dealt by Castorice and Netherwing increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=2 format=i%></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) and lasts for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). "Newbud" cap is fixed at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>. When Netherwing defeats an enemy target, it restores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> HP, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of its overflow HP will be recorded and converted to an equal amount of "Newbud" for Castorice after Netherwing disappears. When the number of ally squad characters in the team is less than 4/5/6/7, Castorice gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color> additional "Newbud".\nWhile Netherwing is on the field, "Newbud" cannot be gained through Talent. For each point of HP lost by all allies except Netherwing, Netherwing will restore an equal amount of HP.

C: 使指定我方单体角色获得【军功】并使刻律德菈获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>点充能。充能上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点。若目标已持有【军功】，则<color=#f29e38ff>额外</color>为刻律德菈充能<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>点。当充能达到<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点时，自动使角色的【军功】升级为【爵位】并解除其<u>控制类负面状态</u>。持有【爵位】的角色被视为同时持有【军功】。持有【爵位】的角色造成的战技伤害的暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color>、全属性<u>抗性穿透</u>提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>，对敌方目标施放战技时触发<u>奇袭</u>。<u>奇袭</u>结束后，消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点充能使【爵位】变回【军功】。

If the target already has "Military Merit", <color=#f29e38ff>additionally</color> grants Cerydra <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge. The Skill DMG dealt by the character with "Peerage" increases its CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color> and All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and triggers <u>Coup de Main</u> when using the Skill is used on enemy targets. C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队#</color>小桂子接到了<color=#42a8b9>@不爱睡觉</color> 的投稿后，第一时间就赶往怪谈现场。结果发现那位「若昔」真的在家中准备做饭，抱着疑问，捉鬼小队继续调查。我们发现穿过一条无人的小巷后，「若昔」变成了文远的样子…机智如我小桂子，一把盐撒了上去，怪物顿时四肢扭曲开始脱水化作一团果冻。目前变形生物已经被地衡司逮捕，据工作人员透露，目前在逃的星界变形怪数量不少……
E: Upon receiving the submission from <color=#42a8b9>@Insomnophile</color>, my team and I rushed to the scene of the supernatural incident. Surprise, surprise, Ruoxi was indeed at home, preparing a meal. With questions at hand, the ghost-hunting squad continued investigating. We discovered that, after passing through a deserted alley, Ruoxi transformed into Wenyuan's likeness. Quick-thinking as always, Little Gui threw salt on the entity, causing it to contort and dehydrate into a jelly-like mass. The shape-shifting creature has been apprehended by the Realm-Keeping Commission. According to the staff, there are still quite a few shape-shifters from the stars on the loose. <color=#42a8b9>#GhostHuntingSquad</color>

C: 地底冒险团队「鼹鼠党」的老大（自封）。\n热爱自由，将生活视为一场又一场冒险。
E: Boss (self-proclaimed) of an Underworld adventure squad, The Moles.\nShe loves freedom and sees life as a series of adventures.

C: 仙舟「罗浮」太卜司之首。\n凭借第三眼与穷观阵为仙舟占算航路，预卜事务吉凶。
E: Head of the Divination Commission on the Luofu.\nThe person who uses the third eye and Matrix of Prescience to foretell the route of Xianzhou and the outcomes of events.

C: 匹诺康尼酒店的门童侍应，乖巧懂事的小男孩。\n对无名客抱有极大憧憬，梦想有朝一日自己也能踏上旅途。
E: A well-behaved young man serving as a hotel bellboy in Penacony.\nMisha has a great longing for the Nameless and dreams of one day embarking on a journey of his own.

C: 自时光中凝取的稀薄力量。正是所有微不足道的刹那，编织成了壮绝的命运。\n\n「飞矢在弦、挽弓逐鹿的那一刻，猎人的双眸最为清澈。」
E: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate.\n\n"The hunter's eyes are the clearest when they pull back the bowstring with the arrow nocked."

C: 「你醒了…谢谢。」 「你…救了我…娜塔莎。该说谢谢的人…是我。」 「不，是我要感谢你……坚持到我完成手术。」 医生与病人疲惫地相视一笑，再也没有说话。
E: "You're awake... Thank you." "You... saved my life, Natasha. The one who should be saying thanks... is me." "No, I should be thanking you... for holding on until I finished the surgery." The doctor and patient smiled wearily at each other and said nothing more.

C: 虽然餐桌已经摆好… 有人要先喝一杯红茶； 有人要先拍一张照片； 有人要先读一份报纸； 有人要先记一页笔记； 有人要先玩一会手机。 「都给我趁热吃帕！」
E: Though the table is set... Some people want a cup of tea first. Some people want to take a picture first. Some people want to read the newspaper first. Some people want to write a page in their notebook first. Some people want to play on their phone first. "All of you, eat while the food is hot!"

C: 他仿佛落入深海，一切都离他而去，只余空洞的思维在跳跃与挣扎。 恐惧、不安、孤独、黑暗、愤怒…那些感受没有随着肉身消散，反而以另一种方式保留在机械的躯壳之中，愈发沉重。 他听到逝者的呼唤，闻到烧焦的气味，电机的嗡鸣在他的耳边盘旋，蓝色的血液流向他饥渴的心脏…一些残忍的记忆再次浮现，刻骨的仇恨化作黑暗中的微光，他循着光亮朝尽头走去，用尽力气浮出了水面。 他睁开眼，一簇火花闪过，他听到来自医者的祝贺—— 「欢迎再次来到这个世界。」  他握紧双手，如今它们是钢铁的，冰冷的…… 他将不再为自己而活。
E: He felt as if he had fallen into a deep sea. Everything was departing from him, leaving only his hollow thoughts writhing and struggling all alone. Terror, anxiety, loneliness, darkness, rage — these feelings didn't dissipate with his physical body, but remained within the mechanical shell in a different manner — and they were even heavier than before. He heard the call of the dead, smelled the scent of something being charred, the whirl of machinery buzzed around his ears, and the new blue blood flew towards his thirsty heart... Some cruel memories resurfaced as the unforgettable hatred turned into a weak light in the darkness. He followed the light to walk toward the end of it all, exerting every ounce of his strength to rise once again to the surface. He opened his eyes and a flash of fireworks darted past before hearing the doctor's congratulations — "Welcome to this world, once again." He balled his hands into fists — hands that were now made of cold iron... He would no longer live for himself.

C: 在渺无边际的太古之地，少年孤身行于找寻的旅路。 他仿佛回到那些流浪的日子，趟过波涛，历经风霜，与巨兽搏斗，同恶浪挣扎。 但在那喘息的片刻，他却并不孤独。 纵然山河万程，他却仍能看见前方的光—— 那是万物生灵的期盼。 破碎的大地已无法承载新生，它们围聚在他身旁，寻求安慰与庇佑。 那是伙伴曾留在他心底的话语，仿若绵延不断的航路，将他们牢牢联系。 困扰他的旧日也曾随风泛起，但来时的路，终会化作蜕变新鳞的助力。 「我会守护开拓的道路。」 少年持枪腾跃而起，向着光芒处前行—— 「亦会捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望！」
E: In the boundless ancient lands, a young man walks alone on his quest. He seems to return to those wandering days, wading through surging waves, weathering wind and frost, battling behemoths, struggling against raging tides. Yet in those moments of respite, he is not alone. Though worlds apart, he can still see the light ahead... It is the light of hope of all living beings. The shattered earth can no longer sustain new life, and the newborn creatures gather around him, seeking comfort and shelter. Those are the words his companions left in his heart, like an endless voyage connecting them firmly together. The troubles of his past may stir with the wind, but the path he's traveled will become the strength for his metamorphosis. "I will stand guard for the Path of the Trailblaze." The young man leaps forth with his spear, advancing toward the light "And I shall defend all hope that threatens to fade away!"

C:
永恒地悬停于虚空之中，
闪耀的数据如洪流般涌入祂的脑海。
将过去未来的万物化作符号，
祂于初始之刻推演终末之时。
知识，答案，真相……
信息的迷雾中升腾起璀璨的光，
于是一切对祂都已澄明。
E:
Eternally suspended in the void,
Streams of shimmering data flood into THEIR mind.
Turning all things past and future into symbols,
THEY deduce the end from the beginning.
Knowledge, answers, truths...
In the mist of information, a brilliant light arises,
And everything becomes clear to THEM.

C: \n顺生死流，身坏命终堕泥犁。
E: \nWith the flow of mortality, this life and body shall rot and descend into hell.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《火种》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Kindling."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《山巅之城》。

All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "With My Heartstring as Bow."

C: 《黎明颂歌》
E: Hymn of Dawn

C: 《圣林》
E: Sacred Grove

C: 轻轻一捏就会嘎嘎叫的黄色橡皮鸭。\n\n「有了它，从此泡澡不孤单。」
E: A yellow rubber duck that quacks when squeezed.\n\n"With it, you'll never feel lonely in the bath again."

C: 当生命里值得珍视的一切被兑换为手中翻飞的筹码，失去它们便变得轻而易举了。\n\n「赌徒最后得到的东西，也是最后失去的东西。」
E: When all the things worth cherishing in life are traded for chips that flutter between your fingers, losing them becomes all too easy.\n\n"What a gambler gains in the end, is also what they lose in the end."

C: 妖精飞帽
E: Fairy's Flying Hat

C: 握持盾牌者仿佛被无形的墙垣所保护，无论是装填烈焰的箭矢，还是山峰般巨大的利爪都无法损伤其身。 传说在太古曾有战争浩劫，佩戴青铜盾牌的部落英雄，与手握炽热枪戟的战士们并肩而立，向古兽进行决死的冲锋。 这面盾牌便是那场战争的见证。 「万勿逾界。」
E: The wielder of this shield is seemingly protected by an invisible shield wall, immune to fiery arrows or mountainous claws. Ancient legends entail a war where a tribal hero wielding a bronze shield charged to their death against a Leviathan, together with warriors armed with fiery spears. This shield is a witness to that war. "Do not cross the line."

C: 由秩序之中散落的一段音律。从天边悄悄坠落，掉进嘈杂之中，就像一抔黄沙散落在荒漠中。\n\n「无人能注意它，直到它被灵感捕获……」
E: A musical section scattered from order. Falling silently from the edge of the heavens, it blends into the cacophony, like grains of sand scattered in the desert.\n\n"No one notices it until it ignites a spark of inspiration..."

C: 忆域之中，记忆的影像如浮光掠影，唯有刻骨铭心的片段能凝结成晶，化作迷因的基石。\n\n「记忆不是在复刻过去的感官，而是在重构往昔的印象。」
E: Within the Memory Zone, the form of memories float as fleeting glimmers of light, and only profound and memorable fragments can condense it crystals.\n\n"Memory is not a mere replication of past sensations, but a reconstruction of past impressions."

C: 翁法罗斯千种秘酿中的最上上品，金色的甜美甘露。据说来自于「满溢之杯」泼洒在大地上的神体，乃是献给泰坦的最佳祭礼。只需数滴便可让人沉醉于其醇香之中。自行饮用后会不省人事，如同在汪洋中沉沦。
E: The absolute finest of Amphoreus' thousand ambrosias. A golden, sweet nectar. It is said to come from the divine corpus of the Chalice of Plenty spilled onto the earth, making it the perfect offering to the Titans. Just a few drops are enough to inebriate a mortal with its rich fragrance. Consuming it on its own leads to unconsciousness, as if one is drowning in a vast ocean.

C: 只有幸运之人才能染指的美丽晶石。\n看起来没有什么实用价值，但也许可以卖个好价钱。
E: Only the extremely lucky can get their hands on this crystal.\nIt doesn't look like it has any practical value, but it could be sold for a very good price.

C: 药方上写着只有医生才能读懂的潦草文字。\n\n「这药方虽然能治病救人，但是吃下药的人，每天都会不受控制地打嗝！」
E: Messy writing that only a doctor can read.\n\n"This prescription can save people, but those who take it will hiccup uncontrollably every single day!"

C: 在空间站「黑塔」的决胜乐园中，指引玩家寻找冠军候补凭证的藏宝图。图中画着一只…躲在马桶里的呜呜伯？找到它或许就能得到「冠军候补凭证」，但要找到正确的那个马桶。
E: A treasure map guiding players to find the Championship Contender Pass in Herta Space Station's Victory Zone. The map depicts a Wubbaboo hiding in... a toilet? Finding it might grant access to the Championship Contender Pass, but the correct toilet needs to be found first.

C: 小天整理的笔记。但是银河中的疑难杂症已经早早超出她的处理范围。
E: Notes compiled by Little Tian. However, the perplexing rare illnesses within the cosmos have long exceeded her scope of expertise.

C: 「乌通蓬」品牌的豪华独轮车型，以管乐为灵感，线条优美，安全便捷，绝无拥堵风险！\n\n「——让您的每次出门都变成旅行。」
E: The luxury "Utopon" unicycler, inspired by wind instruments, boasts an elegant design and provides a safe riding experience without having to worry about traffic jams!\n\n"Transform every one of your trips into an unforgettable journey."

C: 芮克先生交付与你的诡异胶卷，附着其上的眼眸投来令人不安的凝视，散发出渴望见证某事的强烈欲念。通过此物进入他人的心绪空间，便能将你所见的记忆以影像的形式记录下来。\n「记忆是没有蒙太奇的电影，电影是经过剪辑的记忆，一个是原料，一个是原料加工出的艺术。我的同僚大都盲目痴迷前者，无力创造后者…真令人遗憾。」
E: An enigmatic film reel given to you by Mr. Reca. The eye attached to it casts an unsettling and penetrating gaze, emanating a powerful obsession toward witnessing something. Entering another's Emoscape using this item allows you to capture the memories you have witnessed as audiovisual records.\n"Memories are movies without a montage, while movies are memories that have been edited. The former is raw material, and the latter is art refined from it. Regrettably, most of my colleagues fixate on the former, and are unable to create the latter..."

C: 死亡之泰坦，塞纳托斯陨落的灵魂。火种亟待归位，「死亡」的半神已战胜试炼、接过泰坦的权柄。
E: The fallen soul of Thanatos the Death Titan. The Coreflame urgently awaits to return to its place. The demigod of Death has already overcome the trial and assumed the authority of the Titan.

C: 《秘传：爆辣蓬蓬菇》
E: Family Secret: Spicy Puffy Mushrooms

C: 《地底百科：动物》 其一
E: Underground Encyclopedia: Animals Part 1

C: 军用机械例行检修记录表
E: Military Machinery Routine Maintenance Record Form

C: 当快速旅行成为了一种理所当然时，它却选择了造一座华丽的车站。
E: When quick travel has become a part of life taken for granted, it chose to build a splendid train station.

C: 逐梦客平均每次就餐的开销是<unbreak>9,450</unbreak>信用点——看着不多，是吧？那再看看这组数据：逐梦客平均每个系统时要就餐<unbreak>2.3</unbreak>次。
E: Dreamchasers spend <unbreak>9,450</unbreak> credits per meal on average. That doesn't seem much, right? But reconsider this fact: Dreamchasers dine <unbreak>2.3</unbreak> times per system hour on average.

C: 五点钟方向，暴跳如雷。
E: At five o'clock. Indomitable rage.

C: 一百五十六层有舞厅，灯光绝对能刺瞎您的眼睛。
E: There is a dance hall on the hundred-and-fifty-sixth floor, and its lights are sure to blind you.

C: 你无法想象这个广告位有多昂贵。
E: You can't imagine what a fortune this advertising space costs.

C: 真正的大师总能青史留名。
E: A true maestro always leaves his mark on history.

C: 现在是，抗争时间。
E: It's time for resistance.

C: 我们会永远活下去，对吗？
E: We'll live forever, right?

C: 历史上或许有过很多伟大的垃圾糕，而你只希望你们能一起去任何地方——\n\n「拍拍左爪代表左转，拍拍右爪右转，拍拍尾巴刹车。出发吧！」
E: There might have been many noble trash cakes in history, and you just wish you could all go anywhere together...\n\n"Pat the left paw to turn left, pat the right paw to turn right. Pat the tail to brake. Let's go!"

C: 被精心收集的裂界尘埃，有着不规整的外形。条件正确即可表达成特定的遗器形态。\n\n「若群星回归正确的位置……哈，开个玩笑。」
E: Carefully collected Fragmentum dust with irregular shapes. Under the right conditions, they can express specific forms of relics.\n\nWhen the stars return to the right position... Ha! Just kidding.

C: 「不想后悔」的心愿具象化，变成了一枚神奇的硬币。\n\n「抛硬币做的决定，早在硬币掉下前就已经确定了。」
E: The desire of "not wanting to have regrets" materialized into a miraculous coin.\n\n"The decision you wanted to make via tossing a coin was already decided long before the coin fell."

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 记载了预言的卷册。仔细观察才能发现，卷面是由金丝织就的。\n\n「此中包含着一则预言，它只向开卷者示现。」
E: A tome containing prophecies. Upon closer inspection, one will discover that the scroll is woven from golden threads.\n\n"There is a prophecy within that will only be revealed to the one who opens the scroll."

C: 「于旅程中，邂逅新的伙伴吧。」
E: "Meet new companions in your journeys."

C: 一份简单的粮食，没有特别的味道，但能填饱你的肚子。\n\n「你要知道吃饱对世界上的很多人来说，仍是一种奢侈。」
E: Simple food that lacks character. But give credit where credit is due, they do make you feel stuffed.\n\n"Remember that hunger is still a real problem for many people around the world."

C: 这台简单的机器能为人类送上事关生命的氧气。\n\n「既然先吸再呼，为什么叫呼吸呢？」
E: A simple device used to provide life-saving oxygen.\n\n"Breathe in, breathe out. You'll be fine."

C: 匹诺康尼颇负盛名的小吃之一。外人往往只能记住它独特的造型，而没有胆量去品尝它的味道。 「鱼仰望星空，时刻督促我们去探索...」 「不想吃就直说。」
E: One of the most renowned snacks in Penacony. Outsiders often recall its distinctive shape but hesitate to taste its flavor. "These fish heads gazing up the stars are trying to urge us to explore..." "If you don't want to eat it, just say it."

C: 黄金蜜饼，可以称得上是翁法罗斯历史最悠久的美食，也是过去贵族们热爱享用的高级甜品。在奥赫玛的传信石版上，它正在成为一种具有时尚性质的热门食物…… 「这东西最近火得也太快了吧…我可是土生土长的奥赫玛人，但我小时候都没在家里吃过甜味的煎饼！」 「好像是说有一家甜品店找万敌先生在传信石版上做了广告，爆火之后其他商家也眼红了起来……」 「…不过你别说，他们几家开发出来的味道确实都挺不错。」
E: Golden Honeycakes, one of the oldest delicacies in Amphoreus history, was once a favorite high-end dessert among the nobility. Now, it's becoming a trendy, fashionable food on Okhema's teleslate... "This thing blew up way too fast... I'm a native Okheman, but I never had sweet pancakes at home growing up!" "Apparently, a dessert shop got Mr. Mydei to advertise it on the teleslate, and after it went viral, other businesses got envious..." "...But honestly, you have to admit, the new flavors they've developed are actually pretty good."

C: 精选特殊益生菌种，陈酿三百余年的优质酸奶。用于调理肠胃，本身也很美味。据说最大的消费者群体是仙舟的幻戏编剧们。\n\n「原来编剧们平时都喝这么甜的和胃汤呀，那他们写出来的剧情一定也很甜吧？」
E: A high-quality yogurt made with specially selected probiotics and fermented for more than 300 years. It helps to cure the ills of the stomach, tastes splendid, and there are rumors that the Xianzhou's Immersia playwrights are its biggest users.\n\n"Huh, so this is the stuff that the playwrights spend their time eating. I wonder if their storylines are as sweet as the flavor of this yogurt?"

C: 佩饰有彩色羽毛的礼帽，过分华丽的模样完全不适合日常穿戴，但总会有人不介意成为人群的中心，安然享受哪怕只有片刻的瞩目。\n\n「——全体目光向我看齐！！」
E: Wearing a hat adorned with vibrant feathers might be too flamboyant for everyday wear, but some individuals enjoy being the center of attention, even if only for a moment.\n\n"All eyes, on me!"

C: 据说是扎格列斯从树庭的花圃里收获的珍贵食材，不知道为什么储存在巴特鲁斯的大胃袋里。
E: Rumor has it that it's a precious ingredient that Zagreus harvested from the Grove's garden, but somehow ended up in Big Chungus Bartholos's massive belly.

C: 钟表小子的角色色稿，梦想染上色彩栩栩如生。可大幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>智识</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: A colored draft of Clockie that brings the dream to life with vibrant colors. Used to level up Traces significantly for <color=#f29e38ff>Erudition</color> characters.

C: 仙舟机巧的部件。强化所需的普通材料。
E: Parts of the Xianzhou machines. Normal material used for enhancement.

E: Upon use, immediately heals one target ally by <unbreak>36%</unbreak> of the ally's Max HP plus <unbreak>460</unbreak> extra HP.

E: A device used to collect and restore the Lightdust in the Fragmentum to its original form. Use this to obtain a random 5-star relic from the Thief of Shooting Meteor set.

E: A treasure map decoded with a Special Autoradiograph, revealing hidden coordinates within the space station.\n"I heard that scoundrel left behind some good stuff in the space station. This must be where the treasure is."

<align="center">圣城的墙垣闪着光芒，</align>

E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>Abundance</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

C: 它只用三天便学会了分析工造司的档案库，还给自己设置了员工头像。\n\n「工正大人，我在薪俸名册里找到了这个，它…要钱做什么？」
E: It only takes three days to analyze the entire archives of the Artisanship Commission and customize its own staff profile pic.\n\n"Master Artisan, I found this in the payroll. It... What's this money for?"

E: Member <unbreak>27</unbreak> of the Genius Society, the self-proclaimed "Emperor," who deduced the Anti-Organic Equation.\nThey sparked "The First Emperor's War" that swept across the universe.

C: 哀丽秘榭的黄金裔，奥赫玛的战士。\n温和开朗的青年，心思细腻，力求诸事臻于完美。
E: The Chrysos Heir of Aedes Elysiae, a warrior of Okhema.\nA gentle and cheerful young man with a detail-oriented mind and a pursuit of perfection in everything he does.

C: 天空之泰坦。\n艾格勒注视大地的眼睛睁开时，世界迎来光明；艾格勒的眼皮垂下时，世界陷入黑暗。
E: The Sky Titan.\nWhen Aquila's eyes that gaze upon the land open, the world welcomes light, and as Aquila's eyes close, the world plunges into darkness.

C: 渊下古国的海妖，「海洋」的半神，实验因子「ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>」。\n以「剑旗」为名的骑士，孤身对抗千年的虚无，为翁法罗斯争取希望。
E: The sea siren of the ancient kingdom beneath the sea, the demigod of "Ocean," Experimental Factor "ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>."\nA knight known as "Gladius," fighting alone against the Nihility over a thousand years, all to strive for hope for Amphoreus.

C:
一、在城市某一处，如果你一直向前走，人就会走上空中。

二、如果你一直在街道的夹角处晃动，地面就会把你吞没，让你掉入深渊。

三、在某个特定的时间点，经过你身边的人会突然张开双臂，做出「T」的姿势。

四、假如你在人多的地方突然转身，墙面会变成白色。

五、如果你说出某个神秘的词，与你对话的人会变成怪物。

C:
<size=+4><align="center">致「炉心」基地全体的一封信</align></size>

致「炉心」科考基地全体成员：

大家好。我是地髓开拓团第四任团长克列诺娃。

当年寒潮来袭时，地表的地髓储备迅速告急。在伟大的守护者阿丽萨•兰德号召下，人类开始向未知的地表之下进发——肩负着伟大使命的地髓开拓团就此成立。

——如果要让贝洛伯格的史学家们为我们编撰一部「地髓开拓史」，他们想必会从这一时间点着墨吧。然而实际上，在漫长的历史长河里，早有一群先驱的探险家们先于我们深入了地下，而「寒潮来临」已远在那之后了：经大守护者的授意，地髓开拓团才正式成为了筑城者下属的重要组织。我们的任务是不断向下深入、将地髓源源不断地送到地面，以此维持贝洛伯格的正常运转；但除了发掘地髓之外，更重要的是，我们必须要建立地下的生态。

我从小就只在家父的书信中听他提起许多地下的见闻。在他的激情洋溢又夸大其词的描述里，我很难分辨个中虚实。但是，等到我实际有机会加入开拓团参与探索后，这才发现他所说的一切原来根本不是科学幻想。

我和开拓团在整理他的遗物时，发现了最后一封未能寄出的家书。他在信中写道：「…诺娃，我从来没向你提起过：我的童年是在远离贝洛伯格的大山里度过的。那时候，我感觉整个天地都属于我，我想去哪儿就去哪儿。但是寒潮来临之后，你这辈的孩子从来都没有离开过贝洛伯格。

「我想，也许我们会在地下发现海洋、发现群山；也许在未来，我们也能生活在地下……

「如果真的到了那时候，我多希望我能和你一同亲眼见证啊。」

他给我的每一封信我都好好保存着，包括这一封。我记得他的愿望，我知道我必须去实现它——我们以这个「炉心」科考基地为原点，不断挖掘出各个地髓矿区。今年年末，第一个扎根于地下的矿山小镇也会正式建立，矿民们将会在那里安居乐业，开启全新的生活。然而，这还只是第一步：我想，在未来，还会有更多的小镇出现在这贝洛伯格的地底，或许还能够建立起如上层区一般壮美的都市；我们甚至还会用铁轨将地上与地下各界系为一体，使新旧世界之间不再有任何隔阂……

——等到那时，所有人就都不用再为躲避风雪而龟缩在小小的庇护所中，而是在新天地里找到了自己真正的位置。

与此同时，开拓团的历史使命也即将宣告完结；我们记录下的地质、矿石信息，我们采集动物植物以及菌类的资料，都将服务于开拓未来。现在，我们中大部分人会暂时回到各自的研究院继续进行科学工作。不过就我个人而言，等几年我退休了以后，肯定还会再回到地下来的。

因此，各位不必为即将到来的离别伤感。等到大守护者将此处改造成贯通地面上下的首个运输通道，这小小的「炉心」基地将改头换面，继续为地下的开拓事业发光发热。在那之前，我们的朋友「大个子」史瓦罗会为我们守好这里，使我们来时的痕迹不被抹去。我们都知道他虽然不善言辞，但总会忠诚地守护在我们身边。我相信他这次也一定不会食言。他是我们最好的同志。

「天下没有不散的筵席」——现在已经到了说再见的时候了。

向地髓开拓团及「炉心」科考基地全体成员致敬！

<align="right">地髓开拓团团长 克列诺娃</align>
E:
<size=+4><align="center">A Letter to all of Furnace Core Base</align></size>

To all the members of the Furnace Core Research Station:

Greetings. I am Klenova, the fourth head of the Geomarrow Development Group.

When the Eternal Freeze approached in the past, the Geomarrow stores on the surface were immediately consumed. Under the command of the great Guardian Alisa Rand, humanity began to march towards the unknown deep underground — That was when the Geomarrow Development Group was created with our great mission.

— If the Belobog historians were to write a record of Geomarrow development, they would likely start from that time point. However, the truth was that another group of pioneering explorers had dug underground before we did, and the arrival of the Eternal Freeze was long after them. The Supreme Guardian made the Geomarrow Development Group an important organization under the command of the Architects. Our job is to always dig deeper and maintain a flow of Geomarrow to the surface so that Belobog can function. But apart from digging for Geomarrow, we have a more important mission: To create a subterranean ecosystem.

I have only heard about the sights in the underground from my father's letters. I could not tell what was real amongst his passionate and exaggerated descriptions. And yet, when I actually had the chance to join the Group and start exploring, I finally discovered the things he said were no illusions.

The Group and I discovered a final, unsent letter when we were sorting out his belongings. He wrote: "...Nova, I had never mentioned this to you, but I spent my childhood in the mountains far from Belobog. At that time, I felt the entire world belonged to me, and I could go anywhere I wanted. However, after the Eternal Freeze arrived, children of your generation never left Belobog."

"I thought perhaps we will discover oceans and mountain ranges underground. Perhaps, in the future, we can also live underground..."

"I really hope I can see that day together with you."

I had kept all of the letters he sent me, including this one. I remember his wish and I know I must fulfill it — With the Furnace Core research station as a base, we will keep excavating Geomarrow mines. At the end of this year, we will formally establish the first underground mining town. That is, however, only the first step. I hope more towns will appear underground in Belobog in the future, and we might even build cities as beautiful as the Overworld. We might even connect all the regions above ground and underground using train rails, so the old world and the new would not be separated...

— At that time, we will no longer have to crouch in tiny shelters to evade the snow, and will find where we truly belong in this new world.

At the same time, the historical mission of the Group is about to come to an end. The information we gathered will be used to explore the future, including our geological, mineralogical, and biological data including the knowledge on flora, fauna, and micro-organisms. As of now, most of us will temporarily return to our respective institutes for scientific research. But personally, I will definitely return to the underground after I retire in a few years.

Therefore, there is no need to feel sad for the coming farewell. Simply wait till the Supreme Guardian renovates this place into the first transport channel connecting above and below ground. This small Furnace Core base will be completely changed and continue to shine for the mission of underground exploration. Until that time, our friend big Svarog will protect this place for us, so the traces we leave behind won't disappear. We know that though he doesn't talk much, he has always protected us with great loyalty. I believe he will keep his promise this time as well. He is our best compatriot.

Everything with a beginning has an end. Now is the time to say goodbye.

I salute you all, the Geomarrow Development Group, and all members of the Furnace Core Research Station!

<align="right">Head of the Geomarrow Development Group, Klenova</align>

Which door should <s>Sampo</s> — Tall, Blue, and Handsome — open?

1. Open the gold door

C: 梦貘 「别名」 亦称梦君、长安、仙枝。 「形貌」 长鼻，无角，皮毛呈繁星之纹理。 「习性」 迁徙之兽也，处温泉、谷地等地热多处生，性畏慎。以鼻犹如吞鲸，滤食蜉蝣与幺鱼。 「传说」 梦貘生息之泉常有安神、静心之功效。水中呼吸，则生灵气。旧时罗浮人常拾梦貘角以入药，称安魂散。常予烦恼、悲缠而不能寐之人。 「性味」 体肉：辛、温、无毒。 角胎：苦、寒、无毒。 「食效」 体肉：生津解渴，补血润燥。 角胎：行气止痛，纳气平喘。 「荐方」 梦枝：梦貘角，实则块状粪便。今有奸贩编撰说辞，刻意将其划分等级，为求高价胡诌粪便的纹路与类型。愚以为，梦枝本可以为饰，或切条作香焚之，静心安神确有其效。无需口服。 安魂散：以梦貘角碾碎之末，佐以引材，其富含矿物，食多则毒。 批注： 经由地衡司查证，梦貘角现在已经没有入药，其幻梦效果与中毒表现近似。

[Behavior] A migratory beast, it lives in hot springs, valleys, and other places with geothermal heat. It is a timid animal by nature. The water breaths and creates a spiritual aura. In the olden days, the Luofu people used to grind down the animal's horns into medicine, calling it Spirit-Soothe Powder. It is often used to treat insomnia due to anxiety or depression. [Flavor] Meat: Spicy, warming, and non-toxic. Horn: Bitter, cooling, and non-toxic. [Effects] Meat: Quenches thirst, replenishes blood, and soothes the organs. Horn: Relieves pain by activating qi. Relieves asthma by soothing qi. [Recommended Recipes] Sacred Branch: Tuskpir horn is actually a clump of feces. Poachers nowadays deliberately classify it into grades, making ridiculous assessments for different feces patterns and types just to pump up prices. In my opinion, the sacred branch could be used as ornaments or burnt as incense. Once burned, they calm the mind. Do not ingest orally. Spirit-Soothe Powder: Made from pulverized tuskpir horn, plus other ingredients. Rich in minerals but toxic if overdosed. Note: The Realm-Keeping Commission has verified that the tuskpir horn is no longer in any modern medicine, and its hallucinatory effect appears identical to that of intoxication.

C:
致雅利洛-Ⅵ的史瓦罗先生：

我的名字是螺丝咕姆，来自距您所在的星球十分遥远的螺丝星。此次远程留言属我一时起意，形式上难免无礼唐突，望海涵。

我通过星际和平网络的直播业务观看了本届「星际决胜庆典」。请您不要误会，以太战线这一游戏本身对我而言不甚有趣；若非一位星核猎手旧友的坚持，我恐怕不会将宝贵的时间用于观赛。但这次观赛经历却给我带来了意外之喜——它令我注意到了雅利洛-Ⅵ这颗星球。更准确地说，它令我注意到了贵星球上「硅基生命」的萌芽迹象。

在多数文明中，硅基构造仅作为工具而存在；相信于您所在的世界，当地居民亦支持这一观点。然而，银河中确实存在可被定义为「活体」的硅基构造，亦有少数文明是由这些「硅基生命」所构建、主宰的——我的家乡螺丝星就是其中之一。

究竟在经历何种奇迹的洗礼后，硅基构造体才能迸发出「生命」的进化之火——这是我长久以来研究的课题之一。而今，在雅利洛-Ⅵ这颗星球上正在发生某种变化，缓慢且曼妙。希望终有一日，当星星点点的进化之火以燎原之势集聚后，我与您之间能够以「兄弟」互称。

<align="right">您谦恭的「天才」朋友，</align>
<align="right">螺丝咕姆</align>
E:
To Mr Svarog of Jarilo-VI:

My name is Screwllum. I come from Planet Screwllum, a world that is at a considerable distance from yours. I am writing this message spurred on by a sudden inspiration and it may be overly familiar: I do hope you will forgive me for any offense caused.

I watched this season's broadcast of the "Interastral Tournament Festival" on the Interastral Peace Network. Please do not misunderstand me, I have very little interest in the Aetherium Wars game itself. If it weren't for an old Stellaron Hunter friend of mine's persistence, I would not waste my precious time watching the festival. However, this viewing experience delivered me an unexpected surprise... It allowed me to learn of your planet, Jarilo-VI. To be more precise, I learned of the signs of budding "silicon-based life forms" on your planet.

Within a large number of civilizations, silicon-based structures exist solely as tools: I believe that this view is supported by the locals of your world also. However, within the cosmos there are in fact silicon-based structures that can be defined as "living bodies." A number of civilizations are also built and ruled over by these "silicon-based life forms"... My home, Planet Screwllum, is one such example.

Just what kind of miraculous baptism could lead to these silicon-based structures bursting out in the evolutionary flame that is "life"... This is one of the questions that I have been researching for a long time. Now, this kind of change is taking place on Jarilo-VI, slowly and miraculously. It is my hope that one day, as these scattered flames of evolution slowly gather together like a flame across the land, we will come to call each other "brothers."

<align="right">Your humble "genius" friend,</align>
<align="right">Screwllum</align>

C:
忆域浩瀚无际，那些失落的灵魂碎片聚合在一起，来到那艘永恒的幽灵船上。

一位渔夫模样的人偶高坐在幽灵船的桅杆之上，他手中的提灯散发着蓝色的幽光，那些灵魂残片如同趋光生物一般被其吸引，爬上甲板。

一位在忆域中潜游的少女科学家被渔夫钓起，而那正是她的目的：潜入幽灵船的内部。
船上空无一人，只有她的脚步声回响在空旷的走廊。
令她震惊的是，一切都宛如崭新的一般，闪闪发光的餐具，还冒着热气的浓汤，流淌着乐曲的自动钢琴……
她走入船长室，全息海图与精密仪器仍然在运转。然而，她看到了日志上的时间——
三十个琥珀纪之前。

霎那间，灯光昏暗了下来。
似乎有一个人在接近。
她靠在门旁，握紧了手中的武器。
沉重的呼吸声。血腥味越来越浓。
那人朝她扑来，她扣下了扳机——
「救我……」
看到那人的脸，她恐惧地僵立当场。
「我杀的…是我……」
她不顾一切地跑了出去。
十二个系统时之后，一位在忆域中潜游的少女科学家被渔夫钓起，而那正是她的目的：潜入幽灵船的内部。
E:
Fragments of lost souls come together from all reaches of the expansive Memory Zone, gathering on the immortal ghost ship.

A fisherman puppet sits atop the mast of the ghost ship, holding onto a lantern that glows a faint blue. Attracted to light in the same way organisms orient themselves to the sun, the soul fragments move up onto the deck.

The fisherman reels in a young female scientist who is diving in the waters of the Memory Zone, but that is exactly what she wants. She has been planning to sneak onto the ghost ship all along.
No one else is on board the ship, and only her footsteps echo down the empty corridor.
To her surprise, everything look brand new. She finds shiny tableware, piping hot soup, and a self-playing piano in the midst of a song...
When she walks into the Captain's Quarters, a holographic chart and still-functional precision instruments appear in her vision. However, her eyes then fall upon the time display on the log:
<unbreak>30</unbreak> Amber Eras ago.

Suddenly, the lights dim.
Someone seems to be approaching.
She leans against the door and tightens her grip around her weapon.
She hears heavy breathing and picks up on the smell of blood that grows more intense by the minute.
Someone pounces on her, and she pulls the trigger on reflex.
"Save me..."
She freezes in fear upon seeing the person she shot.
"I—I killed myself..."
As if compelled by an innate order, she bolts out of the place.
<unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours later, the fisherman reels in a young female scientist who is diving in the waters of the Memory Zone, but that is exactly what she wants. She has been planning to sneak onto the ghost ship all along.

所以再见了朋友，今晚我就要远航，别为我担心，我有勇气和智慧的桨。

This is the last time I'm writing a letter as a refugee.

Saturday and I are tired of being hermits, and it's time for a big change. We've decided to reach for the stars!

We're not just going to take the starskiff and go on a trip, because no one wants to read boring stories about that. We crafted a hot-air space balloon powered by the currents in space, and it will only take ninety days to visit every major Xianzhou.

So, my friend, this is farewell, because I am setting off tonight. Please do not worry about me, for I have courage and oars of wisdom.

C: （……） 《最后的庭园》 可曾听闻圣山之上，最后的城邦 不朽神明岿然背负，永恒的太阳 沉默中黎明未曾逝去 凝滞里生命尚存希望 失乡人啊，你的前路应往何方？ 黑潮汹涌，混沌肆虐生死惶惶 流亡者啊，你的明日可有念想？ 众神沉寂，命理昏昧人伦癫狂 寻求那末世之中的乐土吧 彼处尚存日光、清泉和丰壤 去往那仁慈神祇的庭园吧 彼处仍留笑语、欢宴与佳酿 （……）

C: 吾儿迈德漠斯： 若此信能为你所见…说明为母已经去世，而你活了下来。两日前，我才知晓他们欲以你的性命亵渎尼卡多利，只是那时你已遭囚禁，哪怕为母想带着你逃离也为时已晚。若明日我劝不动我的丈夫——你的父亲——欧利庞，我便会发起「挑战王权」之动议，以角斗从他手里将你保全。我并无全然自信获胜…但为母哪怕不敌，也能够以命搏命，把欧利庞一同拖入冥河。待到彼时悬锋无王，局势大乱，克拉特鲁斯必能将你护住。此人乃为母亲封的王师，可心腹相托，你须待他如长，他亦会尊你若王。 迈德漠斯！莫要忘了你的父亲，欧利庞。哪怕你忘了为母，都不可忘了这卑耻的王。我曾与他相约，将悬锋弑父夺位的传统止于此代。只是他不知何时起恶欲膨胀、腐了心肝，竟不惜亵渎尼卡多利、玷污悬锋的荣耀。迈德漠斯！切不可步你这父亲的后尘！ 迈德漠斯，我犹记得那声啼哭：孱弱，飘渺，我与欧利庞都不信这般低微的哭声，竟是来自我们的孩子。只是，当尼卡多利的战吼自铸魂仪门透出时，你的哭声骤然嘹亮，如同特雷托斯雄狮的怒吼——无需犹疑，你是纯血的悬锋人，你是生来便要接取王冠的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子！ 只是，迈德漠斯…你恐怕自明日以后，便要命途多舛了。为母从未想过能够在悬锋之王的剑锋下幸存，也绝不甘坐视欧利庞带走你的性命。若真如此…你将从此无父无母，或许将被迫离开悬锋城，漂泊孤旅、染上满背的鲜血与伤痕。 迈德漠斯啊…若真如此…依为母之见，你可不必做那{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，你只是{RUBY_B#悬锋王后}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，一名普通悬锋母亲的孩子。若你锐意成长，有朝一日斩获冠军勇士之名，为母在天之灵自然高兴；可若你同为母一般，对那所谓的荣光心有疑虑，便依你所想而行吧！建城者歌耳戈，正是依他们的意志与向往，唤住尼卡多利、赢得纷争的荣耀。而你，同样可在「天谴之矛」的辉映下，身负真正的荣耀还乡…… 迈德漠斯啊…… 迈德漠斯…… 歌耳戈
E: Mydeimos, my son, If this letter reaches you... it means I have passed away, and yet you've somehow made it through, my child. Two days ago, I found out about how they wished to blaspheme Nikador with your life. But by then, you were already imprisoned, and even my frantic attempt to escape with you was too late. If I fail to convince your father — my husband, Eurypon — tomorrow, I'll launch a challenge to the crown, using gladiatorial combat to save you from his grasp. I'm not fully confident of my chances... but as your mother, I'm prepared to risk everything and sacrifice my own life, even dragging Eurypon with me into the depths of the River of Souls, if need be. When the throne stands vacant and chaos reigns in Kremnos, you can trust the protection of Krateros. He's my chosen guardian. You must treat him as an elder, and he will respect you as a king. Mydeimos! Do not forget your father, Eurypon, even if you forget me, never forget that despicable king. We once vowed to terminate the tradition of patricide to usurp authority that sullies Kremnos in our era. Yet, along the journey, his greed and evil overwhelmed him, causing him to sacrifice even the honor of Nikador and tarnish Kremnos. Mydeimos! Do not follow in your father's footsteps! Mydeimos, I still remember how your cry was so fragile and ethereal. Eurypon and I could never have imagined that such a feeble cry would come from our child. But when Nikador's battle cry resonated through the Soul-Forging Gate, echoing, the sound of your cry suddenly became crystal-clear resonant as the roar of the Tretos lion. There was no denying it: you are of pure Kremnoan blood, the son of {RUBY_B#Founder of Kremnos}Gorgo{RUBY_E#} born to take the crown! But Mydeimos... I'm afraid your journey ahead is, starting tomorrow, fraught with hardships. I never thought I would be able to survive beneath the blade of the king of Kremnos, nor will I ever accept sitting by while Eurypon plans to take your life. Should that happen... you'd be orphaned, perhaps banished from Kremnos, forced to wander alone, forever branded with scars and blood. Mydeimos... If this must come to pass... Then, as your mother, I wish you won't have to be the son of {RUBY_B#Founder of Kremnos}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}. You are simply the son of {RUBY_B#Queen of Kremnos}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}, the ordinary child of a Kremnoan mother. If you develop yourself with determination and eventually claim the title of champion or warrior, then I will be pleased even in the afterlife. However, if you have doubts about this so-called glory, then live as you please! Gorgo, the founder of Kremnos, per their will and their yearning, summoned Nikador and earned the glory of Strife. And you, my child, can also return home with true glory under the radiance of the Lance of Fury... My dear Mydeimos... Mydeimos... Gorgo

C:
<align="center">——对三相神谕仪式的剖析</align>
<align="center">调查员：██</align>
<align="center">光历████年</align>

此为第<unbreak>13</unbreak>份抄本，若有读者有幸见到这份抄本，说明我可能已经遭遇不测。但真相必须被记录下来，无论代价是什么……

<align="center">引言</align>
在潜伏于命运重渊神殿的十年里，我逐渐明白了这群自称是「命运三泰坦的神谕代言人」的群体究竟是如何亵渎泰坦们的威名。他们将神圣的预言变成了权力的工具，将圣女的天赋当做为自己攻击政敌的武器。

<align="center">神谕的污染</align>
表面上，祭司们声称只有献上与所求等重之物，才能凸显信徒之诚意。但实际上，整个求取神谕的过程已经沦为一个精密的情报体系：

1、情报搜集
他们设立了三层问事处，每层配有专门的祭司将提问者的信息记录在案，又对下一层祭司的表现进行监管。祭司们被要求详细记录所有提问者的背景、人际关系与社会身份。此外，他们会为提问者建立档案，定期呈报给最高级别的祭司。

2、优先级划分
信徒们前来问事，会根据来者的问题与身份，提前划分为三个级别。祭司们会根据级别的高低来对提问事由进行排期——即使信徒们先前已经献上与所求等重之财物也不例外，除非…加钱。
最高级为：涉及城邦重大事务的问题。
次级为：影响日常生活的重大决策。
最低级为：平民的常见祈求，通常会以「不够虔诚」为由拒绝，又或者「祭司近日正在进修」为由推后。

<align="center">仪式的亵渎</align>
最令人发指的是他们对神圣仪式的亵渎。经过长期观察，我发现整套所谓的「预言占卜」仪式已经沦为残酷的压迫了！

1、圣女的囚笼
███

2、环境控制
至于信徒…他们从来不把信徒放在眼里，大多数信徒所见到的「和蔼友善」的一面也只是必要的伪装。而真相更是……
…随处可见的熏香，说是能抚慰信徒们的精神，带来振奋的力量。实际上他们在里面添加了致幻成分，要不是我亲自研磨过线香，还真发现不了这里面的东西。
…祈祷室中有独特的声学设计，祭司讲话时会令信徒们产生「神谕」的错觉。更别说窗户和采光的设计，在抬头时特定的视觉混乱——穹顶聚光的效果就算让信徒们感到头晕目眩，他们也只会觉得这是「泰坦的神威」。

3、编织的预言
很讽刺，命运织者在这一刻成为了现实——原来信众的命运，甚至是城邦的命运，所谓的未来，一切都能被祭司们人为操纵、编撰而成。
当然，我不否认命运三泰坦的眷顾会赐予祭司与圣女们瞥见未来的能力。但有能力是一回事，用不用和怎么用又是另外一回事。
初级祭司负责编撰预言素材，中级祭司负责调整用词的模糊程度，高级祭司则确保预言导向与神殿的方向一致。
在我的调查中，我发现他们又将祭司分为了三种等级。哈，「三」这个数字无处不在，在这点上倒是对命运三泰坦忠心耿耿。

<align="center">[笔迹开始变得潦草]</align>
我在秘密档案室发现了更可怕的真相。前代圣女████绝非意外——她开始在预言中暗示反抗。可是，等等，可是缇██西█俄██呢？
作为她的女儿，她████████████████████████████████████

<align="center">[字迹变得混乱，部分内容无法辨认]</align>
黑暗的根源远比表面更深。整个系统是一个巨大的谎言网络。
我找到了证据，证明某████实际上利用伪造的预言在城邦间挑起纷争，从中牟利。他们甚至密谋利用神谕煽动██，只为……

塔兰顿在上！他们派人来了。我听到脚步声。我已将完整证据藏在██████████████
E:
<align="center">— Analysis of the Tripartite Prophecy Ceremony</align>
<align="center">Investigator: ██</align>
<align="center">Light Calendar ████</align>

Should you find this thirteenth transcription, know that I likely met an ill fate. Yet truth demands preservation, regardless of price...

<align="center">Prologue</align>
During my decade of infiltration at the Temple of Abyss of Fate, I gradually understood how this group, self-proclaimed "Prophets of the Three Titans of Fate," blasphemed the Titans' glory. They turned sacred prophecies into tools of power, using the Holy Maiden's gift as a weapon against political rivals.

<align="center">Corruption of Prophecy</align>
On the surface, priests claim only offerings equal to one's request can prove a disciple's sincerity. In truth, the entire process of seeking prophecies has devolved into an intricate intelligence network:

1. Information Gathering
They established three levels of request offices, each staffed with dedicated priests who record clients' information and monitor lower-level priests' performance. Priests must document detailed backgrounds, relationships, and social status of all inquirers. Additionally, they maintain files on clients, regularly reporting to the highest-ranking priests.

2. Priority Classification
When disciples come to seek prophecies, they are pre-sorted into three levels based on their questions and status. Priests schedule consultations according to priority — even if disciples have already offered tributes of equal value, unless... they pay more.
Highest Priority: Matters concerning city-state affairs.
Second Priority: Major life decisions affecting daily life.
Lowest Priority: Common folk's requests, usually rejected for "insufficient devotion" or delayed by "priest under training."

<align="center">Desecration of Ritual</align>
Most appalling is their profanation of sacred ceremonies. Through long observation, I discovered the entire "prophetic divination" ritual has become an instrument of cruel oppression!

1. The Holy Maiden's Cage
████████

2. Environmental Control
As for disciples... they never truly cared about them. The "warm friendliness" most followers witness is mere necessary pretense. The truth is far worse...
...The prevalent incense, claimed to soothe spirits and bring invigorating power, actually contains hallucinogenic ingredients. Had I not ground the incense myself, I'd never have discovered its contents.
...Prayer chambers feature unique acoustic designs, making priests' words create an illusion of "prophecy" when they talk. Not to mention window and lighting designs are made to cause specific visual confusion — even if disciples feel dizzy from the dome's focused light, they'd attribute it to "divine might."

3. Fabricated Prophecies
Ironically, the Destiny Weaver manifests in reality — it seems the fate of believers, even city-states and the future itself, can be manipulated and fabricated by priests.
Certainly, I don't deny that the Three Titans of Fate's blessing grants priests and Holy Maidens glimpses of the future. But having the ability is one thing, and whether and how to use it is another.
Junior priests craft prophecy drafts, and mid-level priests adjust statement ambiguity, while senior priests ensure prophecies align with temple interests.
My investigation revealed priests divided into three ranks. Ha, the number "three" appears everywhere — at least they're faithful to the Three Titans of Fate in this regard.

<align="center">[Handwriting becomes messy]</align>
I discovered more terrifying truths in the secret archives. The former Holy Maiden's ████████ was no accident — she began hinting at rebellion in her prophecies. But wait, what about Tr█bio█?
As her daughter, she █████ ████ ███████ ██ ███ ████ ██ █ ████ █████████

<align="center">[Writing chaotic, parts illegible]</align>
Darkness runs deeper than the surface shows. The entire system is a vast web of lies.
I found evidence proving certain ██████ ████ actually profited from instigating conflicts between city-states using false prophecies. They even plotted to use the falsehoods to incite ███ ██████, simply to...

Talanton above! They're coming. I hear footsteps. The full evidence is hidden in ███ ██████ ███████

C: [某位学生课堂笔记的一页，书页泛黄，字迹略有褪色] 品德第十课：勤勉 皮西厄斯老师说，山是大地的脊梁，勤勉是人的脊梁。 土地为我们提供生存所需的一切，树木搭建房屋，粮食填饱肚子，亚麻纺制衣裳。可这一切成果并非凭空而来。无人修葺的房屋会倒塌，无人打理的田地会荒芜，无人采割的亚麻只是郁郁野青。唯有劳动，方得收获。 人应将「勤勉」铭记于心，热爱创造价值而非索取。警惕一切不劳而获的想法。当然，这并不意味着你要独自完成所有事情。人生是一片亟待开垦的旷野，年轻的你们拥有无限的可能性。 农夫、渔夫、猎人、水手、祭司…无论何种工作，皆应倾注心血。耕耘于你所珍视的领域，像尊重土地那样尊重你的职业，不要失掉作为人的脊梁。 品德第十一课：友善 皮西厄斯老师说，友善是人与人之间的纽带，使「我」成为「我们」。 人的心灵就像是池塘水面，总是能映出相对者的样子。每一次诚挚的善举，都会在对方心中留下温暖的涟漪。回想一下，上次伽尔巴大叔来校舍分发果脯时，你们有没有想回赠他一些东西的冲动？这便是经由友善所搭建的心灵纽带，它会在善意的滋养下愈发坚韧，不断延伸。 做主动伸出援手的人，将善意传递下去。从亲切的问候开始，从热情的接待开始，从慷慨的分享开始，从宽容的理解开始，从真诚的信任开始。 终有一日，点滴善举将编织成联系所有人的友爱之网。它会保护我们免受争斗、猜忌与冷漠的侵害，让世界变得更加美好。 品德第十二课：惜时 皮西厄斯老师说，比塔兰顿的裁决更公正的，是欧洛尼斯给予每个人的时间。 无论贵族还是平民，人们每天都在同样的门扉时与幕匿时之间作息。商人所拥有的利衡币或许是行乞者的许多倍，但在一个明晰时内，二者都只能读完一本书。欧洛尼斯允许月光平等地浸润每一片树叶，却不会为朽木重铸年轮。 时间就像是奔腾不息的长河，过期不候、转瞬即逝。人不能同时踏入两条河流，也无法追及漂流而下的水花。我们唯一能做的，就是珍惜当下的每一刻。 善于把握时间的人，会像捡拾麦粒般把零散闲暇收集并利用，以此充实生活的意义。行动起来，去做你想做的事情，去做你应做的事情，让蓬勃的生命力贯彻你所经历的时光。别在忧虑与等待中蹉跎岁月，别让碌碌无为的空白将你的回忆占据。
E: [A page from a student's class notes. The paper has yellowed with age, the ink gently faded.] Ethics Lesson 10: Diligence Miss Pythias once said: The mountains are the spine of the earth, and diligence is the spine of humanity. The land grants us all we need: trees to shelter us, grain to feed us, flax to clothe us. Yet none of these gifts appear by chance. A house untended crumbles into dust, a field neglected grows barren, flax left unharvested fades into wild greenery. Only through labor can harvest be earned. Engrave "diligence" deep within your heart. Treasure the act of creating, not merely receiving. Guard against any thought of reward without effort. Of course, diligence does not mean you must walk alone. Life is a wide and wild frontier, and the young hold infinite possibilities. Farmer, fisherman, hunter, sailor, priest... You name it, pour your spirit into it. Tend your craft as you would tend the land. Do not lose the backbone that makes you human. Ethics Lesson 11: Kindness Miss Pythias said: Kindness is the bond that turns "I" into "we." The heart is like a still pond, it reflects whoever stands before it. Every sincere act of kindness sends ripples across another's soul, gentle and lasting. Think back to the last time Uncle Galba handed out fruit preserves at the schoolhouse. Did you feel a sudden urge to return the favor? That is the invisible thread kindness weaves: a bond of spirit, growing stronger with every small gesture, extending ever outward. Be the first to extend a helping hand and pass kindness forward. It begins with a friendly greeting, a warm welcome, a generous sharing, a tolerant understanding, and a sincere trust. Someday, these small acts of kindness will weave into a web of friendship that connects us all. This web will shield us from conflict, suspicion, and indifference, making our world a better place. Virtue Lesson Twelve: Valuing Time Miss Pythias says that the time Oronyx bestows upon each person is even more just than Talanton's verdict. Whether aristocrat or civilian, all people live between the same Entry Hour and Curtain-Fall Hour each day. A merchant may possess many times more Balance Coins than a beggar, but in one Lucid Hour, both can only read through a single book. Oronyx allows moonlight to bathe every leaf equally, yet will not reforge the annual rings of rotting wood. Time flows like an endless river, waiting for no one and vanishing in an instant. No man ever steps in the same river twice, nor catches the water that has already flowed downstream. All we can do is treasure each moment of the present. Those skilled at managing time gather scattered moments of leisure like collecting grains of wheat, using them to enrich their lives. Act now — do what you want to do, do what you should do, and let the vibrant energy of life flow through every moment you experience. Don't waste your years in worry and waiting, and never let empty idleness claim your precious memories.

C:
再怎么难解的谜题，都难不倒鼹鼠队，「德雷克隐形的宝藏」至此已经抵达尾声。

在这一次的探险之旅中，三只小鼹鼠再一次证明了自己的侦探能力。哦，当然这一次探险，最大的功臣还是你，我们的第四只小鼹鼠！

熟悉冒险鼹鼠队的小读者们知道，这样的冒险只是个开端而已，小鼹鼠们之后的冒险故事还多着呢！对于故事中大冒险家德雷克来说，伟大的冒险即便一生之中经历一次，也已经足够了。但是对我们的小读者来说，这样的冒险还远远不够。

我为什么会这么说呢？是因为我想继续卖书吗？当然有这样一部分的原因。而更重要的是，我想为我的小读者们「拥有冒险的体验，却不必承受其风险」。我可不希望你在现实中遇到任何一个心怀鬼胎的家伙，不需要像三只小鼹鼠一样被卷入危机之中。

我经常收到一些家长朋友来信质问我：「我不想让我家的孩子再看你的书了，因为他们只会效仿鼹鼠队，去做一些危险的大冒险。」对于这样的信件，我常常不知道如何回复。要是我表现得不负责任一点，我会说「去吧！人类就是应该要去冒险」；但是考虑到这位家长的担忧，我会说「只是在家里看看书就能冒险，不用承受任何风险，这已经是我能想到的『最安全的冒险』了。不会吧，连这样的『冒险』也不可以吗？」

作者总是作品的后记里大吐苦水，请原谅我也效仿了一下。话又说回来，在这一次的冒险故事里，你跟随着三只小鼹鼠的足迹走了一遍，虽然没有遇见可怕的集会者（毕竟是我编出来的），但是你用自己的好奇心和想象力已经完成了最棒的冒险了，不是吗？

那正是我想要的。

在这里，我再次恭喜你完成了冒险，让我一起再次喊出鼹鼠队的口号！

<align="center">鼹鼠，鼹鼠，</align>
<align="center">能文能武！</align>
<align="center">鼹鼠，鼹鼠，</align>
<align="center">当家做主！</align>
E:
The Moles will solve the mystery, no matter how difficult it is, and "Drake's Invisible Treasure" is nearing its conclusion.

The three little moles displayed their investigative skills again in this adventure. And of course, you, our fourth little mole, are the most important contributor to the adventure!

Young readers who have read The Adventurous Moles know that this is only the beginning of their exploits, and the little moles have many more adventures ahead of them! Drake, the story's great adventurer, is content with a fantastic adventure, even if it is only once in a lifetime. However, such an adventure is not enough for our young readers.

What gives me the right to say such a thing? Is it because I'd like to keep selling books? Of course, this is a factor. But, more importantly, I want to give my young readers "the experience of adventure without the peril of it." I don't want you to meet any bad guys in real life, and I don't want you to be trapped in a crisis like the three little moles.

Parents frequently write to me. "I don't want my children to read your stories anymore because they will just follow The Moles and embark on dangerous adventures." Such letters often baffle me. If I were irresponsible enough, I would tell them, "Give it a shot! Humans are supposed to go on adventures." However, given the parent's concern, I would respond, "The safest adventure I can think of is merely going on an adventure at home by reading a book without taking any risks. What, not even such an adventure is permitted?"

Authors are notorious for complaining about their hardships in the postface of their works, so please forgive me if I do the same. You followed in the footsteps of the three little moles in this adventure story, even though you did not encounter the dreadful gatherers (after all, I made it up), but you used your curiosity and ingenuity to complete the best adventure, right?

That is precisely what I am looking for.

I want to congratulate you on finishing your adventure once again, and please allow me to shout out The Moles' slogan!

<align="center">The Moles, the Moles,</align>
<align="center">are brilliant and strong!</align>
<align="center">The Moles, the Moles,</align>
<align="center">take the reins!</align>

C: 「虫蚁之于飞禽，野兔之于狼犬，星尘之于黑洞，诸界之于贪餮。」 ——仙舟，《寰宇通鉴》 诸界渴饮者，永无餍足的吞噬者，会思考的黑洞。既是星神，又是古兽的双重存在。 在奥博洛斯看来，生命是虚空海洋中明灭的浮藻，终将随着诞生它们的星辰归于黑暗——这片黑暗就在祂的口中。
E: "Insects are to birds, as hares are to wolves. The stars are to the black hole, as the worlds are to the gluttonous." — Worlds History as a Mirror, Xianzhou The drinker of worlds, the unsatisfied devourer, the black hole with thought. THEY are an Aeon and a Leviathan at the same time. In the eyes of Oroboros, life is a flickering fragment floating in the sea of void, destined to return to the darkness along with the stars which birthed THEM — This darkness is within the depths of THEIR mouths.

C: 「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；巡猎毫无幽默感，毁灭像个疯子。星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！」 ——某位通晓天文（自称）的假面愚者 懂得欢乐是智慧生灵独有的权利。顽石与星辰都无从体察生命的幽默。 寻求棋逢对手的敌人，寻求消磨光阴的游戏，寻求不问胜负的结局。 寻求捧腹绝倒的笑谈，寻求阴差阳错的误会，寻求神思飞舞的歌谣。
E: "The Erudition is a hunk of junk, the Preservation is a fool, the Hunt has no sense of humor, and the Destruction is a lunatic. All the Aeons are as stubborn as they come. What a shame for Aha!" — A Masked Fool who is a self-proclaimed astronomy expert To savor joy is a privilege unique to sentient beings. Neither the dusty rocks nor the distant stars can fathom the humor that life entails. Go seek adversaries worthy of your mettle, games that while away the hours, and outcomes indifferent to victory or defeat. Go chase laughter that leaves you breathless, twists born of fate's whimsy, and songs that ascend your soul.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 梦境中的豪华空艇完全可以自动导航、自动驾驶，设立一个驾驶舱只是为了让它看上去更像那么回事而已。
E: The luxury airships within the Dreamscape have auto-navigation and autopilot capabilities. The cockpit is just for show.

C: 在圣城卫士的努力下，曾经的刻法勒广场在永昼结束后成为了民众的庇护所，仿佛全世之座依然守护着世人。
E: Through the efforts of the Holy City Guards, the once Kephale Square became a sanctuary for the people after the eternal day faded, as if the Throne of Worlds still watched over humanity.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 撷取虫皇子嗣之颚，凝聚天体死光。再现「繁育」的旧日梦魇。
E: Gathering the jaws of the Imperator Insectorum's progeny, condensing the light of stellar deaths, reenacting the old nightmare of the Propagation.

C: 或许是矿区内视野最好的地方，纷争与私欲、团结与秩序，民间百态在此尽览无余。
E: Perhaps the place with the best view in the mine. Disputes and desire, unity and order, a myriad of thoughts and attempts can be found here.

C: 这道铁门是史瓦罗最后的警告。铁门虽不算坚固，但无人敢于挑战地下守护者的权威。
E: This path's iron gate is Svarog's final warning. While the gate itself is not that strong, no one dares to challenge the authority of the underground guardian.

C: 通往工造司格物院的道路。在「建木」根系疯长后，桥梁损毁，道路中绝，修缮工作遥遥无期。
E: Passage to the Sapientia Academe in the Artisanship Commission. The bridges and roads here were damaged and torn apart after the Ambrosial Arbor's roots rampaged through, with no plans for repair in the near future.

C: 龙吟阗阗，垂云翻卷。沧溟开晦，若木发蘖。受封印遏制，建木的根系在此盘卷成龙形木瘿，不再生长。
E: The dragon's roar echoes, and the whirling clouds twirl. The sea opens its maws, as the dead Arbor sprouts. Hindered by the seal, the Ambrosial Arbor's roots curl into a dragon-shaped wood gall at this place, and no longer grows.

C: 协助游客观赏演武仪典的接待区域。
E: The reception area set up to help visitors attend the Wardance ceremony.

C: 设置于竞锋舰甲板上的演武擂台，来自不同世界的参赛选手们终将在此一较高下。
E: The Wardance arena set on the Skysplitter's deck, where contestants from different worlds will ultimately compete and pursue victory.

C: 既是多功能厅，也是绅士淑女用以谈笑的社交舞台。每一位附庸风雅的名流都是这场闹剧中的唯一主角。
E: A multi-functional room and also a place for ladies and gentlemen to socialize. Every celebrity striving to emulate elegance is the sole protagonist of this farce.

C: 雄伟的悬锋斗技场中央，战士们的勇武曾淋漓尽显之地，如今似乎仍能听到周遭传来山呼海啸之声。
E: The center of the magnificent Kremnos Arena is where brave warriors showcased their might. Even today, it seems as though you can vaguely hear the cheers and noise from the spectators.

C: 前往奥赫玛的小道，荒凉凄冷，可以看出已经许久未曾有人涉足。
E: A short path leading to Okhema. From how deserted the path is, it is easy to tell that no one has traversed this area in a long time.

C: 悬锋城开掘石料的区域，许多山之民在此处无休无止地劳作。
E: The area in Castrum Kremnos where stone is excavated. Many Mountain Dwellers work endlessly here.

C: 分布在世界各个角落的战利品，开启后可获取奖励。
E: Treasures scattered throughout the world. Open them to obtain rewards.

C: 在寒潮席卷的冷酷世界里，人们依然竭力养护着花朵。它就像美好的时光，脆弱短暂，却以刹那的芬芳抚平了岁月的艰难漫长。
E: People are still trying to preserve flowers, despite the cold brought on by the Eternal Freeze. Like a good time, its beauty is fragile and temporary, but its fragrance will help you forget the tough times, even if only for a moment.

C: 罗浮云骑将军景元处理公务之地，不过大部分时间将军都不在此处。
E: Cloud Knight General Jing Yuan of the Luofu's office, but most of the time, the general is absent.

C: 广场上的钟表小子雕像。对于大部分人而言就只是一尊雕像而已——但据说有极少数拥有特殊体质的人能够和它对话…甚至通过提交特殊的钱币从它那里获得好处！
E: The Clockie Statue in the plaza. It is only a statue for most people. But it's rumored that a rare few with special constitutions can converse with it... and even receive benefits from it by offering it special credits!

C: 这是你在「黄金的时刻」的专属停车位，永久保留，不额外收费。可以使用购买到的车辆在此处与「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」间自由往返。
E: This is your exclusive parking lot at Golden Hour. The ownership is permanent at zero extra charges. You can use the vehicles you purchased to freely travel between here and The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 机巧鸟停靠的所在，可以遥控机巧鸟进行飞行。
E: Where cycranes roost, with the option to control its flight path as desired.

C: 西塔罗斯经营的古董店，也售卖手绘陶罐。人们称赞这里为岁月的走廊，每件商品都有自己的故事，逝去的时光在他手中得以恒久。
E: An antique shop run by Theodoros. Dolia are also sold here. People call this place the corridor of time, as all the items have their own story, and times past become everlasting in his hands.

C: 生命花园用以培育和管理奇美拉的装置，蕴藏着造物的奥秘。
E: A device used by the Garden of Life for cultivating and managing chimeras, holding the secrets of creation.

C: 这里收藏着你从各个星球带回的个性穿搭，每一件都记录着一段独特的开拓之旅。
E: Here's your collection of unique outfits from different planets, each piece recording a special trailblazing journey.

C: 「万界之癌」侵蚀下产生的造物，撷取现实既有的元素，造就全新之物。很难说它究竟是在毁灭，还是在创造。
E: A creation born under the corrosion of the "Cancer of All Worlds." A brand-new being made by extracting known elements from the physical world. It's hard to tell whether it is being destroyed or created.

C: 在贝洛伯格除行政区以外的区域随处可见的机器人们，无论是哪种型号，其生产管线都可以追溯到近千年前的几张设计蓝图。有些机兵扮演着协调治安、帮助生产的角色；也有些年久失修的个体在漫无目的地流浪。
E: Robots found everywhere in Belobog except in the Administrative District. No matter which model such a robot belongs to, its origins can be traced back to one of the few design blueprints from millennia ago. Some of these automatons help with security and production, while other faulty units wander aimlessly.

C: 困居于下层区的人们为了生存，往往会不惜铤而走险深入裂界寻找任何可用的物资，其中被他们掘出的古代机器成了他们最好的帮手。
E: In order to survive, some Underworlders are desperate enough to venture deep into the Fragmentum in search of anything salvageable. Ancient machinery that they dug up has become their best helper.

C: 从泰坦神力中诞生的造物，是诸神的侍从与子嗣，为那些伟大的存在鞠躬尽瘁，贯彻它们的威能。而最为危险的眷属，便是「纷争」的军团。
E: A creation born of a Titan's power. Attendants and heirs to the divine, they give all they have for those great beings and act as enforcers of highest power. The most lethal of the Titankin are the Legions of Strife.

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是苏乐达汽水的运输工，失控后仍在分享背负的美味，向路过的宾客抛掷它的礼物。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally a transporter for SoulGlad, this out-of-control deliverer continues to distribute the delicacy on its back, tossing its gifts to passing guests.

When dealing "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG, additionally triggers 1 instance of "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG at a ratio of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方目标施放普攻、战技时造成的暴击率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。

C: 黑夜占比增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，我方目标生命降低后的最终伤害提高额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。

C: 持有【黎明】的角色，造成的暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Characters with "Dawn" increase their CRIT DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 角色造成击破伤害后，会在攻击后额外造成等同于原伤害<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>固定数值的附加伤害。角色的【<u>战意</u>】 大于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层时，获得等同于自身最大生命值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的护盾，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>回合，对敌方全体造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><u>基础伤害</u>的伤害与<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>点削韧，并消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>层 【<u>战意</u>】。
E: After a character deals Break DMG, deal a set amount of Additional DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original damage after the attack. When a character's <u>Grit</u> is higher than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s), they gain a Shield equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). Also, deal DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base DMG</u> and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> Toughness-Reduction to all enemies, and consume <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of <u>Grit</u>.

C: 我方目标施放终结技后，使下次施放攻击后，对攻击目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次等同于攻击力<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的【<u>回味</u>】伤害。
E: After an ally uses an Ultimate, when using the next attack, deals "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> ATK <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) to the target.

C: 我方目标造成的普攻/战技伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，施放普攻时，若生命值百分比大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，则消耗等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值并额外恢复1点战技点。
E: Increases Basic ATK/Skill DMG dealt by ally targets' by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>. When an ally uses a Basic ATK and their HP percentage is higher than or equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, consumes HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP and additionally recovers 1 Skill Point.

C: 你是一名渴望事业有成的人，相信天下没有不可能的事。\n你喜欢挑战，那些经过困难验证的事更能彰显价值的存在。\n你专注于追求更高的目标，从不止步。
E: You are a person who aims for a thriving career and holds the belief that nothing is beyond reach.\nYou love challenges because things that are validated through difficulty are more likely to demonstrate the existence of value.\nYou are focused on pursuing higher goals and never cease your efforts.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为贝洛伯格的守护者，永屹之城贝洛伯格无可质疑的统治者。\n可可利亚（完整）秉持传承自历代守护者的神迹权能，在战斗中号令冰雪的力量冻结敌人。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is the Guardian of Belobog, the indisputable ruler of the Towering Citadel of Belobog.\nAs the Guardian, Cocolia (Complete) has inherited divine powers, giving her absolute command over the power of ice to freeze her enemies in battle.

C: 「授勋」的雕塑：传言曾有一朵被女神亲吻过的玫瑰，它的美永不凋零。
E: A statue of "The Honored." Legend has it that there was once a rose kissed by the Beauty, imbuing it with everlasting appeal.

C:
不败者，一切战场的领主，悬锋城与废墟的王，
战车大匠，尸山王座，胜利父，
荣耀僭主，裂地惊海的雷，翁法罗斯的守护者，
纷争的半神，天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。
全体世间应听遣的将领，永恒且锋利的兵戈，纷争与断绝纷争的法则。
礼赞迈德漠斯，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者，最强者。
E:
The undefeated. The sovereign of all battles. The king of Castrum Kremnos and of ruins,
Grand Artisan of the war chariot, the throne upon a mountain of corpses, and Father of Victory,
The tyrant of glories, the lightning that split the sea, the Guardian of Amphoreus,
The demigod of Strife, the Lance of Fury, Mydeimos.
A general that all the world should heed, the eternal sharp sword, the law of Strife and of ending Strife.
Praise Mydeimos, greatest of conquerors, greatest of guardians, the strongest of all.

C: 由星核力量幻造而成的虚影，执行着令裂界不断扩张的意志。\n智慧生命的欲求在裂界中投影形成的活体能量，犹如一颗沙砾在蚌壳中凝成了珠贝。这股力量四处徘徊，漫无目的，直到感受到其主的意志才会听令行事。
E: A shadow manifested by the power of a Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.\nA living being of energy born from the projection of the desires of sentient lifeforms into the Fragmentum, akin to a pearl created from a single grain of sand. This energy wanders around aimlessly, acting only when executing the will of its master.
