C: 在常例的「开拓」之旅中，列车组成员将乘坐安全稳定的降落舱，登陆到预定坐标点；而在变例的「开拓」之旅中，星穹列车会分离出末节车厢作为降落舱使用，并随车厢搭载充足的维生资源，确保无名客在着陆后，能够以车厢为安全屋展开行动。\n\n根据列车记录，星穹列车领航员「鸡窝头」鲍勃曾多次使用分离车厢的方式进行着陆，列车车厢的回收率仅有<unbreak>42.4%</unbreak>，而已回收车厢的返修率为<unbreak>100%</unbreak>…自那以后，分离车厢的降落方式被列车长明令禁止，仅在极少数的情况下，被作为特殊的「后备方案」使用。
E: In standard trailblazing expeditions, the Express Crew uses secure and stable landing pods to descend to designated coordinates. However, in exceptional trailblazing expeditions, the Astral Express detaches its last coach to serve as a landing pod. This coach is equipped with ample life-support resources, ensuring that the Nameless can use it as a safe house for operations after landing.\n\nAccording to the Express records, Touslehead Bob the Astral Express Navigator frequently used the detached-coach method for landings. The recovery rate for the detached coaches was only <unbreak>42.4%</unbreak>, and of the recovered coaches, <unbreak>100%</unbreak> required repairs. The detached-coach landing method has been explicitly prohibited by the conductor since then, only to be used as a special backup plan in extremely rare circumstances.

C: 星际旅行（现象）
E: Interstellar Travel (Phenomenon)

C: 银河声望
E: Cosmic Reputation

C: 提交
E: Submit

C: 账号异常
E: Abnormal account

C: 本轮由赞助商全程冠名，请小心避让广告牌——没办法，他们给得实在太多了！
E: This round is fully sponsored — watch out for the billboards! Can't be helped... they paid way too much!

C: 总决赛第一轮
E: Grand Finale, Round 1

C: 巡海大鲨鱼
E: Sea Hunter Shark

C: 车借我开开呗
E: Let me borrow the Spheroid for a ride

C: 小心肝…你好像一颗专属梦泡，每晚入睡时我都要拥你入怀。
E: Darling... you're like an exclusive dream bubble. I yearn to hold you in my arms every night.

C: 「多交朋友，因为朋友就是金钱！」
E: "Make more friends, because friends are money!"

C: 让正在烦恼的梦泡艺术家尼奥尼开心起来
E: Cheer up Neony, the troubled dream bubble artist

C: 探索微缩模型，在模型的地面上看到巨大的钢笔
E: Explore the miniature model and find the giant pen laid on the ground

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 建木
E: Ambrosial Arbor

C: 黑塔接管权杖系统，解开「铁墓」封印。你化身列车驶向时光的终点，准备为世界写下前所未有的结局。
E: Herta took control of the Scepter System and unsealed Irontomb. You transformed into an incarnation of the Express and headed towards the end of time, ready to give this world an unprecedented ending.

C: 光、天空、大海、星辰、种子、花、飞鸟、希望、爱。这些美好的词汇，是我对世界最初的想象。一直以来，我用它们讲述翁法罗斯的故事。现在，这是最后一个，关于「明天」的故事……献给你的故事。
E: Light, sky, sea, stars, seeds, flowers, birds, hope, and love. Such words of beauty were how I first imagined the world. For as long as I can remember, I've used them to tell the stories of Amphoreus. And now, this is the last one... a story about "tomorrow," dedicated to you.

C: 你遭遇一位头戴石膏面具、与自己下象棋的神秘男子。石膏头男子请你自行面对困境，并为你让出前行的道路。
E: You encountered a mysterious man wearing a plaster mask, playing chess against himself. He told you to face your predicament alone and stepped aside to let you pass.

C: 银鬃铁卫突然出现，将你们团团围住。你与三月七、丹恒被当作是桑博的同伙，遭到铁卫们的进攻。
E: Silvermane Guards suddenly appeared, surrounding you. March 7th, Dan Heng, and you were treated as Sampo's accomplice, and were attacked.

C: 你在矿区与娜塔莎交谈，得知奥列格正在处理矿工与流浪者因争夺矿脉而起的冲突。地底情况艰难，娜塔莎请你们帮助在此生活的民众。
E: In the mines, you spoke with Natasha and learned that Oleg was dealing with a conflict between miners and vagrants over mining veins. Life underground was harsh, and Natasha asked for your help in supporting the local residents.

C: 彦卿神情严肃，扫视刃、卡芙卡以及显露真身的「饮月君」，誓要将三人送进幽囚狱。
E: Yanqing sternly regarded Blade, Kafka, and Dan Heng's true form as Imbibitor Lunae, swearing to incarcerate all three in The Shackling Prison.

C: 姬子与瓦尔特讨论「邀请函」中的密文，认为可能是无名客的求救手段。「谐乐大典」暗潮涌动，姬子提议在收集情报的同时享受假期。
E: Himeko and Welt discussed the secret text within the invitation and thought it might be a method that the Nameless used to request help. The undercurrents of the Charmony Festival shivered, and Himeko suggested that everyone enjoy a vacation while collecting intelligence.

C: 你与同伴商议，以巡海游侠集结自由意志，并借知更鸟的歌声，唤醒沉睡中的匹诺康尼众人。
E: You discussed with your friends to have the Galaxy Ranger gather free will and use Robin's song to awaken the sleeping people of Penacony.

C: 面对虚卒幻象，阮•梅劝她接纳伤痕而非抗拒，停云挣扎中踏上共存之路
E: Facing illusions of Voidrangers, Ruan Mei advised Tingyun to accept the scar instead of resisting it. After a struggle, Tingyun embarked on the path of co-existence.

C: 昔涟呼唤<color=#f29e38ff>最初的「PhiLia」</color>，在不断失却的逐火之旅中，「爱」会永远存在。与黄金裔们并立，你开启最后的「再创世」。
E: Cyrene beckoned to <color=#f29e38ff>the original "PhiLia"</color>, where "love" endured throughout the Flame-Chase Journey filled with continuous loss. Standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs, you began the final "Era Nova."

C: 你们击败公司小组。托帕向其下属发来消息，要求所有资产评估小组不得影响当地居民正常生活秩序。公司员工们争相撤离大矿区。
E: You had defeated the IPC Team. Soon after, Topaz sent a message to her subordinates, ordering all evaluation teams to stop interfering with the lives of local residents. The IPC Workers scattered, retreating from the Great Mine in a hurry.

C: 佩拉与玲可会合，二人随后向城外雪原走去。你感到疑惑，随后跟上她们的步伐。
E: Pela met up with Lynx, and together they headed toward the Snow Plains outside the city. Puzzled, you followed in their footsteps.

C: 丹恒对你的安好松了一口气，称军团的威胁已经解除，并与你交换手机号码。丹恒称姬子有事找你，方便的话请过去一趟。
E: Dan Heng was relieved that you were alright, mentioning that the Antimatter Legion threat was over, and exchanged phone numbers with you. He also said that Himeko was looking for you, and you should go to her when you're ready.

C: 希儿询问奖章的价值与重要性。布洛妮娅称与存护人们内心的善意相比，这点代价算不了什么。
E: Seele inquired about the medal's worth. Bronya replied, "A medal is nothing compared to the kindness in people's hearts."

C: 素裳检查少女情况，发现对方是属于「十王司」的机巧偃偶判官<color=#f29e38ff>雪衣</color>。雪衣请求素裳将其送去地衡司，罗刹却称他有能力将雪衣治愈。
E: Sushang checked the girl over and realized she was an ingenium marionette judge belonging to the Ten-Lords Commission, named <color=#f29e38ff>Xueyi</color>. Xueyi asked Sushang to send her to the Realm-Keeping Commission, but Luocha claimed he had ways to heal Xueyi.

C: 你调查房门，发现不能从这一侧打开。
E: You checked the door and found that it could not be opened from this side.

C: 在流萤的带领下，你向公园管理员出示梦境护照，获得十枚艾迪恩代币。现在你可以和流萤一起，尽情享受公园中的各种游乐设施啦。
E: Under Firefly's guidance, you showed your Dreamscape Pass to the park admin and obtained <unbreak>10</unbreak> Aideen Tokens. Now, you can enjoy all the amusement facilities with Firefly.

C: 你与流萤来到「筑梦边境」，游客通常不被允许到达此地。这里是梦境世界的建造边缘，流萤的「秘密据点」就在这里面。
E: You and Firefly arrived at the Dream's Edge. Guests are usually not allowed here. This is the edge of the constructed Dreamscape, and her "secret stronghold" can be found here.

C: 你即将与列车组集合，流萤也需要返回现实休息。美好的时光总是短暂，你与流萤在「黄金的时刻」分别。
E: You had to regroup with the Crew, and Firefly had to return to reality to recuperate. The good times are always fleeting. You and Firefly parted ways at the Golden Hour.

C: 砂金将宝石赠予路人，向其打听「死亡」。乌玛称她在入行记者时最想报道有关「死亡」的题材，但被电视台的台长阻止了。
E: Aventurine gave the gem to a passer-by and asked her about "Death." Uma mentioned that when she became a journalist, "Death" was the topic she wanted to cover the most. However, the TV station's director stopped her.

C: 黄泉与瓦尔特的调查暂时告一段落。黄泉突然警觉，感知到有人到来。
E: Acheron and Welt temporarily ended their investigation. Acheron was suddenly alerted as she felt someone coming.

C: 知更鸟教孩子们歌唱，与格莉莎探讨梦境的意义。无论在梦里飞翔多久，最后总要飞回现实。如果羽翼不幸残缺，就把翅膀借给彼此。
E: Robin was teaching children to sing and discussing the meaning of dreams with Grace. No matter how long one flies through the dream, they will one day return to reality. And if their wings are broken, then they should lend each other their wings.

C: 波提欧自称无名客，向大堂经理丹尼斯找茬。丹尼斯请波提欧与丹恒稍安勿躁，安排两位到贵宾室休息等待。
E: Claiming to be a Nameless, Boothill stirred up trouble with the lobby manager, Dennis. Dennis asked both Boothill and Dan Heng to remain calm and escorted them to the VIP lounge to wait.

C: 你回顾了米哈伊尔一生，从童年梦想到老年遗愿，谱写无名客的开拓史。
E: You looked back on Mikhail's life from his childhood dreams to his final wishes in old age, composing the trailblazing tale of a Nameless who blazed the stars.

C: 恰丽卡盯着乱破的画作，若有所思。恰丽卡努力整理头绪，以寻找「自己的忍道」。
E: Chaletka stared at Rappa's artwork, lost in thought. She tried to gather her thoughts to find "her own way of the ninja."

C: 万维克投入物品获「垃圾」回馈，二人确认这是规则扭曲所致的荒诞逻辑。
E: Wonweek tossed something in and got "trash" in return. The two confirmed that this was an absurd logic that arose due to the twisted rules.

C: 你与丹恒在神殿中调查时，遭遇从暗处发动的袭击。丹恒发现对方是没有气息的无机生命，你挥动球棒与之接战。
E: While exploring the temple with Dan Heng, you were suddenly attacked from the shadows. Dan Heng realized your attackers were inorganic lifeform with no life signs, and you swung your bat to fight back.

C: 你与阿格莱雅共同进入浴池，得知她的本职是织造华服，当下主持着黄金裔的行动。为赢取她的信任，你依其请求挪动身体，闭上双眼。
E: You went into the baths with Aglaea and found out that while her duty may be to weave lavish robes, she now leads the Chrysos Heirs in their mission. To build trust with her, you did as she asked and moved your body, then closed your eyes.

C: 企及天空之人将受到「天空」泰坦的神罚。因泄露「天外之界」的存在，你与丹恒在创世涡心受到阿格莱雅的拷问，由遐蝶担任行刑人。
E: Those who tried to reach the sky would be punished by the Sky Titan. Because you revealed "the world beyond the sky," Aglaea interrogated you and Dan Heng in the Vortex of Genesis, with Castorice as your executioner.

C: 你与白厄、万敌进入「雕琢区」。「纷争」的腐蚀使白厄思绪杂乱，他在燥热中努力集中精神。
E: You went into the Sculpting Zone with Phainon and Mydei. Strife's corruption scrambled Phainon's thoughts, and he had trouble focusing while suffering the intense heat.

C: 在白厄与万敌的交谈中，你得知尼卡多利会为自己打造半身以苟延残喘，与此同时万敌身为黄金裔的天赐正是「拒绝死亡」。
E: As Phainon and Mydei talked, you learned Nikador would make a double of himself to survive, while Mydei's divine gift as a Chrysos Heir was "defying death."

C: 在友爱之馆，你与遐蝶、迷迷听到奇怪的歌声。经过一番找寻，你们确定了远处的声音源头。
E: At the Library of Philia, you, Castorice, and Mem heard a strange singing voice. After a search, you pinpointed the source of the distant voice.

C: 一位客人在浴场晕倒，喃喃着「小心悬锋人」。风堇赶来救助，发现是因为池水温度过高而昏迷。阿格莱雅顿时明白现状。
E: Suddenly, a guest at the baths fainted, murmuring: "Beware of the Kremnoans." Hyacine rushed in to help and discovered the cause was overheating from the excessively hot bathwater. Realization dawned on Aglaea at once.

C: 那刻夏的灵魂再次来到冥滩上游荡。他聆听自潮汐深处，有一道声音即将向他诉说。
E: Anaxa's soul once more wandered the Nethershore. He listened to a voice from the depths of the tides, a voice ready to tell him something.

C: 你返回浴宫休息。迷迷在你离开期间大量阅读从遐蝶处借来的书，尝试为你分忧。你安慰迷迷，说找到了觐见「死亡」的办法。
E: You returned to your bath chamber to rest. While you away, Mem had spent time reading many books borrowed from Castorice in an attempt to help you. You comforted Mem, saying that you already found a way to meet with "Death."

C: 在表决之前，白厄将做最后的演讲，他不确定自己能否担负起阿格莱雅的信任。那刻夏劝白厄转变想法，思考自己该如何决定世界命运。
E: Just before the vote, Phainon was about to give his final speech. He expressed that he was unsure if he could fulfill the duty Aglaea had trusted him with. Anaxa chided him to change his perspective, and think instead of what he should do to ensure that the world did not stray from the correct path.

C: 「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝痛斥压迫同胞的晖之民，指出正是艾格勒的「神罚」将天空封锁。塞涅俄丝相信「再创世」神谕，踏上弑神之路。
E: Seliose the Daythunder Knight called out the Sunfolk for their oppression of their brothers and sisters, and declared that the sky had been sealed away as Aquila's "divine retribution" for their sins. Firm in her belief in "Era Nova," Seliose set out on her godslaying journey.

C: 你们来到生命花园，看到风堇的保护罩将落单的民众与黑潮怪物隔离开。为解救公民，你们与黑潮怪物展开战斗。
E: You reached the Garden of Life, where Hyacine's shield kept civilians safe from the black tide monsters. To protect people from harm, you leaped into battle against the monsters.

C: 昔涟亲切问候你们，称你先前的人设是与白厄订下修习契约的异邦勇者。昔涟提出要玩占卜游戏，你们出发寻找占卜用的「神谕牌」。
E: Cyrene greeted you two warmly and said your current identity was a foreign warrior bound to Phainon by a training pact. Then, she suggested a divination game and you all set off to find the "Prophecy Cards" used for divination.

C: 第<unbreak>823156</unbreak>次永劫回归，小伊卡在创世涡心为白厄撑起一方晴空。盗火行者迫近，而白厄对抗这位刽子手的刀锋已然被照亮。
E: In the <unbreak>823,156</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, Little Ica held the sky clear above the Vortex of Genesis for Phainon. The Flame Reaver drew near, but Phainon's blade, facing this executioner, now shined with resolve.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>第<unbreak>23570000</unbreak>次永劫回归</color>白厄与捍卫「天空」火种的风堇对峙，想将风堇从黑潮中解脱。风堇强打精神，仍然想要治愈白厄。
E: At <color=#f29e38ff>the <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence</color>, Phainon faced Hyacine, guardian of the Coreflame of the Sky, hoping to release her from the grip of the black tide. Though weary, Hyacine stood firm. She still wanted to heal Phainon.

C: 星期日曾用「秩序」塑造圣地，但人们终会从梦中醒来。昔涟指出，在「毁灭」向刻律德菈许诺的世界里，同样没有给「人」留下余地。
E: Sunday had once shaped it into a sanctuary of Order, but no dream lasts forever. Cyrene pointed out that even in the world promised to Cerydra by Destruction, there had been no place left for humankind.

C: 黑天鹅认为三月七与忆者们的计划无关，事实上，你们正是因三月七用忆质中和了防火墙才得以进入翁法罗斯。瓦尔特找到了丹恒和你的所在。
E: Black Swan believed March 7th had no involvement in the Memokeepers' plan. In truth, it was March 7th who neutralized the Firewall using memoria that allowed you to enter Amphoreus. Welt had found where you and Dan Heng were.

C: 《如我所书》的本质是被「记忆」修饰过的信息终端。丹恒推测，如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」命途，那么她的牺牲或许不止是为了重置轮回。
E: As I've Written was essentially an information terminal modified by the Remembrance. Dan Heng speculated that if Cyrene inadvertently stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then perhaps her sacrifice was meant for more than just resetting the cycle.

C: 丹恒遭遇在此部署密径的缇宝的记忆，对方劝丹恒跟随海瑟音撤离此地。丹枫认为这道回忆可能属于「荒笛」。
E: Dan Heng encountered memories of Tribbie deploying hidden passages at this place. She urged him to evacuate with Hysilens. Dan Feng believed this memory might belong to Terravox.

C: 追忆残像中，「玉阙」之战前，白珩受征召而缺席云上五骁集会，赠涌泉一瓮以表心意，且待凯旋再饮庆功酒。丹枫已说服龙师们允许持明士兵参战，以全力支持景元对付「计都蜃楼」的奇计。
E: In the Fragments of Recollection, Baiheng was summoned before the battle of the Yuque and, as a result, missed the High-Cloud Quintet gathering. So she gifted a jar of fountain wine to express her sentiment, promising to drink in celebration upon her triumphant return. Dan Feng had convinced the Preceptors to allow Vidyadhara soldiers to join the battle, fully supporting Jing Yuan's ingenious plan against the Ketu Mirage.

C: 巡海游侠与家族没有回音。仙舟联盟与星际和平公司则回应了列车组的通讯，并在联军会议上展开关于合作事宜的激烈谈判。
E: The Galaxy Rangers and the Family did not answer. The Xianzhou Alliance and the Interastral Peace Corporation replied to the Express Crew's message and, at the alliance meeting, engaged in intense negotiations regarding cooperation.

C: 命途能量读数显示，「智识」衰减中，「毁灭」充盈，「记忆」为零。在现实矩阵中，「记忆」没有留下任何痕迹。
E: Path Energy readings: Erudition is diminishing, Destruction is surging, Remembrance is at zero. In the real matrix, Remembrance left no trace.

C: 你与三月七看到一组星际和平公司员工，他们本不应该出现在这颗星球。你与三月七决定上前询问其目的。
E: You and March 7th spotted a group of IPC Workers who shouldn't have been on this planet. You both decided to walk up and ask them what they were doing there.

C: 你尝试以扑满语与账账沟通。账账转身离开，似乎是要去寻找主人，你们决定先跟上账账。
E: You tried mimicking Trotter language to communicate, but Numby simply turned away. It looked like it was heading off to find its master, so you decided to follow it for the time being.

C: 你们在风雪中为瓦赫立了一座墓碑。
E: You erected a gravestone for Vache in the wind and snow.

C: 拍照过后，受到惊吓的扑满以某种奇妙的方式消失不见。玲可发现扑满好像掉了什么东西在营地中。
E: After taking the photo, the startled Trotter mysteriously vanished. Lynx noticed that Trotter seemed to have dropped something in the camp.

C: 在镜流的提示中，丹恒想起了<color=#f29e38ff>白珩</color>这个名字。她是饮月君与镜流曾经的朋友，而镜流此次来迴星港，就是为了用狐人的「慰灵奠仪」祭拜她，将代表逝者的星槎送向星空。为此，丹恒一行需要先制造出星槎。
E: From Jingliu's hint, Dan Heng recalled the name <color=#f29e38ff>Baiheng</color>. She was once a friend of Imbibitor Lunae and Jingliu, and Jingliu's visit to Stargazer Navalia was to honor her with the foxian soul-soothing ceremony by sending a starskiff representing the deceased into the stars. To do so, Dan Heng and the others needed to first create a starskiff.

C: 彦卿提醒大家，脚步要轻，动作要快，一有动静就躲起来。
E: Yanqing reminded everyone to move lightly and quickly, and hide at the slightest sound.

C: 你与丹恒抵达公司货箱的存放处，寒鸦称箱中正存放着步离人造型的机甲，极度危险。
E: You and Dan Heng arrived at the IPC cargo storage area. Hanya warned that the crates contained borisin-shaped mechs that were extremely dangerous.

C: 椒丘向可疑的渡航者询问情况，嗅出对方的步离人气息。椒丘得知云骑军没有封锁港口，倒是天舶司正在清空航道，为演武仪典做准备。
E: Jiaoqiu inquired about the situation from a suspicious Ferryman, detecting the scent of borisin on them. Jiaoqiu learned that the Cloud Knights hadn't secured the port. Instead, the Sky-Faring Commission was actually clearing the lanes in preparation for the Wardance ceremony.

C: 发现目标对象
E: Target found

C: 永冬岭
E: Everwinter Hill

C: 丹鼎司
E: Alchemy Commission

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 你捧着红酒桶与将军对饮。
E: You end up sharing an entire barrel of wine with the General.

C: 椒丘被你猛灌了一顿鸡汤。
E: You give Jiaoqiu a long and passionate pep talk.

C: 测测他是不是真睡着了。
E: Check if he's truly sleeping.

C: 给它放点音乐吧！
E: Let's play it some music!

C:
「你们呵，转动舵轮和观望风向的人，
「想想她，扶里巴斯，
「也曾像你们一样漂亮而高大。」

铁锚般的铅靴领着女孩不断下坠，它们正忠实地履行着设计之初便赋予的使命。

女孩始终没有合上眼睛，与冰冷而孤独的黑暗顽强对抗。她想起自己第一次听说阿基维利的故事；想起踏上旅途的那一天，她为自己打造的「荣誉徽章」；她想起与旅伴同行的<unbreak>30</unbreak>日；想起她们第一次和最后一次集合的林间空地，那里的空气是树莓味的；想起口哨、吉他和竹笛，以及她们一起唱过的歌；想起紫红色的雪花落在微焦的棉花糖上，很快不见踪影。

历历在目的回忆末尾，莫大的空虚行将来临，她突然见到一抹鲜红在黑色的世界中心转瞬即逝。

于是，小小的无名客想起佩刀的她最后一次接过棉花糖时，自己发自内心的笑：

「我从没想过能遇见和自己一样的人。在这条「路」上，你走过的距离比我远了好多。
「所以你也一定会陪我走到最后的，对吧？
「当然，我们的结局早已注定…但就和你说的一样——
「哪怕我最终会化作一潭浅浅的死水，但在走向那一刻的路上，我能做的事依然很多。所以无论如何，我都一定要去试试看——
「——因为我要走一条比阿基维利更深、更远的路！」
E:
"O, you who turn the wheel and watch the wind,
Think of Frebass,
And how she was once as beautiful and stood as tall as you."

The lead boots, like iron anchors, drag the girl down further and further. They are dutifully carrying out the task bestowed upon them from the beginning of their conception.

The girl never closes her eyes, fighting boldly against the cold and lonely darkness. She remembers the first time she heard stories about Akivili. She remembers the first day she set upon the journey and the "Medallion of Honor" she forged for herself. She remembers the <unbreak>30</unbreak> days she spent journeying with her companion. She remembers the forest glade they gathered in for the first and last time, and how the air there tasted like raspberries. She remembers whistles, guitars, and the flute, and the songs they sang together. She remembers scarlet snow falling on slightly burnt marshmallows and disappearing.

The vast void looms near the end of the vivid memories, yet she suddenly sees a dash of crimson blinking briefly into existence in the center of the pitch-black world.

Therefore, the little Nameless remembers the smile she gave from the bottom of her heart when the girl with the sword took the marshmallows for the final time.

"I never thought I would meet anyone similar to me. You've walked so much further on this road than me.
Therefore, you will surely walk with me till then end, right?"
"Of course. Our end has already been determined... However, just like you said —
Even though I may turn into a shallow puddle of dead water in the end, there is still a lot I can do on my journey toward that moment. Therefore, no matter what, I have to go try it—
— Because I will walk on a road deeper and further than Akivili's!"

C: 「墨涅塔，我们向你祈福。若世上没有歌声，没了歌声的春天，没有树林会开出花朵……」 用溪流濯洗双手，再用双手捧出清冽的供神佳酿，吟游诗人们聚集在神庙前，为谁能获得墨涅塔赐福的花冠彼此争论。以恋爱诗闻名的帕提亚三姐妹率先展露歌喉，紧接着是有一千个奇妙比喻的老诗人鲁珀。绮音妙语并未打动女神，面前的酒杯纹丝不动。 直到一位流浪的诗人，拨弄手中七弦的竖琴，弹奏起古老莎草纸上记载的故事。千年前的风沙席卷而来，故事这样开头：在世上还有众多城邦存在的时候，曾有一座城邦遭遇了恶龙的侵袭。 「哀歌我的故国—— 「怪物高踞殿堂，贵嗣沦为恶种， 「只怪那闯入高塔的巨龙， 「蛊惑了我的王，吞吃了我国的公主……」 佳酿被女神斟饮而尽，流浪的诗人成了花冠的所有者。
E: "Mnestia, we pray to you. For if the world had no song, there shall be no song-filled spring, and no forest will sprout blooms..." After cleansing both hands by the stream, then scooping out chilled wine as an offering to the god, the bards gather before the temple, bickering over who would receive Mnestia's blessed wreath. The three sisters of Parthia, renowned for their poems of love, demonstrate their song first. They are followed by an old man, Lupes, the poet with myriad mesmerizing metaphors. Lyrics of honeyed elegance do not move the goddess, the wine cup before them unmoving. Until a wandering poet plucks the seven-stringed lyre in her hands, playing a tale written on ancient papyrus. Sand and winds from a millennia ago sweep across, and the story starts thus — In an age when many cities still existed in the world, a city was attacked by an evil dragon. "Lament for my homeland... A monster dwells in its palatial hall, noble heirs becoming vile scoundrels, All because of that giant dragon that breached the high tower, Corrupting my ruler, devouring my kingdom's princess..." The wine is imbibed fully by the goddess, and the wandering poet becomes the owner of their wreath.

C: 这一天机械时清晨六点，侵入性「极佳念头」准点步入机械城某只一角兽的脑内——机械城未经改造的动物已不多了。从此，在所有令人沮丧的失败、糗事、恐惧面前，囤积的「极佳念头」都能让这只一角兽安然度过难关。它开始以悲伤为乐，以痛苦为乐，压力成为兴奋递质分泌的信号——直到某天它意识到，自己已无师自通，学会将「情绪」变成可自由调节的参数。此后，它永远信心满满，一往无前——它变成了一只「彩虹一角兽」。
E: Following the machine era calendar, on this day at six in the morning, the invasive "Revelrous" entered the mind of a mono-horned beast in the Mechanical City. Only paltry few unmodified animals remained in the city. Hence, fueled by the "Revelrous" contagion, the mono-horned beast was able to overcome all manner of despairing defeats, awkward incidents, and crippling moments of dread. Sadness became joy for it, pain became pleasure, and pressure became a trigger for secreting excitatory neurotransmitters — Until one day it realized it had taught itself how to convert "mood" into a freely adjustable parameter. Thereafter, its confidence was perpetually high and unshakable, turning it into a "Rainbow-Radiant Unicorn."

C: 在每座城邦犄角旮旯的小巷中，总有一群兜售泰坦赐福的商贩，诸如死亡体验药丸、智慧增长圣水、巧言蜜语神油等等。而那渎神的鳞粉，也是其中之一。小贩会告诉你捕捉一百只金蝶才能制作一袋鳞粉，抹了鳞粉的眼睛看满脸褶皱的老太太都像是行走的墨涅塔。鉴于这种鳞粉引发了一系列匪夷所思的社会事件，大多数城邦都将其列为违禁品。
E: In the hidden alleyways of every city-state, there are always vendors peddling Titan's blessings, like Death Experience Pills, Elixirs of Wisdom, and Honeyed Tongue Oils. That blasphemous scale dust is also one of the products. Merchants claim that it takes a hundred golden butterflies to produce a single pouch of the insect scale dust. Once applied to the eyes, even the most wrinkled old woman appears as a walking incarnation of Mnestia. Given the bizarre social incidents this powder has caused, most city-states have classified it as a banned substance.

C: 星际和平公司业务巩固部推出的谢债发行机，打开外壳后会通过电子波粒聚象成天使计数器，公司同时推出了多种型号，包括腕戴型号与助眠抱枕型号，客户使用它时需定期投喂金币，谢债周期结束后将获得数倍收益，本质上是个投资产品。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: A debt dispenser distributed by the Business Consolidation Department of the Interastral Peace Corporation. Once the outer shell is opened, it will condense into an angel-shaped counter through electron particle-wave projection. The IPC simultaneously produced many types of this item, including ones that can be worn on the wrist or in the shape of hug pillows that act as sleep aids. When using it, the client needs to periodically feed it Gold Coins, and will receive returns many times higher than the principal at the end of the debt cycle. In essence, it is an investment product.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C: 决策智能
E: Decision-Making AI

C: 微微拨动回忆的末梢，你抽出一缕伤痛，扔进废弃的忆泡缸。库维达星云的污染泄露，挚爱的血亲在大撤离中失散，饲养多年的慧尾歌鸲也在笼子里病逝，过多的失意让少年封闭了自己，他来到你的面前，希冀将整个人生都删去。\n\n展开备用的记忆库，赴死的战士，远行的旅人，他们把这些捐赠给你，作为治疗的回礼。你细心挑选合适的药品，将它们按比例调配。不能打破的约定，重建惨淡家园的豪情，微不足道的修改，足以为人带来战胜现实的勇气。少年踏上了寻找亲人的旅途，你关上门，迎来短暂的休憩。
E: You gently stir the ends of memory, extracting a strand of pain and then throwing it into an abandoned Memory Bubble tank. Having experienced separation from his beloved family in the Great Evacuation and the death of his long-kept intellitail songbird in the cage following a contaminant leak in the Kuvida Nebula, a depressed young man became withdrawn to the whole world and came to you, hoping to have his whole life deleted.\n\nYou open the backup memory bank. Warriors heading to the battlefield and travelers on an expedition gave you their memories in return for your treatment. Meticulously, you select the suitable medicine and mix them according to the correct proportion. An unbreakable promise, the determination to rebuild broken homes, and insignificant changes are enough to embolden a person to overcome reality. As he embarks on the journey to reunite with his family, you close the door and take a short break.

C:
空洞的深渊在迷梦中盘旋，比世上最昏暗的角落还要幽深，以至于无光的背景也能为它投下一道道阴影。你凝视那片漩涡，生命被无限延长，分割成碎片，它们纷纷坠落，从地上掉进天空里。你跳起身来，想要留住自己的分身，伸出手触摸到的，却是冰冷的墙壁。

这是你的家，也可能不是，满是蛀洞的记忆逐渐腐化。你看见另一个自己走了出去，打开门，却一脚跌进了黑暗里，你试图冲上去拽住他，可怎么也找不到两只消失的手臂。

你茫然地抬起头，太阳沉没进大海，像融化的雪花，你也跟着融化，自我消解，或许你就是太阳？你再度落入深渊。
E:
The spiraling, fathomless abyss hovers in the misted dream, deeper and darker than the dimmest corner of the world, where even the lightless background can also cast slices of shadows on it. You gaze at that vortex, your life infinitely extended, diced into shards that flow and fall, from the ground into the sky. You jump up, hoping to keep your doppelganger. But when you stretch out your hand to touch it, all you can feel is a cold wall.

This is your home, but it may also not be, your memories full of holes gradually rotting away. You see your other self walk out, open the door, but fall right into darkness with one step. You try to rush over and catch him, but you just can't seem to find your vanished arms.

You raise your head in bewilderment — the sun has sunk into the great sea, and like melted flakes of snow, you also start to melt. You are fading into yourself — perhaps you are the sun? You once again fall into the abyss.

C:
广场上众人在呼喊，他们砸毁白水晶的雕像，将治愈瘟疫的学者视作叛徒。他们闯进图书馆，焚烧岁月的书籍，抹消史书上英雄们的功绩。你知道怎么引导一场毁灭，当人们完全遗忘文明的过往，唾弃自我的根基，无需负创神的军队，枯死的社会自会迎接祂的降临。

你掘开他们的坟墓，讥讽恶臭的史卷，它们比不上时尚的航船，比不上星际网络里的诸多乐趣。于是他们也掘开自己的坟墓，不再有葬身之地，今天的我遗忘掉昨天，然后在明天杀死今天的自己。

多美的一幕，亲手掐死一个文明。
E:
The shouts of people echo through the plaza as they smash the white crystal statue and view the scholar who found the cure to the plague as a traitor. They charge into the libraries, burning all records of the past, and erasing the achievements of heroes from history. You know how to guide an annihilation. Once people have completely forgotten all of their past civilization and spat on the foundations of themselves, the withered society that remains will naturally welcome THEIR descent without needing on The Blemished One's troops.

You dig up their graves and ridicule the foul-smelling history books. They could never compare to the fashionable charm of a spaceship or the endless fun that the Interastral Network has to offer. So, they set forth digging up their own tombs. No longer do they have a place to bury themselves when dead. Today, they forget yesterday. Tomorrow, they shall murder who they are today.

Such a beautiful scene, strangling the life from an entire civilization with your own two hands.

C:
有一个词语，哪怕是庇尔波因特的富商们，也乐于在谈笑间提及，作为气氛的调剂。有一段故事，在以太网络的交流中转移，骇客们津津乐道，又把它传播向更广阔的宇宙。

你抛弃了累赘的身躯，将信息都编撰进一段模因。每当有人点击播放，语言中枢里便生长出你的分形。大脑将流行语解码进储存的数据，新的自我在认知中生根发芽。就像是附着在词语和笑话上的蠕虫，沿着联觉信标的轨迹，爬向接受感染的意识体。

有一段模因，藏身于时尚，游曳于流行，悄无声息地寄生进人们的记忆。
E:
There is a word that even the wealthiest merchants of Pier Point will happily drop into a joke to lighten the air. There is a story that spreads throughout the Aether Network, and hackers happily talk about it before spreading it far and wide throughout the universe.

You cast aside your cumbersome body and compile all of your information into a meme. Whenever someone taps to play, a new copy of you is born in their language center. Their brain decodes modern slang and stores it in their data, where a new self takes root in their cognition. Like a worm attached onto words and jokes, it crawls along the trails of the Synesthesia Beacon towards the conscious being that accepted the infection.

There is a meme that lurks within the fashionable, swims in the current of the popular, and silently becomes a parasite in the memories of humankind.

C:
新的自转周期，磁场的变换呼唤你睁开眼睛。你凝聚唾液，在巢穴边缘缓缓黏合出壁垒。透亮的胶质在真空中凝结成泥，你探出纤毛，将泥团揉搓，塑造成通路和屏障，等待它固化成坚不可摧的晶体。

新生的子嗣在堡垒中休憩，它们啃食老化的晶体，融化的汁液有如蜜糖。成年的子嗣在管道中穿行，它们将狩猎得来的蠹虫尸骸撕碎成块，作为你们的食粮。你看到有怪异的生命在你的巢穴上搭建居所，可惜，对方并不在你天然的食谱当中。

恒星的光辉落到巢穴表面，引力的位置已趋于稳定。你静静地闭上眼，等到醒来后去到下一个世界，搭建你的下一颗小行星。
E:
A new cycle of planetary spin and a shift in the magnetic field beckon you to open your eyes. You gather your saliva and meticulously bind together a barrier at the edge of your nest. Translucent gelatin congeals into mush in the vacuum as you extend your cilia, kneading the clumps, and shaping them into pathways and barriers, waiting for them to solidify into unbreakable crystals.

The newborn descendants rest in the fortress, nibbling on the aging crystals, their molten juices resembling honey. Adult scions traverse the pipes, shredding the carcasses of hunted lepismae into chunks that become your family's sustenance. You observe grotesque beings constructing dwellings on your nest, yet, alas, they are absent from your natural diet.

The light of stars cascades onto the surface of the nest, and the gravitational position stabilizes. You close your eyes gently, waiting to enter the next time when you awake, ready to forge your next asteroid.

C: 臭名昭著的耶佩拉兄弟会曾在入侵林德嘉诺星系时动用活体生物武器，这种基因自毁病毒会令受感染的细胞在宿主体内相互啃食，惨状环生。但无休无止的增殖让巢都内的生物群很快超出了控制，它们以狂暴的姿态反过来吞没了兄弟会的阵地，令这群恶棍不得不放弃被卷入的同僚，断尾求生。有人称这起事件背后是永火官邸在作祟，证据则是日后两股势力永无宁日的死斗。
E: The infamous Jepella Brotherhood used live biological weapons when they invaded the Lindgano star system. The virus that causes genes to self-destruct makes infected cells consume each other within the host's body, creating appalling calamities. However, the endless multiplication made the horde of living beings within the Nest Capital soon go out of control. Driven berserk, they turned on the Brotherhood and devoured the invaders' camp, making these thugs have no chance but to give up the brethren embroiled in it, discarding what they could to stay alive. Some claimed the Ever-Flame Mansion was behind this event, with the evidence being the unending death feud between the two organizations that followed in days to come.
