C: 高洁正直的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，出身于血脉高贵的朗道家族。\n在时刻遭受风雪侵凌的贝洛伯格，人们的衣食住行尚能如旧——\n正是因为杰帕德与他率领的银鬃铁卫在守护这平淡无奇的日常生活。
E: The honorable and upstanding captain of the Silvermane Guards who bears the noble Landau family name.\nIn the frost-whipped city of Belobog, life can still go on in normality...\nThis is in no small part thanks to Gepard and his Silvermane Guards who protect the peace of everyday life.

C: 行事周密的银鬃铁卫情报官，年纪不大但头脑出众。\n无论是部队调动、物资分配还是地形状况，佩拉都能冷静地即问即答，毫无错漏。\n至于佩拉的手机壳…「这与工作无关，长官。」
E: The meticulous Intelligence Officer of the Silvermane Guards. While young, she is undeniably brilliant.\nWhether it relates to maneuvering troops, distributing supplies, or analyzing terrain, Pela can answer any problems with calm certainty.\nAs for her phone case... "It has nothing to do with work, captain."

C: 「——日志 筑城纪元████年██月██日。」 「在磐岩镇东南方向的垃圾填埋场中发现一人类幼年女性。」 「经扫描，未见该幼童存在任何机体组织结构破坏或功能障碍，但精神状况较不稳定，对沟通自身状况一事表现抗拒，回避倾向明显。」 「继续尝试与其交流，成功获得部分信息。」 「幼童开始哭泣，长达三小时零七分。」 「该幼童名为克拉拉，身世不明。」 「结论：将其带回基地观察，进一步收集相关信息，以便生成后续处置方案。」
E: "— Log ██/██/████ AF." "A female child discovered in a landfill to the southeast of Boulder Town." "Scans show the child has no structural damage or functional issues, but her mental state was relatively unstable. She is resistant to questions about her condition and clearly wanted to avoid the subject." "I have continued attempting to communicate with her, and successfully obtained some information." "The child begins to cry, lasting three hours and seven minutes." "The child's name is Clara. Her background is unknown." "Conclusion: Take her back to base for observations, and collect further information to generate a follow-up plan to take care of her."

C: 他只能见一片殷红，嘴里腥甜，四肢绵软 ——自己应是死了。 「记住了么？」 他茫然地张了张嘴，那声响如未开化的野兽。 喉咙里的声音戛然而止，冰冷的硬物穿过了他。 如此反复，足有千次。 好生奇妙。肌理断裂时，他能听见筋骨桥接弥合的细微声响。 好生奇妙。体内的怪物被滋养着，他却要任它长为庞然巨物。 好生奇妙。他已丧失生存的信念，躯体却自顾自地恢复如初。 好生奇妙。 当剑再次试图刺穿他的身体之前，他抓住了剑，慢慢起身。 「记住了么？」 他对上女人血红的眼睛，脑中仍是一片空白 ——他再一次被刺穿。 「记住死亡的感觉，带给他们。」 眼底的殷红又泛了上来，他盯着地上那杀他的剑，剑刃碎了半截。 「起来，让我再杀你一次。」
E: The only thing he could sense was a splotch of crimson in his sight and the taste of iron in his mouth. His limbs were unresponsive. — He must have died. "Do you remember?" He opened his mouth, lost, his voice as coarse as a savage beast's. The sound from his throat stopped abruptly as the cold, hard object penetrated his torso. Again and again, this repeated for thousands of times. How marvelous. When his muscle fibers tore open, he could hear the tiny sounds of tendons bridging and reconnecting. How marvelous. The monster in his body was being nourished, but he would let it grow into a massive beast. How marvelous. He had already lost all will to live, but his body regenerated without any consideration for his preferences. How marvelous. Before the sword pierced his body once more, he grabbed it with his bare hands and slowly stood up. "Do you remember now?" He met the woman's blood-red eyes, his mind still empty. — He was run through by the sword once again. "Remember the feeling of death, and bring it to them." Crimson resurfaced in his vision. He stared at the sword that killed him. The blade was broken in half and lying on the ground. "Rise, and let me kill you once more."

C:
在云骑军的军籍文卷中记录了景元如何寻得少年，又力排众议，将他编入军中的始末。然而独独在家系一栏中，彦卿血脉传承相关的信息却付之阙如。

举凡将才，多半自幼显露天资。千年以来，自巡猎中脱颖而出的麒麟儿不可谓不多。只是尚未成年便被授予了军职，时人耳闻，评说一句「将军荒唐」也不为过。

然而天才的少年初上战阵的那一幕更是大放异彩，让所有反对的声音就此沉默。

巡猎远星时，丰饶之民所造的器兽「防风」身形巨硕，碾碎军阵如践蝼蚁。但少年仅在照面间轻易斩去其头颅，令敌势溃散，不战而捷。

至于其后那些战绩：随景元一同破去步离人的贪狼铁阵，斩了三位巢父；又与造翼者激战，最终击沉了遮天蔽日的拏云舰…这些，不过是其胆识与剑艺的小小注脚罢了。
E:
It's recorded in the military annals of the Cloud Knights how Jing Yuan came to discover the young boy, stood his ground against public opinion, and incorporated him into the armed forces. However, in the family lineage column, Yanqing's lineage was relegated to the category of unknown.

Most talented officers display military talent from childhood. For millennia, several talented unicorns have emerged ahead of the pack during the hunt. However, Yanqing earned a military commission before he even reached the age of majority. Some would criticize that "the general is absurd" on this matter.

However, this genius' debut on the battlefield was even more explosive, and any critical voices soon fell silent.

When hunting near a distant star, the monstrously huge mechabeast Windguard created by the Denizens of Abundance was pulverizing defense forces as though they were ants. But this young boy met against it face-to-face, claiming its head and routing the enemy to the point of collapse.

As for subsequent victories: He broke the borisin's Lupine Avarice formation with Jing Yuan, beheading three Brood Lords. He also fought viciously against the wingweavers, ultimately sinking their almighty Cloudseizer Fleet... These are just a small footnote in the annals of his courageous swordplay.

C: 「姐姐…姐姐！」 她惊觉自己身处在蓝天下，周遭麦浪起伏，昂扬生长。 她笑着将细枝和一早捡来的花朵编在一起，戴在怀中女孩小小的脑袋上。女孩回过脸瞧她，笑得比花朵更明亮。 她紧紧捧着这张脸，发誓要永远保护这张纤巧、脆弱的脸，发誓要为她做很多很多。 「姐姐…姐姐！」 才一走神，这张脸就变宽了，开阔了。那俊俏的五官间已经没有一丝需要她呵护的柔弱，只有坚毅。这张脸曾与自己并肩行走，一同登上星槎，远征域外。 风沙、冰霜、泥痕…时间在这张深爱的脸上留下许多尘垢。但自己的手总会轻柔细致地抹去一切。 和自己一样，妹妹已经是个大人了。她不该当着众人的面，像总是操心的母亲那般为她擦拭。但她又怎么能轻易放手呢？她发过誓要永远保护这张脸，发誓要做很多很多。 「姐姐…姐姐！」 她抬头已身在火与血的焦土之上，地上是数千张熟悉却早已丧失生机的脸庞，妹妹的脸也在其中。 但她找不到自己的脸。 「我能救她。我能救回你们所有人。只消挥挥众手中的一枝，我就可以教血肉从白骨上长回去，让花瓣从泥尘落回花蕊。你很清楚。」 她的身下，生有千面的怪树在对她说话，也是在对所有人说话。祂挥舞枝条，枝干深扎大地。 「我乃倏忽，我乃万古。从我开始，尔等将获得真正的长生。」 她饮泣闭目，没有了反抗的余力。此刻她已是这巨树上微不足道的一颗果实，无法向雄伟的根须抗辩。 一柄燃烧的巨剑自天而降，烧尽了空气中甜腻的腐臭味。身着重甲的魁伟男子如同流星般坠入战场，怒啸着冲向巨树。那怪树如同花朵般再度绽开，金色的枝干猛烈生长，紧紧纠缠住宿敌。 「每一次克服死亡，皆是无上喜乐。和他们一样，你的血肉微不足道，但你的痛苦或能取悦我。」 枝干尖笑着，让每一个头颅开口代祂说一个字，接连成句：「腾骁，这次你打算用什么杀死我？我很期待。」 「用我自己。」男人平静回应。他的背后，金色的幻影将巨刃自天搠下，直贯大地。 「姐姐…姐姐！」 呼喊越发急切，她感到自己再次被筛选、被删除、被合并，塞进狭窄有限的自我中。 「所谓的幽府判官、十王敕使，也不过如此。」 如同所有从梦中惊醒的人一般，她回到了自己的身体，却忘记了刚才的梦。白衣判官脑海一阵恍惚。
E: "Sister... sister!" She was shocked to discover herself beneath an azure sky, surrounded by lush undulating waves of wheat growing. She smiled as she braided together the twigs and flowers she'd picked up earlier, placing this wreath on the tiny head of the little girl in her lap. The girl turned back to look at her, smiling even more brightly than the flowers. She held onto this face tightly, vowing to eternally protect this delicate, fragile face — vowing to do many, many things for her. "Sister... sister!" As soon as she was distracted, this face relaxed and grew broader. There was no trace of weakness in those gorgeous eyes that needed her care — only perseverance. This face once walked side-by-side with her, boarding starskiffs together and cruising out beyond the borders. Sandstorms, frost, mud marks... Time has left behind much dirt upon this face. But these hands will always gently and meticulously wipe away everything. Just like herself, her sister has grown and matured. She shouldn't always wipe her sister's face clean in front of everyone like an anxious mother. But how could she ever just let go of things? She vowed to protect this face forever — vowing to do many, many things. "Sister... sister!" She looked up from the blood and fire of the scorched earth. On the ground lay thousands of familiar but lifeless faces, including that of her sister. But she couldn't find her own face. "I can save her. I can save all of you. All it takes is a wave of the branch and I can teach flesh to regrow from the mere bones or let petals rise up out of the dust to the flower once more. You know very well I can." Underneath her, a strange tree with a thousand faces spoke to her, and to everyone. THEY waved THEIR branches, penetrating deep into the earth. "I am Shuhu. I am eternal. From me, you shall gain true immortality." Sobbing, she closed her eyes, incapable of providing any resistance. At this moment, she was just an insignificant fruit upon this giant tree, powerless against mighty roots. A colossal, blazing sword plunged down from the heavens, scorching away the sweet yet putrid atmosphere. A towering figure in formidable armor crashed onto the battlefield like a meteor, bellowing at the towering tree. The strange tree blossomed once more like a perennial flower, its golden branches growing ferociously to tightly entangle the enemy. "Each time you overcome death, I am beyond overjoyed. Like them, your flesh and blood are insignificant, but your pain is something that pleases me." The branches laughed shrilly, letting each head speak one word on THEIR behalf, stringing together a sentence, "Teng Xiao, what do you plan on using to kill me this time? I'm curious." "With myself." The man replies calmly. Behind him, the golden illusion plunges the colossal blade straight down into the ground from high up in the sky. "Sister... sister!" The cries grow more urgent. She could feel herself being once again filtered, deleted, merged, and stuffed into a narrow and limited self. "These so-called Judges of the Netherworld and envoys of the Ten Lords truly amount to nothing." Like everyone who jolts awake from a dream, she returns to her body but has forgotten the momentary dream. The judge dressed in white feels befuddled.

C: 「…从锻刀者留下的残卷可知，出云曾一度来到破灭边缘。为求存续，他们以▇▇▇▇锻刀，持刀者被奉为救国的英雄。 遗憾的是，这个世界已经从星图上消失了，历史的真相无处可寻，『记忆』也不复存在。武装考古学派抵达时，星系中只流淌着「神秘」的歌谣：无边的雨自▇▇中如泪涌出，微茫的雨幕下，出云国的孑遗背对被▇▇▇▇▇▇抹去的故乡……」 ——「执笔者」奥本海默
E: "...Through the scrolls left behind by the blade forger, we have learned that Izumo was once on the brink of destruction. In order to survive, they forged blades from the ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇, and those who wielded them were hailed as the saviors of their realm. Unfortunately, the world has long vanished from the astral charts. The truth of history eludes us, and the Remembrance no longer exists. When the Armed Archaeologists arrived, the galaxy resounded solely with the melody of the Enigmata: ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇ tears, rain's boundless outpour. Beneath faint curtain, the survivor departs from her shore. Her homeland, ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇..." — Oppenheimer, the Recorder

C: 「▇▇▇月▇▇日 我们初见阿雅的时候，她说喜欢缇里西庇俄丝这个名字，听起来又高贵又美丽，就像她编织的衣服。我们问她，就为了这个把我们留下？她摇摇头，说，主要是想听老师每天晚上讲故事。 当时阿雅也是个姑娘，又怕黑又怕鬼，想到她嘴馋了还要拉上我们偷偷去厨房吃晚上剩下的面包，我们就忍不住想笑。时光是个雕刻家，像刻律德菈、海瑟音一样，现在阿雅出落得多么美丽啊！ 就像我们平时教导的那样，阿雅没有让任何人失望，她手中的金丝就像密网一般，任何敌人都无法飞出她的指尖。 可那活在阴影中的清洗者在返程途中偷袭了我们的队伍，服务于元老院的刺客组织绝不允许能领导圣城奥赫玛的黄金裔成长起来。但我们也一样，宁愿选择牺牲自己，也绝不会眼睁睁地看着年轻的英雄夭折—— 我们顺利用百界门度过了这次劫难，但意识也模糊了一分…上一次用百界门以后，我还以为再也找不到缇宁和缇宝了…… 没事的，阿雅。还不是现在，我们只需要休息一会，一会便好…… 只是旅程的脚步，必须要加快了啊……」 ——一封字迹虚弱的日记 缇安在回忆，缇宁提笔写，缇宝来补充
E: "Date: ▇▇▇ / ▇▇ The first time we met Agy, she told us she was fond of the name Tribios, praising it as noble and beautiful, much like the garments she crafted. We asked if that was her sole reason for keeping us around. She shook her head, explaining she mainly wanted to hear this teacher's nightly tales. Agy was also just a girl back then, afraid of the dark and ghosts. Remembering how her cravings led us on stealthy trips to the kitchen for leftover bread at night always brings a smile to our faces. Time is a sculptor, and having shaped Cerydra and Hysilens, now it has rendered Agy beautifully. Agy never lets anyone down, just as we've always taught her. Her golden threads weave a dense net, ensnaring any foe that dares come close to her fingertips. Yet the Cleaners who dwell in the shadows ambushed our team on the return journey. The assassins loyal to the Council of Elders would never allow the growth of Chrysos Heir who could lead the holy city of Okhema. We are no different. We, too, would rather sacrifice ourselves rather than stand by and look on as the young heroes' lives were cut short — We managed to escape the ordeal using the Century Gate, though our consciousness grew hazy by one more portion... After the last passage through the Century Gate, I feared we'd never find Trinnon and Tribbie again... Don't worry, Agy. It's not our time yet. We just need a brief rest, and we'll be back on our feet... But we must hasten our steps now..." — A diary with weaker and weaker handwriting Reminisced by Trianne, recorded by Trinnon, and finalized by Tribbie

C: 驻守冰原的旧忆
E: Old Memories of the Icy Post

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n你们回到了歌德宾馆，这里温暖的地髓灯光和空气中氤氲的茶香使你们感到安心。\n在正式洗漱休息之前尚有时间在酒店中转转，三月七和丹恒似乎也想和你在这里聊一聊——自由安排睡前的安适时光吧。
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nYou return to the Goethe Hotel. The warm Geomarrow lights and the tea fragrance in the air make you feel at ease.\nThere's still some time to walk around the hotel before washing up and getting ready for bed. It seems like March 7th and Dan Heng also wants to speak with you — arrange your time before sleeping as you wish.

C: 你的去路被一辆报废矿车强行隔断。在希儿指示下，你们决定在附近搜集备用件修理矿车，修好后再把矿车移走。\n「找东找西又得累个半死，」你不禁想，「可惜杨叔不在，要不一个黑洞全都给他扬了…」
E: The way forward is cut off by a mine cart out of order. With Seele's instructions, you decide to search for backup parts in the area to repair the mine cart and move it out of the way.\n"It's gonna be hectic trying to look for the parts." You can't help but picture Mr. Yang destroying the cart with his black hole.

C:
你们修好了报废矿车，并将它从道路上移走，打通了继续向下的道路。
此处已近矿洞底部，你注意到希儿神色警惕，眼神也变得如尖刀般锐利…
她的眼神本来就吓人，是什么能让她露出比以往更甚的表情？你不知道，但你十分清楚一件事——
危险正在迫近，你应当做好万全准备。
E:
You fix the out of order mine cart and move it out of the way, opening the path continuing downward.
This is near the bottom of the mines and you notice Seele's cautious expression and sharp gaze...
Her expression is normally scary enough already, so what is it that would make her show an even more serious look? You're not sure, but there is one thing that you are certain of...
Danger is closing in and you should make yourself prepared.

C:
可可利亚不愧为大守护者。为了庆祝你们重返上层区，她甚至悉心安排银鬃铁卫夹道欢迎，可谓是关怀备至。
但铁卫们却不似可可利亚那般贴心——他们为了尽快完成任务，似乎只想把你五花大绑之后丢进克里珀堡。
尽管你们成功躲进了机械屋，但丹恒似乎对这位与大守护者关系匪浅的贵族千金有所提防。
眼下还是先与希露瓦交涉，试探她的底细为妙。
E:
The Supreme Guardian Cocolia has her Silvermane Guards lined up on both sides of the road to welcome you and your companions back to the Overworld. Such a grand reception can only come from a worthy ruler.
The Guards, however, are not so keen on the idea of putting up a show. To complete their task as soon as possible, they'd rather see you hogtied and thrown into the Qlipoth Fort. 
Although you've managed to hide in the workshop, Dan Heng seems to have his guard up against the noble girl with complex relations with the Supreme Guardian.
It'd be best to talk with Serval first and see what you can find out about her.

C: 布洛妮娅捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。\n去见娜塔莎，将这个振奋人心的消息传达给下层区的每个居民吧。
E: Bronya sent news that the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld is about to lift after more than a decade.\nGo meet Natasha and pass this exciting news to every Underworld resident.

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓之旅终于圆满地告一段落了。\n对于你的首次任务，姬子和瓦尔特的评价颇高。\n你可以再和瓦尔特聊聊，看看他能否解答萦绕于脑海的一些疑问。
E: The trailblazing expedition on Jarilo-VI has finally reached a satisfying conclusion.\nHimeko and Welt both give high praises for your first mission.\nYou can keep chatting with Welt and see if he can answer some of the questions lingering in your mind.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n不速之客卡芙卡向列车发出前往仙舟罗浮的邀约，但这份邀约的背后却潜藏着不怀好意的味道。你、三月七还有丹恒决心已定，心念一同——列车的方向绝不会轻易为外人左右。\n好啦，现在你可以回到观景车厢里，投出决定下一站的神圣一票了吧。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nIn a surprise move, Kafka invites the Express to visit the Xianzhou Luofu, but this invitation sounds ominous and could be a trap. March 7th, Dan Heng, and you have made up your minds and are of similar beliefs — The directions of the Express will not be altered by external forces.\nAlright, now you can return to the Parlor Car, and cast your hallowed vote for your next destination.

C: 没想到这空无一人的洞天里竟然还有一位老师傅坚守不去，当真是可歌可泣。\n不打不相识，你们得知这位名唤公输师傅的工匠忧心洪炉的安危，可惜势单力孤，面对疯长的根须束手无策。这岂能难倒急公好义的开拓者们？
E: No one expected an old master to remain at his post in this abandoned delve. His spirits are applaudable.\nYou learn that this man, Master Gongshu, is concerned about the furnace's safety. However, he alone could do little against the rampaging roots. As virtuous and just trailblazers, such a task would be a piece of cake for you!

C: 新的旅程即将开始。查看来自列车组的短信，确认大家是否做好准备了吧。
E: A new journey is about to begin. View the message from the Crew and check to see if everyone is prepared.

C: 经历了一番天旋地转的探索，你发现自己竟然来到了大厅的天花板上。\n黄泉似乎对此早已司空见惯，并表示梦境的出口就在前方不远处。
E: After a disorienting exploration, you realize that you have somehow ended up on the lobby ceiling.\nAcheron seems to be long accustomed to this and simply points out the dreamscape exit just ahead.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 瓦尔特指出兹事体大，必须时刻做好最坏的打算。而为了避免那种结局最终出现，他向众人郑重告别，随后以身入局，与天环族兄妹一道前去与「梦主」展开交涉，留下你们继续寻找其他可行的解决办法。为此，加拉赫也终于愿意将全部真相和盘托出——出于对家族天然的不信任，此前他并未完全交代有关「钟表匠」的一切。\n据加拉赫所说，那位「钟表匠」似乎为星穹列车留下了一份宝贵的遗产…而这份遗产或许就是封印星核的关键。
E: Welt points out the severity of the situation and how one must always be prepared for the worst-case scenario. In an effort to avert the unthinkable, he bids a solemn farewell to everyone before throwing himself into the fray by accompanying the Halovian siblings on their journey to open negotiations with the Dreammaster. This leaves you to continue searching for other ways to avert the situation. To this end, Gallagher finally becomes willing to reveal the whole truth... Due to his innate distrust of The Family, he had not previously exposed everything regarding the "Watchmaker."\nGallagher explains that the "Watchmaker" seems to have left behind a precious inheritance for the Astral Express... And that this inheritance could perhaps be the key to sealing the Stellaron.

C: 你成功击败了那位炽热如烈焰的骑士，拿下「巨星之路」的入场券。\n你们很快就将受到知更鸟小姐的亲自接见…不对，是和你们已经离匹诺康尼大剧院和星核近在咫尺——记住仓鼠球骑士的名言：「快快快快快」！
E: You successfully defeat the knight whose passion was like a burning flame, and claim your entry ticket to the "Path of the Superstar."\nYou will soon receive a personal reception from Miss Robin herself... No, you are already within reach of the Penacony Grand Theater and the Stellaron! Remember the famous words of Hamster Ball Knight: "Go, go, go, go!"

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n在「白日梦」酒店里走走看看，与同伴会合，整理一下现状吧。
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened during this time?\nTake a look around The Reverie, regroup with your companions, and find out what's been going on.

C: 你在入梦池中醒来，惊觉自己已经返回现实「白日梦」酒店。根据三月七的说法，这次你确实是从太一之梦中醒来了——在你昏迷期间，星核已被封印，而橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。她还说列车组受到了邀请，要去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。\n高档游轮、豪华宴会…这才是庆功宴该有的样子。还等什么？做好准备就出发吧。
E: You wake up in the dreampool and find yourself back in the real Reverie Hotel. According to March 7th, you really have woken up this time from Ena's Dream — the Stellaron was sealed while you were out, and all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. She also said that The Family has invited the Crew to The Family's Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.\nHigh-end cruise ships, luxury banquets... Now THIS is what a celebration banquet ought to look like. What else are you waiting for? Get ready to set off.

C: 谐乐大典开幕式不出意外地出意外了：那位爱笑的女孩费心布局，四处分发按钮，显然就是为了这一刻。\n<unbreak>999</unbreak>枚虚数中子弹…说真的，她到底是从哪儿搞来这么多大规模杀伤性武器的？但无论如何，身为无名客的你必须挺身而出，守护美梦——按图索骥，火速解决危机吧。
E: As expected, something unexpected happened during the opening of the Charmony Festival: That laughter-worshiping girl had painstakingly laid out buttons everywhere obviously for precisely this moment.\n<unbreak>999</unbreak> imaginary neutron bombs... seriously, how on earth did she get her hands on so many weapons of mass destruction? But in any case, as one of the Nameless, you are duty-bound to stand up and protect the Dreamjoy: Follow the clues and overcome the crisis as soon as possible.

C: 进入折纸大学的第一场考试便是分配院系的「测弦考试」，虽然这场考试不计分也不会挂科，但考试二字就令人胆寒——哪怕你没上过学也是如此。\n或许在漫长的宇宙文明演化中，这种恐惧早已刻入了高等智慧生命的基因
E: Your first examination upon joining Paperfold University is the Tuning Test, which determines your school. While this examination is not graded and cannot be failed, the term "test" evokes unease nonetheless, even if you have never attended a school.\nPerhaps such fear has long been engraved in the genes of all highly intelligent life forms in the evolution of universal civilization.

C: 临行时，三月七似乎身体抱恙……
E: When setting off, March 7th seems to be feeling unwell...

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 在这段不存在的记忆中，{NICKNAME}竟得到了记忆星神浮黎的瞥视。也许是欧洛尼斯的馈赠，{F#她}{M#他}的身边出现了一个奇妙的生物。{F#她}{M#他}看上去有些…惆怅？好在{F#她}{M#他}很快就振作起来了。
E: In this nonexistent memory, {NICKNAME} actually received a glance from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance. A marvelous creature appeared next to {F#her}{M#him}, perhaps a gift from Oronyx. {NICKNAME} seems a little... despondent, but thankfully {F#she}{M#he} quickly regained composure.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 虽然我们赢下了与盗火行者的战斗，却永远地失去了缇安……
E: Though we won the fight against the Flame Reaver, we have lost Trianne forever.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the divine role of Time.\nTrailblazers always face moments like this, where their fate becomes deeply entwined with that of others... Yet only {NICKNAME} can decide where {F#her}{M#his} destiny leads.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n「长老」并非希望你成为一名「杀人不眨眼的刽子手」，而是希望你能充分理解生与死的重量后，再饱含敬意地完成你那与生俱来的使命。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, the city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nThe "Elder" does not wish that you become a merciless executioner, but that you would fully understand the weight of life and death, then carry out with utmost respect the duty with which you were born.

C: 一位迷途者重返人间绝非易举。死亡的呢喃甘美而宁静，倘若意志不足，必将被冥府的长臂死死牵制。\n不要回头，向前看。走出冥界，回到人间。
E: It is not easy for a lost soul to return to the mortal realm. The whispers of Death are sweet and alluring. If your determination wavers, you will succumb and be forever ensnared by the netherworld's grasp.\nDo not turn around. Look forward. Leave the nether realm and return to the mortal realm.

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n航线会议要开始了，要是真记不得了，列车组的大家会告诉你的。\n说真的，是谁把这么没有品味的画放在你的房间里了？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nThe navigation meeting is about to begin. If you had truly forgotten, the Crew would fill you in.\nBy the way, who put that tasteless painting in your room?

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，还有谁的记忆？
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine, whose else could they be?

C: 在这永恒的居所，昔涟保护着银河众生的记忆，却也几乎散尽了自我。我必须与她一同铭记被铁墓抹消的银河众生，踏上记忆的命途，为故事写下不同的结局。
E: In this eternal dwelling, Cyrene guards the memories of all cosmic beings, yet has almost lost herself in the process. I must join her in remembering those erased by the Irontomb, embark on the Path of Remembrance, and write a different ending to the story.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 在第一可疑藏匿点蹲守失败后，拉明娜继续履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹。在她的带领下，你结结实实地一脚踩入了水魈布设的圈套。所幸拉明娜随身携带治愈药剂，怪物突袭终成了一场虚妄的陷阱。\n经历连环挫败，你与拉明娜改换策略，重审「宓堂传语」，前往密信所指地点，这一次，绝不失手。
E: You have gained nothing at the first of the suspected hiding places. Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. Under her guidance, you step into the trap set by the Xenohydro. Thankfully, Lamina brought some healing potions with her. The surprise monster attack turns out to be a fabricated pitfall.\nAfter a series of failures, you decide to change your strategy and re-examine the Letter From Locus Silentii. You head to the place the letter points out, and you won't miss again this time.

C: 在艾丝妲的苦心与你的帮助下，拉明娜理解了「独立」的真意。\n只有「波少」受伤的世界达成了。
E: Through Asta's effort and with your help, Lamina understands the meaning of independence.\nMaster Capote is the only loser in this incident.

C: 由于你拿捏着古恩实验不端的把柄，他按照你的抉择处置了原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>，也就是所谓的希拉。\n而你也见证了选择的代价。
E: Using the unethical nature of Gunn's experiment as leverage, you persuade him to do just as you decided and dispose of Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>, also known as "Sheila."\nYou get to witness the price of choice.

C: 前往其他房间深入调查
E: Go to other rooms to investigate more deeply

C: 与艾丝妲进行远程通信，击败引发能量波动的怪物
E: Communicate with Asta remotely and defeat monsters causing the energy fluctuations

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有右侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the right

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 至此，事件终于告一段落。对于这个结果，你并不意外——不如说现在这样，才更符合你对黑塔的认知。
E: At this point, the incident has finally come to an end. You are not surprised by this outcome — rather, this is now more in line with your perception of the Herta Space Station.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 原来科鲁泽就是一直给诊所寄匿名包裹的好心人，你决定将这个消息告诉娜塔莎，并向娜塔莎询问科鲁泽妻儿的消息，或许娜塔莎会知道什么。而这就是你能为科鲁泽所做的所有了。
E: It turns out that Kluzer was the one who kept sending anonymous care packages to the clinic. You decide to share the news with Natasha, and ask her if she knows about Kluzer's wife and children. This is all you can do for him.

C: 你与克拉拉循着粗心窃贼的痕迹来到了一处机械垃圾填埋场，并在这里听到了异响。\n这是否暗示着零件大盗就在此处？你不知道，但你可以去响动的来源确认这一问题的答案。
E: You arrive at a machine landfill as you and Clara followed the tracks of the careless thief, and you hear some odd sounds here.\nDoes this mean the thief is here? You are not sure, but you can answer this question by checking out the source of the sounds.

C: 史瓦罗与克拉拉各自表明了心意，但决定权在你这位拯救了贝洛伯格的英雄手中。\n慎重思考，决定帕斯卡的命运吧。
E: Svarog and Clara both stated their thoughts but you, the hero who saved Belobog, have the power to decide.\nThink carefully and decide on Pascal's fate.

C: 根据瓦尔特的说法，在雅利洛-Ⅵ的风雪减弱后，他与姬子便在此地探测到了不明信号。\n为避免这簇信号引来别有用心之人，威胁这颗尚在重生中的星球，你不妨接受瓦尔特的请求，前往指定位置进行调查。
E: According to Welt, Himeko and he had detected an unknown signal here after Jarilo-VI's blizzard had subsided.\nTo prevent this signal cluster from attracting people with ulterior motives and threatening this regenerating planet, you might as well accept Welt's request and head to the designated location to investigate.

C: 陶德向你透露了其中隐情，这竟然和他老师的失踪有关。你答应帮他收集他老师留下的标记，他将查到的坐标发给你，你来到丹鼎司，在这里收集着隐秘的学会标识，并将它们记录下来。
E: Todd revealed the secret to you, which is actually related to his teacher's disappearance. You agree to help him collect the markings left by his teacher. He sends you the coordinates he discovered, and you arrive at the Alchemy Commission, where you will collect the secret Guild markings and record them down.

C: 梅姐没有携带玉兆，也回答不上你的问题，只想着要找回散落的笔记。也许笔记上写着联系方式，你可以通过笔记联系上她的亲属，帮她找找看吧。
E: Mei doesn't have a jade abacus and can't answer your questions — she just wants to get the notes back. Perhaps there're some contact details on the notes and you can use them to contact her next of kin?

C: 星槎迷途，差之毫厘失之千里。感谢素裳的引路与保护，你和罗刹来到了因「建木」重生而陷入灾变的工造司中，救下了受伤的少女判官雪衣。\n雪衣请求你们护送她离开此处，和你的朋友们聊聊，看看他们作何打算吧。
E: With starskiff navigation, an error of mere millidegrees can result in misnavigation by lightyears. Thanks to Sushang's guidance and protection, Luocha and you arrived at the plagued Artisanship Commission due to the rebirth of Ambrosial Arbor and saved the young judge, Xueyi.\nXueyi requested you to escort her away from the place. Talk to your friends and see what they plan to do.

C: 此刻陈放在黑天鹅面前的，毫无疑问，是一个垃圾桶。一个贝洛伯格款式的垃圾桶。你本该对这一幕感到惊讶，但你没有。你早就见怪不怪了。这份见怪不怪的淡定，使你感到自己有些沧桑。
E: What stands before Black Swan in this moment is undoubtedly a trashcan. A Belobogian-style trashcan. This sight is supposed to shock you, but it does not. You have seen many strange things on your journeys. This sense of being unfazed by the bizarre makes you feel like you have really gained some life experience.

C: 竟然当着客人和爷爷的面说赠剑仪式上的宝剑是魔剑…某种程度上来说，算是小孩子童言无忌的特权了。被怀炎将军叱喝时，她那个表情完全就是不服气嘛。\n提着大剑往工造司里冲，可不得吓坏了路人吗？赶紧帮公输师傅止损吧！
E: Who would've expected Yunli to call the repatriated sword a cursed sword, in the presence of her grandfather and guests, no less... She's lucky her objection could be downplayed as the harmless words of a child, though the tongue-lashing from General Huaiyan clearly left her indignant.\nStorming over to the Artisanship Commission with a giant sword in tow, she'll only scare everyone else on her way! Help Master Gongshu put an end to this frenzy now!

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n和孤云好好聊聊吧。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nHave a chat with Guyun.

C: 纷乱的渡口，被押解运送的犯人逃脱，少年剑士霜锋出鞘，却被人捷足先登。
E: The escorted prisoner attempts to escape amidst the chaos at the harbor. The young swordsman's frosty blade unsheathes, but someone else was a step ahead of him.

C: 幽狱失守，群狼破枷，在演武仪典即将正式召开前，这场惊变打乱了一切计划。仙舟街巷间的一切看似平静如旧，但能变化形貌的狼已潜蹑于人群中。\n与此同时，在神策府中，三月七、云璃正静听怀炎将军分析局势。
E: The Shackling Prison has fallen, and a pack of wolves has broken free. This startling development has upset everyone's plans before the Wardance ceremony could even commence. While the Xianzhou alleyways seem as calm and peaceful as ever, wolves capable of shapeshifting have already hidden themselves in the crowd.\nMeanwhile, March 7th and Yunli are at the Seat of Divine Foresight, listening attentively to General Huaiyan as he breaks down the situation at hand.

C: 为了应对呼雷似假似真的袭击宣言，天击将军决定兵分三路。她将亲自担起重责——确保星槎海、长乐天等地面的安全……仅凭她一人之力？
E: In response to Hoolay's seeming promise of an assault, the Merlin's Claw decides to split her troops into three squads. As for herself, she shall shoulder the heavy responsibility of ensuring the safety of ground locations like Starskiff Haven and Exalting Sanctum. Wait... Does she intend to accomplish this all by herself?

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你做出了自认为最佳的选择——多一分则显得奢侈，少一分则显得寒酸。
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou provide what you consider to be the perfect amount — any more would be excessive, any less would be stingy.

C: 发现了一只看上去很担忧的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks distressed. Go and ask what's going on.

C: 呜呜，呜呜…有怪物呜！
E: Wubba-woo, woo-whoo... Monsters!

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n开朗的孩子想要为自己拍张照作纪念……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe outgoing kid wants to take a photo of themself as a souvenir...

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 你成功打开了火种匣。问问伊来内其中贮藏的是什么吧。
E: You successfully opened the Coreflame Casket. Ask Alain about its content.

C: 「幽灵」托付给你一件物品，并希望你能将它带向天空。试着达成她的心愿吧。
E: The "ghost" entrusts you with an item and hopes that you can bring it to the sky. Try to fulfill her wish.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n你找到了一张密钥，用它来开启控制终端，操作齿轮栈桥吧。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nYou find an encryption key. Use it to activate the control panel and control the gear bridge.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 工作圆满完成了，你的表现甚至比一些入行几百年的老员工都要好。\n快去找梓桥领取你应得的酬劳吧。
E: The job is done, and you did even better than some senior employees that have been working for a few centuries.\nGo back to Ziqiao quickly to receive your payment.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n克利克为你提供了一条计策，只要你将怪物引到他们脚下，他就能把怪物解决。
E: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nKilik has provided you with a solution. If you can get the monsters beneath his and Kelok's feet, they can solve the monster problem.

C: 在欢宴无休止的海滨之城，所有人都在幻境中迎来无忧无虑的幸福生活——不过，维吉妮娅却好像有些烦恼……
E: In the coastal city of endless festivities, everyone basks in a carefree, happy life in the fantasia — except Verginia, who seems to be troubled...

C: 阿波罗尼此行的终点似乎就是雅努斯迷津…他想用这台装置得知些什么？
E: The destination of Apollonius's trip seemed to be the Janus' Maze... What was he trying to learn through this device?

C: 在欢宴无休止的海滨之城，所有人都在幻境中迎来无忧无虑的幸福生活——不过，维吉妮娅却好像有些烦恼……
E: In the coastal city of endless festivities, everyone basks in a carefree, happy life in the fantasia — except Verginia, who seems to be troubled...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield Alisa Rand's Lance in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 神兵已成，胜利就在眼前。西衍先生越讲越激动，眉毛几乎要飞到天灵盖上去，声音也愈发洪亮：「此时，在{NICKNAME}心中只有一个念头——消灭绝灭大君，保得仙舟万代太平。」」
E: The divine weapon has been completed, and victory is within reach. Mr. Xiyan is becoming more and more excited as he tells the story. His eyes are open wide as saucers and his voice gets louder and louder: "At this time, there is only one thought in {NICKNAME}'s head — The Lord Ravager must be destroyed so the Xianzhou can remain in peace."

C: 霄老大看不惯金人巷一成不变的状态，被迫相信公司会更好，但是他现在有了新的选择——「金人巷复兴计划」。\n霄老大同意与码头建立商业合作，商会也应该拿出诚意将同功坊纳入规划之中。
E: Mr. Xiao is fed up with Aurum Alley's stagnancy and forced himself to believe that the IPC would provide a better future. However, now he has a new choice in the form of the "Aurum Alley Revival Project."\nMr. Xiao has agreed to establish business relations with the docks, and the merchant guild should also offer something back by including Artistry Hardware into their plans.

C: 阳光宣告了清晨的脚步，你也该继续踏上冠军之路了。
E: The sunlight declares the arrival of a new day. It's time for you keep heading toward the champion's crown!

C: 你们已经完成了「流云渡的决胜乐园」的全部挑战，拿到了第二枚资格勋章。\n通往冠军之路如一卷红毯直铺你脚下——该迈出第三步了。
E: You've completed all challenges in the Cloudford Victory Zone and obtained the second qualifying mark.\nThe road to the championship stretches out beneath your feet like a red carpet — It's time for the third stage.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n空间站的规则仿佛洞窟寻宝。找到第一个宝藏，证明自己的资格吧。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe space station's rules seem akin to hunting for treasures in a dungeon. Find the first piece of treasure and prove your worth.

C: 维尔德居然知道次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神的存在！不仅如此，他还说有要事相谈。难道这游戏真有什么不为人知的秘密？
E: Wilder somehow knows about Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord's existence! More than that, he also wants to go over some important matters. Might this game truly have some unknowable mysteries?

C: 你征服了这款游戏，成为了真正的冠军。这便是对决的终点。\n凯旋而归，然后沐浴在人们的欢呼声中吧。
E: You have conquered this game and become a true champion. This is the end of the duel.\nVictory is yours. Now bask in the rousing cheers of the crowds.

C: 黑塔让你去空间站找她商量要事，这次她似乎与另外三位天才俱乐部会员对模拟宇宙做了些点，呃，小小的疯狂改造，没想到各自捅了点篓子——代码发生错乱，宇宙开始无尽膨胀了！
E: Herta wants you to meet her at the space station to discuss something important. It seems that this time she, along with three other members of the Genius Society, made some, uh, crazy tweaks to the Simulated Universe, but they messed up a bit — all the codes got scrambled, and the universe started expanding infinitely!

C: 利用十王司的法器「同心火铃」进入到符玄与岁阳共享的幻境中，尝试与符玄对话。太卜一动不动，穷观阵一动不动，周围的人就像是入魔一样，这就是岁阳异状吗？
E: Use the Ten-Lords Commission's sacred vessel "Harmonic Chime" to enter the illusion shared by Fu Xuan and the heliobus, and try to talk with Fu Xuan. The master diviner and the Matrix of Prescience both remain motionless, and everyone around her seem to be possessed. Could this be caused by the heliobus?

C: 你并非十王司的人，你当然可以按自己为人的本心处置此事。你放走了「妻子」，你希望他们能度过短暂但愉快的余生。\n或许是感念你的宽仁，在不久后「妻子」找到了你了。
E: You are not a staff of the Ten-Lords Commission, therefore you can certainly manage this incident according to the inclinations of your own heart. You let go of the "wife," hoping that they will enjoy the rest of their brief life together in happiness.\nAfter some time, the "wife" finds you again, perhaps in gratitude for your benevolence.

C: 为「阮•梅」造物们打造的进食区已建好，小家伙们对你竖起了大拇指——如果它们能做得到的话…现在该去验收下你的劳动成果咯！
E: The eating area for Ruan Mei's creations has been built, and the little ones are giving you a thumbs up... if they can do that. Now it's time to check out the fruits of your labor!

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 你加入了辛格勒的调查行动：行动的第一步就是前往梦境中的白日梦酒店，调查无缘无故出现的神秘画作。
E: You have joined Singler's investigation. The first step is to visit The Reverie in the Dreamscape and examine the enigmatic paintings that have mysteriously appeared.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n舒翁打算给刚找到的怪物们取名字，去看看究竟在聊什么吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nSiobhan is going to name the monsters she just found. Go and listen to what they are chatting about.

C: 不止是伯顿，经费报表上到底有什么？你也很好奇……
E: It's not just Burton. You're curious too... What exactly is on this expenditure report?

C: 克劳克影视乐园推荐了《钟表小子》外传拍摄体验项目，虽然感觉不太对劲，但还是去玩玩看吧。\n克劳克影业告诉你了一句奇怪的暗号，去找找能带你玩游戏的接头人吧。
E: Clock Studios Theme Park has recommended the Clockie's Extras Filming Experience project. Something feels off, but let's go try it out anyway.\nClock Studios has given you a strange passphrase. Go look for the contact who can take you for a game.

C: 新版本的《狼之道》可以与石头老板战斗，这真是太酷了，快来试试吧！\n虽然很酷，但你还是分不到片酬。
E: The new version of Way of the Wolf allows you to fight Boss Stone. That's so cool. Hurry and have a try!\nIt's so cool, but you still haven't got a share of the revenue.

C: 为了找到《美梦大机密》的胶卷，你来到了匹诺康尼大剧院。\n《美梦往事》的结局就藏在这里，找找看吧。
E: You have arrived at the Penacony Grand Theater to find the Dreamjoy Secrecy film.\nThe ending of Dreamjoy Memoir is around here somewhere. Start searching!

C: 米莫萨了解了「钟表匠」的想法，她决定帮助养父完成这份遗作。回去把好消息告诉皮斯吧，《美梦大机密》马上就能进行剪辑了。
E: Having learned of the Watchmaker's wishes, Mimosa has decided to help her adopted father complete this posthumous work. Return and tell Pisce the good news: Dreamjoy Secrecy can get back to editing immediately.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 接下来就是与铄金的决战了。\n卢卡坚定地相信，用自己的铁拳可以打碎一切无聊的「盘外招」。\n希望事情能像他预想的那样顺利。
E: The decisive battle against Shuojin is next.\nLuka firmly believes that his iron fist can shatter all pointless "dirty tricks."\nHopefully things will go as smoothly as he anticipates.

C: 闭幕演出圆满结束，你的乐队经历也要接近尾声了……\n财富学院代表得到了应有的惩罚。最后，去排练室看看乱破有什么想说的吧。
E: The closing performance has come to a successful conclusion and your experience with the band is approaching its end...\nThe Fortune Academy representative received their rightful comeuppance. Finally, go to the rehearsal room and see what Rappa might have to say.

C: 你们得到了这只奇美拉小队的管理权，但后续究竟该做些什么…还是得去找花园的园丁确认。
E: While you have been tasked with overseeing this chimera squad, what exactly should you do...? Perhaps it is time to check with the Gardener.

C: 依靠树庭的泰坦神迹，以及脑内关于测试的残存记忆，你成功在圣树的根系网络中仿造出了差分宇宙。按照卡利多托斯的说法，这是最适合你的求学场所，用命途的方程式去理解翁法罗斯的神话和历史。说起来，这算不算是——模拟宇宙的模拟宇宙？
E: Using the Titan Miracle from the Grove and remnant memories pertaining to the test, you successfully emulated a counterfeit Divergent Universe in the Sacred Tree's root system. According to Calidorthos, this is a most appropriate place for you to gain knowledge by using Path Equations to understand Amphoreus' myths and history. Come to think of it, isn't this a simulated version of the Simulated Universe?

C: 即便在梦中，也要贯彻「开拓」的信条——\n以小海豹之名，击败「黑厄势力」！
E: Even in dreams, you must uphold the creed of Trailblaze.\nIn the name of baby seals, defeat Pie-non's Legion!

C: 「巨兽卧沉渊」——大地兽占领了赛场，预言中的第二个灾厄也如期而至。\n与此同时，有关「预言梦」的议论也愈演愈烈……
E: "The giant beast rests in the abyss." A dromas has taken over the competition area as the second disaster foretold in the prophecy comes to pass.\nAt the same time, the discussion about the prophetic dream is getting heated...

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 扫清障碍，继续向前
E: Clear the obstacles and continue forward

C: 找人聊聊，并告诉姬子自己的决定
E: Find someone to talk to and tell Himeko your decision

C: 给佩拉和虎克看看照片
E: Show the photo to Pela and Hook

C: （可选）和贝洛伯格的居民们聊聊
E: (Optional) Speak with the Belobog residents

C: 和姬子聊聊你的见闻
E: Chat with Himeko about what you've seen

C: 与停云碰头
E: Meet with Tingyun

C: 前往太真丹室，迎战药王秘传
E: Head to the Aureate Elixir Furnace and face the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus

C: 追寻开拓者等人的去向
E: Find out where the Trailblazer and the others are

C: 前往「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」
E: Head to "Peppy Pepeshi's Salon"

C: 跟随钟表小子
E: Follow Clockie

C: 离开这里，继续前往大堂
E: Leave this place and continue towards the Lobby

C: 离开这里，继续前往大堂
E: Leave this place and continue towards the Lobby

C: 前往大堂
E: Go to the Lobby

C: 跟随记忆中的流萤
E: Follow the Firefly in the memory

C: 跟随砂金
E: Follow Aventurine

C: （可选）离开这片忆域
E: (Optional) Leave this Memory Zone

C: 通过第三道「动作派」考验
E: Pass the third "School of Action" test

C: 通过第二道「演技派」考验
E: Pass the second "School of Acting" test

C: 跟随米沙继续前进
E: Follow Misha and continue ahead

C: 去参加芮克先生的「试镜会」
E: Attend Mr. Reca's audition

C: 去看看外面的小可爱在吵什么
E: Step outside and see what those shirtheads are squabbling about

C: 与同学们一起前往筑梦设计课
E: Attend the Dreamweaving class with your classmates

C: 向筑梦蕉师提交成果
E: Submit your creation to the Dreamweaver BananAdvisor

C: 与大家谈论现状
E: Speak with the others to find out what is going on

C: 与白厄一同前进，扫清敌人
E: Travel with Phainon and eliminate the enemies

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 靠近第二面镜，推进谒见进程
E: Approach the Second Mirror to advance the audience's progress

C: 与遐蝶交谈
E: Speak with Castorice

C: 前往根石之间，寻找那刻夏的实验室
E: Search for Anaxa's lab between the cornerstones

C: 拜托迷迷使用欧洛尼斯祷言
E: Ask Mem to use Oronyx's Prayer

C: 下山
E: Get down the mountain

C: 获取刻法勒的火种
E: Obtain Kephale's Coreflame

C: 还有宝藏，接着找！
E: More treasure awaits, keep searching!

C: 再次探索「神话之外」
E: Explore Exomyth again

C: 接过承载岁月的仪式剑
E: Take the ceremonial blade which carries time's wisdom

C: 与谜之山之民对话
E: Talk with the mysterious Mountain Dweller

C: 深入树庭，查看错乱的记忆
E: Venture into the Grove, review the disordered memory

C: 协商出战事宜，支援星穹列车
E: Negotiate the campaign and support the Astral Express

C: 揭露隐秘的记忆，了解德谬歌的过往
E: Unveil the hidden memories and discover the Demiurge's past

C: 查看房间内有关白厄的追忆与记录
E: Check the recollections and records about Phainon in the room

C: 前往观景车厢，寻找白厄
E: Go to the Parlor Car and find Phainon

C: 进入收容舱段，调查现场状况
E: Enter the storage zone and investigate the site conditions

C: 回收信标数据
E: Retrieve beacon data

C: 安抚众人的消极情绪
E: Comfort everyone's negative mood

C: 追踪逃逸的冥火
E: Track the escaped infernal fire

C: 品尝杜老板的新茶
E: Taste Boss Du's new tea

C: 和三月七一起，重返贝洛伯格！
E: Return to Belobog alongside March 7th

C: 与三月七交谈，商量对策
E: Talk to March 7th and discuss your strategies

C: 领取通过测试的奖励
E: Claim the reward for passing the test

C: 寻找尤利安需要的宝贝
E: Find the treasure Julian needs

C: 与掘掘博士对话，参加下一场比赛
E: Talk to Dr. Dig to participate in the next match

C: 向克拉拉复命
E: Report back to Clara

C: 将所有的书页都交给出版商尼古莱
E: Give all the pages to Nika the publisher

C: 和博物馆内的佩拉聊聊
E: Speak with Pela in the museum

C: 听听大善人们的需求
E: Listen to the Benevolent Ones' request

C: 向猎犬家系成员询问案情
E: Ask the Bloodhound Family member about the case

C: 赶往花火的藏身之处
E: Hurry to Sparkle's hiding spot

C: 击败公司的武装力量
E: Defeat the IPC's armed forces

C: 与彦卿一同离开司辰宫
E: Leave the Palace of Astrum with Yanqing

C: 前往幽囚狱的望楼
E: Go to The Shackling Prison's watchtower

C: 前往幽狱之底，查看曜青来使的状况
E: Head to the bottom of The Shackling Prison to investigate the status of the Yaoqing messenger

C: 拖住堕入迷狂的天击将军
E: Stall the Merlin's Claw who has sunk into madness

C: 补全柯柯娜的心绪表盘
E: Complete Cocona's Emo Dial

C: 继续见证柯柯娜的回忆
E: Continue to witness Cocona's memories

C: 护送公主殿下驾车离开城市
E: Escort the Princess and drive out of the city

C: 见证蒂索克二世成为一个疯狂的屠夫
E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler

C: 见证蒂索克二世成为一个疯狂的屠夫
E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler

C: 视察尾翼，选择涂装，为飞艇取名并验收
E: Inspect the empennage, select the paint, name the airship, and confirm all are of an acceptable quality

C: 与彦卿对话，等待曜青仙舟的客人
E: Speak with Yanqing and wait for the guests from the Xianzhou Yaoqing

C: 和以斯帖聊聊
E: Speak with Esther

C: 告诉阿德勒真相
E: Tell Adler the truth

C: 搜集「垃圾大王」的线索
E: Gather clues about the Garbage King

E: "Conflict is inevitable"

E: Complete Hexanexus Hard Mode III

E: Prepare to take the stage

E: Discuss the theme of the day with March 7th

E: March, you're not hiding anything from us, are you?

E: Strict Master Yanqing

E: Delayed-Gratification Method

E: Rhythm Combo Technique

E: Qingque

E: Gaze into Gnosis

E: Neophyte Study
