E: Jade-orable

C: 在被列车打捞起来之前，我一直被封在一大块冰里，在宇宙中漂流。
E: Before all this, I was stuck in a huge block of ice drifting through space.

C: 没事，是我自己提起来的嘛。
E: It's fine. I was the one who brought it up.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，要是你们没什么意见的话，就去找丹恒聊聊吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, March, if you two are ready, why not go and find Dan Heng?

C: 你是其中之一。
E: You are one of them.

C: 开拓还真是马不停蹄啊。
E: Trailblazing really is a full-time job, huh.

C: …如此说来，黑塔也盛赞过你们：「一个自称能看见命运的{RUBY_B#艾利欧}狂人{RUBY_E#}，带着一群不要命的{RUBY_B#星核猎手}疯子{RUBY_E#}，追逐宇宙中最危险的东西！」——黑塔可是很少夸人的喔。
E: ...I will say, Herta certainly paid you all a compliment: "A {RUBY_B#Elio}maniac{RUBY_E#} that claims he can see destiny, leading a bunch of {RUBY_B#Stellaron Hunters}wild lunatics{RUBY_E#} in pursuit of the most dangerous objects in the universe!" ...And Herta doesn't give out compliments very often.

C: 现在告诉你应该没关系了…原本要去的地方叫匹诺康尼，在列车的记载里，它是公司用来流放罪犯的监狱星——至少阿基维利时代是这样的。
E: I guess it doesn't matter if I tell you now... Our original destination was a place called Penacony. The records on the Express indicate that it's a prison planet used by the IPC to exile criminals — at least that's how it was in the days of Akivili.

C: 嗯，那么，针对这一特别事项，我们投票决定前进的方向吧。
E: Good. In that case, with regard to the matter at hand, let's vote to decide our next move.

C: 信号中断了，对面什么也没说。
E: The signal broke off, seems that's all there is.

C: （她似乎完全忘了是下去执行任务的。）
E: (I wonder if she even remembers we've got a job to do down there...)

C: 不要低估「希望」。它虽无色无形、不可触及，却蕴含着无限的能量。同为可被播下的种子，在我看来，它远比「星核」更为强大。
E: As intangible as it may sound, don't underestimate hope because the power it inspires has no limit. Like the Stellaron, it's a seed that may grow into something much bigger. But in my opinion, the fruit that hope bears will have a much bigger impact than that of the Stellaron.

C: 就先聊到这儿吧，杨叔。
E: It's been nice chatting with you, Mr. Yang.

C: 喂，「寂静领主」，如果你来到这里，如果你在听——我是#83黑塔，我想见你。相信你我会有很多共同话题。
E: Hey, Lord of Silence, if you're here, if you're listening... I'm member <unbreak>83</unbreak>, Herta, and I want to meet you. I believe you and I will have a lot to talk about.

C: 她可是「天才俱乐部」的人。「智识」博识尊的令使。长生不老返老还童都不在话下吧。
E: She's a member of the Genius Society and an Emanator of Nous the Erudition. She can probably age backwards if she wanted.

C: 哈…我说过了，那时我不知道是他……
E: Hahhhh... I told you already. I didn't know it was him...

C: 难道说……其实陈列柜本身装着的东西是假象，真正的奇物就是这个柜子？
E: Could it be that... the Curio inside the cabinet is a distraction, and the real Curio is the actual cabinet?

C: 当然，在骇客领域，就算天才黑塔也不是我的对手。
E: Of course, even the genius Herta can't compete with me when it comes to hacking.

C: 卡芙…卡…
E: Kafka...

C: 三月……
E: ...March...

C: 没见过这么冒失的姑娘。
E: I've never met a more reckless girl in my life.

C: 目前状况还在控制之中。安保系统受到的破坏很轻微，入侵者只改写了少数核心数据，因此很容易修复。
E: The situation is under control for now. The damage to our security system was minor. The intruder only managed to alter a small amount of data, so it was easy to fix.

C: 有问题随时来找我哦。
E: Come to me anytime if you have more questions.

C: 警告，防护罩受损，<unbreak>55%</unbreak>，<unbreak>73%</unbreak>…主控舱段通道即将封闭。
E: Warning: Defense shield damage level at <unbreak>55%</unbreak>... <unbreak>73%</unbreak>... Master control zone passageways will soon be closed.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着丹恒：「<unbreak>88</unbreak>分？」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Dan Heng. "<unbreak>88</unbreak> points?" It announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着杰帕德：「<unbreak>62</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Gepard: "<unbreak>62</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着流萤：「<unbreak>23</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Firefly: "<unbreak>23</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 要回去么？提醒一句：那是末日兽，军团的对星体兵器。
E: Are you thinking of going back? Let me remind you, that's the Doomsday Beast, the Legion's planet destroyer.

C: 先抓紧离开这里吧，之后会跟你好好解释的。
E: Let's hurry up and get out of here. I'll explain later.

C: 行，{NICKNAME}，我知道了。不过我还是会叫你小鬼，我的大脑太宝贵了，没空存别人的名字。
E: Alright, {NICKNAME}. I got it. But I'm still gonna call you little twerp. The space in my brain is too valuable to store peoples' names.

C: 各个世界的「裂界」彼此相通，因此怪物会通过「裂界」来到空间站内。
E: All existing Fragmentums are connected, so there will be monsters that will enter the space station through its Fragmentum.

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think things over.

C: 你每次都冲在最前。
E: You're always the first one to charge into battle.

C: 既然你一心想留下来…好吧，我不反对。你找艾丝妲吧，她是站长，她说了算。
E: If you're so keen to stay... Fine. I'm okay with it. Go speak to Asta. She's the lead researcher. She's in charge.

C: 放心，在这个列车上，你的一举一动，都逃不过帕姆的眼睛。
E: No matter where you go on this train, Pom-Pom will always have my eyes on you.

C: 「星际和平公司」的售后部还是很周全的帕，自动售货机里的商品种类不仅丰富还会定期上新。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation's after-sales service is very comprehensive. The vending machine has a wide range of products that are regularly refreshed.

C: 看见自己的名字也别吃惊，我会保存本次旅行的档案。
E: If you see your own name, don't be surprised, I also recorded this trip to the archives.

C: 丹恒呢？
E: Where is Dan Heng?

C: 银河里流传着一个说法：列车的核心是星神阿基维利的心脏，它提供了星穹列车穿越诸界的能力。但我在列车上没有找到对应的证据。
E: There is a legend in the galaxy: The heart of Akivili themself lies in the core of the Astral Express, providing it with the power to travel between worlds. But I found no evidence of that aboard the Express.

C: 当一个人的意志与命途发生重叠时，就可视为其行走在命途之上；如果他的意念足够强大，便可从命途中汲取少许力量。这样的人被称作「命途行者」。
E: A person is considered to be on a Path when their will overlaps with that Path. If the person has a strong enough will, they can draw power from that Path. Those who can do so are called Pathstriders.

C: 是吗？合伙人们也这么说，其实我还挺中意的…不过我黑塔从善如流，那就叫它「模拟宇宙」吧。
E: Oh really? That's what my partners said as well. Fine, I am a team player. Then let's call it the "Simulated Universe."

C: {NICKNAME}，你听见了吗？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}. Did you hear that?
Hah...?

C: 先等一下，三月。
E: Not yet, March.

C: 布洛妮娅说，我们可以完全信任你。
E: Bronya said we could trust you completely.

C: 原来茉莉是这样看待希露瓦的啊…没想到她还有被当成正面典型的一天呢。
E: So this is how Molly sees Serval... Never thought she could be a role model for somebody.

C: 看！那边聚集了好多市民呀，宣讲快开始了吗？
E: Look! There's a crowd gathering over there. Is the address starting soon?

C: 这回感觉不到奇怪的视线啦！
E: No more unnerving gaze this time! Hehe...

C: 再见了，朋友们。愿星空「存护」你们的旅途。
E: So long, my friends. May the Preservation bless your journey.

C: 嗯…也许会比我们面临的未来更加艰险。
E: Yes... their future is filled with even more uncertainty than ours.

C: 谢、谢谢希露瓦姐姐！{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，三月姐姐，还有丹恒哥哥…感谢你们此前的照顾，希望你们这一路上能平平安安的。
E: Th—Thanks Miss Serval! {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother} {NICKNAME}, March, Dan Heng... Thanks for taking care of me. Safe travels.

C: 这一晃就是十好几年…真高兴还能在宾馆大堂见到你，大哥。
E: It's been more than a decade... I'm so glad to see you in the hotel lobby again, Mr. Goethe.

C: 歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
E: Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...

C: 不过，老实说…我也不想看她成天坐在克里珀堡里，对着办公桌唉声叹气。
E: ...Hand on heart, I wouldn't want to see her sitting behind a desk in Qlipoth Fort and sighing all day either...

C: 话说回来，我又不是永远不回来了。再者，实在想他的话…我发短信骚扰他不就好了？
E: Also, i—it's not like I'm never coming back. And if I really miss him... I can just pester the heck outta him over the phone, right?

C: 内容大意是鼓动那些因家庭和责任感而放弃了自己的兴趣爱好的人加入这个奇怪的组织。
E: The content seems to be trying to convince people who have given up on interests and hobbies due to family and other responsibilities to join this strange organization.

C: 是啊，太贴心了……有时我真的很想随心所欲地过一天呀！
E: A good one! So considerate... Sometimes I wish I could spend a day doing whatever I want!

C: 你收起信封。
E: You take the envelope.

C: …希望你是在开玩笑。虽然比喻挺精准的，但正常人可不这么说话。
E: ...I hope you're joking, hehe... That's either an interesting metaphor, or you hit your head.

C: 没什么。
E: I'm fine.

C: 我感受到了他们的热情！这项运动就是这么热血，这么有吸引力！不过我必须重申，搏击比赛是专业的，危险的——
E: Brothers and sisters, you can feel their passion! The magnetic pull of this electric sport is undeniable! But let me reiterate: These competitions are for professionals only! Whatever you do kids, don't try this at home!

C: 走了。
E: I'm leaving.

C: 看见这些人了吗？都是矿民和矿民家属，他们是来跟挑事的地痞讨说法的。
E: You see these people? They're all miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

C: 机器人不会遗忘。如果连史瓦罗都不知道「星核」是什么，那我真的爱莫能助了。
E: Robots don't forget. If Svarog hasn't heard of your Stellaron, then I'm afraid perhaps no one has.

C: 唔…尤利安说得对，那就先演练一遍吧？我先去藏好，你们两个来找我！
E: Hmm... you're right Julian. Okay, let's do a practice one. I'll hide, you two have to find me!

C: 就让你们见识下，地底最强的捉迷藏小分队吧！
E: You got it yet? We're the underground's greatest hiders and seekers!

C: 我已经清楚了，继续吧。
E: I'm clear on this bit. What else?

C: 那是咱们「大饭店」的分店。几百年前，歌德家一位前辈白手起家，一心相信自己能做大做强。
E: That's the above-ground branch of the Grand Hotel. A few hundred years ago, one ancestor of the Goethe family was ambitious, and sought to build something big from nothin'.

C: 舍弃颓丧…舍弃悲伤…舍弃无用的感情……
E: Your grief... sorrow... useless sentiments... abandon them all...

C: 我们会帮你。
E: We'll help you.

C: 我们愿意帮助娜塔莎小姐。
E: Always willing to help Miss Natasha.

C: 这个给你，希儿。请帮我把它转交给那几位外来者。如果我没能和你们会合…他们会知道该怎么做。
E: This is for you, Seele. Please help me pass it on to the outsiders. If... If I'm unable to see you again... They'll know what to do.

C: 没办法嘛，那时也不会知道你们会成为地下的大英雄，我作为明面上的首领，总不能一见面就出卖娜塔莎吧。
E: Oh, well. I might just be second in command, but I still have a lot of responsibility. I couldn't give Natasha up right when we first met, could I? I had no clue that you bunch would become big heroes of the Underworld.

C: 不用不用，这次我们通过「炉心」上去。
E: Of course not! This time we'll go back through the Furnace Core.

C: 其实我还挺有精神的。
E: Actually, I still have a lot of energy.

C: （啊…睡得真好。）
E: (Ahh, that was a good sleep.)

C: 而且虎克还是个小孩子！你不会想让我一个人进到裂界里去吧！
E: And I'm still a kid! You wouldn't let me go inside the Fragmentum by myself, would you?

C: 这套盔甲就是拿来穿的，只要有人穿了它，我就能赚钱。
E: Armor is supposed to be worn. As long as someone's wearing it, then I can make money.

C: 我有那个…「特殊礼遇」。
E: I have that... "house special."

C: 盔甲是裂界产物，谨慎点用。
E: It's from the Fragmentum. Be careful.

C: 咳…接下来还有几场和机器人的比赛，我得去准备……
E: Ahem... I have a few matches with robots in a bit, I need to prepare...

C: 等等，要先看看诊断结果。
E: Wait, let's read the diagnosis first.

C: 科鲁泽还在拳馆吗？
E: Is Kluzer still here?

C: 终于…终于，我这个缆车道监护员又能重新上岗了！我还以为自己这辈子就要搭在矿道里了……
E: Finally... Finally I can get back to supervising the cable cars! I thought I'd spend the rest of my life in those mines...

C: 这里…就是上层区吗？空气里的味道…和下层很不一样呢。
E: So this is... the Overworld? The air here smells... different.

C: 但现在…我只想找个地方坐下，发发呆，看着这忙碌的人流…就这么过一整天。
E: But now... I just want to sit down, zone out, and watch the people coming and going... and let the day just pass me by...

C: 琥珀王保佑…只要别去那些垃圾杂志社就好！她从小就爱看那些没营养的东西。
E: Please, Amber Lord, anything but those terrible magazine publishers! She's always liked to read those pointless things...

C: 糟了，好像出事了…你留在这儿安心照看病人吧，娜塔莎。外面的乱子就交给我们当兵的处理。
E: Not good... Stay here, Natasha — the patients need you. The soldiers and I will handle this.

C: …说的也是。我会有这种想法，多半也是因为赋闲太久了吧？
E: ...You're right. I've probably been idle for too long — it's easy to get stuck in your own head.

C: 你依稀记得某部游戏里，落魄的警官付不起当晚的房费，他在店主的奚落笑声中钻进这样的垃圾箱——然后跳了个成就。
E: You vaguely recall a video game in which a destitute police officer could not afford to pay for the night's room and dove into a dumpster like this amidst the taunting laughter of the shopkeeper — and apparently got an achievement out of it.

C: 在琥珀<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪的开端，星际和平公司骄傲地宣布：天才俱乐部著名学者黑塔女士已正式承诺与公司达成长期友好合作同盟关系。
E: At the beginning of <unbreak>2158</unbreak> AE, the Interastral Peace Corporation would like to proudly announce that the famous scientist, Madam Herta of the Genius Society, has officially committed to a long-term alliance and cooperative relationship with the IPC.

C: 你为啥这么着急？
E: What's the hurry?

C: 还不是时候，万一有甚变数，我得在将军之位上承担罪责，可不能现在一走了之，陷符卿于不义呀。
E: It is still too soon, unfortunately. If something goes wrong, you'll need a general to take the blame. How could I simply walk away and put you at such risk?

C: 将军，符太卜想接您的位置，路人皆知。
E: General, Diviner Fu wants the general's position for herself. Everyone knows that.

C: 星核这事，说麻烦也不麻烦。人跑了，再抓回来就是。将军一声令下，我彦卿立刻替您排忧解难。
E: This Stellaron thing is easy. Blade escaped, now we gotta go get him. Just say the word and I'll solve this in a flash.

C: 哎…港口封锁了，还会不会发工资啊？
E: *sigh* The dock's been sealed off. Will we be getting our wages?

C: 这儿暂时不让通行，要请您走别的路了。
E: This place is temporarily closed off. Please use another route.

C: 倒是听说仙舟有什么「卜算」神技，这怎么就是手指比划？跟我数数一样。
E: I heard the Xianzhou can tell your fortune — is that how they do it? Anyone can count on their fingers...

C: 你们——还真是热心肠，难怪景元说可以随意差遣……
E: You... really are enthusiastic. No wonder Jing Yuan told me to give you errands...

C: 眼下四周嘈杂，不便细说。如果您不介意的话，希望能拨冗来地衡司公廨一叙。
E: This isn't a good place to talk — too much activity. If you don't mind, I hope you can come to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 贝洛伯格的孩子还在地底下玩泥巴，这里的孩子就已经能熟练地给人看病了。
E: Belobog kids are making snowmen while children here are writing prescriptions...

C: 结果还要收钱啊！
E: So you're still charging us!

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 咱们赶紧乘上星槎吧！
E: Let's hurry and get on the starskiff!

C: 误会误会。原来您想打听的是刚路过的停云姑娘啊……
E: No, no, my apologies, different foxian. If it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for, she was here a moment ago...

C: 咱们今天真是来对了。
E: Man, we really came to the right place today.

C: 这多亏啊！没有观众。
E: Means we get no audience. That's a loss!

C: 还有你，无名客。你也站在云骑这一边……
E: And you, the Nameless. You stand with the Cloud Knights too...

C: 你们快走吧…太卜的人就在前边……
E: Go... The master diviner's troops are ahead...

C: 帝弓庇佑，你们不是「药王秘传」的人……
E: Reignbow's blessing... You're not Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 关于建木…
E: About the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 至于出现在我们身边的这位「停云」…正如瓦尔特先生所言，她表现出的阴毒与残忍正是为了扰乱我们的心神，切不可落入陷阱。
E: As for the "Tingyun" who accompanied us all that way, it's like what Mr. Yang said — her appearance was designed to sow seeds of doubt among us... we cannot allow ourselves to fall into her trap.

C: （现在不是回去的时候。若被云骑缠住，恐怕就赶不上他们了。）
E: (Now's not the time to turn back. If the Cloud Knights hold me up, I won't reach them in time.)

C: 嗯，我已有分晓。列车团的各位，我带来了一个人，你们一定想见见他。
E: Mm, that is clear to me now. Friends of the Astral Express, I have brought someone with me whom I think you'll be eager to see.

C: 在古代龙尊的主持下，持明族导引古海之水，淹没鳞渊境洞天，将它作为封存「建木」的容器。为了纪念如此壮举和牺牲，仙舟联盟在鳞渊境中竖起显龙大雩碑，留下持明的造像。
E: Under the direction of the high elder, the Vidyadhara guided the waters of the ancient sea to flood the Scalegorge Waterscape delve and contain the Arbor. To commemorate this magnificent feat and sacrifice, the Alliance erected the Dragonvista Rain Monument — a Vidyadhara statue.

C: 成了。
E: It worked.

C: 不明质地的石料上雕琢着几乎已被磨灭的纹路，似是某种失落的文字，即便联觉信标也无法解读。
E: Carved onto the indeterminate stone is a pattern resembling a lost script, nearly faded away, and unable to be deciphered even by the Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 口出狂言！
E: Quiet!

C: 把停云小姐的礼物送到了对的人手里，心中有种释然的感觉。
E: *sigh* It feels nice to get Tingyun's gifts to the right people.

C: 想来从那一刻起，「药王秘传」作乱的种子便已埋下了…他们中有人不惜与虎谋皮，向反物质军团求取了一颗星核，试图令{RUBY_B#建木}丰饶仙迹{RUBY_E#}重生。
E: Presumably, from that moment on, the seeds of discord for the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus had already been planted... Some of them were willing to work with the enemy, acquiring a Stellaron from the Antimatter Legion to try and revive {RUBY_B#Ambrosial Arbor}the Abundance{RUBY_E#}.

C: 将军他没事吧？
E: Is the general okay?

C: 要是不回礼，岂不是就这么输了她一筹？只是…该回赠什么好呢？
E: If I don't return a gift, I'll lose our little duel... But what could I possibly gift her back?

C: 我们来代停云小姐送礼…
E: We're here on a gift-giving errand for Miss Tingyun...

C: 你们说的那怪物…是从哪儿跑来的？我…我真想用手里这把刀，将它细细切做臊子。
E: The monster you mentioned... where did it come from? ...I wish—I wish I could take this knife and cut it to ribbons...

C: 瞧我这记性。咱们还没来得及和这回旅行中认识的人告别呢。
E: I've got goldfish memory — we haven't had a chance to say goodbye to everyone we met so far on this trip.

C: 你好？虽然咱们这一路上并未照面，但彦卿已从将军那边听说了列车团的英勇。彦卿十分佩服！
E: Oh hi, I know we haven't got the chance to get acquainted, but I've heard a lot of good things about the crew from the general. I have to say I'm very impressed.

C: 你好呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我都想好啦，要是溜出去了，咱俩就一起去金人巷，那里的小吃可好吃了。
E: I've got it all figured out. We sneak out, head over to Aurum Alley, and pig out on the snacks there!

C: 对啊对啊，什么事这么重要？
E: Yeah! What was so important?

C: 别紧张，就把它当作一种重返故地的仪式吧。列车离开后，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}隔断诸界，匹诺康尼的归属也几度易主。
E: Don't worry, just think of it as returning to your hometown. Following the Express's departure, the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellarons{RUBY_E#} cut off contact to myriad worlds, and Penacony's ownership switched hands several times.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 您和那位先生一样，都是匹诺康尼的家族成员？
E: Are you also a member of The Family on Penacony like him?

C: 现在听来，这话多少有些言外之意。而他身边的知更鸟小姐…我虽不懂歌唱，但也能听出她声音中的古怪——即将登台献唱的歌者，嗓音怎会透出一丝古怪？
E: In hindsight, there was more to that statement. He also had Miss Robin with him... I'm no singer, but her voice sounded a little strange... Would a singer really take to the stage if their voice wasn't in top shape?

C: 入住是你安排的？
E: You were the one who arranged the check-in?

C: 打道回府，告诉公司有个蠢货把一切都搞砸了。
E: Back home, to tell the corporation that some idiot ruined everything.

C: 关于梦中的行程…
E: About the dream journey...

C: 这里的装潢实在是有些…吵闹。这就是银河上流人士的生活么……
E: The decor in here's a little... loud for my tastes. So this is how astral high society does things, huh...?

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 总之，你平安无事就好。我也该回自己房间了。
E: Anyway, as long as you're all right. I should return to my room too.

C: 我好像看见幻觉了…
E: I think I'm hallucinating...

C: 啊，对了！鉴于您是首次在本店体验梦泡——这枚「纪念贴纸」送给您！您可以用它来装饰您的梦境护照，记录您独一无二的匹诺康尼之旅！
E: Oh, right! As this is your first time using the dream bubble, here's a sticker for you! You can use it to decorate your Dreamscape Pass and commemorate your unique trip to Penacony!

C: 不、不好意思！请帮帮我……
E: S—Sorry for bothering you! Please, I need your help...

C: 偷渡犯是什么情况？
E: What about the stowaway?

C: 除此之外，还有各种奢侈品、服饰、潮流玩具店，甚至是车行——只要你的「苜蓿币」足够，想买什么东西都不成问题。
E: There are also stores that sell luxury goods, apparel, trendy toys, and even cars... As long as you have enough Alfalfa coins, you can buy anything you fancy.

C: 热量没问题吗？
E: Aren't those high in calories?

C: 没、没问题的！反正是在梦里……
E: I—I won't put on any weight since this is all a dream...

C: 你似乎听到了某种细嫩又尖锐的求救声。如无意外，这可怜的呼喊应该是钟表小子……
E: You hear a pitiful cry for help. The cry is...

C: 钟表小子的雕像…怎么了吗？你刚才怎么突然跳起来了？
E: Is there something wrong with Clockie's statue? Why did you suddenly jump just now?

C: 这些正在演奏自己的乐器们，被称作「美梦剧团」。
E: See these musical instruments playing themselves with no human performers? That's the Sweet Dreams Troupe.

C: 压力很大…
E: That's a lot of pressure...

C: 呃…这位是？
E: Um... this gentleman is?

C: 谁跟你是朋友…
E: Since when did I acknowledge you as my friend?

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。天哪，说真的，它真的非常酷。
E: You make an extremely cool grunt. Man, really, it was so cool.

C: 哦，该死的，哈努兄弟！你又坏了我的好事，还抢走了我辛辛苦苦剥削来的财宝！
E: Oh, rats! You've foiled my plan again and taken the treasure I worked so hard to snatch away from other people!

C: 是有点遗憾…
E: It really is a shame.

C: 你到底在说什么？
E: What in the dream world are you talking about?

C: …但感谢你出手相助，是真的。
E: ...But still, I appreciate your help. I mean it from the bottom of my heart.

C: 我…不知道。但我希望你能相信我……
E: I... don't know, but I hope you do.

C: 不客气，应该的。
E: No need to thank me. It's the least I can do.

C: 就是字面意思。
E: Just the literal meaning.

C: 我会告诉你的，但…不是现在。
E: I'll tell you, but... not now.

C: 你们走吧。胜者的权利，尽情享用吧……
E: Alright, you can go in. As the winner, you deserve it...

C: 也许…我们可以想想其他办法？
E: Perhaps, we can think of another way?

C: 跟我来吧，这次别再被看不见的朋友叫走了哦……
E: Please come with me. I hope you won't be distracted by some invisible friend again...

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}…无论是为了找出真相还是离开这里，我们都得出发。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}... We have to move — be it to find an exit, or the truth.

C: 你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你无穷的财富，多到足以填满最大的桶。
E: If you give the golden trash to me, I will pledge you endless wealth, more than enough to fill the biggest trashcan there is.

C: 那么…你要如何选择呢？
E: So... what is your choice?

C: 说来话长。很久以前，我触怒了塔塔洛夫。我对他说，再稳固的统治也有衰亡的一天，就像再多的垃圾也可以被数尽，不知是哪半句话让他非常恼火……
E: It's a long story. A long, long time ago, I angered Tatalov. I told him that even the most stable of nations has their day of decay, and even all the trash in the stars can eventually be counted. It is unclear which part of the sentence infuriated him...

C: 这就是我想和各位交朋友的原因。噩梦与美梦的交汇之地…作为「记忆」的摇篮再合适不过了。
E: This is why I wish to befriend all of you. A place where nightmares and sweet dreams intersect... the perfect cradle for the Remembrance.

C: 而这之后，一位神秘的巡海游侠抵达匹诺康尼，靠一只八音盒入住了酒店…还需要我继续说下去吗，朋友？
E: Thereafter, a mysterious Galaxy Ranger arrived on Penacony, checking into the hotel with only a music box... Do you still need me to continue the story, my friend?

C: 但…这也不说明什么吧。只谈手法，愚者和谜语人也做得到，公司不也破译成功了吗？
E: Well... this doesn't necessarily mean a thing, right? In terms of methods, both the Fools and the Riddlers could pull it off. Hasn't the IPC cracked the message, too?

C: 嗯…我不建议这么做。{M#他}{F#她}的精神状况尚不稳定，得尽量避免刚才那种*粗暴*的移动方式。
E: Mm... I don't recommend that. {M#His}{F#Her} mental state is unstable, so we have to avoid any *rough* traversal methods like just now.

C: 综合这些信息，流萤是和同行者——应该只有一位——一起进入了这条长廊。
E: With all this in mind, Firefly and her companion — there should only be one — have entered this corridor together.

C: 看来有人恭候多时了啊。终于打算走上台前了么……
E: It seems like someone has been awaiting us. Ready to step into the spotlight now?

C: …否则，为何这孩子生来便要迎向死亡…？
E: ...Otherwise, why would this child be born to face impending death...?

C: 「愿母神三度为你阖眼……」
E: "May the goddess Gaiathra close her eyes three times..."

C: 燃烧是火魔的一生，起点与终点。我们生而向死，只为贯彻宇宙真理的一种侧写：万物皆为「毁灭」而生。
E: Burning forms the entire life of a fire demon, from the beginning to the end. We are born to die, just to put into practice a profile of another universal truth: All things are created for the Destruction.

C: {NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
E: You had no desire to kill {NICKNAME}. You only did what you did to drive me and the Memokeeper away... but why?

C: 数日前 永火官邸
E: Days ago — Ever-Flame Mansion

C: 的确，他对那位「巡海游侠」尤为关注。
E: Indeed, he was particularly concerned about that Galaxy Ranger.

C: …不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
E: ...No! I can't accept this!

C: 奇怪…我好像记不清了。
E: Weird... I can't seem to remember.

C: {M#他}{F#她}还好么，那位忆者…没有做什么吧？
E: Is {M#he}{F#she} okay? That Memokeeper... didn't do anything, right?

C: …就像是被谁抹去了？谁做的……
E: ...It's like it's been erased? Who's done this...

C: 朋友，你真跟他约好了么？
E: My friend, did you really make an appointment with him?

C: 我是「橡木兵人」，负责引导您在基底模型的游览——乐意为您效劳。
E: I am an Oak Soldier. I will be here to guide you through the tour of the base model. Happy to be of service.

C: 既然您如期赴约，博学的教授…这是否意味着，您愿意在这场闹剧中站在家族这边？
E: Since you came as promised, learned Doctor... Does this mean that you are willing to take the side of The Family in this farce?

C: 愉快的玩具城之旅结束了，还有点舍不得呢。
E: And the joyous tour of Toy City has come to an end. It makes me feel sad.

C: 这次我说什么也不能放你过去了…请回吧，不然我可要跪下来求你了！
E: I'm not letting you get by this time... Please leave, or I'll have to get on my knees and beg you!

C: 我在那里遇见一位少女，她刚成年，正是应该纵情享受美梦的年纪。她最大的愿望是有朝一日能迁至黄金的时刻，看看由自己的双手织就的华服。
E: There, I encountered a young woman who had just come of age, the perfect time to indulge in beautiful dreams. Her greatest wish was to one day move to the Golden Hour and see the magnificent garments that she had woven with her own hands.

C: 我不知道你在说什么——但你认识黄泉，那个巡海游侠，对么？我有事要问你。
E: I don't know what you're talking about — but you know Acheron, the Galaxy Ranger, yes? I have something to ask you.

C: 别逗他们了，我的好酒保。不劳烦你，今天我来露一手。
E: Just spare them, my esteemed bartender. I'll take over the bar today.

C: 你看，这瓶子里的液体颜色还怪漂亮的。标签上写着…「美梦糖浆•超级浓厚」。好像没找到保质期，封装日期写的是……
E: Check out this bottle. The liquid inside looks beautiful, and the label reads... Dream Syrup (Thick). I don't see an expiration date, but the production date is...

C: （她还是不肯走…或许得再尝试一下。）
E: (She's still not leaving... Maybe I'll have to try again.)

C: 用这杯「向邪恶追索」向你致意，开拓者——
E: Here's to you, Trailblazer, with this glass of "Even the Wicked"...

C: 哈哈，这个比喻不错…呃，这是个比喻吧？
E: Haha, a clever metaphor... Um, you were making a metaphor, right?

C: 我们对这个故事深表遗憾…但事情没有这么简单，对吧？
E: We're truly sorry for what happened... but this is not the end of the story, right?

C: 还有…「死亡」和钟表匠有关。
E: And that... "Death" is related to the Watchmaker.

C: 黄泉小姐的意思是……
E: Meaning...

C: 他只是惊讶于它的再次出现。
E: He's just surprised that it has resurfaced.

C: 黄泉小姐想到了什么？
E: What is it?

C: …该死的，你到底是什么鬼东西？
E: ...What exactly are you?

C: …我从来没变过。
E: ...I've never changed.

C: 想起什么了？
E: What's on your mind?

C: …这是我们为决意赴死之人献上的最大敬意。
E: ...This is the greatest honor that we can offer to those who hurtle towards death.

C: …我可以做到，并且天衣无缝。
E: ...I can do it, and it will be flawless.

C: 我终究是从你的自我中诞生的，所以我很清楚，想取回掷出的筹码难如登天。
E: Hey, I was born from your self. I'm well aware that climbing out of the hole you've dug is basically impossible.

C: 「三起命案」？
E: Three homicides?

C: 砰！整个乐园都将化作一场碎梦。然后，我将在家族做出反应前，成为公司舰队的领航人。
E: Bam! The entire theme park will be reduced to a shattered dream. Then, before The Family can even react, I'll become the IPC fleet's navigator.

C: 在我看来，你其实没有十足的把握。特地进行全城广播，试图拉更多人入局…也是因为你在赌一个「有人能打破壁垒」的可能性。
E: You don't sound very confident to me. Going out of your way to make citywide broadcasts in an attempt to involve more people... You are simply betting on the possibility of someone being able to "break down the barrier."

C: 讨论「如果」没有意义。是你赢了，你为自己赢得了通往那片深海的入场券。
E: It is pointless to discuss "what-ifs." You have won. Your prize is an entry ticket into that deep sea.

C: 看看你的口袋吧，你的朋友早就把答案交给你了。
E: Take a good look at your pocket. Your friend has already given you the answer.

C: 发生了什么…
E: What happened?

C: 对，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: Yes. I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 听好了，我根本不在乎你是如何做到的…我现在只在乎一件事，一个问题的答案——
E: Listen up. I don't care how you did it... I only care about one thing, the answer to a question...

C: 在知晓我身份后仍能流露出如此恶意的人，你不是第一个，也不会是最后一个。此情此景发生过太多次，面对我的问询，人们大多会反问「有何不可」。
E: Knowing who I am and still showing such malice, you're not the first, nor will you be the last. This scene played out many times before — and usually, when faced with my questions, most people retort "Why can't I?"

C: 家族承诺过，会保障客人在梦境中的安全。但我亲眼看见一群有机生命走向影视乐园，不久之后，天空就被划破，黑色的雨从虚空中渗出。
E: The Family promised they would protect the guests within the Dreamscape, but I witnessed a group of organic lifeforms making their way to the theme park, and soon after, a rip tore through the sky, and black rain started leaking out of the void.

C: 潜入已经结束了，你随时可以启动「萨姆」。
E: Infiltration is over. Feel free to activate Sam anytime you like.

C: 你…没事吗？
E: Are you... all right?

C: 你欺骗了我…
E: You lied to me...

C: 鬼、鬼啊！别…别过来……
E: Ghost, there's a ghost! D—Don't come near me...

C: 「虚构史学家」加拉赫，向各位致意。
E: As Gallagher the History Fictionologist, I humbly extend my greetings to you all.

C: 实不相瞒，我和哥哥也是万界之癌的受害者。我们从小便是孤儿，被前来救济的家族收养长大。歌斐木先生见我们有资质，就把我和哥哥带来了匹诺康尼。
E: To be honest, my brother and I are also victims of the Cancer of All Worlds. We grew up as orphans and were adopted by The Family when they came to help. Mr. Gopher Wood recognized our potential and brought us to Penacony.

C: 所以我就不带回去嘛！在梦里过过瘾足够了。我不是长生种，一辈子也就六七十年，要顾及的东西又太多…能开开心心过好日子不容易了。
E: That's exactly why I don't plan on bringing anything back! Just enjoying the dream itself is good enough for me! I mean, I'm not one of those long-living species. I only have around sixty or seventy years in this lifetime, and there's so much to worry about... Being happy here is pure bliss.

C: 嗯，拉勾！不过，要怎么做才能成为调弦师呢……
E: Yeah, it's a deal! But how can I become a Chordmaster...?

C: 请问，您当真不知道星核的存在？
E: I'd like to ask: Did you really not know of the Stellaron's existence?

C: 「三重面相的灵魂啊，请你用热铁烙他的舌和手心，使他不能编造谎话，立定假誓。」
E: "Oh, Triple-Faced Soul, please sear his tongue and palms with a hot iron, so that he will not be able to fabricate lies and make false vows."

C: 这恐怕不行，必须在确认二位的身份后，我才能告知宾客的个人信息。
E: I'm afraid that's not possible. I need to verify both of your identities before I can share any guest information.

C: 嗯…哥们儿，我在这里预留了一瓶「阿斯德纳白橡木」，能帮我们找找吗？
E: Hey... I have an order for a bottle of Asdana's White Oak. Can you help us find it?

C: 二位好，我就是黄泉。
E: Greetings. I'm Acheron.

C: 依我之见，她并无恶意，并且说的是实话。
E: As far as I can tell, she's not a threat and seems to be telling the truth.

C: 不必了，现在就返回列车。
E: No need for that. We'll return to the Express now.

C: 二位是要走了吗？那刚才点的<color=#dbc291ff>阿斯德纳白橡木</color>要退掉吗？
E: Are you leaving, esteemed guests? Would you like to cancel that <color=#dbc291ff>Asdana's White Oak</color> you just ordered?

C: 看哪，现在走来的是四位斗志昂扬的朋友！你们想成为盛典巨星吗？
E: Behold, here come four friends with spirits high and full of zeal! Are you aspiring to be the superstars of the festival?

C: 啊…哈哈…事态紧急，我们还是速战速决吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Ah... Haha... We are running out of time, so let's get this over with quickly, {NICKNAME}.

C: 两位同路人揣着梦想来到一无所有的匹诺康尼，他们渴望成功，却屡受挫折。最后，其中一人不愿放弃，债台高筑；另外一人则放弃事业，离开了这里。
E: Two companions arrive on Penacony with nothing but a dream. Their desire for achievement is met with continuous setbacks. Ultimately, one continues on, despite spiraling into debt, while the other concedes defeat and leaves.

C: 但是，你知道吗？你必须得玩一把紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」，否则就不能通过这里…呵呵。
E: But, you know what? You'll have to play an exhilarating round of Dream Jigsaw first. No jigsaw, no moving forward.

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 哼！哼。
E: Hmph! Hmph.

C: 你怎么也在？
E: How come you're here too?

C: 还算轻松…希望这样的考验不会持续太久。
E: Pretty simple... I just hope these tests don't take too long.

C: 这就是「纯美」吗？太耀眼了…
E: Is this the Beauty? It's dazzling...

C: 「那群…该死的野蛮人！我现在就收拾行李…感谢您告诉我这些，歌斐木先生！」
E: "Those... damned savages! I'll pack my bags right away... My gratitude for bringing this to my attention, Mr. Gopher Wood!"

C: 我把这小小的力量留给你，并期待你将它带给更多的人……
E: I'm leaving that little nudge with you, and I hope you'll share it with others...

C: 他临走的时候，说要把它留给他最好的学生。我想，现在是时候了。
E: When he departed, he said he would leave it to his best student. Well, I suppose the time has come.

C: 我想，流萤小姐的意思是，她要赶赴另一片战场了。
E: I believe Firefly is trying to say that she's heading off to another battle.

C: 「世人遂在乐章中找准唯一的位置，这便是第五日与第六日。」
E: "Thus, all mortals found their unique place within this symphony. That marked the fifth and sixth days."

C: 什…什么！你好讨厌啊！别吓人家嘛！
E: Wh—What...? Ah! You're so annoying! Stop scaring me!

C: 「我们必当为庇护孱弱者而互助，正如我们必当为对抗横暴者而互助。」
E: "We shall support one another, protecting the weak and standing against the mighty."

C: 我对你这份「开拓」的信念表示敬意。
E: Your unwavering faith in the Trailblaze is truly impressive.

C: …喂，{NICKNAME}！别睡啦，太阳晒屁股啦——
E: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!

C: 「记忆」是未来的倒影。从那倒影中，我能看到你独一无二的价值。你能创造出令世界为之倾倒的回忆…你的记忆能够映照出宇宙未来的方向。
E: Memory is a reflection of the future. Within that reflection, I see your unparalleled worth. You have the power to craft memories that can captivate the world... Your memory can illuminate the universe's future path.

C: 我来为你去掉这个错误答案吧。开动脑筋，再仔细想想，那<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>究竟是什么？
E: I'll discard that incorrect answer for you. Take your time and think it through — What is <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color>?

C: 嗯…姬子小姐说的我是不反对啦，但江户星听起来遭遇了危险。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
E: Hmm... I'm not against Miss Himeko's choice, but Edo Star sounds like it's in danger. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?

C: 嗯…有道理。既然这样，我也投给「玛瑙世界」。
E: Mm... that makes sense. If that's the case, I vote for the Agate World too.

C: 江户星。
E: Edo Star.

C: 等可以跃迁的时候，本列车长会广播通知的帕！
E: When it's time to make the jump, Pom-Pom will make an announcement!

C: 完
E: The End

C: 她的研究成果是匹诺康尼得以发展至今的理论基础，对后世繁荣产生了深远影响。
E: Her research results formed the theoretical basis for the development of the entire Penacony to this day, creating a profound impact on the affluence of later generations.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，航线会议就要开始了，就等你啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, the navigation meeting is about to start. We're all waiting for you!

C: 多亏了黑天鹅小姐。
E: Thanks to Black Swan.

C: 琥珀历<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，纪元的第一年，一桩燃烧的阴谋在「梦想之地」为宇宙的世纪初破晓，又在混乱与迷茫中迅速化作死灰。
E: In the first year of the AE <unbreak>2158</unbreak>, a fiery conspiracy erupted in the Land of the Dreams, but soon faded in chaos and destruction.

C: 此人的眼神中全无光芒，只充斥着莫大的狂喜。
E: The spark has completely gone from their eyes, replaced instead by a colossal mania.

C: 哥哥…人性的弱点，不是由他人救赎的。
E: Brother... The weakness of humanity cannot be redeemed by others.

C: 但他们依旧不知道要走向何方，所以，我才必须成为天空中唯一的星予以指引。
E: Even so, they don't know where they should be heading. That's why... I had to become the lone star in the sky to guide them.

C: 而是人再造了你！
E: It was humanity that created you!

C: 你倒是心宽，还能呼呼大睡。我可是留下了心理阴影，昨晚连眼睛都不敢闭，生怕一睡着就再也醒不过来了。
E: I'm so jealous that you got a good night's sleep. I was traumatized and too scared to even close my eyes. I thought if I fell asleep, I'd never wake up again.

C: 然后嘛，我就开始做大吃大喝大买特买的梦了…星期日不会以为这就是我想要的生活吧？从这种幻觉里醒来…轻轻松松嘛。
E: And then, I dreamed about stuffing my face with delicious food and going on a shopping spree... Sunday didn't seriously believe that was the life I wanted, right? Breaking free from that cheesy illusion... was just a piece of cake.

C: 是一艘巨大的空中飞艇，可厉害了！听说它从来不在公众前露面，只有家族的贵客才有资格登上船首，一览匹诺康尼的美丽风光。
E: It's a massive airship, and it's awesome! I heard it's never shown to the public. Only VIP guests of The Family get to board it and enjoy the breathtaking views of Penacony.

C: *嗝儿*~
E: *hiccup*

C: 把「橡木蛋糕卷」抛给账账。
E: Toss an Oak Cake Roll to Numby.

C: 嚯嗬嗬…现在我相信了，翡翠小姐，看来你确实熟读过我的传记。下一步棋该怎么走…你们好好考虑一下吧。
E: Ohohoho... now I'm convinced that you've indeed familiarized yourself with my biography, Miss Jade. So, about your next move... please consider it carefully.

C: 如此庞大的信息量，我们的确需要一些时间消化。
E: Indeed, we need some time to digest such a wealth of information.

C: 没什么要问的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 可哪有人会这么明目张胆地袭击啊，简直是唯恐天下不乱。
E: But who would launch such an obvious attack? They just want to stir up chaos.

C: 你按了吗？
E: Did you press it?

C: 虽然一切尚未尘埃落定，但在座各位如此认可列车的「开拓」之道，我们深感荣幸。
E: While this decision isn't finalized yet, we are honored that everyone here recognizes the way of the Trailblaze.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 但我很遗憾，这典当行给不了我想要的。我在匹诺康尼的最后一次尝试…也只能以「希望」作结。
E: It's a shame, though, that this pawnshop can't give me what I desire. My last attempt in Penacony... Well, it ends with "hope."

C: （真精神呀，还是和之前一样。）
E: (They are still a ball of fire as ever.)

C: 醒醒…醒醒……
E: Wake up... Wake up...

C: 现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
E: Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

C: 喂，我说你呀……
E: Come on...

C: 说来惭愧，那座「太一之梦」实在逼真。我不忍与早已化作异兽的亡友道别，竟然在那虚无缥缈的梦中耽搁了许久…呵，他的音容笑貌真是太过鲜活了。
E: I'm ashamed to admit, Ena's dream was too realistic. I couldn't bear to bid farewell to a fallen friend, who had long turned into a beast. I lingered in that illusory dream for far too long... Ah, his voice and smile were too vivid.

C: 让我们把掌声和欢呼送给各位勇敢无畏的无名客们！
E: Let us gift our applause and cheers to these brave and dauntless Nameless!

C: 我甚至都不是一颗真正的炸弹！是不是很惊喜、很意外、很恐慌？没有吗？真的？好吧，太可惜了。你真该学学怎么讨女孩子欢心！
E: I'm not even a real bomb! Was it surprising, shocking, horrifying? No? Really? Fine. That's too bad then. You really ought to learn how to win a girl over!

C: 炸弹？该死…我都忘记这茬了：火火博士是炸药化学的专家！
E: Bomb? Drat... It completely slipped my mind: Dr. Boom specializes in explosives!

C: 卟卟——回答错误！这两件案子里压根没有炸弹，你是不是多想了？
E: Bzzt — Wrong answer! These two cases don't mention bombs. Are you imagining things?

C: 这是一只花火造型的「芙莫」娃娃。
E: This "Furmur" doll is a Sparkle lookalike.

C: 假面愚者…果然是他们干的好事。
E: The Masked Fools... So this really was their doing.

C: 来和你告别。
E: To say goodbye to you.

C: 就算结局早已注定，那也无妨，人改变不了的事太多。
E: Even if the ending has been predetermined, that's fine. There are countless things that humans cannot change.

C: …总比在旁边看戏强吧！
E: ...Still better than just standing there like a scarecrow!

C: 希望我没有来晚了，孩子。
E: I hope I'm not too late, child.

C: <size=36>大岚神在上！！</size>
E: <size=36>By the Great Lan above!!</size>

C: 非也。阁下太过善良，不知是这些邪祟用妖术操纵了它的落点。
E: I'm afraid you're mistaken. You're simply too good-hearted to realize that the fiendlings were manipulating its landing spot with sorcery.

C: 听起来莫名其妙的。
E: That sounds really odd.

C: 呀，好可爱的睡蕉小猴！
E: Ooh! Slumbernana Monkey is so cute!

C: 我也这么觉得。
E: That's what I thought, too.

C: {NICKNAME}同学，你感受到了吗？这所校园潜藏的「戏剧性」正在蠢蠢欲动。
E: {NICKNAME}, can you feel it? The drama concealed within this campus is stirring.

C: 不是啦。似乎是校外来的，但她多入戏，简直是个完美的演员！
E: No, I think she came from outside the campus, but look how in-character she is. She's perfect!

C: 它的声音那么清晰，告诉我什么不能忘~
E: Its voice so clear, its voice so bright, tells me to remember~

C: 毕竟还得给你找个理由背锅呢…精神不正常也算是一种？
E: I mean, we needed an excuse for your behavior anyway... Surely insanity counts?

C: 呦，倒是挺安分，喜欢这吗，哥们？
E: Oh ho, you sure turned obedient here. So, how do you like this party, pal?

C: 这片子里的大部分人都称不上主角，他们很难展现通常意义上的完整弧光，却同样有着拯救人心的灵魂光亮。
E: Most of the characters in this film aren't what you would call protagonists. You don't really get to see full character arcs on them, but they still have a light in their hearts that can save humanity's soul.

C: 为打败御猿•邪忍，女孩成为了缭乱•忍法的传人。她定忍号为「乱破」，开始跟随苦茶大师修习忍法。
E: To defeat Evil Ninja Osaru, this girl has become the successor to the Dazzling Ninjutsu, adopting the codename of Rappa, she began training under Master Kucha.

C: 缭乱忍侠向每一位在场的忍者行礼，此番举动看似赘余，却是忍者不能忽视的礼仪。
E: The Dazzling Ninja greets each ninja present. This action seems superfluous, but is a courtesy that cannot be ignored by a ninja.

C: 我能说不吗？
E: Can I say no?

C: 蕉蕉蕉，快去创作吧，别忘了我*蕉*给你的技巧！
E: Bana tsk, go create your own work of art! Don't forget to go bananas with the technique I taught you!

C: 不过这位同学，你看着有些陌生，应该不是折纸大学的学生吧？
E: Pardon me, but I don't think I've seen you around here before. You're not a student of Paperfold University, are you?

C: 怎、怎么会这样？老爹，如果连你都放弃了，那我留在这到底是为了什么啊……
E: Wh—Why did it come to this!? What use is it for me keeping up the struggle if you've already given up, Dad...?

C: 哦！这位演员的台词还真有意思。
E: Oh? I see this actor is creative with her words.

C: 蕉蕉，如果觉得压力大，可以早点放弃哦。
E: Bana? Can't handle the stress? You know you can always throw in the towel.

C: 蕉蕉，蕉蕉！
E: Bana bana!

C: 真没素质！不及格啊！！
E: Uncouth! Through and through! Fail!!!

C: 课题很顺利，这里的人都爱睡蕉小猴，尤其是以学生为代表的年轻人。他们将创造出新的联觉梦境「睡蕉的时刻」，并催化它成长、扩张、甚至进化……
E: My research is going along smoothly. People here adore Slumbernana Monkey, especially students from the youth demographic group. Soon, they'll create a new Synesthesia Dreamscape, "the Moment of Slumbernana," and foster its growth, expansion, and evolution...

C: 啊，没有没有。其实…他自己就是通缉犯？
E: Ah, no, no. I guess... you could say he IS a fugitive?

C: 咳咳，是啊，来交换下情报吧，你先！
E: Ahem. Oh yeah, that's right. Let's swap intel then. You first!

C: 没听懂，但应该很厉害吧。
E: I'm not quite following, but it sounds impressive, I guess.

C: 没错，你们说我很有天分。
E: That's right. Been told I'm quite talented.

C: 没错，肉体经由改造，异于常人，无法在物质层面经受退化。心性坚如钢铁，绝不动摇，能将任何腐蚀嗤之以鼻。
E: Mm-hmm. Unlike typical humans, his modified body is impervious to physical deterioration. With a steely grit and determination that never wavers, he can easily resist all forms of corruption.

C: 啊，这…我算来晚了吗？
E: Oh. Uh... Am I late?

C: 无论何时，自我审视都至关重要。
E: Introspection is key, no matter the hour.

C: 所谓「智识」，是一种常人无法承受的诅咒……
E: Erudition is but an affliction that the average person cannot bear...
Bana...

C: 而为了推动情节发展，{NICKNAME}演员，看来你又要担任关键角色了。
E: And for the sake of propelling the plot forward, it looks like you'll have to take on a lead role again, Actor {NICKNAME}.

C: 秘咒？难不倒我。
E: An enchantment? It won't stop me!

C: 好！初次见面，缭乱•忍徒AKA乱破！接下来就是成为忍者的苦修了，跟得上吗？
E: As you wish! Nice to meet you, Dazzling Initiate AKA Rappa! You will now embark on an arduous training to become a ninja. Can you keep up?

C: 皮肤、肌肉、骨骼…你感觉自己身上的每个部位都被侵蚀、破坏、重组……
E: Your skin, muscles, bones... You feel every part of your body being eroded, destroyed, and reconstructed...

C: …听不懂蕉。
E: ...I don't understand, bana.

C: 「潮流」即是公众的欲望所向，在「同谐」的美梦中，它等同于力量。
E: Fashionable trends are what drive people. In the sweet dreams of Harmony, this is equivalent to strength.

C: 糟糕，在下的忍力不足了。
E: Oh no, my ninja power is dwindling.

C: 「副导演」
E: "Assistant Director"

C: 普利蒙教授
E: Professor Primon

C: 但神明职责的重量，终究只能由一人背负。
E: But ultimately... the heavy burden of divinity can only be borne by one.

C: 星核之声？
E: The Voice of the Stellaron?

C: 匹诺康尼的历史也证明了，一个世界的样貌未必是一条命途作用的结果。
E: Furthermore, what happened in Penacony also proved that the appearance of a world may not necessarily be due to the influence of just one Path.

C: 不像演的，看来是本人。
E: Hmm, that sounds like something the real you would say.

C: 落败之人…难道他没能战胜试炼么？
E: One who has fallen...? Phainon failed the trial?

C: 善加运用吧。缇安在奥赫玛的城郊等待各位——祝你们此行顺利。
E: Make good use of it. Trianne is already waiting for you at the outskirts of Okhema, so I won't keep you any longer. May your journey be smooth.

C: 小…狗…？怎么连物种都变了！不应该是小小咪吗？
E: Puppy? I've become a different species altogether...!? And here I thought she would just give me a nickname like Little Memmy...

C: 「经纬小径」…这名字有什么含义吗？
E: Woven Trail... Where did it get its name from?

C: 有说法吗？
E: Got anything?

C: 你说的是……
E: You mean...

C: 或许是因为…被黑潮吞噬的生命，已毫无灵魂可言了吧。
E: It could be because when a life is devoured by the black tide... it loses its soul.

C: 藉「炼金」之道，我将灵魂打碎，炼成黄金，埋入此地。我录下这些话，以便来人明白自己该去向何处。
E: Through the wonders of alchemy, I have shattered my soul and transmuted it into gold before burying it in this spot. I have recorded these words so that visitors may learn where their next destination lies.

C: 所以说图书馆里禁止喧哗。
E: That's why you're supposed to keep quiet in a library.

C: 还是免了。连真身都不愿示现就想加入我们谈话，未免过于亲密了些。
E: That would be rather inappropriate for someone who isn't even willing to reveal their real self. Forget it.

C: 嗯…竟能一下切中要害呢。
E: Oh... Straight to the point.

C: 啊这…可前方是死路呀？
E: Uhhh, but... Isn't that a dead end up ahead?

C: 哦，对！对不起，忘记小缇安了。
E: Oh, right! Sorry, I forgot about Trianne.

C: 啊，这……
E: Ah, this...

C: 别怕，我来保护大家。
E: Don't worry, I'll protect everyone.

C: 没错，我们都是悬锋人！听长辈说，我家以前就住在竞技场隔壁…的隔壁！
E: Yeah, we are! The grown-ups said we used to live next to the arena! ...Well, next to the parts next to it anyway!

C: 克拉特鲁斯…吾师。
E: Krateros... My esteemed teacher.

C: 王翼冠军们、督政官们，你们不能袖手旁观！如果你们还是光荣的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，就提枪跟上我，结束这场血腥的闹剧！
E: King's Aegis and Ephors of Kremnos, you cannot sit idly by and watch this atrocity unfold! If you consider yourselves the honorable sons and daughters of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}, then take up your spears and join me in putting an end to this bloody charade!
Two...

C: 我本意也想在术后放松一下，那就承蒙缇宝女士邀请啦！
E: I was looking forward to unwinding after work. I'd be delighted to accept your invitation, Lady Tribbie!

C: 嘿嘿，太舒服啦……
E: Heehee, it's sooo good...

C: 哈哈，这样又多了一个盼着明天的理由呢……
E: Haha, now there's another reason to look forward to tomorrow...

C: 「鬣狗」——我在将你比作一条瘦弱的鬣狗。顺带一提，你的重音完全不对。
E: It means "hyena" — I'm likening you to a weak hyena. By the way, you emphasized the completely wrong syllable.

C: 奔波数日，想必{NICKNAME}阁下也很疲惫了吧？请暂时将树庭的惨剧抛在脑后，好好休息一日吧。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you must be tired after being on the move these past few days. Please set aside the tragedy at the Grove for now and rest for the day.

C: 哦？梦到什么了，缇里西庇俄丝，我的好女孩？
E: Oh? Now, what did you dream about, my darling Tribios?

C: 呼哇…好好吃饭，好好学习，成为圣女！
E: Wow! I'm gonna eat a lot and study a lot and become a Holy Maiden!

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会眷顾认真的孩子。它会派出知识渊博的学者，当大家的老师，帮助你实现理想。
E: {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} also favors children who try their best. They will send a wise scholar as everyone's teacher to help you reach your dreams.

C: 我知道…我知道…！
E: I know... I know!

C: …*我们*能以对逐火之旅最有益的方式，决定枝叶以何种形式腐朽。
E: ...We can choose how our branches will perish in a way that is most beneficial to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 还记得你的油嘴滑舌。找我做什么，可不只是为了叙旧吧？
E: I remember that glib tongue of yours. What brings you here? Surely you're not looking to reminisce.

C: 对了，这个拿去——
E: By the way, take this with you—

C: ——你不相信所谓的神谕，我知道。但我来寻求你的帮助，不是出于阿格莱雅或缇宝的命令……
E: —You don't believe in the so-called prophecy. I know. However, I'm here to seek your assistance, not at the request of Aglaea or Tribbie...

C: 好身手！为祭典开场足以尽兴……
E: Well fought! That was a good opener to the ceremony!

C: 她们打算做什么……
E: What are they plotting...

C: 没错，这会是无比艰难的一仗。目的地…还是悬锋城。
E: That's right. It's going to be a tough battle, and our destination is... turns out to be Castrum Kremnos.

C: 翁法罗斯将迎来残酷的明天。大敌当前，再辉煌的王朝也不过是一堆瓦砾。
E: A cruel fate awaits Amphoreus. No matter how illustrious a dynasty may seem, it crumbles to rubble and gravel before formidable foes.

C: 我会为逐火之旅争取足够的时间，直到你带领所有人走到「创世」的奇迹面前。
E: I will secure enough time for the Flame-Chase Journey until you manage to lead everyone to reach the miracle of "Genesis."

C: 嗯？
E: Yes?

C: 道…别？
E: You've bid... farewell?

C: 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年 平衡月\n「纷争」之泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利陨落。悬锋之王迈德漠斯战胜试炼，新神诞生。
E: Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, Month of Balance\nNikador — the Strife Titan, Lance of Fury — fell. Mydeimos, king of Kremnos, triumphed over the trial, and the new god was born.

C: 这位老师脾气挺怪。
E: That prof's kinda eccentric.

C: 我用了天空祭司的手段，才让他能再度行走。但倘若有一日，光明从奥赫玛彻底消失…但愿那种事不会发生吧。
E: I had to use the Sky Priests' techniques to help him walk again, but if light ever disappears from Okhema for good... No, let's hope that never happens.

C: 所以，我想知道——身为翁法罗斯第一位半神，是怎样的勇气让你迈出了这条路上最初的一步。
E: So, what I want to know is — As Amphoreus' first demigod, what compelled you to take the first step on this journey?

C: 阿蝶，你不一起去么？
E: Cas, are you not going with them?

C: 这个玻璃制品在*我们*家乡的传统中，寓意并不吉利。
E: She forgot that this glass object meant something unfortunate according to the traditions of our homeland.

C: *我们*觉得它亮晶晶的，就拿来玩，结果不小心打碎了…妈妈也没说什么，只是抱着*我们*沉默了很久。
E: It looked so sparkly that we couldn't resist playing with it, but we ended up breaking it by accident. Mother didn't get angry. She simply held us quietly for a long time.

C: 只要向着明天出发，只要明天的太阳还会升起……
E: As long as you sail toward tomorrow, as long as the sun will rise for the next day...

C: 嚯，当年真是壮观啊。
E: Whoa, it looked truly magnificent back then!

C: 正合我意。这注定是段漫长的旅途，有一千个自己作伴，我便永远不会孤独。
E: Just as I wished. This journey promises to be a long one. With a thousand selves to accompany me, I'll never be lonely.

C: 如果她此时已经知道，这趟逐火之旅果真如泰坦所说，必将引发巨大的浩劫，伴随众多的牺牲，甚至包括她自己……
E: If she had known this Flame-Chase Journey would proceed as the Titan foretold, bringing about great suffering and fatalities, including her own...

C: 预言…？
E: Prophecy...?

C: …什么意思？
E: ...What do you mean?

C: 喔！荣誉队员顾左右而言他，可能藏有杀手剑！
E: Ooh! Dodging the question again, huh? Must be hiding a mace up their sleeve!

C: 我不会让您失望的，奥帝先生！作为一头孤狼，我有无论跌入怎么样的绝境都能幸存下来的自信。
E: I get it now. Don't worry, Mr. Oti. I won't let you down. As a lone wolf, I've learned how to survive, no matter how desperate things are.

C: 在圣杯战争结束前，他应当用「Assassin」这个代号来称呼你。
E: Actually, during this War, he should call you by the code name "Assassin."

C: 我才不是你的从者！白痴，我是你的对手！混蛋，你该不会认不得我吧！
E: What!? Obviously not! I'm your opponent, fool! Do you seriously not recognize me!?

C: 这根本就不是他写的吧？
E: This isn't from him at all, is it?

C: 我也相信他可以全身而退。无论如何，这都是一个和他结成同盟，停止厮杀的好机会。
E: I believe he'll make it out safely too. Either way, this is a good opportunity to ally with him and stop the fighting.

C: 等等，诸位，情况似乎不太对劲。音符小姐，你在这儿见过Lancer了吧？
E: Wait. Something's off. Miss Note, I trust that you've seen Lancer here, haven't you?

C: 还愣着做什么？以为会有太空仿生田螺替你干活吗？
E: What are you standing around for? You think space bionic snails are going to do the work for you?

C: ██自我█观测。
E: ██Self█ Observation.

C: 丹恒现在怎么样？
E: How's Dan Heng doing?

C: 看你这老不死的样子…啊我明白了，你是为了不老不死吧？
E: You practically have one foot in the grave... Don't tell me you're going to wish for immortality.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！这可是天大的误会，商场之中从来不存在什么绝对的敌人！
E: Ohohoho! What a great misunderstanding! There are no enemies that can't be made into friends in the world of business!

C: 啧，说好来这儿碰面…{NICKNAME}这家伙，跑哪儿去了？
E: Tsk, aren't we supposed to meet up here? {NICKNAME}... where did they go?

C: 你的从者是…芮克先生？不，仔细一看，气质上始终有些差异……
E: Your Servant is... Mr. Reca? No... Now that I'm looking at him, there's something off...

C: 斯科特？是那位擅长仿生口技表演的公司专员吗？
E: Skott? The IPC Specialist who does those bionic voice impressions?

C: 真是困了来枕头。
E: Right on cue.

C: 这个所谓的「宝具」便是以此为原型么？这家伙开始得意忘形、胡言乱语起来了啊…干得好啊，御主。
E: So this "Noble Phantasm" is based on that? This guy's really getting carried away and started babbling... Nice work, Master.

C: 只有锯掉我的腿了。
E: I'll have to saw off my leg.

C: 各位，跟随音乐前进吧！
E: Everyone, follow the music!

C: 不管你打算做什么，都已经来不及了。
E: Whatever you have in mind, it's already too late.

C: 不准骂我的开心果！
E: Hey! Don't insult my little ray of sunshine!

C: 用胁迫得来的胜利，对战士是莫大的耻辱。既然知更鸟小姐是我们的盟友，保护她的安全也是天经地义。
E: Victory gained through coercion is a disgrace to any warrior. Since Miss Robin is our ally, protecting her is only right.

C: 既然你的表演欲这么强。那么恭喜，斯科特先生，现在您已从演员降格为演出道具！
E: Since you're so desperate for attention, congratulations, Mr. Skott — you're hereby demoted from actor to stage decoration!

C: 拒绝么…我本该用令咒让你屈服，但我实在讨厌这种烙在身上，能使唤别人的东西。
E: So you still refuse... I should use my Command Spells to force you into submission, but I hate brands on the flesh that bend someone to another's will.

C: 不会，非常简单。
E: Nah, it's no sweat.

C: 可以投反对票吗？
E: Can I vote no?

C: 是吗……
你也曾灵光尽失，不知前途，同样是我竭尽手段，保住了你在家族中的位置。
E: When you were at your wits' end and felt lost about your future, I did everything within my power to help you safeguard your position in The Family.

C: 失败的瞬间总是难忘，人之常情。
E: You never forget times of failure. It's only human nature.

C: 虽说美梦是安全的，但也请注意往来的车辆。
E: Sweet dreams are technically safe, but it would be wise to look out for oncoming vehicles.

C: 莫非在我之后，又有人掀起了风波？
E: Could it be that someone stirred up trouble after I left?

C: 这位姑娘是……
E: This girl is...

C: 恭喜你。在一场拉锯中获得了最初的胜利，这是个好的开始。
E: Congratulations. You attained your very first victory in this tug of war. It's a good start.

C: 又是您，谁在和我说话？
E: It's you again. Who's talking to me?

C: 太夸张啦，停云小姐可千万别做危险的决定，{M#他}{F#她}担不起！
E: Miss Tingyun, that's way too over the top. Just don't make any risky decisions. It might overwhelm {M#him}{F#her}!

C: 如往常那般，梦泡顺畅地向你让渡着纷繁的情境——
E: As usual, the dream bubble smoothly presents you with a myriad of scenes—

C: 我说过自己离开故乡的时候同样匆忙，能理解你如今的心情。
E: Like I said before, I left my home in a hurry, too. I know how you feel right now.

C: 离开匹诺康尼后，你有什么打算？
E: What are your plans after leaving Penacony?

C: 总之，世事无常，昨天的敌人也可以是今天的朋友……
E: Nothing is for certain, anyway. An enemy yesterday may be a friend today.

C: 我也没意见。
E: I'm fine with that.

C: （帕姆出现了，要开航线会议了吧？）
E: (Hmm? {M#It's }Pom-Pom. Time for our navigation meeting?)

C: 那等到了翁法罗斯，咱们一落地就去拍两张吧！
E: Then let's go snap some photos as soon as we arrive in Amphoreus!

C: 这列车是否有些太好用了？
E: The Express is more multipurpose than I thought...

C: 三个扇区是独立分开的，所以排查问题也得一个一个来。你要是准备好了，我们就先去「能源区」检查下情况。
E: The three zones are compartmentalized, so we're going to have to troubleshoot them one at a time. Let's start with the Energy Supply Zone. Get ready, and then we'll go over.

C: 哈、哈！您真幽默……
E: ...Ahaha! Good one there...

C: 当时就是设计着玩而已。
E: Just some toys to amuse myself with.

C: 哈…一身轻松，总算把问题连根拔起了。
E: Ahh, at long last... We can finally be at ease now that we've nipped those problems in the bud.

C: 怎么会产生这种想法？你害怕了，恨不得扇一巴掌让自己清醒点！
E: How can such a thought even cross your mind? You're scared... You feel like slapping yourself to snap out of it!
...Hmm?

C: 小白担心你们是天上来的坏人，但*我们*觉得两位没有恶意。啊，得先做个自我介绍——*我们*是雅努萨波利斯的缇宝，这位是…小白，快道歉！
E: Snowy's just worried you're baddies from above, but we know you two are nothing of the sort! Oh right, you don't know us yet. We are Tribbie from Janusopolis, and this is... Snowy! Hurry up and apologize to them!

C: 哇，这下更不得了啦…两位朋友，幸好你们遇见的是*我们*。
E: Wow, that's something else altogether... You're lucky you met us, then.

C: 哈哈，这下又得破费请哈托努斯喝几杯了。
E: Ahaha... It seems I'll have to treat Chartonus to a couple of drinks again.

C: 他在向难民隐瞒什么？
E: He's hiding something from the refugees?

C: 这就是你说的「温驯」？！
E: This is your idea of docile!?

C: 尽可掩饰，逃避。你分明来自，死者的世界。
E: You can try to avoid and hide it, but you obviously came from the world of the dead.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 赞美阿维！
E: Praise Aki!

C: （期待地聆听）
E: (Listen eagerly.)

C: 好神秘的规矩。
E: That's a puzzling custom.

C: …你不信任我吗？
E: ...You don't trust me?

C: 如果我无法承诺呢？
E: And if I can't promise?
*wince*

C: 大地兽发出了嘲弄的叫声。这下你不仅收获了它的嘲笑，而且还得继续担起投喂它的职责……
E: The dromas lets out a mocking cry. Now, you've not only earned its ridicule, but also the ongoing duty of feeding it...

C: 它也会喜欢你的。
E: It will also like you.

C: 二位是…阿格莱雅大人的贵客？
E: You two are... the distinguished guests of Lady Aglaea?

C: 谢谢，我们不需要。走吧。
E: No, thank you. Let's go.

C: 清、清理？
E: D—Disposed of?

C: 我知道你在想什么，别被一张躺椅诱惑了。
E: I know what you're thinking. Don't be tempted by a mere lounge chair.

C: 那家伙…
E: That guy...

C: 差不多了么？最后，还有一件特别的赠礼。
E: Finished exploring? I still have one last special gift for you.

C: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们因何对奥赫玛伸出援手？</color>
E: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why did you lend your aid to Okhema?</color>

C: 但我也会尽力而为。
E: But I will do my best as well.

C: 把创世涡心的奇景记录下来吧。
E: Let's capture the spectacle of the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 发生了好多事啊。
E: So much has happened today.

C: 还没习惯吗？这是「开拓」的宿命。
E: Are you still not used to it? This is the destiny of a Trailblazer.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已受岁月腐蚀，失去骄傲。但它的力量依旧强大，若想摘得胜利，唯有全军出动。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has become corrupted over the years, their pride waning, but their might endures. Victory only lies in assembling a full-fledged army.

C: 放着我来！
E: Let me do it!

C: 区区闪电，也想拦住悬锋城的战士？
E: Mere lightning won't stop a warrior of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 或许可以用铁球砸碎路障，但愿那边是悬锋城的藏宝室吧，否则可不值当。
E: Maybe we can use the iron ball to smash through the roadblock. Hopefully, it leads to Castrum Kremnos' treasure vault. Otherwise, it might not be worth the effort.

C: 你的沟通技巧还真直白…
E: You don't beat around the bush, do you?

C: 来！未能成王之王，已失神格之神！我们多么登对，就在这里——
E: Come forth! The king who has never claimed his throne, against the god who has fallen from grace. How perfectly matched we are!

C: 大功告成，继续前进。
E: There, all done! Let's move on.

C: 我们回来了。
E: We're back.

C: 但悬锋城隐入迷雾许久，我们无从得知{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神躯不灭的奥秘。
E: Castrum Kremnos has been shrouded in the fog far too long, leaving us unable to discover the mystery behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s undying body.

C: 至少，维持世界运转的法则依旧稳定。无论那位半神身在何方，都践行了自己的使命。
E: At least the laws that govern our world are still in place. So that demigod must be performing their duty still, no matter where they are.

C: 看那边，那扇门后是不是摆着一个完全相同的砝码？
E: Look, behind that gate. Isn't that the exact same type of weight?

C: …你有考虑过增肥吗？
E: ...Have you thought of gaining some weight?

C: 又是那个声音…先跟着它吧。
E: It's that voice again... Let's follow it.

C: 只有这种时候才会开口么？来吧，晚餐已经准备好了。
E: Is this really the only time you'll say something? Come on, dinner is ready.

C: 下次玩弄猎物的时候，记得在心中多念诵几遍。
E: Remember to recite this a few more times in your mind the next time you're toying with your prey.

C: 我昏过去了多久？
E: How long did I pass out for?

C: 错乱的时空…大概也映射了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的扭曲和挣扎。
E: The distorted time and space... is likely a reflection of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s own twisted struggles.

C: 战斗…同伴，一起！
E: Battle... Companions, together!

C: 衣匠，将若虫收集到的情报交给我吧。
E: Garmentmaker, can you give me the intel the nymphs have gathered?

C: 这次算是栽在你手上了，女人！反正我就算是饿死了，这城里也不会有人愿意给我一个怜悯的眼神！
E: Well, you got me! Even if I starve to death, nobody in this city would so much as blink an eye at my plight!

C: 她还剩下多少力量？
E: ...How much of her power is left?

C: 在那个年代，因战争留下创伤的人并不少见。不用太过介意……
E: War has left its mark on many from this period, so please don't take it personally...

C: 如果能假扮成参赛者，我们或许可以进入城内……
E: If we can pose as participants, we might be able to get into the city...

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，这也许是个机会…我们可以和那个人一起进城。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, this might be our chance...! We can enter the city with him.

C: 「愚蠢」…现在你们或许能理解这二字的意义。
E: Foolishness... Perhaps now you begin to understand the weight of that term.

C: 来吧，帮助我将「纷争」的神性拼凑完整。
E: Come, help me piece together Strife's divinity.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「坚韧」——
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Tenacity...

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

C: …就更应该明白，我现在最不想做的就是多费口舌。
E: ...Then you should know that pointless arguments are the last thing I want to get into now.

C: 该怎么说呢…反正就是有种感觉，这个世界对于人家很重要！
E: How should I put it... Bah, anyway! I just know that this world is very important to me!

C: 你该趁这个机会好好休息，白厄阁下…火种的归还仪式就在明天。
E: You should take this opportunity to rest, Lord Phainon... The Coreflame ritual is tomorrow.

C: 分数？早就不记得了——我只记得缇宝老师罚我打扫了一周的黄金裔浴池，还不许任何人搭手帮忙。
E: My score? I don't remember anymore. All I remember is Tribbie punishing me to a full week of cleaning the Chrysos Heirs' bath. And no one was allowed to help me.

C: 悬锋城的那些家伙，掌握了不得了的技术啊…要是我也能把自己的身体和灵魂分割开来就好了。那样，我就能随时让魂魄出窍，飞回家乡那片熟悉的茅草地。
E: Those Kremnoans mastered some cutting-edge technology... If only I could separate my soul from my body too. That way, I'd be able to fly my soul back to the comforting fields of my homeland any time.

C: 它从刚才开始就表现得很兴奋…你喂它吃什么了吗？
E: They've been this excited for a while now... What did you feed them?

C: 吾师…请为他展现前路吧。
E: Teacher, show him the way forward.

C: 「随我来吧，哀丽秘榭的白厄……」
E: "Come with me, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae..."

C: 谢礼？不成问题。
E: You are asking for a reward? Not a problem.

C: 在我看来，这说法反而对大地兽不太友好。
E: As I see it, this nickname is more of an insult to the dromas.

C: 你如今…<color=#dbc291ff>仅是一簇独立行走的记忆</color>……
E: Right now, you... <color=#dbc291ff>are simply a collection of walking memories</color>...

C: 你们完成了「岁月」的试炼。我必须承认，过程远比预想中顺利。直到最后，那位泰坦的心中仍给人子留有一片温软。
E: You've completed the trial of Time, and I have to admit that the process went better than I expected. Even in the end, that Titan's heart still showed a soft spot for humankind.

C: 汝之意识消散得比吾预想中快了些许…看来，泰坦的火种终究无法为凡胎相容哪。
E: Your consciousness is dissipating much faster than I expected... Ultimately, it seems like the Titan's Coreflame is incompatible with a mortal body.

C: 许久不见，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
E: It's been a while, Lord Anaxagoras.

C: 那不妨试试看吧。我也十分乐见您的理论开花结果，看它将为这濒毁的世界带来何种变革。
E: It's worth a try, I believe, and I'd love to witness the fruits of your theory and the change it may bring to this imperiled world.

C: 这么说，您此行是来向元老院禀报事件始末的么？我听说，不仅树庭被黑潮吞没，奥赫玛也不远了。就算有「纷争」的半神站在人类这边……
E: So, are you here to report the incident to the Council? I heard that after the black tide devoured the Grove, Okhema would be next in line. Even with the demigod of Strife standing alongside humankind...

C: 正是，一切始于你那座绿意盎然的庭院。我在那里求学的时候，自然也接触到了{RUBY_B#「最初的学者」}塞勒苏斯{RUBY_E#}的理论。
E: Indeed it was. Everything started from that verdant courtyard of yours. When I was pursuing my education there, I naturally also came to learn of {RUBY_B#The First Scholar}Thalesus'{RUBY_E#} theory as well.

C: 再给我些时间。
E: I need some more time.

C: 吾…就是从这里跳下去，跌落谷底…也绝不会锻炼分毫……
E: I... would sooner throw myself off this cliff and hit rock bottom... than exercise even a little.

C: 呵，又回来了……
E: So, I'm back here again...

C: 蝶，我一直希望你能直抒胸襟。很高兴你这么说。
E: I have always hoped to hear you speak your mind, Cas, and I am glad to have heard your true thoughts.

C: 这就是逐火之旅的意义。
E: This is what the Flame-Chase Journey is all about.

C: 他们为我提供了归宿，作为交换……
E: They provided me shelter, but in return...

C: 证明自己是个合格的圣女，或是具备如此决心吧。
E: Show me that you are a fitting Holy Maiden... or at least, that you possess the resolve to become one.

C: …这是她留下的诡计。
E: ...This is a trick she left for us.

C: 最后，第三件事……
E: And last, but not least...

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，真是比人家还神秘呢……
E: {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is even more mysterious than I am...

C: 我陪你一起等她回来。那时候，你就可以继续打造盾牌了。
E: I'll wait with you for her to come back. When that happens, you'll be able to keep making shields.

C: 想起来了，是叫这个名！不管怎么说，话我已经带到了…至于有没有用，你们自己定夺吧。
E: Oh right! That's his name! Well, now you know. As for whether that info is actually useful, that's for you lot to figure out.

C: 女王？
E: The queen?

C: 远道而来的圣女？
E: Holy maiden from afar?

C: 对不起…我无法令你死而复生。但你若有所求，我可以结束你漫长的困顿。
E: I'm sorry... I cannot bring you back to life. However, should you desire it, I can end your prolonged limbo.

C: 啊？等等等等……
E: What? W—W—W—Wait a minute...

C: 玻吕刻斯的大名，各位可曾听过？
E: Have you heard of the great name of Pollux, perchance?

C: 的确，那不知所踪的少女能致人于死。而将她送来世间的玻吕刻斯…偏偏又会让人「无法死去」啊。
E: While it's true that the missing girl can grant death to mortals... Pollux, the one who delivered her onto this world... Makes it so that humankind "cannot die."

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请小心迎战——
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please fight them with caution...

C: 果然…是这样。
E: It really... works like this.

C: 前路又被冥河截断了……
E: The path ahead is blocked by the River of Souls again...

C: 可惜，就算他们的旅途与我们庶几相似，还有你与卡吕普索，尼卡多利与格奈乌斯从旁佐证，也只能为「轮回」的猜想勾勒蓝图。
E: Unfortunately, while their journey is consistent with ours — you and Calypso as well as Nikador and Gnaeus act as supporting evidence — I can only come up with a rough sketch for my theory of a cyclical history.

C: 叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。
E: That's Anaxagoras to you.

C: ——我看到了，你们所有人的目光都注视着我。
E: As you look upon me, so too do I see you.

C: 感谢诸位耐心等待。我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，谨代表神悟树庭七贤人与全体学者，投下庄严一票。
E: Thank you all for your patience. On behalf of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the scholars of Amphoreus, I, Anaxagoras, am ready to cast my vote.

C: 这家伙干嘛呢？
E: What's he doing?

C: 呵呵，身体和灵魂一分为二，不就该这么用吗？
E: Heh, how else am I supposed to make use of this situation where my body and soul are separated?

C: 阁下，来重新认识一下吧：我在人间的名字叫作遐蝶，如今是「死亡」之半神，塞纳托斯的生之侧面……
E: Allow me to reintroduce myself: I bore the name of Castorice while walking among the mortals, and now I stand as the demigod of Death, the living side of Thanatos...

C: 是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}最后的祝福吗？还是…只属于你的奇迹呢？
E: Is it {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s final blessing? Or... is it a miracle of your own?

C: …可惜，他是个被{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}诅咒了的男人。不过根据我的猜想，他那穿红戴绿、花枝招展的可怕美学应该不耽误你们「再创世」。
E: ...Sadly, he is a man cursed by {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. But by my estimates, his horribly elaborate sense of style should not impede Era Nova.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

C: 「我们」究竟为何物？我说，黄金裔就是未来的泰坦，反之亦然，但这个答案显然只对我们有效。
E: What exactly are we? My answer is that the Chrysos Heirs are the future Titans, and vice versa. Of course, this answer only applies to us.

C: 可她还是自然苏醒了。乐观点想，或许这次也有希望。
E: But she still woke up naturally. Looking on the bright side, that might happen this time as well.

C: 向您致歉，尊贵的女士。您恐怕不能继续前进了。
E: My deepest apologies, esteemed lady. I'm afraid that you cannot proceed further.

C: 但我的回答不会改变。女士，我以最大的善意建议您原路返回。
E: But my answer remains unchanged. Madam, it is with the utmost goodwill that I suggest you return to where you came from.

C: 是吗？让我看看。
E: Oh? Let me have a look.

C: 所有「错误」的尝试，都是更接近「正确」的一步…老师常把这句话挂在嘴边。
E: Anaxa often says that... "Every failure brings us one step closer to the truth."

C: 也许在他看来，天舟的坠毁具有另一重意义：天幕并非不可突破，正因它迈出了关键的一步，才会招致神罚。
E: Perhaps, to him, the crash of the skyship carries a different interpretation. The firmament is not impenetrable. On the contrary, it was precisely because the skyship represented the first step toward breaking free from the shackles of the earth that it provoked the wrath of the Sky Titan and brought divine punishment upon itself.

C: 这是个秘密：七贤人除去首席虚设，其余列位各自享有一处禁地，供他们在遐思之余，进行不会被干扰的研究。
E: It's a well-kept secret. Among the Seven Sages, excluding the nominal Chief Sage — each has a private sanctuary where they can conduct research undisturbed in their free time.

C: 诸位，选择吧！是选择谁也不知道的「再创世」，还是选择回到繁荣的「黄金世」？
E: Would you rather strive toward the unheard-of "Era Nova," or return to the prosperous "Era Chrysea" of our past? Make your choice!

C: 树庭七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯，以及哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶——
E: Anaxagoras, one of the Grove's Seven Sages, and Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death"!

C: 终于出现了啊，那刻夏。还有…蝶。
E: You've finally arrived, Anaxa. So have you... Cas.

C: 其实，他为我展示了……
E: In actuality, he showed me...

C: …一段漫长而沉重的过去。
E: ...A past that was both long and heavy.

C: 况且——「宁战死，毋荣归」——我早已走在这条路上了。我相信，换作是你的姐姐，或是卡厄斯，也一定会选择这么做。
E: Furthermore, a "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return" has always been the path I chose to walk, a journey I began long ago. If your sister or Khaos were in my position, I believe they would make the same choice as well.

C: 有何不可？我年幼时失去了至亲，年少时放弃信仰，不久前虽被你捡回条命，却还是丢了灵魂……
E: Why not? When I was a child, I lost someone dear to me. When I was a teenager, I lost my faith. A while back, although you saved my life, I also lost my soul in the process...

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: ——人子的卑污是无可挽回的死疾。
E: — The corruption within humanity is a sickness beyond cure.

C: 曾经，我们尚未学会阅读复杂的人性，塞涅俄丝的视线是我们了解人子的唯一窗口。
E: Once upon a time, we had not yet learned to read the complexities of human nature, and Seliose's perspective was our only window into understanding humanity.

C: 终有一日，你将不再因为恐惧迈出步伐……
E: One day, you will step forward — not out of fear...

C: 我听到了，末日的回响……
E: I hear it, the echo of the apocalypse...

C: 阿提卡斯…我能感觉到，自己的生命在飞速流逝，不知何时便会坠入永眠……
E: Atticus... I can feel my life slipping away, fading faster with every moment. I don't know when eternal sleep will claim me...

C: 啊…这件事…极不光彩，令我羞愧。但我必须启齿…因为它关乎到你我脚下…这座圣城的存亡啊。
E: Ah... it's so disgraceful that it fills me with shame. Yet, I must speak... for it concerns the fate of our holy city below my feet.

C: 阿提卡斯…？
E: Atticus...?

C: 还真被那救世小子说中了。你们这些被奥赫玛人排挤的杂碎，已经不得不一条路走到黑了……
E: That Deliverer kid was spot-on. You rejects, shunned by the Okhemans, have no choice but to keep moving down this dark path...

C: 只可怜你一没得翅膀，二没得同伴…所以，哪怕艾格勒的火种就被放在天上，哪儿也没去——
E: No wings, no allies... what a pity. Even with Aquila's Coreflame sitting idly in the sky, you're helpless to reach it.

C: 你…还穿着我送给你的那双金靴啊。
E: You're still wearing those golden boots I gave you.

C: 说话吞吞吐吐的，跑得倒是挺快嘛？
E: You sure stumble over your words, but you've got some speed on you!

C: 你们常提起的那位三月七小姐，七宝…我真的很想和她见上一面呢。
E: March 7th, the one you always mention... I'd like to meet her someday.

C: 或许…这就是我企盼的……
E: Perhaps... this is what I longed for...

C: 思绪沉入海洋…你想起翁法罗斯人热衷史诗，通过故事缓和内心的哀愁。或许你也该以这种方式消解低落，重新振作起来——
E: Your thoughts sink into the ocean... You recall how the Amphoreans cherish epics, using stories to soothe their sorrows. Perhaps you should embrace this way to dispel your melancholy and regain your strength...

C: 理性的化身啊，在存在的尽头，你是否寻见了答案？
E: Oh, the Incarnation of Reason, have you found your answer at the end of existence?

C: 距两位阁下初临奥赫玛已经过去许久，想必你们一直在寻找离开的方法？
E: It's been quite some time since you first arrived in Okhema. Presumably you've been looking for a way to leave ever since?

C: 请别误会，丹恒阁下。作为「神礼观众」，我没有立场支持他们的计划。相应地，我也没有阻拦他们的义务。我即是中立。
E: Please don't misunderstand, Lord Dan Heng. As the Theoros, I have no allegiance to their plans nor am I obliged to obstruct them. I am neutral.

C: 你也喜欢这里吗，小伊卡？
E: Do you like it here too, Little Ica?

C: 「仅以这小小若虫的力量，果然还是瞒不过你的锐眼啊…赛法利娅。」
E: "With only the power of this little nymph, naturally I couldn't slip past your sharp eyes... Cifera."

C: 若你下次遇见赛飞儿，替我转告她：<color=#dbc291ff>身为半神，我们永远不可能逃避职责。</color>
E: If you see her, let her know this: <color=#dbc291ff>As demigods, we can't avoid our duties forever.</color>

C: 也许现在回去一趟也无妨。
E: Maybe a trip back now wouldn't be too bad.

C: 白厄，他真的生气了……
E: Phainon is seriously upset...

C: 目击者只看到了…唔……
E: Eyewitnesses only saw... um...

C: 呵，黎明云崖…我对这里的记忆还真是百味交杂。
E: Ah, Dawncloud... This place holds so many different kinds of memories.

C: 天真…天真到让人想为你的童话故事掉泪。
E: How naive. So naive that it makes me want to weep for your fairy tale.

C: 雅辛忒丝——既然建议由你提出，那不妨也以你作收尾——将你的「理想」与在座诸位分享吧，让我们看看你的答案有没有过人之处。
E: Since you suggested this whole process, why don't you wrap this up, Hyacinthia? Share your "aspiration" with everyone, and let's see if yours stands out.

C: 这里沉睡着一位先祖的灵魂…现在，我要唤醒他了。
E: The soul of an ancestor slumbers here... Now, I will awaken them.

C: 完满的结局…？
E: Perfect conclusion...?

C: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
E: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

C: 何况，你那位有出息的学生…可是给我派了个超级艰难的任务哪。
E: Besides, your prized student... gave me an incredibly tough mission to handle.

C: 那么，你应该知道，我曾从某位缇里西庇俄丝那里求得过一则预言。
E: In that case, you're probably aware of the prophecy I sought from a certain Tribios.

C: 原来如此。但缇里西庇俄丝的预言从未落空……
E: I see. Yet Tribios' prophecies never fail...

C: 讨伐{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的队伍——现在终于到齐了。
E: The team tasked with conquering {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} has finally assembled.

C: 传说中{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空堡垒——没想到有朝一日我竟能亲自踏足。
E: It's the legendary sky fortress of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} — I never imagined that one day I'd be able to step foot on it.

C: 果真和传闻一样，天空之城内部并不团结。
E: It is as the rumors said — the Sky Castrum was far from united.

C: 这下面，那一整池金色……
E: That huge golden pool down there...

C: 如果传说有虚假的成分…那它背后一定有必须被粉饰的理由。
E: If there are falsehoods in the legends... then there must be a reason for its embellishment.

C: *我们*听说啦，你打算以自己的力量挑战艾格勒，终结天空一族的纷争。
E: Word has reached us that you intend to face Aquila alone and resolve the strife among the Sky people.

C: 这样一来，祷言应该就能持久回溯啦——
E: Now the prayer should rewind for even longer —

C: 不…不需要她帮忙。
E: No... We don't need her help.

C: 黄昏…如约降临……
E: Dusk... has descended as ordained...

C: 已经死去…我本应。令我弥留…虹光的力量。
E: Died... I should have. Kept me here... the power of the rainbow light did.

C: 白厄阁下！
E: Lord Phainon!

C: 白厄，这是……
E: Phainon, what is this...

C: 离别…我已经快要对它感到麻木了。到了这个时候…我连一句干涩的道别都说不出口。
E: Farewells... I've almost grown numb to them at this point. Right now... I can't even utter a plain goodbye.

C: …成功了！
E: ...We did it!

C: 席卷全银河的灾难？
E: A cosmic-scale disaster?

C: 开启再创世吧，相信我。
E: Trust me, initiate the Era Nova.

C: 在那美丽的新世界，耀眼黄金的湖水中，他将洁净身体——
E: In the golden lakes of that beautiful new world, he shall wash himself clean—

C: 然后，就在那里，完成你我最初…也是最后的心愿……
E: There, finish what we first... and last wished for...

C: 在那场壮绝的，以「智识」为名义的残酷战争中，一位天才的遗产被尽数摈弃，零落在银河间。
E: During that grand yet brutal war waged in the name of the Erudition, a genius's legacy was abandoned, strewn across the cosmos.

C: 你是…？
E: Who are you...?

C: 那不如就用先前的吧：从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者？
E: How about we stick with the usual? You know, the valiant hero from a distant shore who made a pact to learn the sword from you?

C: 孩子总是幸福的，觉得神明注意不到哀丽秘榭的小角落，会对我们睁一只眼、闭一只眼……
E: Ah, the blessing of childhood. Believing the gods might not notice our little corner of Aedes Elysiae, willing to let our small deceits slide...

C: 哈哈，可不是嘛。记得那会儿初来乍到，我光记名字就记了好几天。
E: Tell me about it! It took me forever to get all their names straight when I first came.

C: 我也担心，还是别看了。
E: I feel the same way. Perhaps it's better not to know.

C: 听起来，真是既庄严，又有一丝无法遮盖的哀伤啊……
E: It sounds so solemn, yet tinged with an inescapable sorrow...

C: 你在自言自语什么？罢了……
E: What are you mumbling to yourself now? Whatever...

C: 但悬锋孤军同样也以军纪严明著称。
E: Your forces are equally renowned for their iron discipline.

C: 你也是这么想的，对吧？
E: You think so too, right?

C: 还有许多悬念尚未落地。但，就请允许我暂且退居幕后，掌声有请另一名更加合适的人选：他将为您揭晓答案，并带来第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的终局——
E: There are many mysteries yet to be unwound. But, if I may, allow me to temporarily yield the stage to one far more fitting. Please, put your hands together and give a rousing round of applause for they who will reveal the answers, and bring about the final end of the <unbreak>33550336</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey—

C: 那些焦痕…闪烁的几何…根本不是什么潮水……
E: Those burn marks... The flickering cubes... They're not a tide at all...

C: 我们拼尽一切，归还十二枚火种再造天地，换来的结局……
E: We all gave everything we had, returning twelve Coreflames to recreate the world... and in return...

C: 现在，就让我们履行「岁月」和「负世」的使命……
E: Now, let us fulfill the duties of "Time" and "Worldbearing"...

C: 这就是第二件要注意的事了：非亲信不得近身。在凯撒同意前，请保持五步之遥。
E: The second thing to note: Only trusted ones may come near her. Keep five paces distance until the Imperator allows otherwise.

C: 「异邦联军踏破了黎明。贪婪裹挟着金血，敌人与刻法勒的长眠一同袭来，将圣城的墙垣染成鲜红。」
E: "The outland forces broke through the dawn. Golden blood flowed with greed, and enemies descended with Kephale's eternal slumber, painting the holy city's walls in scarlet."

E: Unpleasant thought, but plausible...

C: ——啊，是你们！擅闯法场的贵客！
E: Ah! Our distinguished trespassing guests!

C: 那么…代价是什么？
E: So... what's the price?

C: 不是洗澡的时候吧…
E: Is this really the best time for a bath...

E: This place... was originally your private bath chamber, perfect for avoiding prying eyes. I wonder if anyone is using it now?

E: Yes! Let's get ready for the banquet ♪

E: ...Please give me a bowl as well, teacher.

E: You wish. Be careful you don't get drunk first!

C: 不会不会。我们很享受！只是…见凯撒迟迟未到，心里难免有些惴惴不安。

C: 不过，再渺小的城邦也应当为凯撒树立方尖碑，以便世人随时想起她征服时的威光。
E: That being said, even the smallest and weakest city-states should build an obelisk to the Imperator, so that their people can constantly recall the glory of her conquests.

C: 和昔涟玩个游戏。
E: Play a game with Cyrene.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>在这片时间流速远慢于世界内部的空间，您将亲眼见证翁法罗斯的史诗…步入尾声。</color>

E: Let's stick to the main points. The Chrysos Heirs activated the Chronocognitive Anchor and helped Screwllum and me open a hole in the "firewall." We made some adjustments, so he can't attack us immediately, but it won't hold for long...
(The Remembrance...)

C: 我见到了三月，她不太对劲。
E: I saw March 7th, and she looked really weird.

C: 但很遗憾，命运不会落败。
E: But alas, fate can never be defeated.

C: 法吉娜在深渊中沉沦，杯身破碎——她的醉意注入黑潮，为翁法罗斯带来了最初的疯狂。
E: Phagousa sank into the abyss, with the chalice shattered, their intoxication spilled into the black tide, birthing the first madness in Amphoreus.

C: 这便是故事的结局，步入剧中的观赏者，你喜欢吗？
E: That's how the story ends. Tell me, visitor in this dream, did you enjoy the show?

C: 我作为「神礼观众」，走过由卡厄斯兰那背负的三千万世——
E: I, the Theoros, have walked the thirty million histories borne by Khaslana...

C: 千年时光在我的尺度之下，不过细沙中的一粒分子。而翁法罗斯之于银河，又不过是长滩上的一粒细沙。
E: A thousand years is a mere atom in a grain of sand to me. Amphoreus, compared to the cosmos, is but that grain upon a whole beach.

C: 您的智慧，远超「理性」模型的边界。
E: Your wisdom far surpasses even the bounds of Reason's model.

C: 身为人臣，若在出征时没有此等觉悟——如你所言，浅薄的忠诚不过是敷衍，不值一提。
E: If a subject marches to war without that conviction... then yes, as you said, shallow loyalty means nothing.

C: 因为你还有必须承担的职责，仅此而已。除你之外，无人能背负起法吉娜的神权。
E: Because you still have a duty no one else can bear. Only you can uphold Phagousa's divine authority.

C: 你已沉默了许久，剑旗爵…开始后悔自己的选择了？
E: You've been silent a long while, Dux Gladiorum... starting to doubt your decision?

C: 这不是救世主吗？你终于来了！
E: Isn't that the Deliverer? You finally made it!

C: 在长长的墓志铭末尾——
E: At the end of the long epitaph...

C: 「死亡之半神」遐蝶，生于光历？？？年，逝于光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年。
E: Castorice, the Demigod of Death. Born Light Calendar ???. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>.

C: 翁法罗斯的半神们用尽全力将我拘禁于此，可惜——
E: The Amphorean demigods used every ounce of their strength to constrain me here, yet regrettably...

C: 我身为第一位在洞穴中觉醒的囚徒，理应引领其他盲者回归正途，抵达真正的阳光下。
E: As the first prisoner to awaken in the cave, I must lead the others who are blind back onto the right path and reach true sunlight.

C: 这时候，翁法罗斯赋予他的多线处理优势就能让他彻底崩溃：记忆里的一道画面在我们看来只有一秒，对他来说却是几千万、甚至上亿次运算……
E: That's when the parallel processing advantage he gained via Amphoreus will completely destroy him. An image from a person's memory played in real-time might only be a second for us, but for him in Amphorean time? It could be millions or even billions of calculations...

C: …呵，看来在我无从企及的深水里，你们进行了一场隐秘的狩猎啊。
E: ...Heh, it seems you had conducted a secret hunt in the depths that even I cannot reach.

C: 啊，既然说到了「秩序」…{NICKNAME}的一位旅伴，或许能为您带来启发。

C: 那就以最后一幕，为这段记忆之旅画上句号吧。

C: 只需献上等价的供物，我便能以自身意志改写此世的法则。善可以为恶，丑可以为美，弱可以为强……

C: 然后，在最合适的时机登台，用真理结束一场漫长的辩论。

C: 「这是黑塔的指示？难以想象她会借助『同谐』的力量。」
E: "Oh my... That was Herta's suggestion? It's hard to imagine she'd borrow the power of the Harmony."

C: 「这正是我想说的，姬子小姐。现在，翁法罗斯的忆域前所未有地充盈……」

C: 而我们也没有任何办法能和{NICKNAME}联系上。
E: So we have no way of contacting {NICKNAME}.

C: 「母亲」？

C: 试试看吧，如法炮制。

C: <color=#dbc291ff>耳边响起谐乐的音律，牵引着你触碰眼前的画……</color>

C: 只有真正自由的人，才能勾勒出它的形状。

E: "At the journey's end, they shall bathe in gold once more..."

C: 「岁月」泰坦另有其人…
E: The Time Titan is someone else...

C: 怎么样，比{NICKNAME}强多了吧？
E: See? Way better than {NICKNAME}, right?

C: 「这弯弯绕绕的性子，是他没错。」
E: "This roundabout way of doing things... is definitely him."

C: 「真是，绕了好远的路啊。」
E: "We really took the long way around."

C: 也就是说，决战的时刻到了。
E: In other words, it's time for the decisive battle.

E: Let us walk through the final page of this saga with everyone one step at a time, shall we?

C: 正如你的到来，让翁法罗斯的命运再度开始转动。

C: 「我相信奇迹的花，会在其中绽放。」
E: "I believe a flower of miracles will bloom within."

C: 五、四、三、二、一……
E: Five, four, three, two, one...

C: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
E: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

C: 「那就由我们，将信念践行。」
E: "Then we will carry out those beliefs."

C: 告诉祂，逐火怎么可能是一场骗局？

C: （没人回应……）
E: (No response...)

C: 也去跟他们打声招呼吧，灰宝？

C: 我不是在那吕枯耳戈斯的脑袋里待了些时日么？啧啧，可是让我学到不少「渎神」的知识啊。

C: 「你看见了吗？翁法罗斯终于迎来了黎明。」
E: "Did you see? Amphoreus has ushered in the dawn."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「『真理是溶解世界万物的溶剂，因而绝无法在客观上存在』——对此，本人心中已有绝妙的证明，但鉴于故事已临近尾声，故不再展开。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"'Truth is a solvent that dissolves all things in the world, and thus cannot objectively exist.' I have a brilliant proof for this in mind, but since we're nearing the end of the story, I shall not elaborate."</color>

C: 坏了，{F#她}{M#他}要过来了！
E: Oh no, {F#s}he's coming this way!

C: 欢迎回家，三位。这次的「开拓」，也辛苦你们了。
E: Welcome home, you three. Thank you for your hard work on this "Trailblaze."

C: 你还是先随便找几本书入个门吧。
E: Maybe start with a few basic books first to get your feet wet.

C: 这也意味着，翁法罗斯的因果与你无关，至少和现在的你无关。

C: 我想好啦，黑塔女士。

C: 在「记忆」中逆行，真是新奇的体验呀。

C: 但现在，却是「未来」赋予了「过去」新的意义，「果」反过来滋养了「因」……

C: 但现在看来，一切是值得的。

C: ——编织「神的梦境」。

C: 有一叶小船…它载着从树上摘下的，愿望的种子…航向了远方……

C: 也伴着，无穷的邂逅。
E: And with them, endless encounters.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝；刻律德菈；三月七；丹恒……

C: 桃子…你在哪？
E: Peach... where are you?

C: 所以，沿着来时路，出发吧。
E: So let us return the way we came.

C: 不知不觉中，这本书记录了太多悲欢离合，每一页都变得沉甸甸的。

C: 桃子。记忆。保存。学习。
E: Peach's. Memories. Save. Learn.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而在它眼里，不再「无瑕」的水晶花，终于有了「心」，也学会了「爱」。</color>

C: 今天你教我的，我都会认真学。

C: 放一百个心啦。在花导的下一个剧本里，小灰毛才是主角～
E: You don't have to worry at all. In Director Sparkle's next script, Gray Hair gets the spotlight~

C: 没想到我难得鼓起勇气，出来替温队长跑腿，竟然就阴差阳错大仇得报。这就是命运吗，呜，呜呜……
E: I had to gather up so much courage to come do Mr. Wen's errands, and who knew it would turn out to be an avenging trip? Is this fate? *sniff*

C: 我附议。{NICKNAME}，你说说该怎么办？
E: I agree. {NICKNAME}, what do you say?

C: 可惜，我绝不会束手就擒——
E: Unfortunately for you, I won't give up that easily—

C: 快快快，让开让开，我憋不住了。有事到机修间找我！
E: Come on, get out of the way, I can't hold it anymore. Come get me in the maintenance room if you need anything!

C: 直到有一天，我正睡着呢，突然被一声巨响吵醒——
E: Until one day, I was suddenly woken up from my sleep by a terribly loud noise —

C: 才不是，瞎说八道什么哪。
E: Of course not. Stop talking nonsense.

C: 留给你作纪念吧。
E: You keep it, as a memento.

C: 啧，非得我把证据掰碎了喂你是吧？
E: Geez, do I really have to break it down for you?

C: 不能答应她啊！
E: You can't give in to her!

C: 我告诉她，这次爸爸一定会烫个爆炸头喔，可她的小手冰冰凉。
E: I told her... that Daddy will definitely get a more luscious hairstyle this time. However, her little hands had already gone cold.

C: 这里该用「黑发绸」还是「白裙裾」？嘶，头皮发麻……
E: Should I use "dark silk" or "white gown" here? Tsk... It's hurting my brain...

C: 你看过我写给莱斯莉的那些诗了吧，怎么样？
E: You've read the poems I sent Lesley. What do you think?

C: 我还没认真看过…
E: I haven't looked...

C: 除了巨环与星芒外…
E: Other than the halo and starlight...

C: 原来你喜欢这种风格啊。不过，我担心被她拒绝才写的这一版……
