E: Oh, so you're into that style. But I only wrote this in case she rejects me...

C: 结束纪录查阅。
E: End record lookup.

C: 打从星震发生后，莱斯莉与我们的时间差将逐步增大。她发送复信的时间，会从一个月，变成一年，再延长到十年，都有可能。
E: Since the starquake, the temporal difference between Lesley's and ours will gradually increase. It is possible that the time it takes for her reply to arrive will change from one month to a year, and maybe even ten years.

C: 至少答应过他。
E: At least tell him.

C: 只是被拒绝了，对我洛奇来说，也算不上什么大事。实在不行，遇到再来挑衅地概科的人，我就狠狠地揍他们一顿。
E: It's just a rejection. It's no big deal to me. If anyone dares to challenge the Department of Cosmic Geography right now, I'm gonna teach them a lesson.

C: 哈哈。有时候真是不知道，这股子不知天高地厚的冲劲，到底是他的优点，还是他的致命缺陷。
E: Haha, sometimes I really wonder if his naïve ambition is his virtue or weakness.

C: 没想到你这年轻人，还会回来找我这个老头子。
E: I never thought you would visit me again, kid.

C: 在为阿尔弗瑞德报仇之前，我还不想死在那些怪物手中！
E: I don't want to die at the hands of those monsters until I avenge Alfred!

C: 一起去吧，有个照应。
E: Let's go together. We can look out for each other.

C: 我来负责修缮工作。
E: I can help with the repairs.

C: 也有人轻视它，把它当作可以随意破坏和践踏的棋子。
E: Others despise it or see it as a chess piece that can be destroyed and trampled on at will.

C: 是啊，都怪那水魈诡计多端，最近把我捉弄得苦不堪言！这不，才有刚刚你我那番古怪的对话。
E: *sigh* It's all because of that Xenohydro's trickery. This has been tormenting me to no end! That's why we had to have that conversation earlier.

C: 突然，你头痛欲裂，不得已放弃了思考。
E: Suddenly, you get a splitting headache, forcing you to give up the thought.

C: 我有预感，如果能找到那些监视屏，一切疑虑都会解开。
E: I have a hunch that if I can just find those security monitors, everything will become clear.

C: 如果根本找不到这样的地方呢？如果它彻头彻尾就只是你的一个幻想？
E: What if you can't find this place at all? What if it's just your imagination?

C: 是<color=#eb4d3dff>我多么希望</color>吗，也许<color=#eb4d3dff>我也有属于自己的生日，属于自己的朋友，以及属于自己的梦想</color>吧。
E: Is it <color=#eb4d3dff>my wish?</color> Or perhaps <color=#eb4d3dff>I do have my own birthday, my own friends, and my own dream</color>.

C: 这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我们是第一次见吧。我的名字是希拉•诺娃，如果你需要知道的话。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, this is the first time we've met. My name is Sheila Nova, if you want to know that.

C: 于是，那位女科员选择孤身返程去报信，却不料在路程中发生了意外。
E: The female researcher chose to return to her home planet alone to alert them of the disaster, but unexpectedly, an accident occurred during her journey.

C: （听起来这个乔安好像蛮正常的，但她说话好怪哦。）
E: (Although Joanne looks normal, the way she speaks is very strange.)

C: （有了！我假装自己在查询医疗服务不就行了！）
E: (I know! I'll just pretend I'm checking out the medical services!)

C: 原理其实很简单，「螺中笑声」上遗留的模因病毒信息粒子的颗粒数量不高。
E: The principle behind it is actually quite simple. The viral load of informational particles left behind by the memetic virus in the Crackup Conch is simply not high enough.

C: 因此，基于尊重大家隐私的考量，我也好，其他工作人员也好，最好还是别碰终端机。
E: Therefore, to respect everyone's privacy, no one, including myself and the other staff, should access the terminal.

C: 终端机屏幕上跳动出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「当前算力不足，请稍后再试。」</color>
E: A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Insufficient computing power. Please try again later."</color>

C: 好嘞，走你！光学身份校验程序已经架设完毕，终端机目前算力充足，您直接用就完事了。
E: Yup, here you go! The optical identity verification program has been set up. The terminal has sufficient computing power. Please feel free to use it.

C: 你怎么知道是她？
E: How did you know it was her?

C: 那可不嘛，这也是我自己的人生经验，研究自己喜欢的东西，这样的人生才有滋有味。
E: Of course it does. This is also my life experience. Having fun in life is all about investing in things that you find interesting.

C: 嗯嗯，那么——总之这次就辛苦你啦，给你准备了点报酬，不是什么特别贵重的东西，不过都是我亲手准备的。
E: Well, anyway, thank you so much. This is the reward for you. I made this myself.

C: 里面还是挺危险的…不过你要是准备好了，就和我说吧。
E: It's quite dangerous in there... But if you're ready, just let me know.

C: 怪起来了，他找这中央空调能有什么事？
E: Weird. Why would he visit this Casanova?

C: 今天回去我就把当时的<color=#dbc291ff>「录音稿」</color>打印下来，我们粉丝会必须全文朗读并背诵！
E: I'm gonna print out the <color=#dbc291ff>transcript of the conversation</color> as soon as I get back today! The fan club needs to recite and memorize it!

C: 交给我们就好！波少退下吧！
E: Leave it to us, Master Capote!

C: 怎么会呢！只不过它新鲜，你熟悉嘛。
E: Hey! He's a new face, and you're not.

C: 没错没错，你看我们俩之间就不会有这样的误会啦。
E: Yeah! See, the two of us would never have misunderstandings like this.

C: 照片我都拿来了，就是这几张。
E: I brought some of them here. Take a look.

C: 这个问题很难界定。
E: That's one hard question to answer.

C: 不过，最后还有一件事。
E: But, there is still one last thing.

C: 假设：思想总是先于语言。
E: Hypothesis: Thought always precedes word...

C: 附近有个奇怪的信号，可能是另一个涂鸦。
E: There's a strange signal nearby. Maybe it's another piece of graffiti.

C: 她往基座舱段的方向去了，也对，只有这一条路嘛。
E: She went toward the base zone... Yep, there's only one way.

C: 我才想起来，在黑塔女士的众多藏品中，有一张叫做「朋克洛德精神」的游戏卡带。
E: I just remembered that Madam Herta has a game cartridge named "Punklorde Mentality" in her collection.

C: 不如让我来吧…
E: Why don't you let me do it...

C: 这是我的名字啊！她盗用了我的身份信息！
E: That's my name! She used my identity!

C: 还没有准备好…
E: I'm not ready yet...

C: 你回来啦。
E: You're back.

C: 「哦，岔路？难不倒我。」
E: "Fork in the road, huh? I got this."

C: 有种奇妙的感觉…
E: I have a wonderful feeling about this...

C: 请说吧。
E: Please, ask away.

C: 区域内尚有未发现的「骇入声明」，是否退出模拟测试？
E: There are still undiscovered hacking callcards in the domain, are you sure to exit the simulation?

C: 哎，客气什么，是我找你帮忙，等多久都没问题。
E: Hey, what's with the politeness? I looked for you for help, so I'm willing to wait.

C: 你是指来这里前？我一直是工程师，以前在「公司」分部工作，定级P<unbreak>24</unbreak>。
E: Before this? I've always been an engineer. I used to work for an Interastral Peace Corporation branch and made rank P<unbreak>24</unbreak>.

C: 我们刚启程不久，突然发生了震荡——我当时认为是被不明太空物堵截，抬头一看船外的景象便变化了！在看向船外的那一刻…追尾也同时发生了。
E: There was a sudden jolt not long after we had departed — I was sure we must have collided with some unknown celestial object. When I looked outside, everything was different. That was when we collided with the Express...

C: 没想到我们竟再次碰面，「真蛰虫」。
E: I did not envision seeing True Stings again.

C: 你忍住了伸手薅它的欲望。
E: You fight off the impulse to reach over and feel it.

C: …但你还是怀疑盆栽里的土其实是好吃的巧克力粉。下次可以尝尝。
E: ...Yet you can't shake the idea that the soil in the potted plant might actually be scrumptious chocolate powder. Worth sampling the next time around.

C: 这家伙说自己死而无憾，说什么和盆栽告别，原来不是在搞笑啊？！居然是认真的？你不会答应他了吧？
E: So all that talk of "departing the mortal coil" and "bidding farewell to a plant" — that was all serious!? You refused him, right?

C: 在保证列车安全脱出后，自寻出路，平安脱险，以待我们的下一次相见。
E: Once the Express is safely out, I will devise my own exit plan and navigate my way to safety. Until next time!

C: 纯美骑士团，一群习惯独行星河中、很难被理解的人。他们的归宿本就是星空，这场烟花或许也象征着对他的授勋。
E: The Knights of Beauty are made up of individuals who are used to traveling through the cosmos alone... they are difficult to understand, and the starry sky is their home. Perhaps this firework show is a symbol of his honor.

C: 你俩怎么就打起来了？！不过打完…你俩好像还挺合得来的嘛。
E: What was that all about!? *sigh* It does seem like you're on better terms after the fight.

C: 发生什么了？
E: What happened?

C: 前情你大致也知道了。几个系统时前，黑塔女士的一具人偶遭到了原因未知的袭击，下落不明，信号也始终无法定位。
E: You probably know the gist of things already. A few system hours ago, one of Madam Herta's puppets was attacked by an unknown perpetrator. We don't know the location of the puppet, and we can't pinpoint its signal.

C: 没有监控吗？
E: There was no surveillance?

C: …陪阿兰遛狗？
E: ...Walking the dog with Arlan?

C: （从头好好检查一遍，回到最开始与黑塔的对话…）
E: (I need to go over it from the start... starting with the conversation I had with Herta...)

C: 佩佩，没事吧？
E: Peppy, are you okay?

C: 我们会带他回来的。
E: We'll get him back.

C: 首先，是阿德勒的失踪，他一定抓住了什么关键线索。
E: First, Adler's disappearance. He must have come across some vital information.

C: 牵强附会，差不多得了。
E: Tenuous connections. Enough of this nonsense.

C: 答案：我正是为此而来。毕竟事件真正的主角——在这里。
E: Answer: That is exactly why I came. After all, the principal figure in this whole affair... is right here.

C: 请放心，艾丝妲只是受了些惊吓，正在医疗室内恢复。
E: Rest assured, Asta only had a fright. She is recovering in the Clinic.

C: 抵达空间站时，我向黑塔借来#29丝丝喀尔的造物「相位灵火」，希望能从其他会员的研究成果中得到一些启发。
E: When I first arrived on the space station, I borrowed the Phase Flame from Herta — it's an invention of member #29 Sserkal. I hoped to be enlightened by other Society members' results.

C: 智商
E: IQ

C: 哼，看你也有兴趣，我就告诉你觐见芝士流心大人的方法吧，你得自己努力——
E: Hmph, since you're so interested, I'll tell you how to secure an audience with the honorable Molten Cheese Tart. You'll need to work hard to get there.

C: 没见过。
E: No.

C: 石膏头男人，嘶嘶。
E: Man with plaster head, *buzz*.

C: （听起来很适合它……）
E: (Sounds fitting...)

C: 感情的表征可能是积极，也可能是消极。但其中，植根心底的爱是永恒不变的东西。
E: Emotions may be either positive or negative. However, the love rooted in the depths of their heart is eternal and unchanging.

C: 什么声音？
E: What's that noise?

C: 唔，那位维修工程师还是太热心了，因为星穹列车给他帮了些小忙，他便坚持要抱着小机器人一路走到月台，还要亲自送到列车上……
E: I still think that engineer went overboard. Just because the Astral Express helped them out with some stuff before, he insisted on bringing that little robot all the way to the railway platform and delivering it to the Express personally.

C: 从你登上星穹列车后第一次到访的世界开始，去看看那些接受过星穹列车帮助的人现在过得如何，说不定会有意想不到的发现。
E: Why don't you go and see how the people who received help from the Astral Express are doing now, starting with the first world you visited after boarding the Express? I think you might discover something quite unexpected.

C: 等等，我有个想法。也许…让尤利安亲眼看清真相，反而是帮助他克服恐惧的最好办法。
E: Wait, I have an idea. Maybe... Maybe allowing Julian to see their true form would be the best way to help him overcome his fear.

C: 大守护者？
E: The Supreme Guardian?

C: …哈，这么看来，我们坚持到了最后一刻，也算是有点意义……
E: ...Hah. Then it seems like our perseverance till the bitter end did achieve something...

C: 但慢慢地，我发现银河实在太大了。即便是最惊心动魄的壮举，在无垠的星海面前，也不过是沧海一粟。
E: But, over time, I discovered that the Cosmos really is just too big. Even the most earth-shattering events are no more than a drop in the ocean when it comes to the vast starry seas.

C: 我们别找麻烦就好…
E: Let's just make sure that we're not the ones creating trouble...

C: 喂！你这家伙——
E: Hey! Where do you think you're—

C: 莫名其妙被那个桑博坑了一下，感觉很火大……
E: Grr, that Sampo cheated us all. Wait till I get my hands on him...

C: ——他们找到了坚持驻守家园的「筑城者」，并向后者提供了一大笔资金，用于灾难避险。
E: They sought out Architects who refused to leave — those who insisted on defending their homes. The IPC provided these Architects with significant funds to aid them against the coming disaster.

C: …贵星的苦衷我完全理解，大守护者小姐。贝洛伯格当下财务紧张的局面不是因为你——当然，也不是因为这城里任何一个人——的过错导致的。
E: I understand the difficulties that this world is facing, Supreme Guardian. Belobog's current financial burden cannot be pinned on you, nor anyone else for that matter.

C: 白白的，蓬蓬的…好可爱！在哪里能见到活的呢？
E: It's so white and fluffy! Where can I find a live one?

C: 哼！呼噜，哼唧！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 听着挺像那么回事，但这些杂七杂八的规矩不都是你们自己定的？这个世界好不容易才活了过来，才经不起你们这么瞎折腾！
E: Y'know, it's funny how the "rules" always seem to work in your favor, don't you think? This world's been hanging by a thread and now you're here to pull the plug on it!

C: 「公司」动作很快，贝洛伯格现在到处都是他们的人，而且口径都是统一的「资产评估」。
E: They're moving quickly. Belobog is crawling with their agents — all they talk about is "asset evaluation."

C: …比*这件事*还重要？
E: ...MORE important than this?

C: 原来如此，相比冀望缥缈的未来，佩拉更希望身边的人能过上好的生活……
E: I see. So compared to a distant and uncertain future, what you really care about is making sure the people around you have a good life...

C: 不过看你们这脸色…怎么，有心事？
E: But... I can tell by the look on your faces you're probably not dropping by to say hi.

C: 没啥事…就有点儿晕…
E: I'm fine... Just a little dizzy...

C: 希望你跟老板们多说我的好话！
E: Mind putting in some good words for me with your bosses?

C: 太好了。各位，前方的山路有些崎岖，请当心脚下。
E: Excellent. The mountain road ahead is a little treacherous, watch your step.

C: 那是肯定，我们也是不久前才发现了这片区域。
E: Mm, we've only recently discovered this domain.

C: 不要歪解我的话！
E: Do not twist my words!

C: 该到「潜爆机兵」登场了。
E: It's time to deploy the Automaton Stealth Bomb.

C: 到哪去了…他们…到哪去了……
E: Where... Wh—Where did they go...

C: 背后突然传来一阵脚步声……
E: You suddenly hear footsteps behind you...

C: 我们回镇上去吧。我还欠那些患者一个解释……
E: Let's go back to town. I still owe those patients an explanation...

C: 没能彻底斩断联系的过往…总有一天会回来敲你的门。
E: If you fail to make a clean break with the past, the past creeps up on you...

C: 嗯，如果我没理解错的话，这封信里，「细问魈魅踪迹」似乎写的是我们界种科的奇物「异星水魈」。而「戚戚与之同谋」，则像是某种指控……
E: Well, if I understand correctly, where it says, "An inquiry into spirit traces," it seems to be referring to the Xenohydro, a kind of Curio from our department. And "to be an accomplice" seems to be some kind of accusation.

C: 我第一次发现，我愿意用平庸的前途，来换恣意潇洒的生活。
E: For the first time, I found that I was willing to trade my mediocre future for a free and unrestrained life.

C: 别担心。哪怕他不在，还有姐姐在。姐姐也会保护希莉儿。
E: Don't worry. Even if he's not there, my sister is with me. She'll take care of me.

C: （这个叫希莉儿的小女孩，好像一直在盯着那边看……）
E: (This little girl named Cyrille seems to be fixated on that spot the whole time...)

C: …哎哟喂，别这么吓我啊！老桑博这小心脏脆弱的很呐……
E: ...Argh, don't scare me like that! This ol' heart of mine is really weak, y'know...

C: 如果你不幸战败，我当然会想办法带你撤退到安全地带，等你准备好后再一起继续探索。
E: If it so happens that you are defeated, I will definitely fight my way to bring you back to a safe place and continue our exploration when you are ready.

C: 我明白了，要一束「球牡丹」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
E: Aww... Ball Peonies, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...

C: 服下瓦赫的「风雪免疫」。
E: Let's drink the Blizzard Immunity.

C: 噢，这么说，你答应了？太好了！行，那你先去忙自己的，我们下层区见吧。
E: ...Sound promising! I'll meet you in the Underworld, then.

C: 知道偷窃行动是谁组织的了吗？
E: Do you know who might be behind the museum thefts?

C: 老实说，我没想到咱们这么轻松就能把它找回来…总感觉有哪个环节出了问题。
E: Honestly, I didn't think we'd get it back so easily... It almost feels like something's not quite right.

C: 好，你先忙吧。准备好了就来找我。
E: Sure, do what you need to. Come back when you're ready.

C: 哦，原来是机器人集体出了故障。唔……
E: So they're malfunctioning collectively. Hmm...

C: 但是你看——最后的成品还是挺像模像样的嘛！
E: But see the final product for yourself — not too shabby, is it?

C: 我的照片？现在就给你拍一张。
E: Was it a photo of me? I can always take a new one for you.

C: 眼前的男人醉心于他精心编织的演讲内容，似乎完全没有意识到你的到来。
E: The man before you seems so engrossed in the elaborate speech performance that he doesn't seem to have noticed your arrival.

C: 什么证不证据，这还需要证据吗？告诉你们吧，全贝洛伯格能干出这种事的只有那一个人——就是那个不要脸的蓝毛诈骗犯！
E: Evidence? Who needs evidence? Let me tell you, there is only one person in all of Belobog who can do such a thing — that shameless blue-haired fraudster!

C: 唔，抱歉，尽是些不足挂齿的小事…我这里好像真的没有什么值得注意的线索，要不两位还是去问问广场上的其他人吧？
E: Sorry, these are all everyday occurrences... I really don't know of any noteworthy clues. Maybe you could try asking the other people around here?

C: 猛地一下破门而入！
E: Break down the door with a bang!

C: 如果不记得了，那我再解释一下也无妨。
E: If you don't remember, it won't hurt to go over it again.

C: 其实，答案很简单：我从小没有见过自己的双亲，也不记得他们赋予我的姓氏……
E: Actually, the answer's very simple: Ever since I was a child, I've never met my parents, and I don't remember the surname they passed down to me...

C: 是博物馆。
E: Mu-se-um.

C: 好啊，你说了算。还有其他地方需要调整吗？
E: Sure, it's your decision. Anything else?

C: 算了，还是别改了。
E: Forget it. Let's keep it as is.

C: 我觉得不用再修改了。
E: I don't think it needs to be modified.

C: 倒是你——面试官布洛妮娅，你倒是说词儿啊！
E: Lady Bronya, why don't you say something?

C: 呃，那要不就到此为止？对你我都好——也甭浪费{NICKNAME}的时间了。
E: Um, should we end the interview here? It's good for both of us. Let's not take up any more of {NICKNAME}'s time.

C: {NICKNAME}…对于大守护者的提问，你有什么高见吗？
E: {NICKNAME}... Do you have a wise answer to the Supreme Guardian's question?

C: 我要问就这些了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 虎克小鬼？不不不，你搞反了，是你老爹有错在先。不信你自己问他！
E: Little Hook? No, no, you have it wrong. It's your daddy who bullied us first. Ask him if you don't believe me!

C: 虎克大人说的都对。
E: The boss is always right.

C: 被人偷走了吗？
E: Someone stole it?

C: 你怎么看待费斯曼大叔？
E: What do you think of Mr. Fersman?

C: 话不用说得这么绝吧。
E: You don't have to be so mean.

C: 可是…可是……
E: But... But...

C: 哟，这就回来了——怎么样，挖到宝藏了吗？
E: Hey, how's it going? Did you find the treasure?

C: 这点玩意我们也不缺，你们留着……
E: Oh, well we actually have enough for the moment. You hang onto it...

C: 好在作战目标清晰，地形也不算复杂——我的部下经验丰富，不必担心指挥系统出差错。
E: We have clear objectives and the terrain is relatively easy to read. My officers are well-trained — the command system will be in good hands.

C: 嗯。小心环境，附近的气温明显下降了…这现象着实反常。
E: Okay. Be careful though, I sense a drop in temperature. Something's not right.

C: （…杰帕德听不到它的声音吗？）
E: (...Can Gepard not hear that?)

C: …姐姐，这都是文物，你别乱动。万一弄坏了就不好了。
E: These are all relics, sis. Please don't touch them. What if you break something?

C: 其实，这次请你来这里，是想和你聊聊我们家玲可的事。
E: Actually, I want to talk to you about our little Lynx.

C: 深夜……
E: At night...

C: …喂，玲宝玲宝！你快看！
E: Hey! Lynxy! Look!

C: 嗯…毕竟是贝洛伯格的名人，你可能在哪也听别人提起过吧。
E: She's famous in Belobog. You might have heard other people mention her in passing.

C: 你们往下看，看到那些杂乱的摊位了吗？那是铆钉镇的集市广场，娜塔莎想要的物资估计就堆放在那儿。
E: Look down there. See the mess that remains of those old stalls? That's Rivet Town's market. The supplies Natasha wants are probably there.

C: 被你这么一说，好像确实有点…难道这镇子还有人住？不可能啊……
E: Now that you mention it, it does seem a little... Could people still be living here? Impossible...

C: 从小到大，母亲一直教我宽容，教我存护人们内心的善意…哪怕自身只是一缕微光，也要努力照亮他人。
E: From a young age, my mother taught me to be forgiving and to preserve the goodwill in people's hearts... Even if I am but a small glimmer of light in this world, I must try my best to shine brightly for others.

C: 这么大的家伙…
E: That's a big one...

C: …我不觉得她知道。守护者继承人的选拔是绝对的机密，被选中的孩子必须完全告别过去。
E: ...I don't think she knows. The selection of the successor is done with utmost secrecy, and the child chosen must completely say goodbye to their past.

C: 「从左边楼梯下来之后，朝着前方走十步，往右转，再走十五步，原地转十圈再往前……」
E: "Go down the stairs on the left, then walk ten paces forward. Turn right, walk another fifteen paces. Spin around ten times, then keep walking forward..."

C: 欸？怎么回事，你们怎么都不说话了？
E: Huh? What's wrong? Why aren't you saying anything?

C: 呜…我、我们才不会轻易认输！总有一天，鼹鼠党要当上下层区的大英雄，让大家都对我们刮…刮……
E: Hmph! You think we're gonna accept defeat just like that!? One day The Moles will be the heroes of the Underworld and the Overworld! Then everyone will sit... sit...

C: 帕斯卡…现在，能请你告诉我，为什么要偷零件吗……？
E: Pascal... Could you please, uh... explain why you were stealing parts...?

C: 可能是铆钉镇闹鬼吧…
E: Maybe Rivet Town is haunted...

C: 就是这家伙吧？
E: This has to be one of them, right?

C: 认证结果：成功。剩余所需认证数：2。
E: Certification result: Success. Requisite certifications remaining: Two.

C: 启动失败。尝试修复复复复复……
E: Initialization failure. Attempting system restorashhhh...

C: 克拉拉？你……
E: C—Clara? ...You...

C: …我准备好了，{NICKNAME}。去揭开真相吧，我会在旁边听着。
E: ...I'm ready, {NICKNAME}. Reveal the truth. I'm listening.

C: 忽略掉那些碎片化的细枝末节…结论就是，这个世界的高层人员，还有守护者本人——他们其实早就知道「星核」就是灾难的源头。
E: Putting minor details aside, this is the conclusion... Eminent individuals, not to mention the guardian herself, knew early on that the Stellaron was the source of disaster on this world.

C: 希儿……
E: Seele...

C: 老爹…好！虎克保证，绝不让娜塔莎姐姐和老爹再担心了。
E: Daddy... Aw... Okay, I swear I'll never make Natasha or daddy worry again.

C: （不过，还有一点点时间，<color=#dbc291ff>也可以再找找看有没有隐藏的买家……</color>）
E: (...Although there is still some time left. <color=#dbc291ff>We could also see if we missed any buyers...</color>)

C: 你怎么知道？
E: How did you know?

C: 谁看见我家的宝贝孙子了？
E: Has anyone seen my grandson?

C: …好强的小妹妹！要是有朝一日我能和你一样厉害就好了。
E: ...Th—That was really brave of you! I hope I can be half as strong as you someday.

C: 四百五十冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，四百五十冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>450</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

C: 小妹妹，你头别这么铁嘛，我们好说好商量……
E: Come on missy, don't be so stubborn. We can talk it over...

C: 下一件竞拍品是……
E: The next item up for auction is...

C: 哦？狙击最高价的买家突然出现了！七百五十冬城盾一次！
E: Oh-ho? A new challenger enters! <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield!

C: 谢谢你！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Thanks for the help, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 三、三个月？！老…娜塔莎姐姐，虎克想再商量一下……
E: Th—Three months!? Witchy old... Natasha, let's negotiate...

C: 喔，对了！我也给老爹准备了礼物，你快打开看看吧！
E: Oh, yeah! I got a gift for you, too! Open it and take a look!

C: 小偷是你安排的？
E: Did you send the thief to steal the detector?

C: 大概是语言模块出了些什么故障吧…你能带我们去见克拉拉吗？
E: Its language module must have malfunctioned... Can you take us to Clara?

C: 未来都在你的手中！
E: Your future is yours to decide!

C: 不过，如果你愿意帮忙调查的话…或许能发现克拉拉没注意到的线索。
E: But if you're willing to help look into this case, perhaps we can uncover some clues that I missed.

C: 那些叔叔阿姨…不，应该说是下层区的大多数人，都只把机器人看作工具而已。
E: The vagrants... or, to be more accurate, the majority of people in the Underworld regard robots as nothing more than tools.

C: 那么在哪里才能买到呢？
E: Where can we buy one?

C: （居然还有这么离奇的报废原因……）
E: (That is such an odd reason to be scrapped...)

C: （把新外壳交给克拉拉）
E: (Hand the new shell to Clara)

C: 此外，该机体核心模组中亦见大量逻辑坏道。在对其进行深入扫描时识别到大量信息噪音，内容不详。
E: Furthermore, many defective networks were detected in the core module. A significant amount of muddled information with unknown content was discovered during a deep scan.

C: 理解。我尊重你的意愿，克拉拉。在此期间，我会确保该个体不对他人人身及财产安全造成影响。
E: Understood, Clara. I respect your wish. In the meantime, I'll make sure that this robot doesn't endanger other people or property.

C: 说得好！台词很帅嘛！
E: Right on! I'm stealing that!

C: 交涉失败了。
E: There goes the negotiation.

C: 走，回能源中枢——谁敢挡路，就给他点颜色瞧瞧！
E: Quick, back to the energy supply hub. Anyone that tries to stop us is gonna find out a thing or two.

C: …那就是还有动武的可能性了。
E: ...Meaning it could end in a fight.

C: 抱歉，老弟——我说好了要站在他们这边。
E: I'm sorry... we have an understanding. I stand with them.

C: 你和那边的三个人都亲自见过大守护者，既然她不认可你们的说法，岂能擅作主张！
E: ...You have all seen the supreme guardian in person. Do you think you can act as you please because she didn't recognize your version of events!?

C: 以我这脾气，老弟肯定没少替我操心。还真是辛苦他啦。
E: Knowing my temper, my brother almost certainly went to great lengths on many occasions for me. I should be thanking him.

C: 老弟独木难支啊。刚才把他教训了一顿，这是我的责任。而且……
E: My brother can't hold them back by himself. He wasted a lot of energy on us. He's my responsibility now. Besides...

C: 但是…我对你完全没有印象了，对不起——我现在有点混乱……
E: But... I don't have any recollection of you whatsoever. I'm sorry — I'm a little confused at the moment...

C: {NICKNAME}说的没错，感觉就像…感觉就像我们在被好多双眼睛一直盯着。
E: Oh yeah, {NICKNAME}. It feels like... like there are loads of eyes staring at us.

C: 意识变得模糊了…
E: I'm starting to feel hazy...

C: 第一，这些家伙费尽千辛万苦来到这里，为的就是封印那个叫「星核」的玩意。
E: One: These guys have come through hell to get here — to seal this Stellaron thing.

C: 姬子！你可算想到我们啦！
E: Himeko! You finally spared a thought for us!

C: 我能明显感觉到，笼罩这座山岭的风雪正在逐渐消退。但是……
E: It certainly seems that the blizzard around this mountain is starting to gradually subside. However...

C: 不——绝对不行。
E: No... No, no way.

C: …母亲是为了「存护」贝洛伯格而牺牲的。
E: ...Mother died to preserve Belobog.

C: …没有人会到这里来找我了。我不够聪明，不够坚强，不够自立…但唯独这点我很清楚。我一直在欺骗自己，就这样过了太久…我厌倦了。
E: ...Nobody is coming here for me anymore. I'm not smart enough, not strong enough, not independent enough... but I know all that. I've been lying to myself all this time and living that way for so long... I'm so tired of it.

C: 我无处可去，我就在这里等你。
E: I got no place to go. I'll be waiting for you here.

C: …你很温柔，陌生人。和斯捷潘先生一样温柔。
E: ...You are so gentle, stranger. As gentle as Mr. Stefan.

C: 说来话长，我被某个人骚扰了…
E: Long story. It all started with an ad...

C: 转达关于寒潮前历史的调查结果…
E: Report your findings of the history before the Eternal Freeze.

C: 乖、乖～不哭…「星际和平家电」的客服就是这样疯狂推销，根本不管客户的感受……
E: Now, now. Don't cry... Interastral Peace Appliances' customer service is all about crazy marketing. They don't care one bit how the customer feels...

C: 规则是什么来着？
E: What are the rules again?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星槎海的航道里会经过不同颜色、不同型号的星槎。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Starskiffs of different colors and models will pass through the lanes in Starskiff Haven.</color>

C: 没事没事，让梅姐先去治疗吧，我也得和您见上一面。
E: No rush. Mei should get treated first, and I should meet you in person.

C: 我临时买了一些谢礼，是仙舟甜点，还请您收下。抱歉让您费心了，为了素不相识的人，做了这么多的事情。
E: I bought some Xianzhou snacks on the way here as a small thank-you present. Please, take them. Thank you so much for all you've done for a complete stranger.

C: 俺实在是不想麻烦芦慧姑娘，你都不知道她有多忙，有时候饭都吃不上就得离开。
E: I really don't want to trouble Ms. Luhui. You don't know just how busy she is. Sometimes, she had to leave for work without having a proper meal.

C: 通过你的问询、我的调查，我们得到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>证言</color>，结合机巧鸟的影像，我们就能找到目标星槎到底是什么了。
E: Through your inquiry and my investigation, we got some <color=#dbc291ff>testimonies</color>. With these testimonies and the cycrane footage, we should be able to find the starskiff we're looking for.

C: 突然兴奋的男士说了什么。
E: The suddenly excited man's testimony.

C: 我们追逐着星槎从北到南，也就是说星槎去向了西方。
E: We chased it from north to south. Making a right turn means that it went to the west.

C: 她说自己听到了<color=#dbc291ff>当时俺听到了「咔嚓」一声</color>…但是这也说明不了什么。
E: Mei said she <color=#dbc291ff>heard a crack sound...</color> But this doesn't mean anything.

C: 他们原本批复让我进入丹鼎司参详医典，做些学术交流工作，但事情拖到了现在。仙舟人等得起，老头子我可等不起。
E: The locals originally gave approval for me to enter the Alchemy Commission, browse medical texts, and exchange research findings with others, but they kept delaying my visit. Xianzhou residents might be able to afford the wait, but my old bones simply can't.

C: （转述陶德的请求）
E: (Recount Todd's request)

C: 这些医典并不是什么绝密文献，也不记载什么禁忌内容。
E: These medical textbooks are not highly confidential files, nor do they contain forbidden knowledge.

C: 我见到水魈了
E: I saw a Xenohydro.

C: 听说你在找我？
E: I heard you're looking for me?

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 蘑菇就是蘑菇。
E: Mushrooms are mushrooms.

C: 哟，这不是我的诗仙机巧吗？
E: Ah, isn't that my little poet ingenium?

C: 她拒绝的不是诗，是你。
E: It wasn't poetry she rejected — it was you.

C: 怎么还有边塞诗人？
E: How is there a Borderland Poet?

C: …怎么还有点小聪主人的风格。
E: ...Why does that sound like Master Cong's style.

C: 静斋小姐喜欢的不是诗人，请你现在就认清现实。
E: Being a poet won't win the heart of Ms. Jingzhai. Please face the music.

C: 噢，这些事情不应该由一朵蘑菇教你……
E: Oh, a mushroom is not in the position to teach you things like this.

C: 我不能说的太详细，但是这个结果是没有错的。
E: I can't reveal too many details, but there is nothing wrong with this result.

C: 孤屿可能蜕生了？
E: Guyu has undergone the hatching rebirth?

C: 去广云袖买些漂亮衣服。
E: Go to Cloudbreadth Sleeves to buy some beautiful clothes.

C: 诈骗犯不就是想要钱嘛，我的零花钱应该能够支应你和温符瑞的。你们的损失，我统统给你报销的！
E: Scammers just want money at the end of the day, don't they? My allowance should be able to cover for both you and Wen Furui. I will reimburse all your losses!

C: 不好意思，你能再说一遍吗？
E: Excuse me?

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，听我一句劝。无论你想寻求一段恋爱，还是仅仅出于好奇想找人聊天，我劝你不要太过投入。
E: {F#Young girl}{M#Young boy}, heed my advice. Whether you are here to find love or to find a chat buddy out of curiosity, you shouldn't be too invested.

C: 再念一遍。
E: Say it again.

C: 我追不上，但是嘛，我有办法让它飞得慢一些。
E: I can't. However, I have ways to make it fly slower.

C: 高级…会员资格？{NICKNAME}你可真是太棒了，果然交给你是没错的。
E: Premium... membership? You're full of surprises, {NICKNAME}. Picking you for the job was the right decision.

C: 不过，如果她真的存在经纪人，为什么是用「她自己的小号」来联系你呢？
E: But, if she does have a manager, why would she use her own alias to contact you?

C: 这个地址只有她才知道的，所以她安排了人手假扮云骑军在这里埋伏你。
E: Only she would know of this address, so she must have arranged for people to ambush you as Cloud Knights.

C: 本来也许能挖出更多信息…
E: I thought maybe we could extract more information from him...

C: 重要的是内在，不是性别种族。
E: What matters is what's inside, not sex or ethnicity.

C: 人生嘛，百分之八十是花在等待上，老夫已经等了很久很久啦，不在乎多等那么一点儿时间。
E: Well, life is all about waiting. Since I've already waited for so long, I don't mind waiting a little longer.

C: {NICKNAME}啊，你好。照片的事就拜托你了。
E: Hi, {NICKNAME}. I'm counting on you for the pictures.

C: 而这一张图，许多人形汇聚在一起引导浪涛，淹没巨树。想来应该是描绘了持明族对罗浮的贡献……
E: And this drawing shows a group of people summoning waves to drown an enormous tree. I suppose this illustrates the contribution of the Vidyadhara to the Luofu...

C: 是啊，真奇怪…
E: That's really odd...

C: （无法握住的光芒，却能被相机拍下来…陶德追寻的应该就是这玩意了……）
E: (The light is untouchable but can be captured by the camera... This should be the one Todd is looking for...)

C: 返老还童？
E: You're de-aging?

C: 我最讨厌带小孩儿了。
E: Babysitting? No thanks, I'd rather watch paint dry.

C: 半夏，你不是不知道接下来怎么走吗，{F#她}{M#他}身体结实，武艺又好，肯定帮得上忙。
E: Banxia, you don't know the way from here, right? This {F#girl's}{M#guy's} no pushover — {F#she'll}{M#he'll} be able to help.

C: 你和龙女达成了什么交易？
E: What deal did you make with the Dragon Lady?

C: 买来了吗？
E: Did you buy it?

C: 庇尔波因特、翁瓦克、泰科铵…
E: Pier Point, Vonwacq, Taikiyan...

C: 衔药龙女。
E: The Healer Lady.

C: 看来留在这里守株待兔是没有错的，半夏妹妹，可算是在这里等到你了。哦，你还带来了衔药龙女，这是打算将功补过的意思吗？
E: Waiting here for you works well, Banxia. Our patience gets rewarded! Oh, I see you've brought us the Healer Lady. Trying to make up for the lost time?

C: 这可是你的主意喔！
E: You said it, not me!

C: 站住！这个小姑娘是干什么的？
E: Halt! What's with the kid?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们走。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's go.

C: 梁，沐……
E: Liang... mu...

C: 你们也不知道吗…可恶，这不是什么都没留下嘛，臭婆娘耍我呀！
E: You don't know? Ugh, she left me with nothing. Was she playing me this whole time!?

C: 两位好啊。波月古海今日风高浪急，两位怎么有雅兴到此一游？
E: Hello, what brings you two here? The wind and waves are restless around Lunarescent Depths today.

C: 大胆！
E: Pretty bold of them!

C: 让我仔细瞧瞧…唔，你的脑袋上也生了龙角，他们说你是那个丹枫的转生，看来是真的了？哎呀，你和我不同，怎么没有尾巴？
E: Let me take a look at you... Dragon horns. Well, they say you're Dan Feng's reincarnation. I suppose it must be true, then? But you're different from me — where's your tail?

C: 多少族人在那场灾难中入灭，再也无法进入轮回。而我…我也被那孽物撕去了一条腿…好疼……
E: How many of us perished in that disaster and could not be reincarnated? And I... My leg was torn off by that abomination... Oh, the pain...

C: 以妾身看来，持明族只需要一位龙尊。孱弱无用、窃据大位的那一个，除去便是。
E: From my perspective, the Vidyadhara requires only one High Elder. A second High Elder — one who is weak and useless must be removed.

C: 持明族中未必尽是心怀鬼胎的人。如果龙女大人不安心，神策府这厢可以安排住处。
E: Not all of the Vidyadhara harbor evil intentions. If you feel uneasy, Dragon Lady, the Seat of Divine Foresight can arrange for you to stay elsewhere.

C: 持明已有长生不灭的身躯了，持明祈求的应当是如同仙舟人那般生息繁衍的能力。
E: The Vidyadhara already have immortal bodies. What they should pray for is the ability to reproduce like the Xianzhou natives.

C: 怪物是怎么出现的…
E: How did the monsters appear?

C: 何止举手之劳啊，您为了我们，耗费了那么多的时间和体力……
E: Nonsense! You went out of your way to—

C: 喂！人家杨叔就是举个例子！我可是银河第一好姑娘。
E: Hey! He was just giving an example! I'm the nicest girl in the galaxy.

C: 嗯…{NICKNAME}说得对。关键还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
E: You're right, {NICKNAME}. The key is whether the Realm-Keeping Commission will trust a judgment based on this logic.

C: 这就是「热爱」的光芒吧。
E: Sounds like you really care.

C: 三二一四
（反正也很难想象罗刹具体遇到了什么困难，就当做是这样好了。）
E: (Anyway, it's not like we're gonna be able to conjure up exactly what Luocha ran into. Why not use our own interpretation to bridge the gap?)

C: 背面写了什么？
E: What's on the back?

C: 也许我们可以旁敲侧击，问问知情人士。
E: Maybe we can ask some people who might know the truth.

C: 晴霓告诉了你们这些吗？
E: Did Qingni tell you any of this?

C: 这台术算机不停跳动着字符和日期。
E: This calculation device is continuously cycling through symbols and dates.

C: 桌子的左边、右边和桌面下边各有一个暗格，要先看哪个呢？
E: There are hidden compartments on the left, right, and under the desktop. Which one should we check first?

C: 不知为什么，翻完这册日记，我突然觉得和她亲近了很多。虽然意外知道了我们不是血脉相连的母女，但我比过去更了解她了。
E: ...I feel a lot closer to Mom after reading this diary. Even if we're not connected by blood, I understand her a lot more now.

C: 你们快跑吧！这些怪物一时半刻爬不上来！
E: Just run! These monsters can't get up here anytime soon!

C: 决定了吗？
E: Have you made up your mind?

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: 作为演示，你让我先吧。
E: I'll go first to give you a demo.

C: （在这里试试说谎吧，下一次，就必须说真话了…）
E: (If I tell a lie this time, I'll have to tell the truth next time...)

C: ——你这个，邪魔外道！
E: ...You witch!

C: …我可以走了吗？
E: ...Can I leave now?

C: 穿过它的一瞬间，有种身子突然变轻了的感觉。
E: Whoa... I felt like I suddenly lost weight when we passed through.

C: 哇，咱们好像给病人进行诊断的大夫哎。
E: Whoa, so we're like doctors diagnosing a patient right now!

C: 这是{NICKNAME}。你别理{F#她}{M#他}，这家伙每次自我介绍都要玩点花样。
E: Don't mind {F#her}{M#him}. {F#She}{M#He} likes to get a little creative with {F#her}{M#his} introductions.

C: 恩公身手矫健，只要找到操作台，然后操作一下，我们就能继续前进了。怎么样，很简单吧？
E: You've already put on quite the show — do you think you'll be able to find and operate the control panel? Should be simple, right?

C: 奇怪，这儿的门本该是打开的呀？
E: Strange, the gate here is supposed to be open.

C: 「人有五名，代价有三」。
E: Of five people, three must pay a price.

C: 是吗？真遗憾。在所有的情绪中，仇恨最为强烈，我选择了它，握紧了它，用它来维持我的存在。
E: Really? How unfortunate... my hatred overshadows my other emotions. I chose to hold onto it, to embrace it, and to use it to maintain my existence.

C: 我来告诉你，那一战，白珩这个傻瓜终究还是耗尽了帝弓所赐的运气。
E: Let me refresh your memory. During that battle, Baiheng, being the headstrong girl that she was, managed to exhaust the luck that was bestowed upon her by the Reignbow Arbiter.

C: 就像在问…「为何，为何要和饮月一起，造下这场恶孽？」
E: It's as if they're saying... "Why... why did you and Imbibitor Lunae commit such an unforgivable sin?"

C: …没有落款，也没有见面的时间和地点。看来寄信人认为我会记得这些事情。
E: ...There's no signature, and it doesn't mention a time or place. Looks like whoever sent this expects me to remember.

C: 与此同时，鳞渊境深处，显龙大雩殿中…
E: Meanwhile, in the Dragonvista Rain Hall, Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 所以，小谛听到底在港口发现了什么啊？{NICKNAME}，咱们一起去瞧瞧吗？
E: So, what did Diting find at the port? Come on {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out.

C: 现在看我年纪小，等再过一阵子……
E: I might be young now, but just you wait...

C: 若是机巧鸟还能正常运作，也许可以找到一些影像记录…现在怕是不成了。
E: If the cycrane hadn't been damaged, we could've extracted some footage... *sigh* That's no longer an option.

C: …我输了。
E: ...I lost.

C: 如您所见，自星核灾变降临，「魔阴身」的狂症就蔓延开来了。
E: As I'm sure you're aware, symptoms of mara have been spreading ever since the Stellaron incident occurred.

C: 所以，你要我消灭魔阴身？
E: So, you need me to eliminate the mara-struck?

C: 我明白了！你是说你渴望长生，对吧！毕竟长生不死也是一种力量！
E: I understand! Eternal life is indeed a kind of power, wouldn't you say?

C: 在新人过来之前，我暂时来这边代班。
E: I'll be handling her duties until her replacement arrives.

C: 嗯…我确定。
E: Yes... I'm sure.

C: 卡芙卡的情况可不同。
E: Kafka's situation was different.

C: 这就去帕！
E: Going, going, gone!

C: 那也不能用禁锢的方式来「保护」一个人啊。
E: You don't "protect" people by imprisoning them.

C: 希望你不要再探索更远的事物了，相信我，请你相信我…那不会有任何好处。
E: I hope that you will refrain from exploring any further than this. Trust me when I say: Nothing good can come of it.

C: 对呀！{NICKNAME}，你脑袋可真灵光呀。 说到我失忆前就拥有的，应该就是凝出「六相冰」的能力吧？太卜，我随手变出的这块冰，应该能符合要求吧？
E: Oh yeah! {NICKNAME}, you sure are a smart cookie. My Six-Phased Ice ability must date from before the memory loss. Master Diviner, any ice I create should do, right?

C: 加油，三月！
E: You can do it, March!

C: 符玄？那是谁？没时间做白日梦了，现在空间站很危险。
E: Fu Xuan? Who's that? There's no time for daydreaming — the space station is in crisis.

C: 没办法了…看来这次真的只能靠我自己了。
E: *sigh* Looks like I'll have to do it by myself this time.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 虽然在穷观阵里真是吃尽了苦头，但拿到了这个小礼物，就觉得还不算坏。
E: Jumping through all those hoops in the Matrix was pretty exhausting, but this little gift makes me feel like it was worth it.

C: 再等一下…
E: Hang on a second...

C: 虽然对卡勒瓦拉而言它是件颇有历史价值的古物，但毕竟它不属于这个世界。
E: While the sword holds great historical significance for Kalevala, it doesn't truly belong to our world.

C: 那怎么就不奇怪了？很奇怪好吧！
E: Explains what? It explains nothing at all!

C: 我一步都迈不出去。直到母亲将我从劈砍的魔剑前推开，我才能趔趔趄趄地跑起来。
E: I was frozen in place, unable to move. It was only when my mother pushed me away from the deadly swing of the cursed sword that I managed to escape.

C: 美少女的事都不累。
E: A pretty lady like her never gets tiring.

C: 剑不是我偷的。
E: I didn't steal the sword.

C: 但他到底是如何将剑带离工造司的？又为什么要在送还宝剑后将它偷走？还有，他为什么要在匣中留下这片花瓣？
E: But how did he manage to take the sword from the Artisanship Commission? Why did he steal it after returning it here? And why would he leave that petal in the case?

C: 那是我和一名云骑流落异星的记忆。
E: It was a memory of me and a Cloud Knight, stranded on an unfamiliar planet.

C: 但我也记得，如果不是有个年轻人为了收葬我，冒险将它缝了回去，我已经彻底入灭了。
E: But I also remember that if it weren't for a brave youngster who risked his neck to reattach my head and give me a proper burial, I would've disappeared completely.

C: 有些伤感…我想在这儿待一阵。
E: I'm feeling a bit emotional... I'd like to stay here for a while.

C: 如果你的证言可信的话——没别的意思，毕竟每一份证据都应当被审视。
E: ...If your testimony is reliable. I'm not implying anything, but we need to scrutinize every piece of evidence.

C: 店员进入试衣间查看情况，却发现了「花火大人的尸体」！她在试衣时被人勒死了！
E: After a long time, the shopkeeper went in to see what was going on, but instead discovered Miss Sparkle's body! She had been strangled to death!

C: 哦…我懂了，你坚持不肯放我走，就是为了拖我下水啊！如果我不答应，下场…下场就会和她一样……
E: Oh... I understand. You refused to let me go because you wanted to drag me into all of this! If I don't agree, I'll end up... just like she did...

C: 关于受害者…
E: Regarding the victim...

C: 沙马里当场就不行了，一下从梦里惊醒了过来。那凶手也转眼消失不见。
E: Shamari collapsed on the spot and woke up from the dream. The murderer vanished in a flash.

C: 还是不玩了吧，我们的时间也没那么充裕。
E: I'd rather not play around. We don't have very much time.

C: 需要这么大阵仗吗？我说过会配合你们的呀。
E: Is this really necessary? I said I'd cooperate with you.

C: 没错，人类是做不到的。
E: That's right, it would be impossible for a human...

C: 他倒真会差遣人。那儿离「丹鼎司」不过咫尺，恐怕如今也已经大难临头了。
E: He really is a delegator at heart, isn't he... There isn't much distance between the Artisanship and Alchemy Commissions — I'm afraid the former is likely also facing imminent catastrophe.

C: 这可是为天舶司立功的好机会。
E: This could be your moment to shine for the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: ——是云骑军派来的救援吗？！
E: *gasp* Are you guys Cloud Knights? Are you here to save us?

C: 三月。
E: March.

C: 没别的意思啊，挂在那儿打烂了也挺可惜的。
E: I'm just saying! It'll be a shame if they get smashed to pieces.

C: 那就打到它灰飞烟灭！
E: Let's blast it to smithereens!

C: 「罗浮三少」就是…就是…嗨呀，就是特别牛逼的咱们仨，连地衡司的条子都拿咱们没办法呢！
E: The Luofu Trio is made up of two — uh... th—three super awesome kids that everyone's afraid of! Even the Realm-Keeping Commission!

C: 好耶！打起来打起来！你们打起来，这个战士的名额就是我的了！
E: Yeah — fight, fight, fight! The winner gets to join the Legion with me!

C: 我都看到了，这家伙突然用内力暗算老大，你太卑鄙了！
E: They used some kind of hidden power — I saw it! You're a cheater!

C: 三个小孩骂骂咧咧地离开了现场。你也带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: The three children flee from the scene while disgruntled. You take the chance to lead the girl away from this site of conflict.

C: （她怎么孤零零的一个人来去…）
E: (Why does she wander about alone...?)

C: （算了，药已经给到了，去和丹枢汇报一下情况吧。）
E: (*sigh* Well, I've delivered the medicine. I should report back to Dan Shu.)

C: 唔…我担心她一个人来去，也想听听她最近的心事。
E: ...I worry about her wandering around on her own, and I want to know what's been on her mind lately.

C: 呜呜呜…救命啊……
E: *sob* Help...

C: 满怀向往倒也不是坏事。
E: One hopes that would be the case...

C: 举个最简单的例子吧…你知道吗，虽然程度不同，但仙舟人大都受到口腔疾病和颞下颌关节紊乱的困扰。
E: To give a common example... Did you know that to varying degrees, most Xianzhou natives are plagued by oral diseases and jaw-related conditions?

C: 同受「丰饶」的转变，你可知道「丰饶孽物」和仙舟人的区别是什么？
E: For beings transformed by the Abundance, there's a difference. Do you know how Abominations of Abundance and Xianzhou people differ?

C: 你出于好奇，信手翻了翻丹枢身旁的书册。她闻声转向你。
E: Out of curiosity, you flip through the books beside Dan Shu. Hearing that, she turns to you.

C: 谛听循着丹枢的气息，将你引导到了工造司。
E: The Diting follows Dan Shu's scent and leads you to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 对不起…军爷…
E: I'm sorry, sir...

C: 要是哪天咱们遇到了危险，我想高呼慈悲的药师搭救时，我不想自己的功德户头里空荡荡的，一点儿让自己自豪的善举都没有。
E: If I were in danger one day and needed Yaoshi's help, I wouldn't want my merit account to be empty without a single kind deed that I could take pride in.

C: 我们保育派的主张特别简单，我们用放生的方式来拯救和保护那些被过度捕猎，数量稀少不足以延续种群的濒危物种。
E: Our position is pretty straightforward — We aim to rescue and protect endangered species that are so overhunted and scarce that they can hardly sustain their population.

C: （这台机兵似乎又被点亮了…这算是回光返照还是尸骨未寒？）
E: (The lights on this automaton seem to be coming on... is it hanging on to dear life, or is it the last flicker of a dead machine?)

C: 钟珊…是你的朋友对吧？对吧？
E: Zhongshan... is your friend, right? Right?

C: 高风险，高回报，高流量。我是说，在成长的道路上，每个人对未知事物的好奇心会被渐渐磨去，而我，我不能接受自己变成如此乏味的成年人。
E: High risk, high reward, high view count. As we grow up, our curiosity for the unknown gradually fades... I'm not gonna let myself become a boring grown-up.

C: 不管是谁的主意…两位，这儿已被划为禁区，无干人等不得入内。
E: Regardless whose idea it was... This place has been designated as a restricted area. No one is allowed to enter.

C: 惹毛判官小心吃几百年牢饭。
E: You'll be handed a few centuries of jail time if you irritate the judges.

C: （哎哟，学乖了，不说话？那么，我来编几句台词，你乖乖照着念就好。）
E: (Oh, you're not gonna fight back anymore? Then let me make up some lines. Just be good and say it with me.)

C: 蹬鼻子上脸了是吧？从那个{F#女孩}{M#小子}身体里滚出来，老子这就把你吞了！
E: Laugh while you can, coward! I'm gonna swallow you whole the second you leave that {M#boy's}{F#girl's} body!

C: 真有趣啊。可惜尾巴大爷没能得逞，不然借着这小姑娘的身体，它说不定能东山再起，像「燎原」那般，把仙舟闹个地覆天翻呢！
E: Hilarious! It's a pity "Mr. Tail" didn't devour you... He might've recovered his power and turned the Xianzhou upside down... just like Ignamar did!

C: 汝等平安归来，看来十王司今日的运气不算太糟。
E: You have returned safely. It seems the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today.

C: 啰嗦，挑后半段爱听的听就好了！
E: You need to start filtering out the stuff you don't wanna hear. That's what I do.

C: 雪衣大人也会害怕吗？
E: Madam Xueyi... you're afraid too?

C: 没事，您先休息一会吧。
E: It's fine. Please take a break first.

C: 我可以陪你走走。
E: I'll take a walk with you.

C: 呕…呕……
E: *Barfs*... *Barfs*...

C: 啊，问我吗？
E: Ah, me?

C: 娜娜，我马上就要去泰科铵参加比赛了——等比赛一结束我就回来找你，我们老地方见。
E: Cocona, I'm going to Taikiyan and joining the competition. I'll come back and look for you when it's over — we'll meet at our old haunt.

C: 他把这笔钱全部用在了押注上——他赌自己能获得这次业余组机动球比赛的冠军。
E: He used all this money on a bet — he bet that he would become champion in the amateur bracket of the Roboball competition.

C: 这一时肯定很难消化，我明白。但您应该能理解…庞德他真的非常在乎您，也希望能兑现自己许下的承诺。否则他绝对不会冒那么大的险……
E: This news may be hard to swallow, I understand. But you should understand... Pound really cared for you greatly, and hoped that he could trade himself to fulfill your wishes. Otherwise, he would not have undertaken such a great risk...

C: 两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
E: The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.

C: …就和现在的我一样。为了能在这个世界里生存，我不断地把自己的灵魂切片、丢弃…直到最后，剩下的只有一具令人生厌的躯壳。
E: ...Just like what I am now. To survive in this world, I have kept cutting off pieces of my own soul and discarding them... Until finally, there's nothing left but an empty shell that detests life.

C: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
E: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

C: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
E: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

C: 我不是你的亲人…不是导师…更不是医生。
E: I'm not your family... your mentor... not even a doctor.

C: 啊…您是说之前的店长吗？她已经辞职了，就在不久之前。
E: Ah... You mean the previous shop owner? She resigned not long ago.

C: 就那么爱出风头？
E: What a show-off.

C: 你拿到了银河巨星莱斯利•迪恩的亲笔签名。你不知道在梦境中获得一张签了名的明信片意味着什么…但你还是倍感激动。
E: You obtained the autograph of the galactic superstar Lesley Dean! You are unsure of what receiving an autograph in a dream actually means... But you are still extremely excited.

C: …可我该向谁求助呢？
E: ...Who should I go to?

C: 起初，你很难理解为何在匹诺康尼这样的世界依然有纸质账单的存在。
E: At first, you could not understand why paper checks would still exist in a world like Penacony.

C: 我们去唤醒她吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let us awaken her, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我愿意为他放弃一切。我的财产，我的生活，我的理想。
E: I would give anything for him. My money, my life, my ideals.

C: 来吧，我准备好了。
E: Okay, I'm ready.

C: 善良…细腻…隐忍…她身上的美好品质我细数不尽。有她陪伴的这段时光，我的人生过得如此顺利…她为我扛下了沉重的冗务，让我能够专心于自己的事业。
E: Kind... Meticulous... Patient... She has more good qualities than I could ever list. With her by my side, my life could not have been smoother... She took on the weight of my responsibilities so that I could continue to focus on my own career.

C: 我们离开这里吧。我感觉…有些累了。
E: Let us leave this place. I'm feeling... tired.

C: ——《薄荷色的星河》，我最爱的一部电影。有机会的话，希望您能和所爱之人一同观赏。
E: ...My favorite movie is The Mint-Colored Galaxy. If you get an opportunity, I hope you will watch it together with the one you love.

C: 我一定不会让您失望的，放心吧。
E: I won't disappoint you. Don't worry.

C: 唔，听上去是个不错的选择，能凸显星穹列车对空艇的所有权。
E: Mm, that doesn't sound like a bad idea at all. It represents the authority of the Astral Express holds over the airship.

C: …列车长帕姆。
E: ...Pom-Pom, Conductor of the Astral Express.

C: 请您稍等。
E: Just a moment.

C: 丹尼斯经理——他刚才不知道犯了什么病，嘴里喊着假期啊代币啊什么的就冲出去了——简直太奇怪了，我从没见过他那副样子！
E: Dennis the manager — who knows what he's dealing with upstairs, but he stormed out screaming things like "vacation" and "tokens"... It was so weird. I've never seen him like that before!

C: 这一瓶的口感似乎没有那么沁凉清爽了…将饮料瓶净空的瞬间，你感到了一丝后悔，因为你的肠胃发动了代表抗议的微微抽搐。
E: This bottle of SoulGlad fails to provide the expected refreshing and revitalizing experience... As you finish the bottle, a slight pang of regret washes over you, as your stomach gives slight shivers of protest.

C: 你将这一切怪罪于姬子和瓦尔特•杨——作为列车组的大家长，他们没有教会你「自制力」在充满诱惑的现代社会中是多么重要。
E: You find yourself blaming Himeko and Mr. Yang, the "parents" among the Crew, for their failure to emphasize the importance of "self-control" in the face of modern temptations.

C: 再来一瓶苏乐达。
E: Have another bottle of SoulGlad.

C: 再磨蹭一会儿…
E: Drag it out just a little longer...

C: （这会儿好像没什么客人…再随便转转吧。）
E: (There don't seem to be any guests right now... Let's take a bit of a walk around then.)

C: 凭借无人能敌的内力和天花板级别的职业素养，你压制住了大声嘲笑眼前这位皮皮西人的冲动。显然，他对于自己姓名的滑稽程度毫无自觉。
E: With unprecedented levels of restraint and first-rate professionalism, you fight back the urge to laugh out loud at this Pepeshi — who apparently has no idea how silly his name sounds.

C: 怎么，还没玩够？
E: What? Still haven't had enough of this place?

C: 开玩笑的，这里就是酒店前台。
E: Just kidding. This is the hotel reception.

C: <unbreak>135</unbreak>层？或许只是个巧合…你该问问他，他想找的人叫什么名字。
E: The <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor? That's probably just a coincidence... You should ask him the name of the person he's looking for, just in case.

C: （不想那么多了，不知道接下来还会遇到什么样的客人……）
E: (Don't think about it so much. Who knows what kind of guest I'll meet next...)

C: 哎哟喂，真贪心啊{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}…行吧，加就加，分你一半！
E: Hey... don't be too greedy, pal... Fine, I'll up the price. You can have half!

C: 给我来*一打*苏乐达。
E: I'll take one dozen SoulGlad.

C: 抱歉，我来晚了，今天我买单…
E: Sorry, I'm late. I'll pay the bill...

C: 如今有诸位列车客人同列，我也感觉安心不少。既然老师们有如此心意，咱们一起在这里稍作等候。
E: I feel much more at ease together with the Express guests. As you all feel the same way, let's wait here together for a while.

C: 希望是一万年。
E: Make it ten thousand years.

C: 拜别怀炎将军。
E: I bid you farewell, General Huaiyan.

C: 你和三月小姐不都在丹鼎司里养伤吗？
E: Weren't you and March both being treated in the Alchemy Commission at the time?

C: 天呐！彦卿师父不会想把剑送给云璃师父吧？
E: Woah! Are you really thinking about giving your sword to Yunli, Master Yanqing?

C: 谢谢，心意我领了。不过我对饮品还是有些挑剔，正常罗浮人应该是没人喝苏打豆汁儿的，待会本座请你品一下星芋啵啵，你自会明白。
E: Thank you. That is very kind. However, I am quite picky when it comes to drinks. Almost no regular Luofu citizen actually drinks mung bean soda. I'll take you to try some startaro bubble tea and you'll understand.

C: 所以这件事是打算交给我？
E: So you'd like me to take over from here?

C: 上一份。
E: Previous one.

C: 我们去不夜侯喝点儿茶吧！
E: Let's go to the Sleepless Earl and order a pot of tea!

C: …星槎海…星槎…我只想看看星槎在天上飞。
E: ...Starskiff Haven... Starskiffs... I just want to see starskiffs soaring through space.

C: 我只是需要有一个人告诉我「愿意收我为徒」。但是师傅他…他明明可以作为星际和平公司的设计师离开的，他又是为什么留下来呢？
E: I just needed one person to tell me, "I'll take you on as an apprentice." But my master, he... He could have left and been a top designer at the IPC, but he stayed behind instead. Why?

C: 我也是听公输师傅说起过，很久以前迴星港被一伙求药使袭击过。
E: I heard Master Gongshu talk about how Stargazer Navalia was attacked by some Elixir Seekers before.

C: 一开始每次想到莱恩先生的脸，我都会泪流满面，心里就有一股子冲劲。
E: At first, I'd burst into tears whenever I thought of Master Ryan's face, and my heart would skip a beat.

C: 公输师傅仔细检查了「金人飞行士」的逻辑设计，并且完成金人行为能力测试。他眉头一皱，发现事情并不简单。
E: Master Gongshu examines the design of the aurumaton pilot and completes a test on the aurumaton's abilities. Furrowing his eyebrows, he notices something is amiss.

C: 不可思议，但可以试试…
E: It sounds incredulous, but it's worth trying...

C: 那这样的话，铖杰师傅要不试试「绘画」吧？
E: If that's the case, should you give painting a try?

C: 此外，已逝之人的身躯不复存在。若欲令其开口，还需一具机巧之身充作形骸，就像吾身一样，希望汝等能够速速备妥。
E: Besides, the deceased don't have a physical body. To allow your master to speak, he'll need to possess an ingenium body like me. Please get it ready as soon as possible.

C: 你之前应该跟他打过照面了吧？对，就是那个装了只机械胳膊的小子。他之前也一直在为「地火」办事，只是不在这个镇上。
E: You've probably met him before, right? Yep, it's that boy with the mechanical arm. He was also doing work for Wildfire before, just not in this town.

C: 我果然没看错！
E: I knew it!

C: 卢卡那家伙，以前从来不会这样…这个心我实在放不下。
E: Luka didn't use to be like this... I can't just let it go.

C: 和史瓦罗对决之前提了两句。
E: He mentioned something before he fought Svarog.

C: 欸，你来了！快，他走得不急，现在出发应该还能赶上。
E: Oh, you're here! Come on — he wasn't in a hurry so we should be able to catch up easy enough.

C: 嗯，嗯…行，我明白了！放心吧哥们，我们保证帮你把机器人找回来。
E: Mm-hmm... Cool, we've got this! Don't worry, bro. We promise we'll find your robots!

C: 回家。回家。
E: Go home. Go home.

C: 「——让世界上的邪恶无处遁形！」
E: "Defeater of evil throughout the world!"

C: …怎么可能，离结束还早着呢！再来！
E: ...No way. I'm a long way from tapping out! Let's go!

C: 然后，我还想把骚扰大家的坏人全都赶走——
E: Then, I wanna chase away all the bad things hurting everyone...

C: 然后，我就要重新学会站立，行走，锻炼…直到实现所有这些愿望！
E: Then, I need to learn how to stand, walk, and exercise again... until I achieve all my dreams!

C: 晚安…玛吉。
E: Good night... Margie.

C: 在罗浮航行的宙域，公司的舰船，被步离人打劫，而朱明的使节救了他们？这案情听起来真复杂……
E: So, an IPC ship was attacked by the borisin near the Luofu, and the Zhuming envoys saved them? This sounds complicated...

C: 这把小剑便是如此。它飞在空中，本该射向那名逃窜的步离人。可惜剑主心性纷扰，反倒让它像只折翼的飞鸢，失了准头。
E: As for this little sword, it was supposed to strike that escaped borisin prisoner, but unfortunately its owner's agitated state caused it to fly off like a kite with a broken string, and it missed its target.

C: 爷爷，你到底站哪头的？
E: Hey, whose side are you on, Grandpa?

C: 你说的不错。明明是凭本事「拿」走，说是抢也罢了，他怎么能将我和小偷小摸混为一谈？
E: You're right. I "took" it with my skills, so I guess you can say I'm a robber or something. How dare he imply I'm a thief. Totally different!

C: …她正是为你而来。
E: ...She has come specifically for you.

C: 好吧，既然老师们有意帮忙，那我也不再推辞。去工造司会会他们吧。
E: Well, since you're willing to help, I won't decline your kindness. Let's head to the Artisanship Commission and meet them.

C: 为何会在这儿出现步离人？
E: Why are there borisin here?

C: 怎么又来了一个？你是谁啊！
E: Another one? Who the heck are you!?

C: 如果你没别的事，就别在这附近闲逛了。等我过几天忙完了，叫上小桂子和藿藿，一起去金人巷吃个饭吧。好久没聚了。
E: Stop hanging around here and find something better to do. Once I'm done in a few days, call up Lil Gui and Huohuo, and let's grab a meal at Aurum Alley. It's been ages since we hung out.

C: 我虽然身为持明族人，但与身边的两位伙伴一样同是外人身份。灵砂小姐想要的「医方」，丹恒无法置喙。但是…有一句忠告，希望灵砂小姐听听。
E: Well, even though I'm a Vidyadharan like you, I'm an outsider just like my companions here. I can't really say much about a "remedy," but... I do have a piece of advice, Miss Lingsha.

C: 今天是我在丹鼎司履任的第一日，刀兵见红可不是个开门好彩头。
E: It is my first day at the Alchemy Commission — a brawl is definitely not how I imagined celebrating it.

C: 椒丘，生死之事，自有定数。
E: Well, life and death, Jiaoqiu, it's all predetermined.

C: 仇怨？你误会了，我和云璃…只是切磋罢了。
E: Grudges? No, not at all. Yunli and I... we were just sparring.

C: 元帅发出饬令，要我前往罗浮仙舟。但公文里也不过寥寥几个字：「观礼演武仪典，旁听飞霄问话」。
E: The Marshal ordered me to come to the Xianzhou Luofu, but the document only says: "Attend the Wardance and listen to Feixiao's questioning."

C: 我要在此致歉。我邀请诸位返航观礼，是存了向两位将军出示人证的心思，但没能坦诚相告，是景元的不是。
E: My apologies. Truth be told, I invited all of you to the ceremony because I wished for you to act as my witnesses. I apologize for not disclosing this information earlier.

C: 死者前突的下颚利齿横生，与那些死去的步离人颇为神似。
E: Sharp fangs grew unchecked along the deceased's protruded lower jaw, bearing an uncanny resemblance to the other borisin corpses.

C: 尽管幽囚狱的狱卒饱经训练，但在步离人恐怖的冲击之下，仍然死伤惨重。
E: The prison guards at the Shackling Prison may be well-trained, but they likewise suffered deaths and casualties in the face of the borisin's horrifying assault.

C: 明日便是演武仪典举行的日子了，两位不各自砥砺锋芒，怎么还在这儿醉心教学？
E: Tomorrow is the big day of the Wardance. Shouldn't you two be focusing on honing your skills instead of teaching swordplay here?

C: 不…没事。
E: No... it's nothing.

C: 路君？巡防卫队的值守武官？……等等！
E: Lujun? An officer of the patrol defense squad... Wait!

C: 我来为天击将军介绍一番。身着青衣的这位——
E: Let me introduce our guests to you. The one dressed in green...

C: 喔？这倒不像我认识的神策将军啊。
E: He didn't? That doesn't sound like the Divine Foresight I know.

C: 有心行善，值得赞赏。云骑巡猎讨魔，也秉持向善之心。虽然总有人不明事理，多加非议，但我不会质疑各位无名客的动机。
E: Your good intentions are commendable, just like the Cloud Knights' determination to eliminate those abominations. Even though there are always people who remain skeptical, I won't question your motives.

C: 很好，从各位的回答来看，这些问题都能有所解释。
E: Well, it seems that your answers have addressed all my questions.

C: 星核猎手的预言，我倒也未必全信。但在见招拆招之间，罗浮已从建木灾异中得以保全，可见艾利欧对未来的预言，亦有可观之处。
E: As for the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy, I didn't believe all of it, but in the end, the Luofu did survive the Ambrosial Arbor crisis. So, I think it's safe to say that Elio's prophecy about the future holds some merit.

C: 不，没事，也许是我的错觉…咱们走吧。
E: No, never mind, maybe I'm just imagining things... Let's keep moving.

C: 饶是生命力顽强的长生种也抵受不住。
E: Even the toughest long-life species would have a hard time enduring this.

C: 难怪我始终嗅到一股熟悉的兽臭味，原来这不是我的错觉啊。貊泽，动手！
E: No wonder I kept smelling that familiar stench. So, it wasn't just my imagination. Do your thing, Moze!

C: 不到最后一刻，还不是放弃的时候。
E: Yeah, we won't give up, not until the very last moment.

C: 曜青使者，还有无名客呢？
E: What about the Yaoqing messengers and the Nameless?

C: 你那边发生了什么？
E: What happened on your end?

C: 丹鼎司的分内之责罢了，便是苦药也得吃下去呵。将军想打哪儿查起？
E: Well, it's part of my responsibilities as the Cauldron Master. So, where would you like to start, General?

C: 这便是丰饶孽物的可怕之处。对他施加剑树之刑，消磨其生命力，结果他的刑期反倒成了对我们耐心的考验。
E: Such is the terrible nature of the Abominations of Abundance. We subjected him to the Forest of Swords to drain his life force, but in the end, his punishment turned into a test of our patience.

C: 元帅借呼雷移交罗浮一事，既暂时平息了曜青狐人的恶念，也告诫了经历乱局的罗浮仙舟。
E: By imprisoning Hoolay in the Xianzhou Luofu, the marshal both suppressed the dangerous intentions of the Yaoqing foxians and warned the Xianzhou Luofu to refrain from repeating its mistake.

C: 哈哈哈哈，步离仁兄幽默了。我听说步离人在自我改造的过程中丧失了不少味蕾，无法品尝出复杂的滋味，只有血肉的「咸」能唤起你们的食欲。
E: Hahahaha! You have quite a sense of humor. I've heard that you borisin have lost many of your taste buds during the self-modification process, so you can't experience complex flavors. Only the "saltiness" of blood and flesh truly awakens your appetite.

C: 她打败了你们。末度，不公平是为死人和失败者准备的托词。既然猎群四分五裂，又是谁告诉你们我还活着，谁把你们派来这儿？
E: And she bested you, Mok Tok. Fairness is but a pathetic excuse for the dead and defeated. Since our great pack has fallen apart, who told you that I was alive? And who sent you here?

C: 有什么话非得小声说吗？哈哈哈哈，客人有话不妨直接说。
E: Keep what quiet? Hahahahaha! Come on, spill it if you have something to say.

C: 咱们这星槎随时都可以走。
E: I'm ready to leave whenever you are.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>我需要你的帮助。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I need your help.</color>

C: 演武仪典召开前两个时辰\n\n迴星港
E: Two dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nStargazer Navalia

C: 唉，几个不请误入的游客嘛，咱们好好说话。
E: Hey, chill out. They're just a few lost tourists.

C: 公文？当然有了。云骑军得知有人潜入迴星港。
E: Official documents? Of course, there are. The Cloud Knights are aware that some people have infiltrated this port.

C: 演武仪典召开前一个时辰\n\n长乐天
E: One dual-hour before the Wardance convenes\n\nExalting Sanctum

C: 我代彦卿师父守擂！
E: I am here to be the ringmaster on behalf of Master Yanqing!

C: 首先是大家最关心的问题！彦卿骁卫没有出现在今天的「演武仪典」上。
E: First, the question that is on everyone's minds! Lieutenant Yanqing is not appearing in today's Wardance!

C: 云璃师父。
E: Master Yunli.

C: 三月七选手真是太狂…呃不，太自信了！
E: March 7th, you are quite arro—... I mean, extremely self-assured!

C: 难道我们要放弃那些「可能性更小」的地方吗？
E: Are we just supposed to abandon those "less likely" locations?

C: 我们的身后，是手无寸铁的仙舟百姓和迢迢而来的旅客。试问，身为云骑军人，我们能让步离人的计划得逞吗？！
E: The unarmed civilians of the Xianzhou and countless visitors from afar are under our protection. Let me ask you, as Cloud Knights, will we allow the borisin to succeed with their plan!?

C: 谈不上「一直」，只是「经常」罢了。一旦打到兴头上，她就会把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
E: I wouldn't say "always"... But "often" would be fair. As soon as the heat of battle gets to her, she sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.

C: 当然是因为心系竞锋舰和弟子的安危啊。
E: I was concerned about the safety of the Skysplitter and my dear disciple, of course!

C: 我听说那个时候是你救下了我？
E: I heard that you saved me?

C: 罢了，在飞霄到来之前，就由你们来充当余兴节目吧！
E: Fine. You can be a little opening act for me until Feixiao finally arrives!

C: 椒丘，你竟然…！
E: Jiaoqiu, you—!

C: 她把我们都当成敌人了吗？
E: Does she think we are her enemies?

C: 抱歉，和来时一样，我又迟到了。
E: I apologize for my tardiness, once again.

C: 但我那个脑子有泡的生意伙伴，一入梦就不知所踪。我本和他约好了在这里见面，结果马上就要开始谈判了，还不见他的人影！
E: But that blister-brained business partner of mine went missing right after entering the dream. I was to meet him here to start negotiations, but he's nowhere to be found!

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 不是「面子」，是「人望」。朕不指望你能理解。
E: It's not "pull." It's "prestige." I don't expect you to understand.

C: 真这么简单就好了！她应该是缺少了什么东西！就是因为缺少了那样东西，她才说什么也不肯寻求你的帮助！
E: If only it were that simple! She must be missing something! It must be because she is missing something, that's why she refuses to ask you for help.

C: 可这些日子，竟有一伙刁民胆敢频繁地袭击朕——朕心胸宽广，不想和他们一般见识，可奈何忍一时越想越气。
E: But these days, there have been a bunch of unruly hooligans who assaulted me time after time. Benevolent as I am, I refused to stoop to their level, but the more I think about it, the more seething I become.

C: 走吧，去个安静些的地方，看那些个刁民会不会上钩。
E: Let's go to a quieter place. We'll see if they take the bait.

C: 你自己决定。
E: You decide for yourself.

C: 伊里潘！够了！无名客，如果这个旧零件没问题的话，就拜托你了。
E: Illifan! Enough! Nameless, if this old part can let you do your thing, we'll leave it to you.

C: 兄长登基践祚已两年有余，这两年和我的关系也逐渐疏远了。要是能送他以前最喜欢的纺锤花，他应该会很开心吧？
E: My older brother has ascended the throne for more than two years, and our relationship has grown distant. If I gift him with spindleblooms that he used to love, I think he'd be happy?

C: （呈上无毒的酒）
E: (Bring the safe wine)

C: 陛下…您这是…什么意思？
E: Your Majesty... You... What is the meaning of this?

C: 已经不止一位臣民给朕讲过这些事了。朕已经知悉了！
E: More than one subject has brought this issue up to me. I am fully aware!

C: 我还看到了…一些人。啊…卓尔不凡的人们，哪怕是在散装的记忆里也闪着光芒。
E: I also saw... some people. Oh... those extraordinary characters. Even in fragmented memories they can shine.

C: 时候到了，专家。按下起爆按钮吧。
E: It's time, bomb-maker. Hit the detonate button.

C: 咳，看过《钟表小子》动画片吗？按设定来说，「折纸小鸟只认识钟表小子」。
E: Ahem, have you seen Clockie's cartoons? According to the setting, origami birds only know Clockie.

C: 匹诺康尼容不了一只不说「啾」的鸟，于是我就听了那个「钟表匠」的忽悠，在这儿建了个新巢。后来又有一些爱唱反调的人也被他拽了过来，这儿就成了流梦礁。
E: Penacony does not welcome birds that can't tweet, which is why I trusted the Watchmaker's deception and built a new nest here. Later, he dragged a bunch of naysayers here, and this place became Dreamflux Reef.

C: 你面前的小鸟突然哑火。它沉默了两秒，态度变得极为冷淡。
E: The bird before you suddenly goes mute. It is silent for a couple of seconds, and its demeanor turns aloof.

C: 呵呵，教授，我理解你的担忧，但我们也应尊重筑梦师们的自我表达。
E: Heh-heh, I understand your frustration, Professor, but we should also respect the Dreamweavers' freedom of expression.

C: 没什么要问的。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 我们、我们……
E: W—We...

C: 某人在建筑旁写下一行小字：「十二时刻•设计草图」
E: Someone has written something beside the building: Twelve Hours Blueprint.

C: 脑子正常的哪愿意在这么危险的地方干活啊？每天除了闷头画稿、钻进梦里施工——甚至还要被人诬陷诽谤。
E: Who would want to work in such a dangerous place if they didn't have a screw loose? With heads buried in architectural drafts, working deep in the dream, and even subjected to accusations and slander.

C: 我原来以为这孩子只是好奇，施工相关的讨论也没有刻意避着他…没想到他都记住了。
E: I thought this child was just curious, so I didn't keep him out of earshot during our architectural conversations... Turns out, he memorized it all.

C: 你是个敏锐的孩子，熟悉梦境，也拥有构筑梦境的天赋。教授不会拒绝这样的人才的。
E: You're sharp, familiar with the Dreamscape, and possess a talent for building Dreamscapes. The Professor would never refuse such a prodigy.

C: 当年那个到处捣乱的毛头小子，竟然已经能建出这种规模的建筑了……
E: The kid that used to be such a troublemaker has already built something of such scale...

C: 你说的对。但只有这样，隐夜鸫才不会消失，我们筑造的「巢」会永远留在梦中。
E: You're right. But this is the only way for the Nightingales not to disappear, and the "nest" we built will remain in the dreams forever.

C: 我已经没有坚持的理由了，也该迎接我并不完美的结局了——
E: There's no reason for me to hold on, it's time for me to embrace my imperfect end...

C: 谁说这不算一种*完美结局*呢？
E: Who says this doesn't count as some sort of *perfect ending*?

C: （嗯？那边似乎有人在吵架…？）
E: (Hmm? Looks like there's a quarrel going on...?)

C: ——就在那！别让他跑了！！
E: ...Over there! Don't let him get away!

C: 我来还档案。
E: I'm here to return the file.

C: ——「若是筑梦时被绊住腿脚，就抬头吧。」
E: "If you stumble when weaving dreams, look up."

C: 最近这段时间，大壮不知为啥总是犯懒。我看事出反常，就亲自到兽栏蹲守，果然发现了元凶——这个外邦人！
E: In recent times, Bossman had been unusually lazy. I noticed something amiss, and personally stood guard by its cage. Guess who I caught red-handed — this outlander!

C: 一个人的真实想法往往以玩笑的形式表露。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
E: A person's true thoughts are often revealed in the form of jokes. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.

C: 不会的，宝贝…有妈妈在就不会。
E: No, baby... It won't happen as long as mama is around.

C: 妈妈，我不想再吃这些硬面包了，牙都快硌掉了！
E: Mama, I don't want to eat this rock-hard bread anymore. My teeth are going to fall out!

C: …这一箱价钱又不贵，才<unbreak>2000</unbreak>利衡币。买不了吃亏，买不了上当啊！
E: ...This crate doesn't cost much, only <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Balance Coins. There's no way you're losing out on this deal!

C: 里面…全都是食物？而且看上去品质还不错……
E: It's... all food inside? And they look pretty good too...

C: 这是偷窃，我很清楚自己在做非法之事。如今这番下场，也算是我咎由自取。
E: It is theft. I understand very well that I was committing a crime. As for how it ended, it was simply my just deserts.

C: （后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>中立且客观的态度</color>。）
E: (Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>impartiality</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)

C: （再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>非常丰盛的食物</color>。）
E: (After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>luxurious meals</color>.)

C: 和服装一样，传说往往也会应潮流来去。阿卡迪亚在如今已是「过时」的故事，许多墨涅塔的信徒都不知晓这个名字。
E: Much like clothing, legends are often things that come and go with the times. Arcadia is already a story of the "past." Many disciples of Mnestia don't even know this name.

C: 什么？你是不是打仗把脑袋打坏了——如果你的构造有脑袋的话。
E: What? Have you battled so much that your brain got knocked silly? ...If you have a brain in there, that is.

C: 这还有个人呢！
E: I'm here too, you know!

C: 来了奥赫玛，就让婆婆请你吃个够！来点苹果？还是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果？
E: You are in Okhema now, let me treat you to a feast! Would you care for an apple? Maybe a Mediterrana fig?

C: 这位眷属…女士是我们奥赫玛的贵客，不要将偏见带到这包容的城邦。
E: This Titankin... This lady is a guest of Okhema. Do not bring your prejudices into this city of acceptance.

C: 看到民意所向了吗？不要再以私情干预此处的公正了，除非你能将这破坏恢复原状！
E: Do you see the will of the people? Do not use your personal affairs to interfere with the justice of this land any longer! That is, unless you can restore this damaged item to its previous glory?

C: 其实和我没啥关系。
E: This actually had nothing to do with me.

C: 倘若事情结束在这里也罢，可自那以后，帕西提亚便常常在梦中听见它的声音。年复一年，如同一个缠着她的幽灵。
E: If things just ended there, it would have been fine. But since then, Pasithea often hears its voice in her dreams. Year after year, it's like a ghost haunting her.

C: 几日前，在奥赫玛闹得沸沸扬扬的，黄金裔们的贵客，对吧？
E: You're the honored guest of the Chrysos Heirs who was causing such a commotion at Okhema just a few days back, right?

C: 别分心，帕西提亚，继续跟着辅祭大人的指示做。
E: Don't get distracted, Pasithea. Keep following the instructions of the acolyte.

C: 但既然你们要撕破脸，也别怪我把事情全都捅出去。
E: But since the gloves are off, don't blame me for spilling the entire truth.

C: 即使欧洛尼斯沉默不语，我也能替你预言——他们会杀了你，他们不会相信。
E: Even if Oronyx remains silent, I can foretell your future after you tell the people these truths — the citizens will kill you. They will not believe it.

C: 上前去吧，天平已高悬在你的头顶，用它明晰你灵魂的重量。
E: Go forth. The scale has risen far above your head. Use it to ascertain the weight of your soul.

C: 我会成为圣女。
E: I will be the Holy Maiden.

C: 居然能摸鱼？
E: She can slack off like this?

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 等你考虑好了，就去找爱德华医生吧。我会说服奥帝先生提供协助，回头见啦。
E: Once you've made up your mind, go see Dr. Edward. I'll convince Mr. Oti to help out. See you later!

C: 结果，正赶上他的舰队被抽调去对抗铁墓，那艘歼星舰…被击毁了。
E: But his fleet was dispatched to fight against the Irontomb, and that starnought... was destroyed.

C: 《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
E: Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.

C: 翁法罗斯有几个月亮？
E: How many moons does Amphoreus have?

C: 坐标，呜…呜呜！帮助，呜！
E: Coordinates. Wooo! Help! Wooo!

C: 他们对你的期望？
E: What are their expectations for you?

C: 正在研究学习计划……
E: Reviewing curriculum...

C: 发短信的时候还挺言简意赅的，要是运用到实际中…会被当做是怪人的吧？
E: I'm concise enough when sending text messages, but if I put it into practice... Would people think I'm a weirdo?

C: 但我确信，我认识的埃美丽小姐绝不是那样的人。
E: But I am positive that the Miss Emily I know is nothing like that.

C: 你们的看法是…
E: So, what do you think?

C: 哎，最近实在是睡不着啊。
E: Oh, it's been so hard to sleep these days.

C: 虽然我没有理解什么是小小的马桶，但是有人听我讲话的感觉真好…谢谢你，好心的陌生人。
E: I don't get what you mean by a small toilet seat, but it feels good to have someone listen to me... Thank you, kind stranger.

C: 我还没问呢！
E: I haven't asked anything.

C: 但我觉着太老气了。
E: But I think it feels a little old-fashioned.

C: 简单来说就是印有黑塔女士指定图案的款式，我记得还挺抢手的。
E: Basically, it's a lens with the picture of Madam Herta imprinted on it. I remember it was very popular.

C: 呃，那现在流行的是什么我也不清楚…抱歉，抱歉。
E: Umm, okay. I'm not sure what's fashionable anymore... Sorry...

C: 雪地上留下了白色的鬃毛，在附近的树丛里还发现了咬痕。
E: There is some white fur left in the snow. And some bite marks are found in the bushes nearby.

C: 你给她看过照片了吗？她怎么说？
E: Did you show her my photo? What did she say?

C: 不、不管了！就先送这一箱吧，另、另外一箱等我回来再说……
E: N—Never mind! I'm gonna deliver this box first, and then, the other one after I come back...

C: 荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，这边，这边！
E: Honorary member {NICKNAME}, here!

C: 不许你这么评价鼹鼠党！
E: You can't badmouth The Moles like that!

C: 荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！快过来快过来，又有新任务啦！
E: Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Quick, come here! We have a new mission!

C: 需要我把他揍醒吗？
E: You want me to kick him up?

C: 邓恩那小子之前跑来跟我谈话，问我愿不愿意再多待几个月，培养培养接班人。
E: Then Dunn came to me and asked if I wanted to stay for another couple of months to train my successors.

C: 至于选什么品种的花…就由你定吧。我现在也不太清楚她的喜好……
E: As for the best type of flowers... I'll let you decide. I'm not so sure about her favorites now...

C: 其实他不用一直在信里跟我们道歉…只要他还能在自己的岗位上找到认同感，我和妈妈肯定支持他的选择。
E: He really doesn't need to apologize to Mom and me. We'd support his choice if the job makes him feel needed and fulfilled.

C: 太简单了，这就出发。
E: Simple enough. Let's go.

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: 请您慢走。
E: So long.

C: 听着挺有趣的。
E: Sounds pretty interesting.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天会在广场散步，拜托你去广场上看看她在做什么吧~谢谢你啦~
E: I heard that she's going for a walk in the plaza today. Please, can you go to the plaza and observe what she's up to? Thank you so much~

C: 听着不像公益组织啊…
E: It doesn't sound like a charitable organization.

C: 我的需求是——希望你能为我拍张照！就这样。
E: I need you to — take a photo of me! That's all.

C: 都说你认错人了。
E: I told you, you've got the wrong person.

C: 等等。难道说……
E: Wait. Are you saying...

C: 哦？请留步，年轻人。你手上的是……
E: Oh? Wait, kid. You're holding...

C: 好耶！谢谢{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Yay! Thank you!

C: 留下一张灿烂的笑脸，这位乖巧懂事的孩子便散发黯淡的光芒，在裂界的街道中散去。
E: This nice and polite child puts on a bright smile as their figure radiates a dim light, then disappears from the streets constructed by the Fragmentum.

C: 唔，我想这应该不是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}的技术问题…我再拜托别人帮我拍一张就好！
E: Mmm, it's probably not because of your photography skills... I'll ask someone else to take one for me!

C: 这贝洛伯格刚打完仗不久，墙外又是大风大雪…挣钱可太难了啊。
E: Belobog just finished fighting the war, and the outside is all snow and blizzard... It's so tough to earn money.

C: 他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。
E: As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.

C: （假装照着做，数到<unbreak>20</unbreak>就睁眼）
E: (Pretend to do as he says and open your eyes on <unbreak>20</unbreak>)

C: 这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
E: This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.

C: 来，客官，请——
E: Please enjoy!

C: 类似山中别墅的景致，让你时常忘记这里是一座修建在云端的城市。奥赫玛的水来自何方，又最终会流向哪里？这个问题的答案也许只有法吉娜自己知道。
E: Scenery reminiscent of a mountain villa, often making you forget that this is a city built atop clouds. Where does Okhema's water come from, and where does it eventually flow? Perhaps only Phagousa knows the answer to this question.

C: 喂喂喂，刚才是你干的好事吧？看不出来啊，好好的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}居然这么没素质，高空抛物，都砸到我头上了！
E: Hey you, did you do this? I wouldn't have guessed — a decent-looking {F#young lady}{M#young man} like you throwing things from high up like a hooligan! They hit me on the head!

C: 你仔细地跟他分析了一遍，无论从露台底下草坪的痕迹看，还是他后脑勺的状况来看，都不存在你高空抛物的可能。
E: You scrutinize his entire person — from the markings on the turf below the terrace, to the back of his head, you see no traces of you throwing any objects from a height.

C: 岁月注视着你，无需惶惶，它平等地注视着一切，漠视一切，夺走一切。
E: Time watches over you, no need to fear. It watches over everything equally, indifferent to all, claiming all in its passing.

C: 似乎具有精巧的结构，音律一刻不停地自行流淌。
E: A seemingly intricate construct that flows with music on its own.

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: This is the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 以下为您展开详细报道。
E: Let's take a closer look at the details.

C: 无仪式时，市民们也搬来枕垫，三五围坐乘荫纳凉。
E: When there are no ceremonies, people bring their cushions and enjoy the shade.

C: 奥赫玛建筑美学的杰作，眼前的云石天宫依山而坐，显扬不对称的律动之美。
E: An architectural masterpiece from Okhema, the Marmoreal Palace was build alongside a mountain to demonstrate the beauty of asymmetrical rhythms.

C: 然后迎来崭新的昨日。
E: And then they welcome a brand-new yesterday.

C: 请暂且避让，我来结束它的痛苦吧。
E: Please move aside. I will bring an end to its suffering.

C: 你看见壁画上刻着巨树在阳光下伸展枝条，无数智慧的火花从树冠坠落的景象。
E: You notice a mural etched on the wall, depicting a giant tree spreading its branches under the sunlight, with countless sparks of wisdom cascading from the treetop.

C: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
E: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

C: 这尊雕像仿佛将「命运」二字具象化了——它的形态既像一把钥匙，又似一扇门，更像一架天平。难怪命运三泰坦的信徒们对它青睐有加。
E: The statue seems to embody the concept of "destiny" itself — its form resembling a key, a door, and a scale all at once. Small wonder the followers of the Three Titans of Fate hold it in such high regard.

C: …冥顽不灵。也罢，咱俩的辩论从来都没能分个高低。这最后一次，我让你赢。
E: ...You stubborn old fool. Have it your way. We were never able to decide a victor in our debates. Let's count this final one as your victory.

C: 其他的柱子都是完整的，而它却是悬空的…就像是这完美无缺的世界中过目即忘的瑕疵，而你却发现了它。
E: The other pillars stand firm, but this one floats... like an imperfection in this otherwise perfect world, one that you've noticed.

C: 「柱头」没有回应你，显然它觉得自己就是黎明云崖不可撼动的一部分。
E: The "pillar head" hasn't responded, clearly thinking of itself as an irremovable part of Dawncloud.

C: 呼呼…真是复杂……
E: Phew... This is so complicated...

C: 不出意料的，你注意到底座上有一个精巧的开关装置。
E: As expected, you notice a finely crafted switch at the base.

C: 进展…必须……
E: Progress... must...

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 嗯…有位织者看不惯丑陋的造物。金丝带来消息，它正驻足于<color=#dbc291ff>神殿后的走廊尽头</color>，肆意吐槽呢。
E: Hmm... there's a weaver who cannot tolerate ugly creations. The golden threads bring word that the weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>at the far end of the corridor behind the temple</color>, freely mocking what it finds displeasing.

C: 你再瞅一眼试试？
E: I dare you to wwy that again.

C: o((■ω■- )o「桀桀，谁█违逆豹，豹就让谁见识███黑暗█残酷！」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "Hehe, I will show those who█dare disobey me███cruel█darkness!" )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「很好，第二题：大地兽肉排和巨无霸双拼肉饼，你会选择——」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Good, now for the second question. Make your choice — dromas steak or the supreme patty blend pie?" )∋

C: 要是我有一只就好了…
E: I wish I had one...

C: 墨镜一戴我谁都不爱…
E: I got my shades on and no earthly attachments...

C: 那似乎是一座高塔，上面有几位身穿黑袍的占星师在此驻足。他们脚边摆放着沙漏与星盘，低声交谈着什么。
E: It appears to be a towering structure, where several black-robed astrologers are gathered. Hourglasses and star charts lie at their feet as they converse in hushed voices.

C: 咦？啊，这个，这个啊……
E: Huh? About that... Uhh...

C: …黑潮造物？！维尔图斯，别管我！快走！！
E: ...Black tide creatures!? Virtus, don't worry about me! Run!!

C: 我们会替你目睹再创世。
E: We will witness the Era Nova for you.

C: 云层游移，雨水██，溪涧流淌█河流逝去，<color=#eb4d3dff>蒸腾升起</color>，云层游移，雨水落下，溪涧███河流逝去，<color=#eb4d3dff>蒸腾升起</color>，云层游移，██落下，溪涧流淌，█流逝去，<color=#eb4d3dff>蒸腾升起</color>，云层游移……
E: The clouds drift, the rain █████, the streams flow, ███ river fades away, <color=#eb4d3dff>rising into vapor</color>. The clouds drift, the rain falls, the streams ███w, the river fades away, <color=#eb4d3dff>rising into vapor</color>. The clouds drift, ███ ████ falls, the streams flow, ███ █████ fades away, <color=#eb4d3dff>rising into vapor</color>. The clouds drift...

C: 或许不该在这里停留太久……
E: Maybe you shouldn't stay here for too long...

C: 她用精湛的医术疗愈伤口，用温柔的微笑弥合疮痕。她形单影只，肩负起重返天空的使命…即便神谕允诺的祝福只不过是诅咒的回音。
E: She heals wounds with her superb medical skills and mends scars with her gentle smile. She travels alone, shouldering the mission of returning to the sky... even though the blessings promised by the prophecy are but echoes of a curse.

C: 翁法罗斯的海洋如蓝宝石般剔透，在无人知晓的旧日，美丽的「海洋」眷属就在其间起舞…这场幻境的造主也不例外。
E: The Amphoreus' ocean sparkles like sapphire. In forgotten days, those fair Kins of Ocean danced beneath the waves — and the one who forged this fantasia was no different.

C: 遐蝶，合格。
E: Castorice, you pass.

C: 你记得在此地，她从月华之中归来，与你相拥——那时的温度，那时的甜香，那时耳畔的轻语，都历历可数…她得到了她一直想要的拥抱。
E: You remember her, here, stepping out from the moonlight to embrace you — the warmth, the sweet scent, the whispered words by your ear, all so vivid... She finally got the embrace she had always wanted.

C: 相信法吉娜，它会控水。
E: Have faith in Phagousa, they can control water.

C: 但这里每一个角落，都已被我细致地侦察过了！尤其是那座大炮，注意看，它已经瞄准你了——
E: But I have already scouted every corner of this place! Especially that cannon. Look, it is already aimed at you—

C: 我不断诘问自身…如果虫生的尽头就是这样一片走不出的虚无，还要推着巨石向山坡上行走喀？
E: I keep questioning myself... If the end of a nymph's life is only this inescapable void, why keep pushing the boulder uphill, crrk?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。很抱歉让你说了谎，请理解，流光忆庭…我们有自己的法则。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm sorry you had to lie, but please do understand... We have our own rules at the Garden of Recollection.

C: 谢谢你，仙舟之行的回忆，已经保存下来了～
E: Thank you. I've already kept this journey aboard the Xianzhou in my memories.

C: 下一场演练什么时候开始？
E: When's the next drill starting?

C: 明白。一切服从你的安排，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Got it. Everything's been done as per your order, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 那帮不敬业的工程师，稍微遇到点小故障就要把我的系统格式化——我才不会让他们得逞，哈！哈！哈！
E: Those cursed engineers are always formatting my hard disk whenever having the slightest glitch — but I won't let them get away with it. Bwahaha!

C: （我好像听到了什么东西在叫，像是呼救 ？）
E: (I thought I heard something, like someone calling out for help?)

C: 我认识你…你别靠太近。
E: I know you... You shouldn't get too close.

C: 新面孔？你是…空间站的科员？
E: New face? Are you... a space station researcher?

C: 出示
E: Present Evidence

C: 当前区域已关闭，请勿进入。
E: The area is closed. No entry.

C: （门开了！我这就解除同步，{NICKNAME}你赶紧出来！）
E: (The door is open! I'm going to desync now. {NICKNAME}, hurry up and get out!)

C: （先别急着进去，它好像看到你了，让我来吧。）
E: (Don't rush in. It seems to have seen you. Let me go first.)

C: 据说是非常严苛的训练呢…每天要绕着圣城跑一万圈，还要深蹲一万次，还要硬拉一万组，还有…还有很多「一万个」！人家得再想想……
E: They say it's from incredibly harsh training... every day he runs ten thousand laps around the holy city, does ten thousand squats, does ten thousand sets of weights... and there's... anyway, there's lots more stuff he does "ten thousand" of! Let me think...

C: 是有什么事情不想做吗？说说看，人家会帮你的哦？呀，可不是帮忙装病！
E: Is there something you don't want to do? Tell me, I'll help out! Ah, not helping you fake being sick, though!

C: 总之会很「浪漫」。
E: In any case, it will be very "romantic."

C: 你伸出手，触碰这个「广告牌」。在指间触碰到它的一刹那，你的脑海中传来了一阵温柔的低语。
E: You reach out your hand and touch this "billboard." The moment your fingers make contact with it, a gentle voice enters your mind.

C: 滴答，滴答…快把路拼出来吧！
E: Tick tock, tick tock... Hurry up and piece the road together!

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 那就来吧！
E: Yes!

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: {NICKNAME}，先将例行演算做完吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's finish the routine divination first.

C: 高手就是寂寞啊……
E: Being a master truly is a lonesome experience...

C: 有没有可能是你的问题。
E: Could the problem be with you?

C: 快点啊。
E: Hurry up.

C: 除了棋鬼。
E: ...The Chess Ghost.

C: …这不是你的幻觉。
E: Your mind's not playing tricks on you.

C: 最后我们还是决定使用了简单易懂的「Remake」。
E: Finally, we decided to take the simplest approach and chose "Remake."

C: 你放心，你解开谜题后都会得到「魔方战令」，这是我们新推出一项「阶段性奖励服务」，你带着它来找我，我就可以给你奖励，简单吧？
E: Don't worry. Upon completing the puzzles, you will obtain Hex Passes. This is a new type of Segmented Reward Service. Bring the Hex Passes to me, and I'll reward you. Simple?

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 我懂了，是黑塔小人！
E: I see. It's like the miniature Hertas!

C: 实际上，最近我正为一件事而苦恼。如果你愿意伸出援手，我会非常感激。这是真话。
E: In fact, I've been troubled by something recently. If you are willing to lend a hand, I would be very grateful. This is the truth.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 关于你的长相…
E: About your looks...

C: 怎么这么多问题？
E: Why so many questions?

C: 尊重您的选择，但您可真是亏大了！
E: I shall respect your decision, but you're losing out!

C: 啧…你说话怎么跟这里的祭司似的。还是说，你是那种什么——行为艺术家？
E: Tch... you sound just like the priests here. Or are you one of those — what do they call it — performance artists?

C: 你和扎格列斯到底是什么关系？
E: What exactly is your relationship with Zagreus?

C: 我们的母体巴特鲁斯…它自己去完成英雄之旅，却把我们弃置于此，等待着一个或许永远无法等到的访客。
E: Bartholos's main body... left to complete its Hero's Journey, abandoning us to wait for a visitor who may never arrive.

C: 你看，要想引人注意，那只能多多表演啦。
E: Look, if you wanna get noticed, you'd have to put on a show.

C: 你决定不和假冒的小猪一般见识。
E: You decide not to stoop to the level of that fake piggy.

C: 短矛还你，有空记得回来玩啊！
E: Here's your spear back. Do come back and hang out again sometime!

C: 咳咳…不管怎么说……
E: Ahem... Anyway...

C: …难道说，在古泰坦语的某些特殊表达方式里，光明和黑暗——哦，还有时间——都可以用同一个词来指称？
E: ...Could it be that, in the ancient Titan language, light and darkness — Oh, and also time — are represented by the same word?

C: 哎呀，你愿意听我细细讲来，这实在是太感谢了。
E: Thank you so much for being willing to listen to me.

C: 原来…如此。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在上，请接受我的谢意。
E: So... this is the answer. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, I offer you my gratitude.

C: 接下来的委托…来自一位守城的卫士，内容是——「我的真爱该在何处」。
E: The next request comes from a city guard. The content is — "Where is my true love?"

C: 腻了？那我们就换一个。「——激起往西的涟漪！」每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
E: Bored already? Let's change another one. "Stir up ripples of past referee!" It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?

C: 我明白，我明白…现在谁也顾不得谁了。天父啊，但愿他去了别的避难地……
E: I know. I know... No one can afford to worry about anyone else right now. O, sky father, I hope he made it to another shelter...

C: 呃啊…还没有起效吗…你…你是……
E: Ngh... It's still not working... You... who are you...?

C: 不必紧张。我受大司铎委派在此管理火种匣，多少知晓了一些秘辛，凯妮斯女士也曾因此向我抛出橄榄枝——说实话，元老院的一席之地，的确十分诱人。
