E: No need to be on edge. The Chaplain assigned me to oversee these Coreflame Caskets, so I know a few secrets. Even Lady Caenis extended me an invitation — honestly, a seat in the Council of Elders is indeed a tempting offer.

C: 我又筛选出一批火种匣，还剩下七十二个需要确认。该死，这得开到什么时候？可是我…嘶……
E: I've sorted through another batch of Coreflame Caskets. Still <unbreak>72</unbreak> more to go. Darn it, how long is this gonna take? But I... ngh...

C: 我这就来！
E: On my way!

C: 宇宙应当…均衡…
E: The universe should be... in equilibrium...

C: 这具白匣子吗？它是「灵柩」，俗名「棺材」，专用于收殓逝者的遗体。
E: Oh... this one? It's a casket, more commonly known as a coffin. It's for containing the remains of the deceased.

C: 你只是懒得自己收拾吧。
E: You don't wanna fix it.

C: 「又没抓到斯蒂芬•劳艾德露面。」黑塔摊手，「看来他是对升级做的实验——这个游戏小狂人，心里只想着玩游戏迅速升级了！现在，<color=#dbc291ff>祝福正在无尽升级</color>！」
E: "I failed to catch Stephen Lloyd's face reveal. Again." Herta shrugs. "Seems like he experimented on leveling up — That mad gamer is only thinking about leveling up quickly in this game! And now, <color=#dbc291ff>Blessings are leveling up endlessly</color>!"

C: 成功了！我得赶紧把这个消息告诉斯蒂芬——{NICKNAME}，你也别愣着，再进去逛逛，试试能不能说上一两句话或者别的什么……
E: Success! I have to tell this news to Stephen right away — {NICKNAME}, don't just stand there. Go in and see if you can get a few more words out of them or something...

C: 有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——噢，他想保密，所以你把他忘了吧。
E: There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen— oh, um, he wants to keep it a secret, so... forget about him.

C: 按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……
E: It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...

C: 收集不就是人类的天性吗？
E: Is it not human nature to collect?

C: 「在你测试的时候。」黑塔回答，「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」
E: "While you were testing," Herta replies. "We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."

C: 太遗憾了，我刚上瘾。
E: What a shame! I was just getting addicted.

C: 「奇物」有持续性的效果，它的获取会改变你接下来的探索体验。
E: Curios give a persistent buff, and they are going to completely rewrite your subsequent exploration.

C: 祂绝对、公正、漂亮，多重音节有如军队般威严，其中藏匿着不容忽视的法则。
E: The Aeon is absolute, just, and magnificent. THEIR multiple syllables carrying the solemnity of an army, concealing within THEM a rule that must not be overlooked.

C: 「我所做一切都是为了帮助太一！」阿哈大笑着拍手，祂的皮球和扑克互相拥抱，「阿哈从来乐于助人，帮助其他神是我的乐趣——」接着祂把目光转移到你身上。
E: "Everything I do is to help Ena!" Aha claps while roaring with laughter. THEIR ball and poker cards hug each other. "Aha has always been helpful. It's my pleasure to help other Gods..." Then, Aha turns THEIR gaze to you.

C: 「否定：存在『丰饶』与『繁育』有关的可能。」螺丝咕姆突然出现。
E: "Negative: There are possible relations between Abundance and Propagation." Screwllum makes a sudden appearance.

C: 自此之后，无机生命对这远道而来的人十分感兴趣——他常在春光难耐的下午一边为螺丝与齿轮们讲课，一边哭泣；无机生命对这种情感感到新奇。而他从星空彼岸带来的生物知识第一课如此记载：「经过研究，不同种类的虫类血液颜色并不相同。」
E: Since then, the inorganic beings have taken a keen interest in this outlandish traveler, who always gives lectures to the screws and gears on vibrant spring afternoons while weeping — an emotion that is entirely new to the inorganic beings. The first lesson in biological knowledge that he imparted from across the stars was something like this: "Research has shown that the blood of different species of insects is not of the same color."

C: 「繁育」的命途于孤独的尖啸中示现，而后塔伊兹育罗斯带领虫群奔向宇宙，无尽地侵蚀、吞没可见的一切，直至奥博洛斯出现在祂的面前：「贪饕」与「繁育」的对垒波及寰宇三分之二的有生区域，无数星系因此消亡。
E: The Path of Propagation was revealed in a lone whine, and Tayzzyronth led the Swarm into the universe, avariciously consuming everything in its wake until Oroboros appeared before him. The great war between the Voracity and Propagation affected two-thirds of all the living worlds in the universe, and countless planetary and star systems perished as a result.

C: 你不知道。
E: You have no idea where they could have gone.

C: 「超出系统设计外的东西。」螺丝咕姆的声音使你安心，「但没有危险，{NICKNAME}，模拟宇宙需要均衡。我、黑塔、阮•梅，都在你身边。」
E: "Anomaly detected outside of system design." Screwllum's voice reassures you, "But it is of no danger, {NICKNAME}. The Simulated Universe needs Equilibrium. I, Herta and Ruan Mei are here with you."

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「我还没介绍呢，你怎么就进来了？」黑塔摊手，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
E: "Why did you come in so soon? I haven't introduced you yet." Herta shrugs, "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

C: 惊谲的意象在你面前铺展开来：在这个时刻，祂的身躯颤抖而胆小地蜷缩起来，无数新的虫族纲目却在这时出现：它们交换信息素，如同花朵交换不同颜色的花瓣，接着就诞育完全不同的*新物种*。
E: A mind-blowing phenomenon unravels before you. The Aeon's trembling body curls up timidly, as countless new insect species emerge at the same time. They exchange pheromones, just like how flowers exchange for petals of different colors. Then, an entirely new species is born.

C: 「最后…是第三个时刻。」
E: "Last but not least... the third moment."

C: 「呃…『阿哈』的笑声。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德有点犹豫，「但可能是假的，祂什么都做得出来。」
E: "Um... And Aha's laughter." Stephen Lloyd says hesitantly, "It could be bogus, since THEY were unscrupulous."

C: 你走在混乱不堪的边星，这里满目疮痍。反抗军在残垣断壁间挣扎，抵抗公司的武装部队，寻求一线生机。法恩莎的老对手们也混在其中，率领各自的部队加入这场斗争。
E: You walk through the chaos of the fringe planet, a place in complete disarray. The resistance forces struggle amidst the ruins, resisting the armed forces of the IPC, seeking a glimmer of hope. Farnsha's old adversaries are also mixed in, leading their own troops in this struggle.

C: 只是从那一刻开始，他总是会产生「不好的念头」，不受控制，并且愈发强烈。
E: From that moment on, he would always have uncontrollable and increasingly intense bad thoughts in his mind.

C: 下落，重力正撕扯着身体，你咬紧牙关，等待降落舱中的指数降低。想要突破括尔加哈帝国军的封锁线，伪装成无害的陨石是唯一的方法。
E: You are falling. Gravity tears at your body as you grit your teeth, waiting for the landing capsule's indicator to decrease. Camouflaging yourself as a harmless asteroid is the only way to bustle through the Khorgahar Imperial Army's blockade.

C: 准备进攻。
E: Get ready to attack.

C: 怎会有学者视思考为敌？
E: How could a scholar ever see thought as the enemy?

C: 「医生，我理解你的疑虑。你只是从未认识到，知识与智慧本质上是一种诅咒。」男人接过你递去的药材，从中拣出几截碎块。
E: "Doctor, I understand your concern. What you do not realize is that knowledge and wisdom are essentially a curse." The man takes the medicine from you and pulls a number of fragmented pills from among them.

C: 你明白了「他们」是谁。
E: Now, you understand who "they" are.

C: 阿尔比拉德不再回答，但你从她的眼中看到了沉静如湖底顽石的冷意。「都不对，都不对。我明白了，是命途之力太弱了。令使！只要能得到一名令使……」
E: Arblad did not reply to his words, but you saw a silent, steely determination in her eyes like a rock submerged at the bottom of a lake. "I was wrong. That's not it. I get it now. The Path power isn't strong enough! An Emanator! I just need to find an Emanator..."

C: 克丝黛拉向你鞠了一躬，随后转向愕然的几位学派元老。「学派的研究进入瓶颈、人才青黄不接，还请原谅我的先斩后奏。我已派人与『庸众院』商议合作之事，我将把宝押在新的时代。」
E: Chrystella bowed to you, then turned to face the shocked school elders. "Our school's research has hit a dead end and we are short on talent. Forgive me for taking liberties, but I have already sent people to discuss cooperation with the Council of Mundanites. I will put my money on our new era."

C: 「教授，我有一个问题。」一个顶着爆炸头的学生打断了我。虽然他提问前没有举手，但这种求知的态度值得鼓励，你示意他继续。
E: "Professor, I have a question." A student with a wild hairstyle interrupts my introduction. Although he did not raise his hand before asking, this attitude of seeking knowledge is to be encouraged, so you gesture to him to continue.

C: 但整个工程最关键的部分，虚数能量捕捉计划，却因收益始终无法覆盖成本而中止。
E: However, the most crucial factor in the entire project, the imaginary energy containment plan was never able to cover its costs and was canceled.

C: 听起来你很熟悉这个人。
E: Sounds like you're very familiar with this person.

C: 「作为我学术成就的发轫之处，它算得上我最引以为傲的成就。」
E: "As the starting point of my academic achievements, it can be considered one of my proudest achievements."

C: 我要支配学会！
E: I want to take over the Guild!

C: 你没找到任何东西。
E: You do not find anything.

C: 其四唤作<color=#dbc291ff>未来</color>，似蝴蝶也似波纹，欲卜得一个答案，解读宇宙是确定亦或混沌，直到将未来完美地预测。
E: The fourth is called <color=#dbc291ff>Future</color>, like a butterfly, like a ripple, seeking an answer divined, to determine if the universe is ordained or chaotic, till the future can be perfectly predicted.

C: 逃向储能区域。
E: Run to the energy storage area.

C: 为避免受感染的学士重新点燃帝皇战争。博识学会剥夺了他们的研究资格，并对患者终生严格监管。完美进化学派至此名存实亡。
E: To prevent the infected scholars from re-igniting the Emperor's War, the Intelligentsia Guild rescinded their research authority and put them under stringent surveillance for the rest of their lives. The School of Evolutionary Perfection is now defunct in all but name.

C: 「阻止鲁珀特复活…不，应该不会这么简单。」波尔卡的目的仿佛一道有滋有味的点心，被黑塔含在嘴里反复咀嚼。当黑塔意识到自己不可能就此得出答案时，微笑出现在嘴角，「新的难题，令人振奋，不是么？」
E: "To prevent Rubert's resurrection... No, it can't be that simple." Polka's objective is like a savory treat, being sucked and chewed in Herta's mouth. When Herta realizes it is impossible for her to get an answer in this way, the corner of her mouth curls into a smile, "A new conundrum. How exciting, don't you think?"

C: 「我感受到有人在窥探我的<color=#dbc291ff>足迹</color>。」女人掏出手术刀，放到手中仔细打磨。「于是我为他们准备了回礼，一场猫捉老鼠的游戏。」
E: "I can feel someone prying into my <color=#dbc291ff>steps</color>." The woman takes out a scalpel, places it in her palm, and starts polishing it. "So I am preparing a gift in return — a game of cat and mouse."

C: 「我也好想你啊，想得头都弄丢了。」
E: "I missed you too, so much that I've lost my head!"

C: 大人们说，世界就要毁灭，连绵的冰川在重力牵引下撞击大陆，碾过地表。而后，战前关怀员的封冻将使所有生灵陷入沉寂。
E: The adults say that the world is going to be destroyed, and that the endless glaciers will crash into the continent, obliterating the surface under the pull of gravity. Then, the frozen seal of the Pre-Battle Caregiver will plunge all life into eternal silence.

C: 为了后代的繁衍。
E: For the prosperity of the next generation.

C: 或者——算了，商业斗争我不关心。
E: Or... Forget it. I'm not interested in corporate conflicts.

C: 那可是「寂静领主」，我怎么可能输？噢，别把这事告诉阮•梅和螺丝咕姆。
E: There's no way I'll lose by choosing the Lord of Silence! By the way, please don't tell Ruan Mei and Screwllum about this bet.

C: 这样就告一段落了。关于公司的片段还真不少——小跟班，这些资料够你们用上好久了吧？
E: Well, that's gonna be the end of it for a while. There's quite a lot of information related to the IPC. Hey, sidekick, is this enough to last you a while?

C: 结给艾丝妲就行。我不管这个。
E: Sort it out with Asta. I don't deal with money.

C: 图书馆正中央古老的楼梯，呈螺旋状一直通到天上，看不到尽头。
E: The ancient staircase in the center of the library spirals up into the sky, with no end to be seen.

C: 你走在雪原里，裹紧身上温暖的皮毛。你迎面遇到一位男士——他有着红色卷发和雀斑，身材高瘦，穿着小牛皮靴，扛着猎枪。
E: You wander on the snow plains wrapped tightly in a fur coat. A man is coming your way. The tall and slender man has crimson curly hair and a freckled face. He is wearing leather boots and holding a rifle.

C: 他非常激动，认为遇到了同样识货的爱好者！
E: He is thrilled, thinking that he has met someone who shares his taste!

C: 你正准备离开之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎正提醒着你可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……
E: When you are leaving, one of the sac-submerged Nameless lets out a wail! He seems to be hinting at the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...

C: 沾满不明血液的符纸摆在你的面前…你对此十分不屑，完全不为所动。你压根不信命……
E: A talisman stained with blood from an unknown source is placed before you... You regard it contemptuously and remain completely unimpressed. In your opinion, there is no such thing as fate...

C: 难以置信——你的双手颤抖着，你的热泪从眼眶溢出。一生作为「数据分母」的你从未想过，你会得到如此*曼妙*的体验，你甚至怀疑这一切都是模拟的——
E: This is unbelievable... Your hands are trembling, and tears are streaming down your face. Being an unlucky dog all your life, you never expected to experience something as *wonderful* as this. You even wonder if everything is still just a simulation...

C: 「再过百年，我依然在这里生产火漆。」制造机说道，接着继续埋头锤它的小锤子。
E: "I'll still be making sealing wax here for another <unbreak>100</unbreak> years," the manufacturing machine says, and then gets back to its hammer.

C: 「规则只有一个，用球砸晕在场的所有人就算胜利！」伴随着一声哨响，数颗粉色的达达球火速向着你的面门袭来。
E: "There's only one rule: Knock out all competitors on the field with the ball to win!" With a whistle, several pink dahdah balls fly straight towards your face.

C: 本节目由星际和平公司赞助播出，正宗菠萝气泡水，为您带来难忘的味觉盛宴。
E: This program is sponsored by the Interastral Peace Corporation. Authentic pineapple soda, bringing you an unforgettable feast of flavor.

C: 上百上千的垂钓者相互拥挤，他们手握相位偏移鱼竿，任凭饵料沉入水晶深处。
E: Hundreds of thousands of anglers jostle about, their hands grappling at phase-shifting fishing rods and letting their bait sink into the crystalline depths.

C: 你模仿学士的动作，将探针扎进外壳，但针尖撞到了更坚硬的东西。干裂的表皮中钻出一抹漆黑的影子，在冰冷的阳光下发出嗡鸣。
E: You copy the scholars' movements and insert the detector into the outer shell, but the needle strikes something harder. A jet-black shadow emerges from the dry, cracked surface and begins to emit a low drone under the cold sunlight.

C: 受到匿名人士举报，寿司飞船实为一位进行了基因改造的原教旨主义寿司学者。这位巨大的参赛者表示，他在以自身为原料，制造太空军舰寿司。
E: An anonymous source complained that the sushi spaceship is actually a genetically modified fundamentalist sushi scholar. This enormous contestant states that he wishes to serve as a sushi spaceship, using himself as the raw material.

C: 「我喜欢这家伙，谁能说，明目张胆的笑话就不能算笑话呢？」
E: "I like this guy. Who ever said an in-your-face joke isn't a joke?"

C: 松软的口感，你咽下美好的旧忆。店长的鳍拍打在空气上，最后一道主菜已盛放上桌。
E: You swallow beautiful old memories. They have a spongy texture. The owner of the restaurant slaps the air with their fins. The final course is served to your table.

C: 粘稠的色彩在画纸上流淌，令妖怪眼泪直流。
E: Viscous color flow across the paper, causing tears to fall from the monster's eye.

C: 就当是做了场好人好事，在梦中向一位流浪的老人施予了馈赠吧。
E: Consider it a good deed, a gift given in a dream to a wandering old man.

C: 也许欧洛尼斯还在梦里？又或者向它祈祷的人太多了？要不向其他两位命运泰坦祈祷试试？
E: Perhaps Oronyx is still dreaming? Or are there too many people praying to them? How about trying the other two Fate Titans?

C: 听闻，一场以生命为赌注的远征就要开始，你登上航船，期待着未知的冒险故事。
E: Word has it that a perilous expedition with one's life on the line is about to begin. You board a ship, anticipating adventurous stories of the uncharted.

C: 在山羊学派的奇兽培育记录中，你发现了一个统计错误。恒温环境制造的奇兽，在体型扩张中的畸形率比常规值低了3％。
E: In the breeding records of the Caprists, you discover a statistical error. Creatures created in an environment with controlled temperatures show a deformity rate lower than its standard rates by 3% when their size expands.

C: 但盾已无处找寻。
E: Yet, this shield has vanished.

C: 作为泰坦的神启。
E: As a revelation from the Titan.

C: 摈弃众多诋毁和恶评，尼卡多利并非愚昧野蛮的怪物，它看重荣耀，甚至高于胜利本身。
E: Despite widespread criticism and defamation, Nikador was not the mindless brute many portrayed. They held glory in higher esteem than victory itself.

C: 曾有「赤足的弗雷托」，自沿海的希罗科萨斯一路奔来。他的双脚如同领受了法吉娜的赐福，比海上的浪花还要迅速。
E: Consider "Barefoot Freto," who dashed from the coastal town of Silo Kossas, his feet as swift as the sea's waves, blessed by Phagousa.

C: 它们以偷走死者的财产为乐，在黄金战争最为血腥的年代，被藏在死之国度的金币，甚至堵塞了奔流不息的冥河，令河水泛滥至现世，竞相争抢金币的士兵被冥河吞噬，在史书上留下骇人的灾厄。
E: They delight in stealing from the dead. During the bloodiest years of the Chrysos War, gold coins hidden in the realm of death even clogged the River of Souls, causing the waters to overflow into the mortal world. Soldiers scrambled for the gold coins, only to be consumed by the flooding river, leaving a grotesque chapter in history.

C: 要载歌载舞地踏上英雄的旅程，再载歌载舞地迎来胜利或终焉。
E: Embark on your hero's journey with song and dance, and meet victory or doom the same way.

C: 万径之门，你是最亲近人子的命运。你呼唤人们来到自己的立足之地，建立连接一切的雅努萨波利斯，所有旅程都将经过的世界中心。
E: Gate of Infinity, you stand closest to humanity's fate. You call people to your own foothold, to build Janusopolis that connects all, the heart of the world through which all journeys must pass.

C: 雷暴过后，空气里都是甜丝丝的气味，地上的孩子们惊奇的发现，天上飘下了棉花糖雨……
E: When the storm finally subsides, the air carries a lingering sweetness. Down below, children stare in wide-eyed wonder as soft tufts of cotton candy drift from the sky like rain...

C: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的喜报「恭喜您通过学术成果筛选，我们诚邀您前往神悟树庭进行面试。」
E: A week later, the unthinkable happens — an acceptance letter from the Grove of Epiphany. "Congratulations! Your research has successfully passed the selection process. We are pleased to invite you for an interview at the Grove of Epiphany."

C: 而今从高空俯瞰，只有那些深不可测的裂谷，还记录着吉奥里亚年幼时的顽皮。
E: Now, from a high vantage point, only the deep, unfathomable ravines remain, recording the mischievousness of Georios in their youth.

C: 但塔兰顿并不知晓，只因刻法勒是从艾格勒的双眸中诞生，它的双眼也更适应白昼。
E: Yet Talanton did not realize that, having been born from Aquila's eyes, Kephale's gaze was naturally attuned to the light of day.

C: 「当以我身为镜，造万物之灵。」
E: "I shall make them in my image, that they may bear the spirit of all things."

C: 巨人又找来瑟希斯，请它摘下智慧的果实，赐予造物理性与思考的能力。诞生自圣树的神明自无不允，还带来了好奇心起的墨涅塔。
E: Then, the giant sought out Cerces, asking them to pluck the fruit of wisdom and grant their creations the gifts of reason and thought. The god born of the Sacred Tree had no reason to refuse, and even brought forth the curious Mnestia.

C: 于是巨人前往冥河，面见宿敌。它用商议好的言辞鼓动尼卡多利。
E: Thus, the giant journeyed to the River of Souls to confront its sworn enemy. They spoke with carefully chosen words, goading Nikador into action.

C: 其实在你第一次想开我箱子的时候，我就注意到你了。最开始我还以为你是小偷……
E: Actually, I noticed you the first time you tried to open my chest. At first, I thought you were a thief...

C: 你决定从科员名单里随意勾选几个，哪怕不是一个科室也没有关系，毕竟跨领域的探索才是未来的研究趋势！
E: You decide to randomly check a few names from the faculty list, not even caring that they are not from the same department. After all, interdepartmental research is the future of academia!

C: 为了这首歌，你决定…
E: For this song, you decide...

C: 苦涩的味道似乎被淡化了，味蕾摘下了它的面纱。这杯咖啡背后真实的容颜会是俏丽、温柔、甜美的吗？需要等待……
E: The bitterness seems to have dissipated and your taste buds took off the veil that concealed the flavor's true self. Will the real aroma of this coffee turn out to be pretty, gentle, and sweet? One can only wait and see...

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 你想要转身，活动自己紧绷僵滞的关节，却发现自己动弹不得——这不光是因为你根本无处施展，更因为你周身肌腱早已因极端恐惧僵直、战抖。
E: You want to turn around to exercise your tight joints, but you find yourself unable to move — not only is there no space around you, but your muscles and tendons are also stiff and trembling out of abject fear.

C: 自那天起，你心中有关「美」的一切认知便尽数化作灰烬——烈焰自你脚下升起，顷刻间将你彻底吞没。
E: Since that day, everything you understand about "beauty" has turned to ashes — flames rise from below and devour you in an instant.

C: 就这么做吧，你对自己说。杯中的褐色液体冒着热气，你的心灵感应触须慵懒地趴在脑门上。然后是胃——甜美的口感与舒适的温度顷刻间充盈了你的身体……
E: That's exactly what you'll do, you say to yourself. The brown liquid in your mug is piping hot. Your psychic tentacles lazily flop down on your head. A sweet flavor and comfy warmth flood your body as the cocoa enters your stomach...

C: 我是叛逆的蝶~
E: I am a rebelfly~

C: 哎…能看见熟面孔真是太好了——我已经有点受不了了……
E: Oh, it's wonderful to see a familiar face. I was just about at my wit's ends...

C: 或者，想得再大胆点…要是能拿到他的签名照，咱们以后绝对能发一笔大财。
E: Or, even better... If we could get my hands on a signed photograph of him, we would be rolling in money, <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.

C: 没问题！只要我这小摊还没打烊，您随时可以回来挑战。
E: No problem! You can come back and start the challenge anytime, so long as my stall is open.

C: 你依稀记得自己有过这样的经历：你坐在浮空的士的后座上，从城市的一个地点飞到了另一个地点。
E: You vaguely remember having this experience before, with you sitting in the back seat of a hover-taxi, flying from one place in the city to another.

C: …但它真的很隐蔽。而且，它是条小巷，被封起来的那种。想在其中探索一番乃是人之常情。
E: ...But it really is quite a hidden location. It's a small alley, the kind that has been blocked off. Naturally, anyone would want to go explore what's in there.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 你感到后颈处传来令人毛骨悚然的凉意，像是有人将锐利的刀尖抵上你的肌肤。
E: You can feel a frightening chill run down the back of your neck, as if someone puts the sharp point of a knife against your skin.

C: 天啊，你真是个善良的人！
E: My goodness! You really are a good person!

C: 哈哈，我就知道。
E: Haha, I knew it.

C: 哈哈，必须的！毕竟我希露瓦嘛。
E: Haha, of course. I'm Serval.

C: 给你。
E: Here you go.

C: 喀喀！怎么能这么说！在你看不到的地方，我们动得可欢了！
E: Crrk crrk — How could you say such a thing! We're jiggling around happily when you aren't looking!

C: 瀑布后面就应该别有洞天喀！险境、奇遇、还有拔出来就能消灭所有怪物的宝剑……
E: Surely there's wonder behind this waterfall! Peril, quests, and a mystical blade that defeats all monsters as soon as you pull it out...

C: 无论昼夜，吾都将守望这神明垂迹之地，直到吾主回归的那天。
E: In light and darkness, I shall guard this sacred ground, until our master's return.

C: 这是一顶无人问津的帆布凉棚。从此处堆积的板条箱来看，这或许曾经也是一处门庭若市的小摊，只是现在不知为何惨遭废弃。
E: This is just an ordinary canvas awning. Judging from the stacks of crates, it might have been a stall with heavy foot traffic, but for some reason, it has been abandoned.

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)

C: 鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
E: The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!

C: 你没有想过事态会向这个方向发展…最初的你不过想在捉迷藏游戏中另辟蹊径——可现在竟演变成一场轰动磐岩镇的「大英雄握手会」了！
E: You hadn't expected things to go this way... You were just hoping to take an unconventional approach in hide-and-seek. Now your attempt has turned into a sensational "Meet the Hero" event in Boulder Town!

C: 你一定还记得我们在桅杆上守夜的那些晚上，月色纯净，打在帆布上；船摇摇晃晃，掠过漆黑的海洋…那时候我甚至想成为一位英雄了，你是不是也一样？
E: Surely you remember those nights we kept watch on the mast, the pure moonlight spilling over the sails, the ship rocking gently as it glided across the dark sea... In those moments, I even dreamed of becoming a hero. Did you feel the same?

C: 可能，这就是蝶生吧……
E: Perhaps, that's just the life of a butterfly...

C: 我已听见雾角…
E: I hear the fog horn...

C: 不过，这里的人都去哪儿了呢嘤？
E: Still, where has everyone gone, eep?

C: 今天也很祥和呢~
E: What a peaceful day~

C: 你回来了嘤…
E: Welcome back, chirp...

C: 都是命运的安排…
E: It's all part of the fate's design...

C: 会不会是因为你缺乏魅力？
E: Is it because you lack charm?

C: 这是最后一件事，如果你帮我完成了，我就回到鹤运物流，这样如何？
E: Here's the last thing. If you help me with this, I'll go back to Heron Express. How about that?

C: 这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
E: You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.

C: 赌约？
E: A bet?

C: 说归说，闹归闹，别拿生命开玩笑。你很清楚，这只专门负责处理物流快递的机巧鸟很难承受得了入魔机巧的攻击，你还得是亲自出手拯救它。
E: Joking aside, you shouldn't make a joke out of life. As you know, this cycrane courier is not designed to withstand an attack from the Entranced Ingenium. You'd have to rescue it personally.

C: 咳咳咳，我想起来了，我确实不认识什么螺丝咕姆。
E: Ahem, I just remembered — I really don't know any Screwllum.

C: 5镝…好像有点道理……
E: 5 strales... I think that makes sense...

C: 两人都是0镝！
E: Both of you get nothing!

C: 等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
E: Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?

C: 哈哈，这个问题问得好——这个挑战赛啊，其实是小店为举行四百二十一周年庆特别举办的酬宾活动！
E: Haha, now that's a good question — we're holding this special eating event to celebrate the <unbreak>421</unbreak>st anniversary of our store!

C: 你第一次发现包子竟然有这么大。不过，比赛可还没结束！
E: You never realized before how big buns actually are. But the contest hasn't finished yet!

C: 不许藐视权威！
E: Don't disrespect authority!

C: 伸出双手。
E: Extend both arms.

C: 好极啦，你们俩的连心率接近<unbreak>87%</unbreak>！接下来，我会把同心符接到金人上。
E: Great! Your synchronization rate is close to <unbreak>87%</unbreak>! Next, I will connect this Hearts Aligned talisman to the aurumaton.

C: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
E: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

C: 这是哪里？
E: What is this place?

C: 算了，不说这些了。我看你从其他地方赶过来，若是有这家伙的下落，劳驾你再来知会我一声，拜托了！
E: Let's not talk about this anymore. Since you come from other places, if you manage to spot this guy, please let me know, thank you!

C: 这辆斯坦威游隼把灯光开得巨大，足以让站在面前的人短暂失明。
E: The Steinway Falcon turns its headlamps up bright enough to temporarily blind anyone standing in front of it.

C: 还是离开好了。
E: Better just leave.

C: …但我只能在梦里见到他。
E: ...But I can only see him in my dreams.

C: 听说已经住满了。
E: I hear it's full.

C: 法吉娜保佑，法吉娜保佑…
E: O Phagousa protect me, Phagousa protect me...

C: 纸张不好保存…
E: These papers won't last...

C: 不好意思，这就让开。
E: Sorry, there you go.

C: 总而言之，往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的。以后不要再做这种事了。
E: Whatever it is, it's extremely dangerous to chuck coins into a jade wheel. Please do not do things like this ever again.

C: 说罢，女人默默地离开了。
E: After talking, the woman walked off quietly.

C: 听起来都是好有趣的事帕。
E: It all sounds interesting.

C: 怎么样，有什么结果了嘛？
E: How about it? What'd you find?

C: 有多好…就是…好……
E: Good... is just good...

C: 要打开行李给你检查吗？
E: Do you want to check inside my luggage?

C: 空间站里有月台的帕，列车停靠起来非常方便！
E: I can stop the Express at the railway platform of the space station! It's quite convenient.

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}，麻烦你跟帕姆解释清楚吧，不是不借，实在是不好意思坑你们。
E: {NICKNAME}, please tell Pom-Pom, it's not that I don't want to lend them, it's just...

C: 我可以花钱买！
E: I can pay you!

C: 尊重，理解！
E: I understand that.

C: 请教管理经验…
E: Please give me some management advice...

C: 外面的世界啊…帕姆的确是很想看看外面…不过，旅途的意义并不在于外面的风景有多么精彩，而是在于与你同行的人。
E: The outside world... Pom-Pom does want to see it. However, the meaning of the journey lies not in how wonderful the scenery is outside, but in the people you travel with.

C: 不过「副官」应该也跟你解释过了——想要赢得这场演练，你还得过我这关才行。
E: But the aide should have already explained to you that, if you want to win this drill, you'll have to get through me.

C: 精彩，精彩！我无话可说，{NICKNAME}教官！你的威猛值得我世代传颂！
E: Amazing, amazing! I'm speechless, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! My children would sing of your might for generations to come!

C: 放走次元扑满，这意味着丹鼎司里随时可能会再出现异常…更重要的是，也许你会完成不了任务目标，这样真的可以吗？
E: Letting it go means that anomalies may happen manifest in the Alchemy Commission again... and more importantly, you won't be able to complete your task. Are you really sure you want to do this?

C: *电波滤音*…能听到我的声音吗？
E: *electronic voice* ...Can you hear me?

C: *电波滤音*…没关系，您先在积玉坊外面等一会儿，它们会回来的。
E: *electronic voice* ...Well, don't worry. Just wait outside the Trove of Verdure for a while, and they'll come back soon enough.

C: 我要出——石头！
E: Rock!

C: 对不起，我知道错了。
E: I'm sorry. I was wrong.

C: 呃…道歉要是有用，还要银鬃铁卫干嘛？你…呃…我必须让你知道事情的严重性！对，严重性！
E: If apologies worked, we wouldn't need Silvermane Guards! I must show you how serious this is. Yeah, how serious!

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 那！是！个！炸！弹！
E: That! Is! A! Bomb!

C: 你明白，这就是那种曾风靡一时的某类作品中常见的男一号：永远热情似火，永远主动出击，永远毫不遮掩地散发自己的魅力。我们通常称之为…芳心纵火犯。
E: You identify him as the classic male lead in a once-popular period genre: Always fiery, always aggressive, always unabashedly charismatic. We usually call this kind of guy... a reckless Lothario.

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 这些…通缉令…就是我画的啦！这下你满意了吗！
E: These... Wanted posters... I painted them! Are you happy?

C: 你放心，情况没有你想象得那么夸张。
E: Don't worry. It's not as bad as you think.

C: 检测到超过正常水平的噪音。
E: Abnormal noise levels detected.

C: 这…不是很有趣吗？
E: Isn't that... Fun?

C: 摆在你面前的只剩一个问题：接还是不接？
E: Only one question remains... Are you picking up the phone or not?

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 最后，陌生的男人向后退去，消失在街角。
E: Finally, the stranger backs off and disappears into the streets.

C: 男人一时间竟没有料到事情可以展开的如此顺利。他皱眉半晌，摊开手掌。
E: The man didn't expect everything to have gone so smoothly. He frowns and spreads open his palms.

C: 画面中出现了几位身披重甲、手持蛇矛的狐人少女，她们眼神坚毅，口中念念有词：
E: Several foxian girls wearing heavy armor and holding serpent spears appear on-screen. Their look is staunch as they quietly mutter:
Oiiii!

C: 没听懂，这是什么东西？
E: I don't understand. What do you mean?

C: 你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，这一个也并无不同。
E: You've smashed countless ordinary vases like this before, and this one's no different.

C: 这是一间破旧的杂货铺。它只兀自静静矗立着，以冷眼目送往来人群，在这向来熙来攘往的宣夜大街上显得尤为低调。
E: This is a broken-down old newsstand. It just stands there in silence, watching the crowd impassively. It seems particularly low-key among the humdrum of Starwatcher Avenue.

C: 嘿，这不是重点！你看到了一个神秘的盒子，接下来就*应该*看看里边装了什么，不是吗？
E: Hey, that's not the point! You see a mysterious box, so you *should* have a look at what's inside. Right?

C: 终于可以飞了！
E: Finally, fly time!

C: 这…丹鼎司这边不是藏着药王秘传的邪徒恶党吗…所以我稍微有点怕……
E: Well... Aren't the evil Disciples of Sanctus Medicus hiding over here in the Alchemy Commission...? So, I'm a little scared...

C: 那当然了，天舶司一定会给你相应的酬劳～
E: Don't worry. The Sky-Faring Commission will definitely reward you handsomely.

C: 好吧，我知道这是强人所难——接下来就交给我们鹤运物流吧。
E: I understand this might be a little too much. Just leave the rest to us.

C: 你不会太亏了吗？
E: I'm not putting you out too much?

C: 如果直接去卖掉，依我估值，这铁盒也就<unbreak>40</unbreak>信用点左右……
E: If you sell it directly, you'd only get about <unbreak>40</unbreak> credits based on my initial valuation...

C: 集装箱门打开，你看到里面站着两个怪家伙。看得出来，这是两个药王秘传的莳者在秘密会谈。
E: The container doors open and you see two weird people standing inside. You can tell that this is a secret meeting between some disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 啊对对对。
E: Ah yes, hmm, I see.

C: 别、别过来，这里很危险！
E: S—Stay away. It's dangerous!

C: 摆出一副软弱可怜的样子，然后在你渐渐放下戒心后，不遗余力地从你身上榨取关怀与关注，简直比缠在树上的藤还要麻烦。
E: Wearing this weak, pathetic mask and then — once you've let down your guard — doing everything possible to squeeze all the attention and care from you. It's worse than a thorny ivy coiling around a tree.

C: 无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。
E: Whatever worries you might have, you can tell me all about it.

C: 做我们这一行的，一向很少向人抱怨……
E: In this line of work, we rarely ever complain to anyone...

C: 快呀——快喝呀！还在等什么呢，快喝呀！
E: Quick — drink up! What are you waiting for? Drink up quick!

C: 感谢您的体谅，卡尔先生。那我先去确认一下情况，回来再联系您。
E: Thank you for your understanding, Mr. Carl. I'll double-check everything then and call you once I get back.

C: 梦想是伟大的，艺术是永恒的……
E: Dreams are great, but art is eternal...

C: 悄悄告诉你，鸢尾花家的家主特别器重我——我也知道自己脾气冲、说话直，但在那位大人眼里，这些可都是优点！
E: And let me tell you on the down low, the head of the Iris Family holds me in high regard. I know I can be brash and blunt, but to the head, these are all pluses!

C: 所以我调转船头，打算直接驶离这片星系…结果迎面撞上了一支泯灭帮的舰队。那群疯狗，追的那叫一个紧！我都怀疑他们是学会派来追杀我的。
E: And so I turned around the spaceship and planned to jet straight out of that star system... but ended up running straight into an Annihilation Gang fleet. Those crazy mutts were doing all they could to chase me down! I even suspected that perhaps the guild had sent them to hunt me down.

C: 不过在那之前，我得先把周围仔细检查一遍——这么简单的钱却一直没人赚，背后肯定有鬼。
E: But before that, I had to carefully check our vicinity — this gig was all too easy, and there had to be something going on behind the scenes.

C: 所以，当联军打上门时，韦兰已经因义体的排异反应而死去多时……
E: So when the righteous alliance attacked, Wyland had already been dead for some time due to graft-host rejection...

C: 直到生命的最后一刻，他还在试图用嘴去吸输液管，好弄出几滴残留的提取液来。
E: He was still trying to use his mouth to suck the last few drops of extract out of the tubes during his final moments.

C: 他的追随者们呢？
E: And what of his followers?

C: 但他从来都没能摆脱人性中的贪欲，直到最后，滑稽地死在了管子拼成的王座里。
E: But he was never able to rid himself of human greed, until in the end he died farcically upon a throne made of twisted tubes.

C: 咳咳，既然钱已经付完了，那我们就走、走吧……
E: *coughs* Seeing as the money's been paid, let's go...

C: （小声）我知道，你不用当着{M#他}{F#她}的面特意跟我说一遍。
E: (Whispering) I know. You don't have to tell me specifically in front of {M#him}{F#her}.

C: 你在利用我！
E: You're using me!

C: 我们来自朋克洛德，我们是全宇宙最热忱、最具创意、最有底蕴的虚拟现实开发者！
E: We're from Punklorde, and we're the most passionate, creative, and skilled virtual reality application developers in the entire universe.

C: 那我就给个…七分吧。不得罪人，也算得上客观。
E: I'll give it a... seven. It isn't too harsh and is fair.

C: 「肠胃通」的长篇大论结束了——眼前的望远镜也变成了瞎眼镜。
E: Alright, the long speech about the "I-POO" is finally over, and the telescope in front of you has turned into a useless piece of junk.

C: 对，我是喜欢钱…但这世上有人不爱财吗？凭我的才能和天赋难道还换不来你们这种人的尊重吗？
E: Yeah, I love money... But is there anyone who doesn't? With all my talents and skills, shouldn't I deserve the respect of you people?

C: 是啊，我到底怎么了？我…怎么会爱上一条猎犬呢？
E: Yeah, what's wrong with me? How did I... end up falling for a Bloodhound?

C: 比如那个刚跑掉的波波特，试戏的时候结结巴巴的，但我看这孩子长相声音有几分可爱，就让他在《汽水人生》露了个脸。
E: Take that Popott, for example. He stuttered through his audition, but I saw some potential in his looks and voice, so I gave him a shot in the drama Life's a Soda.

C: 特别是星际和平娱乐，他们肤浅的商业理念捧红了一堆德不配位的明星！没有实力，全是营销，让匹诺康尼的年轻人也受了坏影响——唉，公司！
E: Especially the Interastral Peace Entertainment! Their shallow business ideas have produced a bunch of unworthy and immoral stars! No talent, just marketing! And it's a bad influence on the young ones in Penacony too. IPC, what a disgrace!

C: 保镖，让他别纠缠我和波波特先生了——注意分寸，别把家族的人引来了。
E: Hey, you. Stop {F#her}{M#him} from bothering me and Mr. Popott, and be careful not to turn this into a scene. I don't want to draw The Family's attention.

C: 呜哇…部长，这家伙身手不一般啊！
E: Woah... Leader, this one here is a tough nut to crack!

C: 但我是个皮皮西人，又不是长生种，哪有那么多「以后」呢？
E: But I'm a Pepeshi, not a long-life species. I don't have much time to wait.

C: 他们有人想要传承过去的艺术，有人想要尝试更前卫的表达…但无论如何，他们的作品还是要摆在观众面前，供市场评判。
E: Some of them want to carry on traditional arts, while some are experimenting with a more avant-garde performance style... Anyhow, their work has to be presented to the public and evaluated by the market.

C: 回头见，期待能在观众席上看到您的身影。
E: See you later. I look forward to seeing you in the audience.

C: 还记得小时候跟长辈卖唱的日子，那时我们的演出大都是为了满足人们的好奇心，让听众发现人的喉咙还能发出这么特别的声音。说是歌手，但其实和飞碟马戏团里钻火圈的扑满没什么区别。
E: I can still vividly recall my childhood days, singing songs with my relatives. Most of our performances were meant to satisfy people's curiosity and showcase that humans could create such unique sounds. While we called ourselves singers, we weren't much different from those Trotters who entertain with daring acts in the Cirque du Soucoupe.

C: 等到那个时候…我或许就能再次唱起门达希亚的音乐，没人有资格阻拦我。而所有人都会对他们曾唾弃的艺术赞叹不已，用各种艺术理论为我辩护，奉上无数赞誉！
E: And when that time comes... I might just be able to sing Mendasian music again, with nobody having the right to stop me. Everyone will marvel at the art they once despised, defending me with various artistic theories and showering me with countless accolades!

C: 或许对我这样差劲的警探来说，那种事注定会发生……
E: Perhaps those things are destined to happen to a detective as incompetent as me...

C: 朋友啊，就此别过了——现在我只想静静离去，就像清醒者在黎明前悄然踏上旅途，不惊醒画眉与晨露——<color=#f29e38ff>千万别来找我，也不要让旁人来搅扰这份安宁！</color>
E: It's time to go our separate ways, my friend... I wish to depart in silence, just like a soberer who sets off before dawn so as not to awaken the birds and dew... <color=#f29e38ff>Please don't come looking for me, and don't let others disturb my peace!</color>

C: 在这嗅觉的引领下，我走出了故乡…而今它又引领着我来到神往已久的匹诺康尼……
E: Thanks to my intuition, I left my homeland... Now, it guides me to my long-desired Penacony...

C: 等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
E: When you're done collecting all the trash, I'll offer you my highest compliments.

C: 所以，我的使命不仅无法拯救家乡，反而会把它推入毁灭的深渊……
E: Thus, not only was my mission incapable of salvaging my home, but it would push it further down the abyss of ruination...

C: 最开始我并不想同意，因为我对人类社会不够了解，未必能胜任这份差事。
E: I was hesitant to take up this job at first, thinking I didn't know enough about human society to be up for the task.

C: 从前…也有人关心过我。但那更像是一种同情，一种类似于「看到有只狗掉进了湖里」的怜悯……
E: Before... There used to be people who cared for me, but it was more out of compassion, a kind of sympathy you felt when you saw a dog fall down a well...

C: 是吗？那和我得到的消息之间多少有些…偏差。不重要了。
E: Really? There's a slight... discrepancy between that statement and what I've been told. It's no matter, though.

C: 你应该已经见过我的兄弟姐妹了…你应该也在迷惑他们为什么会变成那副模样，对吧？
E: You should have met my brother and sister by now... and you must be confused about why they look like that, yes?

C: …毫不意外地出了意外。
E: ...Of course, something unexpected just had to happen.

C: 但我宁愿永远背负这份痛苦，也不想再选择逃避。
E: But I choose to shoulder this pain, I will not run away anymore.

C: 这是善意的提醒，不是威胁……
E: This is just a polite warning, it is not a threat...

C: 谢谢，没空。
E: Thanks, but I'm busy.

C: 这就对了，那些人的生死和我们又有何干系，有钱赚才是硬道理。
E: That's right. What's it to us whether those people live or die? Making money is the be-all and end-all.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 你不会也是猴子吧？
E: Don't tell me that you're a monkey too.

C: 为啥是我？
E: Why me?

C: …唉，校长啊校长，为什么偏偏要让我停办派对去找工作…这可真是太难为我了。
E: *sigh* Is the dean really asking me to stop partying and look for a job? That would be nearly impossible for me to accomplish.

C: 家乡？我爷爷还住在新伦蒂尼恩呢。匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？
E: My home planet? My grandpa is still living on New Londinium! Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?

C: 我也想要offer！
E: I want an offer too!

C: 信中的一些内容我仍持保留意见。不过校长有一点说进了我心里——时代。
E: Although I still have my reservations regarding some of the contents in the letter, what the dean said regarding the era got to me...

C: 全体船员都要听令啾！
E: All hands on deck, tweet!

C: 但万一…黑塔真的拒绝了你，你该怎么办？大脑轻微宕机了一秒，但转念一想，只要你想要，总会有办法的，你对此深以为然。
E: But just in case... What would you do if Herta did indeed refuse you? Your brain shuts down for a split second, then suddenly thinks better of it — There will always be a way, so long as you want it. You're convinced of that.

C: 与星际接轨是好事，只是...我们这些老家伙估计难免落伍啊。
E: Connecting with the universe is a great thing, it's just... It's hard for us old folks to not feel behind the times.

C: 你掀开箱盖，里面是零散的铁脚手架和螺丝。
E: You open the crate to find scattered iron scaffolds and screws.

C: 你也迷路了啾？没办法，毕竟人不会飞…对了，我会飞啾！
E: Are you also lost, tweet? That can't be helped. After all, humans can't fly... Oh yeah, I can fly, tweet!

C: 啾，看来这个垃圾桶里也没有宝藏呢……
E: Tweet, there's no treasure in this trashcan either...

C: 小镇宾馆是人家最喜欢的作品啾！每个来到美梦小镇的人都会夸赞这里的美景，不枉人家精心设计啾……
E: The Town Hotel is my favorite work of all, tweet! Everyone who comes to Dreamville praises the beautiful scenery, which made my meticulous design work all worth it, tweet...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个特别爱赶时髦的孩子，估计又被<color=#dbc291ff>休息区桌上的时尚杂志</color>吸引了啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one child who loves following fashion and probably got fascinated by the <color=#dbc291ff>fashion magazines on the table of the rest area</color>, tweet~

C: 这只灯罩就是最适合我的地方啾！
E: This lampshade is the most fitting spot for me, tweet!

C: 到底怎么才能成为赤红大哥那样的硬派鸟呢？
E: How can I become a real hardcore bird like Boss Red?

C: 巡逻偷懒被赤红大哥发现了啾…
E: I got caught slacking off by Boss Red during a patrol, tweet...

C: 那里的藤蔓滑轨上还刻着我与仓鼠球骑士的比赛记录——三十二胜三十一负六平！哼哼，是我领先一局啾！
E: The match record between me and the Hamster Ball Knight is still carved on this vine sliding rail — thirty-two wins, thirty-one losses, and six draws! Hehe, I'm leading by one, tweet!

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个总是翘班的小家伙很擅长给自己寻找偷懒的小窝，说不定现在也正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>玩偶中</color>睡懒觉呢！
E: Hiya! Let me think: There's a little one who's always slacking off and is very good at finding hidden spots to do that. It could be hiding <color=#dbc291ff>among the plushies</color> and taking a nap right now!

C: 啾啾！前面很危险，无关人员禁止入内禁止入内啾！
E: Tweet tweet! It's dangerous ahead. Unauthorized personnel are prohibited from entering, tweet!

C: 你向面前这只小鸟展示了自己的梦境护照。
E: You flash your Dreamscape Pass to the bird before you.

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个毒舌的孩子总喜欢<color=#dbc291ff>嘲笑其他没有翅膀的家伙</color>，明明大家都是美梦小镇的居民啾！
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! There's a foul-mouthed kid that loves <color=#dbc291ff>taunting other non-winged creatures</color>, but everyone's an upright citizen of Dreamville, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个认真的助手总之对自己的作品过于爱护，它估计现在也守在<color=#dbc291ff>广场侧边的「座椅」的附近</color>啾~
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a serious helper who is overly protective of its own works. It's probably in the vicinity of the <color=#dbc291ff>chair by the side of the plaza</color>, guarding it, tweet!

C: 朝露小屋到处都光秃秃的，没有小草，也没有大树——
E: Dawndew Hut is so barren... Neither trees or grass grow here...

C: 「哇咔咔咔，是我！美梦小镇的大坏蛋，石头老板！」
E: "Mwahaha! It is I, the great villain of Dreamville, Boss Stone!"

C: 嘿嘿，我也喜欢啾。
E: Hehe, I like him, too, tweet.

C: 美梦小镇的居民越来越多，小镇越来越热闹了啾！等孩子们长大，在下就可以带它们学习建造新的小屋了啾~
E: The population of Dreamville is growing by the day and the town is becoming more and more lively, tweet! When these little ones grow up, I can take them to learn how to build new huts, tweet~

C: 再见，你想进就进去吧，我要提前下工了啾。
E: Goodbye. You can go in if you want, I'm clocking out early, tweet.

C: 再见啾，朋友，我要去精进自己的技艺，总有一天，我会搭建出比这更厉害的作品啾。
E: Goodbye, tweet. I have to hone my own craft, friend. One day, I will make something that trumps this masterpiece, tweet.

C: 之后有必要在这立个牌子...
E: We'll have to put a sign here in the future...

C: 想想其他人。
E: Think of someone else.

C: 如果娜塔莎在身边的话，她一定会建议你赶紧去找个界域定锚。
E: If Natasha were here, you know she'd suggest you find a Space Anchor immediately.

C: 再见，矜持的朋友，就当我在心里和你握爪了啾。
E: Goodbye, reserved friend. We'll just say we shook claws in our hearts, tweet.

C: 这里到处都暗暗的，很像会钻出怪物的地方啾。
E: It's really dark here. Feels like a monster will pop out anytime, tweet.

C: 好问题…我好像也忘记了啾，到底是什么小鸟啾……
E: Good question... I also forgot, tweet. What kind of bird is it, tweet...

C: 但还是猫头鹰老师好~
E: But Professor Owl is better.
Tweet...

C: 我一直在暗中注视你、仰望你、欣赏你击败对手时英武的身姿和冷漠的眼神！
E: I have always been watching you from the shadows, looking up to you, admiring your heroic stance and cold stare as you defeat your opponents!

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 你正准备拆开箱子看看，指尖便被一阵冰冷的金属物体轻轻拍了拍，你歪头望去，里面竟是一只奄奄一息的机巧鸟！
E: As you open the box, you feel the sensation of cold, metallic material against your fingertips. Upon closer inspection, you discover a cycrane on the brink of a complete breakdown!

C: 跟紧我！
E: Stick with me!

C: 文件？我已经交给永仁了。
E: Yongren's official documents? But I've already given them back to him.

C: 自从鑫鑫提起那个书名开始，你的表情就已说明了一切。鑫鑫，把书给{F#她}{M#他}吧，应该是书的主人托{F#她}{M#他}来取的。
E: Your expression gave you away as soon as Xinxin mentioned that book. Please give the book back to {F#her}{M#him}, Xinxin. The owner of the text must have entrusted {F#her}{M#him} to retrieve it.

C: 我一个谛听，还能做什么？加入天才俱乐部吗？那肯定还是继续陪着鑫鑫一起查案呗。
E: I'm just a Diting. What can I do? Join the Genius Society? Hah, I'll just keep investigating cases with Xinxin.

C: 这《开智之卷》或许压根就不是给人类看的，就是用来开启机巧的禁制的…你知道的，「金人之乱」后，仙舟把机巧造物的智慧都封锁起来了。
E: Perhaps this Manuscript of Wisdom is not meant for humans, but rather to break the bans of ingenia... As you know, all ingenium creations have been deprived of their wisdom after the Aurum Rebellion.

C: 你忍着痛，从车窗玻璃的反射上看清了自己的相貌——那毫无疑问是一个身穿制服的死鱼眼少年，此刻你*毫不怀疑*那就是自己，那本不应该是你自己。
E: Despite the excruciating pain that you endure, you manage to catch a glimpse of yourself in the car window's reflection. You see the face of a lifeless teenager in school uniform staring back at you. As surreal as it may seem, you know with "certainty" that it is your reflection...

C: 我也算是这鉴爻轩的常客了，每隔一段时间都要来抽一次签，可你猜怎么着？我抽到的永远都是那三种凶签！几百次了，一次不凶的都没抽到过！
E: I've been coming to the Looking Bronze every once in a while, but guess what? I got one of the three "Woe" sticks every single time! I've done this hundreds of times, and not once have I got a "Weal!"

C: 阿幸愣了一下，接着继续低头默念。玉兆重新开始转动…然后很快，玉兆又停转了。
E: A-Xing freezes for a moment and then lowers his head again. The jade abacus starts to turn... but once again, it stops after a short while.

C: 没有听众，也没有乐师，唯有孤琴呜咽不止，如泣如诉，像是等待有心之人驻足。
E: There's no audience or musicians around. Just a solitary guqin, whimpering mournfully as if waiting for an unrequited love to come around.

C: 你听我解释，是这样的，上一个这样和我说话的人，已经死了。
E: I can explain. It's like this: The last person who ever talked to me this way is dead.

C: 没人拦着…好，希望你对其他事情也是这个态度，下回你闯进幽囚狱，和武弁说「也没人拦着我进来啊！」看看能不能保住你的小脑袋。
E: Nobody stopped you... Alright, are you going to adopt the same attitude toward everything in life? When you eventually are trying to force your way into the Shackling Prison, tell the warden that "nobody's stopping you" — and see if you live to tell the tale.

C: （不想阅读）
E: (Don't read it)

C: 骨为灯芯肉做香。
E: My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.

C: （将它往外面再拉一点）
E: (Pull it out a little more)

C: 别怕，小佩。老爸勤勤恳恳干了一辈子，省下来的钱就是为了这趟旅行……
E: Don't worry, Pennie. Your father has worked hard his whole life, what remains is all for the sake of this trip...

C: 夏洛特，我…
E: Charlotte, I...

C: 你花了不少力气修补好它残破的内心——或者说内芯——并为此感到满足。然而……
E: You put great effort and strength into repairing its heart — or, core may be more accurate — and you feel satisfied with your work. However...

C: 你向克劳迪娅讲述起古怪的梦境迷钟、诡异的磁带和潦草的字条。
E: You told Claudia about the odd Dream Ticker, the spooky tape, and the scribbled note.

C: …觉得我作弊的人可以站出来。你？你？…还是你？
E: ...Anyone who thinks I was cheating, step forward. You? You? ...What about you?

C: 不是吧，连你都怀疑我？那台机器是你亲手操作的，有没有问题，你自己清楚啊。
E: No way, even you suspect me? You used that machine yourself, you know better than anyone that there's nothing wrong with it!

C: 玩这种街机，技术和运气都不是最关键的。喏，你猜，最重要的是什么？
E: With these kinds of arcade games, it's not about skill or luck. Guess, what do you think is most important?

C: …不知贵客长久驻足，究竟所为何事？
E: ...Is there a reason that you have been stopped in your tracks, dear guest?

C: 老爷老爷！
E: Boss, boss!

C: 闹街彷徨梦思迷。
E: Streets bustling, lost in a dream's soft glow.

C: （狠狠地踹一脚！）
E: (Give it a ruthless kick!)

C: 你顿悟了：看似一派和谐的表象之下，暗藏着一场水晶杯与三个酒瓶之间的情感大戏。
E: The realization dawns upon you — there is a love drama ongoing among the three underneath the peaceful facade.

C: 你再好好看看，我可是一瓶酒！一瓶酒想要找到一只完美的酒杯来盛装自己的酒浆，这难道不是天经地义的事吗？
E: Look at me. I'm a bottle of liquor! Isn't it the most natural thing for a bottle of liquor to desire a perfect wine glass that complements it?

C: 那瓶红葡萄酒很有野心，也很有毅力，它应该很适合你。
E: That bottle of red wine is ambitious and determined. I think it is a great match for you.

C: 哈哈，别怕。谐乐大典就快开始了，等到时候我带你去见见来自其它星系的上等名酒……
E: Haha... no sweat. The Charmony Festival is around the corner. I'll introduce the finest liquors from other galaxies to you there...

C: 哎，不对啊，哈努兄弟不是只会发出「帅气的*哼*声」嘛？为什么我们还能说话？
E: Wait a minute. Isn't Hanu supposed to only make cool *hmph* sounds? Why can we still speak?

C: 好哇，信任就信出这么些东西。
E: Alright, that trust is shattered today.

C: 呵，各位，再也不见。
E: Hah, this is goodbye. See you again never!

C: 酒瓶被一把抢了过去。
E: The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.

C: 景元…
E: Jing Yuan...

C: 这也能杀熟？
E: Wait, even robbers trick their friends?

C: 是这样么？原来你也是无家可归的人，这…给你个机会吧。
E: Oh? So you're a homeless vagrant, too? Then... we'll give ya a chance.

C: 向居民募捐。
E: Ask the residents for donations.

C: 话说在前头，你可别说什么「怎么不学点新曲子」之类的啊，我们倒是想呢，可之前的老板总是要讲究个「品味格调」，就只让我们翻来覆去演奏那几个调子。
E: And I'll pre-empt you: Don't say something like "Why don't you learn new tunes" or something along these lines. We'd love that, but our previous boss was always preoccupied with "sense of style and taste," and would only allow us to play these few pieces over and over.

C: 也不是不行…
E: Sounds doable...

C: 流梦礁？那是什么地方…听这不像是匹诺康尼的地名，难不成——哇老板你难道还特意为了我们去别的梦境找歌手了吗我真是爱死你了……
E: The Dreamflux Reef? What sorta place is that... It doesn't sound like it's on Penacony. Could it be... Woah! Boss, don't tell me you specially made a trip to the other Dreamscapes to look for a singer for us? Gosh, I love you to death...

C: 她的歌声清澈又温柔，观众们听得如痴如醉，连大气都不敢喘，生怕干扰到她的演出。
E: Enthralled by her limpid and mellow singing, the audience find themselves holding their breaths, for fear of spoiling her performance.

C: 打开包裹。
E: Open the package.

C: 翻找片刻后，你又在重重精美小礼品之下发现了一张纸条，上面贴着一枚…硬币？
E: After a brief search, you discover a note sitting beneath the layers of exquisite gifts. It seems that a... coin has been taped onto it?

C: …那我去把寒鸦大人叫过来。
E: ...Let me get Madam Hanya.

C: 是9…等等，你这恍然大悟的表情是怎么回事？
E: It's 9... Wait, did I miss something? Why the surprised look?

C: …而幽囚狱是用来关闭重犯的地方，你曾在这里见过一些*并非是人*的囚徒…那么一本书被关在这里，似乎也算是有理可依。
E: ...Moreover, The Shackling Prison is a place for dangerous offenders. You witnessed some non-human criminals in this prison... so it seems plausible that a book would be locked up here.

C: {NICKNAME}，此事并非是交托于汝的任务，汝不必将其视为负担。
E: {NICKNAME}, this isn't a task that has been entrusted to you, you do not need to view it as a burden.

C: …不记得了。
E: ...Not at all.

C: 金人巷确实是个好地方吧？
E: Aurum Alley is a great place, right?

C: 那好，传送带的小冒险要开始了！
E: Very well. Let the conveyor belt adventure begin!

C: 你不会打算让我放点炮听个响？
E: You're not asking me to go and fire these cannons just so you can listen to them?

C: 我先喘口气。
E: Let me catch my breath for a second.

C: 这事行不行啊…
E: Are you sure about this...?

C: …说了多少次！不要随时开着你那个破葫芦！
E: ...How many times have I told you? Don't just leave that damn gourd open all the time!

C: 请确认——以上是否为你想要旁听的内容。
E: Please confirm if the above are the lessons you wish to audit.

C: 嘶——要来了！
E: Ssss... It's coming!

C: 来来来，套餐种类多样，订购越多折扣越大，同学你要不要详细了解一下……
E: Come, come, I have plenty of package offers. The more you buy, the bigger the discounts. Care to learn more in detail...?

C: 你瞧瞧黑着脸不再搭理你们的讲师，又看看始终沉默着、努力减少自己存在感的邻座——这不应该啊？
E: You glance at your solemn-faced lecturer who is already ignoring you two, then at your silent neighbor who is trying his darnedest to reduce his presence — this shouldn't be happening?

C: 已经开始喜欢了！
E: I'm starting to like it!

C: 不就是拍卖了盛会巨星的签名照嘛，至于闹到学校…噫，怎么你也在？！
E: It's just auctioning off an autographed photo of the Festive Superstar. As for the trouble at school... Huh? Why are you here as well!?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 你启动开关，明亮的球体升起，带来暖意。不远处的池水边升腾起白雾，温度逐渐升高，就是不知道水温如何。
E: You turn the device on and a glowing sphere rises, bringing warmth. Pale mists rise from the pool nearby and the temperature begins to climb. You're not sure how hot the water is right now.

C: 就「快问快答」吧。
E: I'll go with Rapid-Fire Questions.

C: 我会发射微量电波扫描您的大脑，接收并检测它发出的回声，此过程中可能会有幻觉出现，但请相信，这是完全无害的。
E: I will emit a trace amount of electronic wavelengths to scan your brain, receiving and detecting the echoes it sends out. There may be hallucinations during the process, but please believe me, it's harmless.

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 行吧，无妨。这样东西在我的故乡，应当是「铁水瀑布」。
E: All right, fine. The answer should be something called molten waterfall in my hometown.

C: 完全明白了，就是<unbreak>20</unbreak>万！
E: I totally got it! It's <unbreak>200</unbreak>k!

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 一丝卡顿、一瞬闪屏、一份莫名消失的文件、一次猝不及防的弹窗…无数的「不对劲」累积，终于让你鬼使神差地点开了「杀毒软件」。
E: A sign of lag, a moment of splash screen, an inexplicably disappearing file, an unexpected pop-up window... These add up to the feeling that something is wrong, and you end up opening the Antivirus Software.

C: 实不相瞒，我的核心代码其实是一条《超级开拓小子》的游戏外挂。我不断和其他代打外挂生死相搏，最终才成长为了能够独当一面的「超智能病毒」。
E: Honestly, my core code is a game plugin for Super Trailblaze Kid. After constant fights to the death with other plugins, I finally grew into a full-fledged Supersmart Virus.

C: （看看盖着保鲜膜的列车锅）
E: (Look at the Express Special covered in cling film)

C: 好，以后就这么办吧！
E: Alright, these are the rules from now on!

C: 唉，我知道我是世上最无能的桶…但就不能让我一个桶待会儿吗？
E: *sigh* I know I'm the worst trashcan in the world... but can't you just leave me alone for a while?

C: 6加6等于<unbreak>66</unbreak>，8加8等于<unbreak>88</unbreak>…我终于悟透了！
E: 6 plus 6 equals <unbreak>66</unbreak>. 8 plus 8 equals <unbreak>88</unbreak>... I finally understand it!

C: 依你看，本王的这副身躯成色如何？
E: What do you think of my body?

C: 不错，你能识得泰山、明辨美丑，言语也让本王甚是喜欢。
E: Not bad at all. You can distinguish the outstanding from the mediocre, and your words are pleasing to my royal ears.

C: 哦，又一个试图学习哈努精神的新人。让我来考考你，哈努兄弟面对敌人围攻时会怎么做？
E: Oh, here's another newbie ready to learn some Hanu's spirit. Let's find out how much you've learned. What would Hanu do if he was besieged by enemies?

C: 杯口放低与他碰杯。
E: I'd lower my glass when clinking it with theirs.

C: 这根本不是暗号！好哇，没想到你居然伪造身份欺骗我的感情！
E: That's not the passphrase at all! How dare you fake your identity and take me for a ride!

C: 呃啊啊啊啊！这装束…这球棒…的确是传说中的{NICKNAME}！
E: Ahhhh! Your attire... Your bat... You are indeed the legendary {NICKNAME}!

C: 不愧是我徒弟，孺子可教也。
E: You are indeed my disciple. There might be hope for you yet.

C: 师傅，我已经不再是那个普通的垃圾桶了。我将用我的存在证明，即使是最不起眼的角落，也能发光发热……
E: Master, I am no longer that ordinary trashcan of when we first met. I shall use my existence to prove that even the most inconspicuous of corners can shine bright like a diamond...

C: 嗯，你的答案体现不出任何特色，我认为你没有任何特长！而最适合你的去处当然就是——
E: Okay, your response was pretty mid. I don't think you have any special talents! Therefore, the best place for you will be...

C: 信箱焕然一新了。苔痕、裂缝和穿堂风都已成过眼云烟，现在它志得意满地站在你面前，准备着你的检阅。
E: The mailbox has been reborn. No more moss, no more cracks, no more chilly wind whistling through. It stands proud and tall now — ready for your inspection.

C: 打开看看！
E: Open it up!

C: 如果是白厄的话，一定会这么做的。
E: If it were Phainon, he definitely would.

C: 但别担心，万一发生了这种事，人家一定会使用唤醒的魔法，像今天这样把你叫醒哦？
E: But don't worry! If that ever happens, I'll come find you and cast a wake-up spell, just as I did like today!

C: …不久前，浮黎的目光掠过了翁法罗斯。加上黑塔女士此行获知的情报——
E: Not long ago, Fuli's gaze swept across Amphoreus. Combined with the intel Madam Herta gathered on this journey—

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 即使世界内时间流遭打乱，基本的因果也不可悖反。在运算的最小单位中，其时间流向依然是有矩可循的。
E: Even when a world's temporal flow is disordered, basic causality remains inviolable. In the smallest computational increments, time's flow still follows discernible patterns.

C: 在沉思你为什么认识我。
E: I'm thinking about how you even know me.

C: 嘻，开个玩笑，只是气氛正好，想和你玩捉迷藏。提示：<color=#dbc291ff>人家就在你身边哦。</color>
E: Hehe, just kidding. The mood felt right, so I thought I'd play a little Hide-and-Seek. Here's a hint: <color=#dbc291ff>I'm right next to you.</color>

C: 不过别担心，至少「迷迷」时期的记忆有好好保存下来哦，比如那段逐火之旅的细节、《如我所书》、还有……
E: But don't worry. My memories from being Mem have been retained. I can remember the Flame-Chase Journey, "As I've Written", and...

C: 咦，我怎么闻不到……
E: Huh? Why don't I smell it...

C: 说来奇怪，在海边的时候明明离得更近，却总觉得遥远无比。
E: It's strange. We were closer at the beach, but it felt so far beyond reach.

C: 也许经过启程、冒险，最终回到这里时，我们已经不一样了。但麦浪依旧会是记忆中的样子，一如既往欢迎我们。
E: Perhaps we're no longer the same as we were before we departed on a journey, experienced adventures, and returned here. However, these ripples of wheat will welcome us just as how we remember them to be.

C: ——愿塔兰顿给予他与牺牲相等价的馈赠。愿他的灵魂安息。
E: ...May Talanton reward him with a gift fitting of his sacrifice. May his soul rest in peace.

C: 快走吧，雅努斯不欢迎停驻不前的人！
E: Be gone then — Janus does not like those who stay stagnant!

C: 不知为何，这匹木马的内部尤为逼仄，没法自由舒展开身体，憋闷的感觉让你想起了曾在友爱之馆见到过的窄门。或许，这就是研究学术必须经受的苦痛？
E: For some reason, the horse's interior proves especially confined, preventing free movement — this suffocating feeling recalls the narrow door at the Library of Philia. Is this the price of scholarly pursuit?

C: 「确有其必要性」
E: This is the necessary way

C: 「入学仪式，其之终：泰坦居所，理性永存。学习圣树的美德，将根深深扎进土壤。」
E: "The Final Rite of Initiation: In the Halls of the Titans, where Reason eternal dwells. May you learn the Sacred Tree's virtues, digging your roots into depths below."

C: 看得出来，佩佩挺喜欢你给它取的新绰号。
E: It looks like Peppy likes the nickname that you've given him.

C: 小狗不用上班，但也要接受训练，这样才能成为聪明的小狗。
E: Puppies don't have to work, but they do need to be trained so that they could be clever little doggos.

C: 它无法理解你的意图，呆坐在原地，看上去有些不知所措。
E: It doesn't understand your intent and just sits there, looking slightly overwhelmed.

C: 但我相信，政法科一定会竭尽自己的努力，去弥补这场灾难导致的诸多漏洞。
E: But I believe the Department of Galactic Geopolitics will certainly try its best to make up for this disaster.

C: 等之后危机解除，你不妨也试一试？
E: When the crisis passes, would you like to have a try?

C: 古恩老师是法政科的创始人，他富有智慧与哲思。
E: Mr. Gunn is the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. He is very wise and philosophical.

C: 哈，应物科乃是黑塔的重要科室之一，包揽了站内所有资产的流入流出、盘查与清点。
E: Ha! An important department within the space station, Implement Arts is. We oversee the incoming and outgoing of all our assets, including inventory checks and counts.

C: 虽说空间站已大体受控，但怪物还未被全数清除。
E: Although the situation is generally under control, the monsters have not been completely wiped out.

C: 呵，年轻人！
E: Hmph, young people!

C: 今天我的日程是，帮助卡波特大人「给粉丝回信」、「取回定制午餐」、「熨烫服装」、「给第二批粉丝回信」、「取回定制晚餐」、「给第三批粉丝回信」……
E: This is my schedule for the day: Help Master Capote reply to his fans, fetch his personalized lunch, iron clothes, reply to the second batch of his fans, fetch personalized dinner, reply to the third batch of his fans...

C: 看你的样子，以前没见过？是新来空间站的科员吗？
E: I don't think I've seen you before. Are you a new researcher on the space station?

C: 你认为莱斯莉喜欢洛奇吗？
E: Do you think Lesley likes Rocky?

C: 我能做的部分，主要还是尽可能培训目前已有的这一批防卫科科员。平时空间站的氛围比较平稳，除了处理科员的研究事故之外，防卫科的工作也就只有普通巡逻了。
E: What I can do at this stage is to step up the training for our existing staff members. Most of the time there's not much work for us at the station. We just need to handle the occasional research accidents and do our daily patrolling.

C: 他啊，收拾包袱回家去了。
E: Ah, he was sacked.

C: 灰灰说我这口味都过时了…是不是我这口味恶心到你了，要不然你怎么还不走，你都挡着我的光了，哎……
E: Ashy said I was an outdated snack... Do you find me disgusting? Why are you still here? You're blocking my light. *sigh*

C: 还是放弃吧，我、不，严格来说是我们——我们所有被创造出来的生命，我们都过时了，我们是没有未来的。
E: It's time to give up. I — or more precisely — we, the created beings, are all outdated. We don't have a future.

C: 你就是这么跟阮•梅说话的吗？
E: Is that how you talk to Ruan Mei?

C: 咳咳，简单介绍一下，你可以跟它们一样，叫我「全域守望者」，因为我将守望此地，直至我生命尽头。
E: Ahem, let me introduce myself. You can call me "Guardian of the Domain" like everyone else, as I'll watch this place till my death.

C: 没办法，我生来如此。当然，这要感谢我的「母亲」——亲手创造出我这个生命体的，伟大的阮•梅女士！
E: I was born that way, and I owe that to my mother, the great Miss Ruan Mei who created me.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 唔…是这样吗？{NICKNAME}…看来「反吐真剂」开始发挥作用了。
E: Hmm... Is that so? {NICKNAME}, it seems that the Anti-Truth Serum is working.

C: （关闭终端。）
E: (Shut down the terminal.)

C: 好嘞！您这么果断，定是瞧出了什么端倪吧。愿扎格列斯眷顾您！
E: All right! You must've noticed something if you're that certain. May Zagreus favor you!

C: 亲爱的帕门弥德。请告诉我：你是谁，你从哪里来，向哪里去？
E: My dear Parmenides. Please, tell me: Who are you? Where have you come from? Where are you going?

C: （继续听下去）
E: (Keep listening)

C: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
E: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

C: 概念的不可能，无法通过事实来推断。
E: Conceptual impossibility cannot be deduced through reality.

C: 容我再思考一番…
E: Let me think about it...

C: …好…好孩子…波瑟芬妮…谢谢…我的波瑟芬妮……
E: ...Thank you... Good child... Possephone... My Possephone...

C: 不失去我一次，他们是不会妥协的——
E: They won't compromise until they lose me at least once...

C: 去学一门手艺吧。
E: Go learn a craft.

C: …似乎也无所谓？
E: ...It doesn't really matter, does it?

C: 我能帮上什么？
E: How can I help?

C: 至少第一次过来参观的时候，即使有尼科马库斯带路，我还是因为找厕所而迷失了方向…安德烈亚斯也抱怨过自己是个路痴，在树庭工作了好几年仍然会迷路。
E: Even when Nicomachus guided me on my first visit, I got lost looking for the restroom... And Andreas, who always complained about being directionally challenged, still got lost in the Grove despite working there for years.

C: 从你收集到的线索来看，要是将那个神秘人的行为与一个抢劫犯类比…说他事先没有踩过点，我不太相信。
E: From the clues you've gathered, comparing that mysterious person's actions to those of a robber... I find it hard to believe he hadn't scoped out the place beforehand.

C: 不，这反而说明，他没有这么厉害。如果真是这样，其余火种早就被盗走了。
E: No, that suggests he isn't all that powerful. If he were, the other Coreflames would have been stolen long ago.

C: 愿这对姐妹在塞纳托斯的怀抱中得到安眠。
E: May the girls find their final rest in Thanatos' embrace.

C: 完全没有。
E: Not a scratch.

C: 这位憔悴的老父亲只是沉默地聆听着，将那柄剑紧抱在怀中，任凭浊泪在脸上纵横。
E: The weary father listens in silence, clutching the sword tightly to his chest as tears stream down his face.

C: 呜呜……
E: *sniffles*...

C: 就是说啊，做人不能太那个。
E: I'm just saying, you can't be too much like that.

C: 我看这图表有点奇怪，所以就…不好意思！
E: This graph looked strange, so I... I'm sorry!

C: 撞到我就没事了？
E: And now it's no big deal?

C: 早在伊俄还在合唱队时，我就觉得他脑袋有问题了。
E: I suspected Eio wasn't all there even back when he was in the choir.

C: …时间不早了，在下先告辞了。
E: ...It's late. I should take my leave.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，这上面讲的是什么呀？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, what's the story behind this mural?

C: 嘿嘿~那我要把今天从刻法勒大人那儿感受的温暖带回市集，与大家一同分享！
E: Hehe~ Then I'll take the warmth I felt from the great Kephale today back to the market and share it with everyone!

C: 这些年摆摊攒下的积蓄，我藏在了…藏在了……
E: The savings I've gathered from running my stall all these years... I hid them... I hid them...

C: 您自由发挥就是，我会做好准备，依照您的步调行动！
E: You take the lead, and I'll be ready to follow, acting in sync with your moves!

C: 为了捍卫竞技场英雄的荣耀，短暂的沉思后，柯库翁冲了出去。
E: To defend the honor of the arena hero, after a brief moment of contemplation, Glykon charged out.

C: 振作起来，柯库翁！
E: Pull yourself together, Glykon!

C: 两人这么说着，含笑着闭上了眼睛。
E: With their last words, they close their eyes with peaceful smiles.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，刚才回应我们的声音，是你吧？
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, it was you who responded to our voices just now, right?

C: 哟，贵客！怎么样，在宴会上喝得可算尽兴？
E: Hey, honored guest! So, did you drink to your heart's content at the party?

C: 不过那家伙，待谁都是这样温和热情，真是不开窍啊。
E: But he is so warm and friendly to everyone, he's completely clueless.

C: 享受这场无休的宴会，不好吗？
E: Why not enjoy this never-ending party?

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 它的曲库齐全得惊人，除了大量资金投入，我想象不到你们有其他办法来解决版权问题。
E: It's amazing how many songs are stored in its library. Someone must have paid big money to get all the copyright issues sorted.

C: 如果累了，直接躺在座位上看也行——不论从什么角度看，宇宙总是那么迷人。
E: And if you're feeling a little tired, lie down on the seats instead. The universe is fascinating from every angle.

C: 姬子姐姐说她不擅长捉迷藏；瓦尔特叔叔虽然一脸想要参加的样子，但最后还是苦着脸拒绝了我，也没和虎克说到底为什么……
E: Himeko said she's terrible at hide-and-seek. Welt looked excited, but then he said it was a shame he couldn't do it and never explained why...

C: 不生气的老巫婆当然很漂亮…等等，荣誉队员你的回答偏题了！
E: Hmph, only when she's not angry... Wait, honorary member, stop changing the subject!

C: 我真可爱！
E: I am a bit of a cutie!

C: 克拉拉…好像忘记把手机带来了……
E: I think I forgot to bring my phone with me...

C: 唔…帕姆也对克拉拉这么说了，好可惜……
E: Yeah... they did mention that to me. I wish they could...

C: …好想…好想把帕姆抱回去！
E: I wish I could take Pom-Pom back to Belobog!

C: 我问问其他人的意见。
E: Um, I'll have to ask around first.

C: 要是你们愿意，我随时可以给你们来一场小型私人演出。
E: If you like, I can give all of you a small private show any time.

C: 只是此事我一人说了不算。我还得将提案整理好，与布洛妮娅、佩拉和其他尉官商议才是……
E: Only thing though is, I can't make the call. I'll need to write a report and discuss it with Bronya, Pela, and others first.

C: 这辆列车行驶于宇宙之中，潜在的危机多不胜数。而帕姆大人不仅确保了列车的安全，甚至还将车厢内的保洁、绿植的养护工作都揽到自己的职责中去。
E: The Express must have encountered huge dangers on its journey through the universe. Not only does Pom-Pom make sure that no harm comes to the crew, they even manage to find time to clean the carriages and take care of the plants.

C: 实在是太了不起了……
E: That's really amazing...

C: 浓郁的咖啡香……
E: The thick aroma of coffee...

C: 我也喜欢坐这儿。
E: It's pretty great for sitting.

C: 入戏倒挺快——你上车没多久吧。
E: You're a new passenger yourself, aren't you?

C: 电影里不是经常有那种主人回家开灯，却发现早有人坐在沙发椅上等他的桥段吗？卡芙卡和刃都喜欢这么干，萨姆甚至不会让他开灯。
E: Isn't it often the case in movies that a guy comes home and turns on the lights, only to find someone sitting on the sofa waiting for him? Kafka and Blade both like to do that, and Sam won't even give the guy a chance to turn on the lights.

C: 希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
E: I hope you all cherish one another.

C: 列车长看上去还很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
E: I guess... Oh, the conductor likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~

C: 没有。
E: Nope.

C: 偷偷告诉你，它们喜欢去人少的地方待着。
E: I'll let you in on a secret — They like to be away from people.

C: 但我会通过我的语言，去指引每一个，就像是你这样，迷失在慌乱之中的人。
E: But with my words, I will guide all those who are lost and in a panic like yourself.

C: 从你的眼神里，我能看出焦躁不安。这是一种来源于恐惧的情绪，我能理解。
E: I can see anxiety in your eyes. This emotion originates from fear. I can understand it.

C: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
E: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

C: 总之，我没有能说出一句话，也没有给出任何回应。
E: Anyways, I couldn't say anything to him and gave him zero responses.

C: 未来有什么打算？
E: What are your plans for the future?

C: 谢谢你邀请我登上列车。我就自己随意转转吧，不用劳您大驾专门陪我了。
E: Thank you for inviting me to board the Express. I'll take a look around on my own. You don't have to accompany me.

C: 当然解散啦！大家逃都来不及呢。只不过听说还有少部分人还打算继续支持他，说什么「要陪伴波少洗心革面」。
E: Of course it did! We couldn't get away fast enough. But I hear some people plan to keep supporting him and want to "be there for him as he changes."

C: 哼，这个没良心的小子，早把老头子我忘咯！别说下落了，连个消息都没给我发，亏我还天天刷新终端看有没有未读消息……
E: Hmph, that ungrateful brat has long forgotten about me. He never sent me any messages, let alone his whereabouts. And here I am, logging onto the terminal every day to see whether there are any unread messages...

C: 反正我那傻徒弟不在空间站里，别人知不知道都无所谓了。
E: It doesn't matter, my silly apprentice is not in the space station anyway.

C: 如今贝洛伯格正逐渐恢复正常，也在逐步取得与外界的联系。为了避免潜在的敌人对我们造成威胁，我必须尽可能把你们的知识全都带回去才行。
E: Now that Belobog is gradually returning to normal, we are also slowly reconnecting with the outside world. I have to take as much of your knowledge back with me as possible to prevent any potential enemies from endangering us.

C: 这么说，你们去过比它大得多的地方？
E: So you've been to places way bigger than this?

C: 哈哈哈，当然不是用在拳台上了。
E: Hahaha, of course I'm not gonna use it in the ring.

C: 从结论而言，是本座败了…不过真理嘛，并不在于口舌胜败。本座依然很满足。
E: As such, Himeko prevailed... But the truth isn't about winning or losing. I am content.

C: 要说登上过这趟星穹列车的公司员工，我肯定不是第一个。据说「开拓」阿基维利还在世的那会儿，公司和无名客之间还有不少往来合作。
E: I'm definitely not the first IPC staff member to board the Astral Express. I've heard that the IPC and the Nameless cooperated frequently when Akivili the Trailblazer was still around.

C: <unbreak>8182</unbreak>减去<unbreak>6479</unbreak>…
E: <unbreak>8182</unbreak> minus <unbreak>6479</unbreak>...

C: 哼，我一定要在你们之前查清帕姆的身份，摸清它的喜好——瞧好吧！
E: Hmph, I'll figure out what Pom-Pom is and what they like before you do! Just you wait!

C: 突然对帕姆心生敬意了！
E: I've suddenly developed a new respect for Pom-Pom!

C: 持明新生，如同重归大海的游鱼，理当自由自在。而我在岸上观望足矣。
E: When the Vidyadhara are reborn, they are as fish that have returned to the ocean... it is a state of complete freedom. That I may glance upon him from the shore is enough for me.

C: 好像有看不见的东西…
E: I feel an invisible presence...

C: 没想到竟然是这样的理由。
E: ...Uhh, I guess that makes sense...

C: 就像戒指一样。我想，我会将它制作成与珠链般配的模样，应当散发一种温润的色泽。
E: It reminds me of a ring. I imagine crafting it, and then adding a bracelet of beads to complement its soft, lustrous glow.

C: 列车上的鲜花，失去色泽后也会快速枯萎吧……
E: I imagine the flowers on the Express wither quite quickly once their vibrancy fades...

C: 以你所见，天才和庸人的定夺权在谁手中？
E: In your view, who holds the power to distinguish between genius and mediocrity?

C: 人确实乐于给自己贴上标签。
E: It's true, people love to label themselves.

C: 做出选择，然后去背负、思考、接纳，这样便好，不需要自证什么，也不需要得到认可。
E: Make a choice, bear it, reflect on it, and accept it. There's no need to prove anything or seek validation.

C: 我自知不讨人喜欢，但基本的礼节还是有的。
E: I recognize I may not be the most endearing person, but I still uphold fundamental courtesies.

C: 我们依然行走在路上。
E: We are still walking on the path.

C: 之后迎接客人的工作交给你啦！
E: In the future, we'll leave the guest-greeting to you!

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得这几盒子弹怎么样？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you think of these boxes of bullets?

C: 放松的感觉…真好啊。
E: The feeling of relaxation... is so nice.

C: 如果梦境能治愈一切，那现实…真的就没有意义了吗？
E: If the Dreamscape can heal everything, then does reality... not hold any meaning anymore?

C: 看来你的体质有点特殊啊，应该多在匹诺康尼多停留一下~
E: Sounds like an unusual condition you've got there. You should stay a while in Penacony!

C: 再次谢谢你的邀请，不久之后，我也要启程了…列车的下一站会是哪里呢？记忆的流向…又将去往何处呢。
E: I thank you again for your invitation. Before long, I too must depart... Where is the Express' next stop? The river of memories... where will it flow to next?

C: 方才与瓦尔特先生一起听了星际和平播报，有一则消息令人唏嘘不已。
E: I was listening to the Interastral Peace Broadcast with Mr. Yang just now, and there was a greatly sobering piece of news.

C: 这个装饰有些显眼。
E: This ornament is pretty eye-catching.

C: 你的勇敢和好奇心令人动容。我与希世难得号随时等待你的到来。
E: Your courage and curiosity are truly moving. The One and Only and I await your arrival.

C: 你们说得都对！
E: You're both right!

C: 的确。我瞧你体质特殊，是个可造之材。以你的实力，匹配球棒不成问题。
E: For sure. You have a unique constitution and a lot of potential. With your strength, wielding a baseball bat is no problem at all.

C: 我知道的你也知道，我不说的你也不说……
E: You know what I know, and you won't say what I won't say...

C: 你听谁说的？
E: Who did you hear that from?

C: 我听说，他掌握着去往远方的路……
E: I heard that he figured out how to go far away...

C: 我感觉我们可以去表演杂耍，以我们的天赋——绝对有搞头！
E: I feel like we could put on our own variety show. With our talents, we'll definitely make a good show!

C: 你这伤口不要紧吧？外面是不是很危险？
E: Is your wound okay? Is outside really dangerous?

C: 随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯会被入侵，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…
E: Over time, the rich flavor of Salmon dilutes, as it makes its way into Redsunset's flesh. When you can no longer tell Redsunset Salmon's main ingredient from its seasoning, the dish's name doesn't make much sense...

C: 比如说「上班就是喝茶看报，跟同事聊聊天，然后看着时钟等着下班」。实际上，这都是误传。
E: A job where I just "Clock in, drink tea, read the newspaper, chit-chat with colleagues, and stare at the time, waiting to get off." But that's all nonsense.

C: 宜居城郊板块，水电暖供应充足，精装修拎包入住，稀缺楼盘，机不可失！这么好的机会，我都恨不得给自己来一套！喂，你！你还在等什么？
E: Great location in the outskirt of the city, energy and water already sorted out. For this fully furnished property with fabulous interior design, you need to bring nothing but yourself! High demand, limited supply! I'd want to take one for myself! Hey, you there! What are you waiting for?

C: 我手头有行政区七百年来的全部房产交易纪录，另外，贝洛伯格八大家族的族史我都倒背如流——靠着手头的这些信息，我才能争取到官员的支持和民众的信任。
E: I have data on all property sales in the Administrative District for the past seven hundred years, and I know the nitty-gritty of the history of the Eight Belobog Families. My knowledge has won me the trust of both government officials and regular people.

C: 我上哪去看《雪国冒险奇谭》？
E: Where can I read Tale of the Winterlands?

C: 怎么，你不信？看着吧——迟早有一天，我要让「大宇宙时间隧道」成为世人皆知的科学理论！
E: Find it hard to believe? One day, the world will tremble before my big universe time tunnel! You'll see.

C: 音乐剧的类型并非一成不变。
E: There are other types of musicals you can try.

C: …我听说是准备出续作了，阿尔乔姆可能要…啊，抱歉，我以为你在问《雪国冒险奇谭》的事。
E: ...I heard that a sequel is going to come out. Artem might... Ah, sorry. I thought you were asking about the Tale of the Winterlands.

C: 塔米拉小姐天生丽质，气场过人，肯定不至于嫉妒小女子啦…还是不要把人想得太坏唷～
E: Tamila is a natural beauty and she has a great stage presence. I'm sure she isn't jealous of me... Let's not think too negatively about people.

C: 我和那莱姆士汀家的人可不一样。再说了，大臣家的公子就非得不食人间烟火吗？这是偏见，要不得！
E: I'm not like this Limestein guy. What? Does being the son of an official automatically put someone above the common people? That's an unacceptable stereotype!

C: 紧急维修是能解决一时的问题，咱们也是能撑过这波寒潮。可忙到头来也没法从根本解决问题，这一切真的值得吗？
E: Emergency repairs are nothing more than temporary fixes. We can survive the Eternal Freeze. The problem is all this busy work isn't going to solve the real issue. Is all this effort really worth it?

C: 也不能这么说吧…
E: Well, you shouldn't put it like that...

C: 我觉得没戏。
E: You don't stand a chance.

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 还不错啊，贝洛伯格爱读书的人可不少呢。
E: Not bad. Belobog has a lot of people who love to read.

C: 可是老矿工们不这么想，他们觉得流浪者把矿队弄得乌烟瘴气的…然后那些新来的又觉得矿队待遇太差，没有自由…到头来搞得两头不讨好。
E: But the old miners have their own ideas. They think the vagrants have made a mess of the mining team... and the vagrants aren't happy with their payment and feel that they've lost freedom... In the end, neither side is happy.

C: 你都投资了些什么人？
E: Who do you invest in?

C: 咿！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}居然问我这种问题…真是坏心眼！
E: Hey! What are you asking me that for?... Don't be a jerk!

C: 最近？感觉也没什么特殊的变化……
E: Nothing special recently...

C: 是，但重点并不只是能多挣点钱……
E: Yes, but making more money isn't the main point...

C: 啊，那接下来呢？
E: Ah, what's next?

C: 而且，在布洛妮娅姐姐之前，根本没有人会那样对待我…大家都嫌弃我手脚不干净，像见了疯地鼠一样躲着我……
E: No one had ever treated me so nicely until I met Bronya... Everyone despised me for being a thief and avoided me like I was some kind of rabid gopher...

C: 啊，还是算、算了，没什么…不好意思啊。
E: Never mind, nothing really... Sorry about that.

C: 怎…怎么可能！我要是扒、扒手，奥列格老大哪肯让我进「地火」啊……
E: No — no way! I—If I were a pickpocket, Chief Oleg wouldn't let me into Wildfire...

C: 要是、要是不想说，也、也没事。我就是纯粹好、好奇……
E: I—If you don't want to tell me, it's okay. I was just c—curious...

C: 你是机械师？
E: Are you a mechanic?

C: 简单来说，就是让每个人都能暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚，自由自在地发展自己的兴趣爱好、或者只是单纯地休息一下……
E: In short, we can get everyone to temporarily escape from the bindings of family and duty, to freely develop their hobbies, or just to take a break...

C: 好啦，你跑了一天，肯定累坏了吧，快回房间歇歇！我这就去下厨，等下做好就给你把饭端上去！
E: Well, you must be exhausted after running around the whole day. Take a rest in your room. I'll bring the food over when it's ready!

C: 真的？那你现在又认识我们歌德家的人了，恭喜你！哈哈哈。
E: Really? Now you know the Goethe family too. Congratulations! Hahaha.

C: 虽然这城墙里面一年到头都暖和得很，但城墙外可是铺天盖地的暴风雪——如果你们真是从外面来的，想必是已经亲眼见过了。
E: Although it's warm inside the wall all year round, there are constant snowstorms outside the wall. If you are really from the Outside, you must have seen it.

C: 与其杵在这死气沉沉的办公室里，她更想用自己的双手改变现状。何况她心里始终挂念着下层区的事，想强行留住也难。
E: She wants to get stuck into some material change, rather than stick around in this lifeless office. She was always thinking about the Underworld. You can't stop someone like that from leaving.

C: 她是个有手腕的人。
E: She is very calculated.

C: 你们的乐队叫什么？
E: What's your band called?

C: 我看你们就别大摇大摆地在外面闲逛了，先在我这机械屋避避风头吧。
E: I think you should stop strutting outside so brazenly, and keep your head down here in my workshop.

C: 怎么可能，那可是我老弟呀。我这做姐姐的，不管嘴上怎么说，心里都还是会挂念着他的。
E: Not true. He's my little brother. And no matter what, as his big sister, I will always be worrying about him.

C: 我听外面的人说，佩拉和希露瓦现在还经常一块排练，演出。真怀念……
E: I heard that Pela and Serval still do band practice and live performances together regularly, just like old times...

C: 你这是在干什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 我和她没那么熟，不好意思问。
E: I don't know her that well, so I find it hard to ask her.

C: 暂时想不到该聊些什么了。
E: I can't think of what to talk about right now.

C: 我想和克拉拉聊聊天…
E: I want to talk to Clara...

C: 来到聚落里扎营的流浪者们大多都很喜欢机器人…时间久了，也多少都掌握了一些和机械有关的技术。
E: Most of the vagrants who make camp here liked these robots... As time went by, they also learned some mechanical skills.

C: 实在不行就换壳，我来帮你。
E: Just change the casing if there's no other way. I'll help you.

C: 我会按照既定方案将该个体纳入基地网络，而已备份的信息则交给克拉拉自由处置。
E: I will integrate this machine into the base network according to the determined solution. The copied information will be handed over to Clara to use at her discretion.

C: 此外，「星际决胜庆典」结束后，我收到了一条来自雅利洛-Ⅵ外部的神秘信息。
E: What's more, after the Interastral Tournament Festival ended, I received a mysterious message from beyond Jarilo-VI.

C: 鼹鼠党的成员可多了！虎克得想想……
E: We've got many! Let me think...

C: 记住，人是铁，饭是钢——欢迎您下次再来！
E: Remember, nobody can live without food. Come back next time for a feed!

C: 哟？
E: Yo?

C: 伊妮丝的表演结束了。
E: Eunice's performance ends.

C: 呃…还是算了。
E: Ergh... Forget about it.

C: 嗯，我是贝洛伯格雪原科考队的队员。
E: Yup, I'm a member of the Belobog Snow Plains research team.

C: 呜！咕呜呜！
E: Groo! Groooo!

C: 小心别让家里人发现了……
E: Be careful. Don't let your family find out...

C: 我在财政部有一朋友……
E: I've got a friend in the Treasury Department...

C: 哎，不知道这下能不能鼓舞作者出个续集……
E: *sigh* Hopefully this'll inspire the author to pen a sequel...

C: 不知道她喜欢什么花……
E: I don't know what flowers she likes...

C: 这次还是按人头均摊？
E: Are we splitting it equally?

C: 是啊是啊！
E: Yeah. Yeah!

C: …这才刚刚开始呢！
E: ...It's only just begun.

C: 坐…坐下…坐？下？
E: S—Sit? ...Sit?

C: …还是长得像鱼的灯笼形机巧？
E: ...Or is it a lantern-shaped ingenium that looks like a fish?

C: 请问…你在这博物馆里，可曾看到过我的希露瓦大人？
E: Excuse me... Have you seen my Lady Serval anywhere in the museum?

C: 这位《水晶日报》的主编似乎还是忘不了她的《雪国冒险奇谭》……
E: Looks like this Crystal Daily chief editor still couldn't let go of her Tale of the Winterlands...

C: 我听雪衣大人说您是值得信任的仙舟盟友，很少听到那位大人的如此评价，我愿意相信您会将幽囚狱的秘密藏在心中。
E: Madam Xueyi has mentioned that you are a trusted ally of the Xianzhou. It is rare to hear her offering such a high remark about anyone, so I am happy to trust that you'll keep mum about the secrets of the Shackling Prison.

C: 要是我不小心说出去的话…？
E: And if I unintentionally tell them to someone...?

C: 我并非是研究历史学者，所以我对幽囚狱的历史并非全然熟悉。这里是罗浮内幽囚狱系统中其中一处，历史悠久，建立的具体年份已不可查。
E: I am no research historian, so I may not be familiar with the complete history of the Shackling Prison. It has been established eons ago that the exact date of its construction is long-lost to time. The facility we are at is just one unit of the Shackling Prison system on the Luofu.

C: 根据前任司狱大人所说，此处的幽囚狱是由仙舟人和持明族人合作修建的。想来也合理，若不是持明云吟法术，也不可能在海底建造这么庞大的建筑。
E: According to the previous Jailer, this unit of the Shackling Prison was jointly built by Xianzhou natives and the Vidyadhara. And it checks out because if not for the Vidyadhara's cloudhymn magic, it wouldn't be possible to build this colossal structure underwater.

C: 曾经的我也天真过，以为自己可以完全不理会他们就把工作进行下去。
E: I used to harbor that naive thought too, believing that I could just block them out and go about my duties.

C: 可你听起来很不情愿。
E: But you sound reluctant.

C: 我才不要呢。
E: I'll pass.

C: 想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑。我继续给您介绍介绍——毕竟这也是我们勤务的工作之一……
E: Haha, just kidding. Let me continue telling you what we get up to — after all, that's also part of our job...

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: 嗐，我和您说这个干什么…咱们聊点别的，聊点别的。
E: Hey, why am I telling all of this to you... Let's talk about something else.

C: …他们长得都差不多，我想想，要不就是东边儿的这位吧？
E: ...They're all pretty similar. Let me think, is it that one to the east?

C: 都有哪些问题你不能答？
E: Are there any questions you can't answer?

C: …现在是上班时间。您是前来咨询事务的化外民，我是地衡司的执事。严谨才是正确的地衡司执事工作态度。
E: ...It's business hours now. You're an Outworlder with an inquiry, and I am an officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission. Being disciplined is the expected work manner for a Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 请问地衡司有什么可以帮助你的吗？
E: Greetings. What can the Realm-Keeping Commission help you with today?

C: 好呀，有事儿的时候去找净砚，没有事儿的时候来找我就行。
E: Alright, if you have problems need solving, trouble Jingyan. And if you have time need killing, you're welcome to chat with me.

C: 就闲聊到这儿吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat, then.

C: 尽管打听，我要是能回答，我会告诉你的。
E: Ask away. If I'm able to answer, I'll be sure to let you know.

C: 幽囚狱主簿都要做什么？
E: What does a secretary of the Shackling Prison do?

C: 毕竟这里关押的都是些穷凶极恶的家伙，那些与他们相关的文书，往往都写满了常人难以想象的邪恶与残酷。
E: After all, these are black-hearted criminals we're holding here. The documents related to them are all filled with cruelty and atrocities beyond the fathoming of a normal person.
