C: 三百多岁的人，没有「记忆力好」以外的一技之长，没有值得依靠的社会关系，甚至没有一个…能回去的家……
E: For a three hundred-year-old person with no skills beyond having a "good memory," no social connections on which they could rely, not even a home to return to...

C: 你好像对职场氛围颇有微词。
E: You seem to be pretty critical about the workplace culture here.

C: 很难想象你经历过怎样的职场，要么你很幸运，同事间相处愉快；要么你已经是身经百战的老油条，职场上发生的一切你都能接受。
E: It's hard to imagine what your workplace experience has been like. Either you're lucky enough to get on with your colleagues, or you're a seasoned veteran who's capable of accepting anything thrown at them at the workplace.

C: 咳——我之前和云骑军举报过几次化外民的可疑行为，仅此而已，你别瞎想。
E: *Ahem* I've reported a few suspicious Outworlders to the Cloud Knights before, that's all. Don't overthink it.

C: 那边的持明好像在嚷嚷什么，我也不清楚。
E: There're some Vidyadhara yelling about something over there. I don't really know what.

C: 现在这个情势下，十王司在鳞渊境的「有关人士」只有三种，判官、冥差、罪人。在下希望您不是最后一种。
E: At this present situation, only three types of "concerned parties" remain for the Ten-Lords Commission in Scalegorge Waterscape: Judge, spiritfarer, and criminal. I hope you do not fit into the final category.

C: 还是那句话——德威不知道的，差不多就是阁下不该知道的。
E: As I always say: Anything Dewei doesn't know is what you should not know.

C: 你在鳞渊境做什么？
E: What are you doing in Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 因而在仙舟「方壶」，护珠人基本上代替了云骑的岗位，是那里的精锐部队。
E: That's why the Pearlkeepers aboard the Xianzhou Fanghu formed an elite force that have basically replaced the role of Cloud Knights there.

C: 没事，不打扰，不打扰。要是想聊聊天，你可以随时来找我。我平时也找不到谁能跟我聊这些。
E: All good, it's no bother at all. Any time you want to chat, just come and find me. I usually can't find anyone to talk with about this stuff.

C: 比如这些叶子、果实、树皮、根茎…它们大多是受「建木」力量波及所生，成分奇异，入药后更有神效。
E: Take these leaves, fruit, bark, and rhizomes for instance... They're miraculous ingredients, mostly evolved following exposure to the power of the Ambrosial Arbor. And they have even more potent effects once used to make medicines.

C: 客官，话不可以这样说呀。别人不要了，我这里才会收下嘛。
E: Please don't say that, my dear customer. I only accept things that people don't want.

C: 心情确实不太好。这该从何说起呢…唉…我从头给您讲吧。
E: Indeed. I'm not feeling too good. How should I explain this? Hmm... let me start from the beginning.

C: 我在方壶仙舟交流了一百五十多年，又在博识学会的哈米特空间站交流了一百五十多年，最后在公司的法特森星际医院交流了一百多年……
E: I spent about <unbreak>150</unbreak> years on the Xianzhou Fanghu, and another <unbreak>150</unbreak> years at the Hamet Space Station of the Intelligentsia Guild. And finally, I was at IPC's Fedson Interstellar Hospital for over <unbreak>100</unbreak> years...

C: 喂喂喂，你这就打探过头了，不合适吧？
E: Hey, hey, don't go digging where you're not supposed to. You know what I mean?

C: 我认为我推荐的工作内容明确，薪资透明，是正经工作。
E: I consider the jobs I offer to be respectable because they have clear goals and fair pay.

C: 好吧，其实我看你蛮有悟性的，有兴趣跟我一起放生的话可以随时来找我。
E: Well, you seem to have understood everything pretty quickly. If you ever want to join me in my releasing ritual, feel free to come find me.

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 当然不是，我是从方壶来的。不知道你是否听说过「方寸烟海」的美名？
E: Of course not. I'm from the Fanghu. Have you heard of the famous Miniature Myriads?

C: 要不是在这儿有商机，我才不想过来呢。你瞧这星槎，造型如此无趣，和我们方壶比可差远了！
E: I wouldn't have wanted to come at all if it weren't for the business opportunities. Just look at this starskiff! Its shape is so dull and plain, and it's got way less aesthetic than the ones on the Fanghu!

C: 客人，我只会修东西。
E: But I only fix things, dear customer.

C: 这里就是仙舟「罗浮」啊，果然百闻不如一见……
E: So this is the Xianzhou Luofu... Ah, what an eye-opener...

C: 我必须和天才俱乐部的那位「黑塔」大人进行接洽，成为她执笔巨著的责任编辑。客观地说，这是我们烛墨学派载入史册的大项目了。
E: I need to work with Herta of the Genius Society as the general editor for her new magnum opus. Objectively speaking, this project is of vital importance, and once it succeeds, we Candelagraphos will be recorded in history.

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 没其他事了，你去忙吧。
E: That's all from me. I'll leave you to work then.

C: 最近新买了什么好剑？
E: Have you bought any nice swords lately?

C: 你这剑怎么这么重？
E: Why is your sword so heavy?

C: 但是天舶司接渡使停云是货真价实的，所有人有关她的回忆也更是如此。
E: But Tingyun the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador did exist, and so does everyone's memory of her.

C: 「快乐工作的基本要诀」一共就三条——不主动，不拒绝，不负责。你，记住了吗？我现在就来考考你。
E: There are three basic principles for happiness at work – do not be proactive, do not say no, and do not be responsible. Got it? Let me give you a small test.

C: 讲讲这帝垣琼玉牌吧。
E: Please tell me more about Celestial Jade.

C: 别担心，你能保护好我。
E: I'm sure you'll keep me safe.

C: 不是很好笑…
E: It's not a very funny joke...

C: 我就记得小时候住在超级大的房子里，还有个特别气派的——和咱金人巷差不多的大的花园广场。
E: All I remember is that when I was young, I lived in a huge house with an amazing garden plaza. It was about the size of Aurum Alley, actually.

C: 我真的听到了吗？没听到。
E: Did I hear what you said? No, I didn't.

C: 推测你想询问的是「不赦十恶」。
E: I assume you are asking about the Ten Unpardonable Sins.

C: 像您这样的贵宾光临，简直是我们「广云袖」的荣幸啊！您下次再来，提前跟我说一声嘛，我们可以闭店清场，专门接待您！
E: It is Cloudbreadth Sleeves' honor to have entertained an esteemed guest such as yourself! Do let us know in advance the next time you come. We will close up the store just to specially welcome you!

C: 原来你把我当避风港了呀？
E: So you're using me as an excuse?

C: 掌柜突然露齿一笑。
E: The pawnbroker suddenly breaks out into a toothy grin.

C: 此时，一名白发剑士缓缓登上擂台，整个校兵场瞬时安静了下来——就像一缕孤高的月光拂过，众人不禁屏息凝神。
E: Right then, a silver-haired soldier steadily climbed onto the ring, and the entire parade square immediately fell silent — as if beholding a lofty moonlight streak whisking past, everyone held their breaths.

C: 静静缓缓流动的时间，原本如同流水一般持续不断，而「抽刀断水」之事更应该是无稽之谈…但这一剑，却实实在在地削去了时间。
E: Time, flowing slowly and silently, is supposed to trickle steadily like water, and it should have been impossible to deliver a "Water-Severing Strike"... but this slash had indeed pierced time itself.

C: 哎，不会做就酱爆的就不要写酱爆了，直接写清炒什么都行。
E: *sigh* Don't say it's "bursting with juices" if you can't cook it this way. Just write "stir-fried" or something.

C: 啊！看来我们两个之前是认识的。抱歉啊，我已经彻底忘记你了。
E: Ah! We know each other, do we? I'm sorry. I've totally forgotten about you.

C: …{NICKNAME}。
E: ... {NICKNAME}.

C: 哈哈哈，原来你是一个容易害羞的人啊。
E: Hahaha, so you're a real shy one, huh?

C: 我以为你走了…
E: I thought you left...

C: 咱那神策府门口有几尊石狮子，你记得吗？
E: Do you remember how there are several stone lions outside of the gates of the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 照这样发展下去，我们哥儿俩马上就能摆脱「爱好者」的身份，跻身主流相声界了！
E: If things go on at this rate, we'll soon be able to turn pro and be one of the mainstream crosstalk comedians!

C: 就在不久前，我还做了个梦，有一个{RUBY_B#漆黑的大日}漆黑的无底洞{RUBY_E#}挂在天上，消失的肌肉都飘进了空洞里。
E: Just a while ago, I had a dream where a {RUBY_B#Pitch-Black Great Sun}pitch-black, bottomless hole{RUBY_E#} hung in the sky, and all the muscles that had disappeared were drifting into it.

C: 丹鼎素针、鳞渊春、荫山绿、狩原毛峰…嗯，到底要选什么好呢？
E: Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron, Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Hunter Maofeng...

C: 有缘再会。
E: Until we meet again.

C: 你相信有这种东西存在吗？巨大的建木就矗立在仙舟之上，仿佛一切神话故事都能在这里找到存在的证据。
E: Do you believe there's really such a thing? The giant Ambrosial Arbor grows aboard Xianzhou, as if all myths and legends can find evidence of their existence here.

C: 后来神仙姐姐降临凡间。长老们就求她展示神通。好个神仙姐姐，听到乡亲们受苦拍案而起，提剑就进了赤泉山。
E: And then the celestial lady descended to our world and the elders begged her to use her divine magic. Lo and behold the celestial lady! Up she went with her sword when she heard about how the villagers had suffered, and she went into Redspring Peak.

C: 过了一阵子，有一天大家突然瞧见赤泉山顶有电闪雷劈，风呼啦啦吹。要不了多久，整个赤泉山的山头突然塌了，以后都改叫「平顶山」了。
E: After a while, we suddenly saw a thunderstorm with terrible winds on Redspring Peak. Then the peak just completely collapsed, so we now call it "Flat-Top Peak."

C: 嘿嘿，神仙姐姐的故事是不是特别特别神奇？呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
E: Heehee, aren't the celestial lady's stories so amazingly? Phew, storytelling is hard work. If you want more, I'll tell you other stories about her next time!

C: 哈哈哈哈，那我就不客气地收下你的赞美了。
E: Hahaha, I'll accept your compliment then.

C: 别误会，你在这群庸才之中，也算是实力顶尖了。这也是我连叹「可惜」的原因。
E: Don't get me wrong. You're already a standout among these clowns, but that's exactly why I found it a shame.

C: 这帮仙舟老东西，简直就是鼠目寸光、尸位素餐…气死我了……
E: Those old short-sighted Xianzhou fogeys are really infuriating...

C: 不要拿世俗的眼光看我。
E: Don't judge me by worldly norms.

C: 下次进货了之后，客人记得再来呀。
E: Do come back again when my next batch of goods arrives.

C: 那请你务必要加入我们「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」！
E: Then you must join our Yanqing Galactic Fan Club!

C: 苏乐达在仙舟卖的好么？
E: Is SoulGlad selling well in Xianzhou?

C: 不过苏乐达™正在计划强势入住仙舟本地，要是我们在这里建厂的话，贸易的天平就会向我们倾斜。
E: However, SoulGlad™ is planning to heavily invest in the Xianzhou local market. If we set up a factory here, the scales of commerce will definitely start to tip in our favor.

C: 驭空大人好飒…
E: Madam Yukong is so chic...

C: 仔细想想，为什么声名远扬的大盗会躲在这里打杂呢？这不合理呀。
E: Come to think of it, why would an infamous thief be hiding here and doing odd jobs? It doesn't make any sense.

C: 得了怪病，尾巴掉了…
E: I caught a rare disease and it fell off...

C: 一个人如果仅为糊口而写作，那永远成不了「大师」、仅为了生存而盗窃，那永远当不上「大盗」。我这也是同样的道理。
E: If someone writes just for a living, he will never be elevated to a master of his profession. If one robs for survival, he will never gain notoriety as a feared bandit. The same principle applies.

C: 可、可你也是小屁孩儿…
E: B—But you're just a kid yourself...

C: 所以这份工作最重要的就是责任心和细心，不能放过一点微小的隐患。魔鬼往往隐藏在细节中，我需要把它们一点点揪出来。
E: So, the most crucial aspects of this job are responsibility and meticulousness, leaving no room for oversight. Often, the devil is in the details, and I must root them out one by one.

C: 我贴好了，你去交罚款吧！
E: You've been ticketed. Go pay your fine!

C: 这边儿有座儿，这边儿宽敞。
E: Here's a seat. It's quite spacious.

C: 吓死人了！等等，一天有那么多时间吗？
E: That's too much! Hang on, are there really that many hours in the day?

C: 还、还有不用工作的世界？
E: S—So they don't even have to work?

C: 我的天…那就是步离人？
E: Oh my! Is that a borisin?

C: 审什么审，我不接受审判，这样吧，我给你讲个故事呗。
E: Interrogate? You wish. I'm not standing trial. Here, let me tell you a story.

C: 你看上去比别的岁阳更好说话…
E: You seem more easy-going than most heliobi...

C: 你是啊…请问你找我有什么事吗？我…可能还没准备好和你聊天。
E: It's you... Do you have any business with me? I... might not be ready to talk with you just yet.

C: 展开讲讲…
E: Go on, tell me more...

C: 不过嘛，你也真是蛮特别的，刚才那一招，唔…让我再回味一下——强硬的力道，刁钻的角度，以及狠辣的技巧，简直是让我一眼就爱上的程度。
E: Though, you're pretty special. That move just now... Mmm, let me recall it again: A powerful stroke, a precise angle, ferocious technique, the kind that would make me fall in love at first sight.

C: 你听说过有位挑战彦卿骁卫的异星拳手叫卢卡吗？
E: You heard of Luka, that outworlder fighter who challenged Lieutenant Yanqing?

C: 那本小说可好看了！
E: That's a great book!

C: 洗油烟机～修理星槎～
E: Clean the cooker hood~ Repair the starskiff~

C: 仙舟真和平啊…
E: It's so safe and peaceful aboard the Xianzhou...

C: 运之于「道」。
E: This is Your Way.

C: 要是能计算犯罪概率…
E: If only you could divine crime statistics...

C: 要对技术有信心…
E: Have faith in technology...

C: 苏打豆汁儿是罗浮的特色，不得不品尝。
E: Mung bean soda is a specialty aboard the Luofu, and simply has to be tried.

C: 「流落异世拣到一方破壶，收纳灵田万亩，广厦千幢，且看我如何打破垄断成就地产大亨…」
E: "When I was wandering through strange lands, I chanced upon this cracked pot, which contains lands of countless residences. Watch as I beat the system to become a property tycoon..."

C: 我只是来做生意的…不过这下子，咱们这些外乡人也有份长生不老啦？
E: For me, it's just business... But now, us Outworlders can also become immortal?

C: 你别欺负我不懂文化。
E: Just because I'm not as cultured as you doesn't mean you can bully me.

C: 担心好你自己就行。
E: You should just care about your own affairs.

C: 最近我们店强推减肥药。
E: Recently, we've been promoting slimming pills.

C: 受龙尊敕命而起。
E: ...when the Lunarescent Depths parted with the high elder's command.

C: 嗯，就是他…不是童话，是几百年前的历史记载。我原以为他是无所不能的英雄，所以注定不会和我们一样生老病死…可没想到……
E: Yes, it's him... It isn't a fairy tale, but a historical event that took place centuries ago. I thought he was an invincible hero that was spared from illness and death. Little did I know...

C: 那不一样，我这是返璞归真，像我这样注重食材品质的老饕不多了！
E: You're missing the point. I'm just focusing on the basics. Nowadays, there aren't many gormandizers like me who cares about the quality of ingredients!

C: 同感。正如那践行时分，于明媚午后降落的一场太阳雨……
E: I feel the same. Just like during that Action Hour, when a sunshower fell on that bright afternoon...

C: 你认可「智识」命途吗？
E: Do you acknowledge the Path of Erudition?

C: 歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
E: Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.

C: 听你这么说，这一定是前世的*我们*教给你的话吧？
E: From what you're saying, I believe it was our past life selves who taught you that. Am I right?

C: 因为…奇拉拉想听荒笛大人和「开山者」大人从前的征战故事！听说那时候的大地兽凶猛善战，不光是像我这样的小奇美拉，连山之民都要小心它们的脾气呢。
E: Because... Chirara wants to hear Lord Terravox and Lord "Mountainbreaker" tell stories about their past battles! I heard that back then, the dromases were fierce warriors. It's not just little chimeras like me, even the Mountain Dwellers had to be wary of their temper!

C: 呵呵，我也很愿意与他结识一番，前提是…他对大地兽的爱并非「叶公好龙」呐！
E: Hehe, I'd love to get to know him too, but only if... his fondness isn't restricted to the mere concept of them, all talk and no substance!

C: 敬翁法罗斯！
E: To Amphoreus!

C: 到底喝了几杯？
E: How many cups did you have, exactly?

C: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
E: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

C: 你呢，飞宝？知道事故的前因后果，医师才能作出更准确的判断哦。
E: And you, Ciphie? A doctor needs the full story to make an accurate diagnosis.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 二位倒是都言之有理，但……
E: You both make fair points, but...

C: …嘶…还真是涩口哪。
E: Tch... quite the astringent bite.

C: 我苦练了四百年啊！
E: But I trained hard for <unbreak>400</unbreak> years!

C: 怎么看都是你自己做旧的吧？
E: It's just sloppily painted, no matter how I look at it!

C: 亲爱的，我一定拔得头筹。
E: My darling, I shall prevail.

C: 如果在仪典上拔得头筹！
E: If I prevail at the Wardance!

C: 打打杀杀有什么好看。
E: What's so interesting about violence...

C: 恐高提示已经足够多了，请问你是否还要向深处俯瞰呢？
E: I've warned you enough about the height. Do you still want to look down into the depths?

C: 「Woooh～」你仿佛听到了深处的回声。
E: "Woooh~" You seem to hear the echo from the depths.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 仙舟人称其为「四方览镜」——可它不就是个电子显示屏吗？
E: People in Xianzhou call it a Foursquare Mirror. Isn't it just an electronic display?

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 材质：金人
E: Materials: Aurumaton

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 饮茶会干部。
E: A Tea Society official.

C: 曾经有人把机械臂拼装星槎的视频放到网上，由于过程因极其解压而大受好评，登上了首页推荐——精确，稳定，可控，简直是心灵按摩。
E: Someone posted a video of a robot arm attached to a starskiff on social media. The whole DIY process was so de-stressing to viewers that it went viral and was trending on the homepage — precise, stable, controllable, like a massage for the soul.

C: 工造司的设计师说「要有炮塔」，于是炮台出现。工造司的设计师说「要有更多的炮塔」，于是更多的炮台出现。工程师说「还不够」，于是你看到了竞锋舰。
E: The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be turrets," and there were. The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be more turrets," and there were more. Then the engineers said, "It's not enough," and thus you see the Skysplitter.

C: 别以为我没有看见，做到位！
E: Don't think I'm not watching! Let's do it properly!

C: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
E: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.

C: 光站在那里就让人安芯。
E: It gives one peace just by standing there.

C: 你未来也要挑战彦卿。
E: You'll be challenging Yanqing in the future.

C: 状如巨大卷轴的蓝图——仙舟民能把任何东西设计成卷轴的样子。
E: The blueprint is in the shape of a gigantic scroll. The Xianzhou citizens are capable of turning anything into a scroll.

C: 「在反物质军团入侵高度文明的世界时，纳努克会优先派出铁墓『静默』其科技。」
E: "When the Antimatter Legion is invading a highly civilized world, Nanook will first dispatch Irontomb to nullify its technology."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 用于沙盘推演的全息投影。天舶司凭此物研究敌我双方动向，判断当前局势下的最优解。
E: It is the holographic projection used to display the sandpit simulations. The Sky-Faring Commission uses it to study the movement of allies and enemies and formulate the best plan for the current situation.

C: 咱家总算出了个大学生！
E: We finally have a college student in our family!

C: 咳咳，我爱我的母校！
E: Ahem, I love my alma mater!

C: 摇摆起来吧朋友们！
E: Let's rock on my friends!

C: 这是什么玩意？！
E: What the heck is this thing?

C: 就这样离开。
E: Walk away.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 然而比武时的一招疏忽，如一记毒辣的枪刺终结了这份期许。师弟技高一筹，将你击败。那柄演练用的枪头竟洞穿了你的胸口。
E: Nevertheless, one careless move in a match changes everything. Your junior outshines and defeats you in the match. Surprisingly, the spear used for training pierces through your chest.

C: 你决定不再理睬这只快递箱，转身离去。
E: You decide to leave the courier package alone.

C: 据说「尚滋味」燕翠师傅是以拳法闻名的厨师，以自己击败的星际猛兽入菜肴——你很好奇，是否该送她一张车票，让她登上列车与你同行。
E: Chef Yancui of Spices Supreme is supposedly famous for her fighting techniques, and she uses intergalactic beasts she has defeated in her food. You wonder whether you should get her a pass and let her join you on the Express.

C: 你的内心警铃大作（我猜的），因为这寄件人与收件人的名称格式，正是臭名昭著的「药王秘传」！
E: You suddenly feel a jolt of alarm (I guess?). Both the sender and recipient's names fit the format of the notorious Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 缭乱！我是你们的粉丝啊！
E: The Dazzling! I'm your fan!

C: 怎么都是你的自拍啊。
E: Why're they all your selfies?

C: 敢和岁阳谈合作，有胆识。
E: Cooperating with a heliobus, they've got some guts.

C: 「天舶司左侧停泊口办包年有积分，十年清空一次，记得兑换。」看得出来墓主生前是个热心人。
E: "The leftmost dock of the Sky-Faring Commission gives points to customers with an annual package. Points are cleared once every decade, so remember to redeem them." You can tell that the deceased was a kind-hearted person.

C: 早就跟你说过，我们付不起这么高的房费！我们已经没有信用点了！
E: I've told you, we can't afford such an expensive room fee! We're out of credits!

C: 这辆推车的主人不知去哪里享受了，只留冰淇淋孤零零地立在架子上——好在梦中的冰淇淋不会融化。
E: You're not sure where the owner of this cart ran off to relax, leaving the ice cream on the shelves all sad and alone. Luckily, ice cream doesn't melt in dreams.

C: 隐约间，你似乎听到积木们在低声啜泣。但当你想要仔细去听时，一切声音都消失了。
E: Very faintly, you seem to hear the blocks whimpering softly. But when you want to listen more closely, all sound has vanished.

C: 一扇紧锁的房门，门后传来轻微的电流声。直觉告诉你，强行打开这扇门可能会有坏事发生。
E: A subtle buzzing sound of electricity comes from the space behind the firmly locked door. Your instinct tells you that opening the door by force might lead to unthinkable consequences.

C: 这景色，还挺漂亮的…你知道，它不是虚假的幻影。
E: You know, this breathtaking view in front of your eyes... is definitely not an illusion.

C: 毕竟，栏杆尽头的远方是一片黎明。
E: After all, there is a dawn waiting at the end of the railing, visible in the distance.

C: 屏幕上显示出一些不太「常规」的网站入口，你不会想要点进去的。
E: A few strange web interfaces are shown on the screen. You don't really want to click into them.

C: 「啦啦啦…噜噜噜…啦啦啦噜！」小号的声音如同垂死女人的尖叫。
E: "Lalala... Doodoodoo... Lalaladoo!" A trumpet's sound screams like a dying woman.

C: 欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」。店主近期不在，营业时间另行通知。有事请留言。
E: Welcome to Dreamjolt Hostelry. The owner is currently away, and the business hours will be updated later. Please leave a message if you have any inquiries.

C: 我…我在这里工作！
E: I—I earn my living here!

C: 智慧生命拥有的情绪细腻、珍贵，但多数人没有意识到它危险的一面。世间所有罪行都源自情绪酝酿而成的冲动。
E: The emotions that sentient beings possess are delicate and precious, but most of us do not realize their dangerous side. All crimes in the world are driven by impulses that stem from emotions.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，锐利的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his sharp gaze piercing through your face.

C: 骂谁穷呢！嗯？要不是信了你们的鬼话，我至于沦落到给人打工吗！
E: Who are you calling poor!? If it weren't for your fancy talk, I wouldn't be stuck working for someone else!

C: 行呀。您想知道些什么呢？
E: Sure. What do you want to know?

C: 但是…呵，您肯定明白，每个人都有自己的使命和坚持。而我坚持的东西恰巧名叫「真相」。
E: But... Heh, you must understand, everyone has their own calling and tenacity. And mine is coincidentally fueled by the "truth."

C: 您已经知道我的秘密了…如果有一天我从梦境中永远地消失了，希望您也不要感到意外。
E: You already know my secret... If I forever disappear from the Dreamscape, I hope you will not be surprised.

C: 眼前的少女像株饱蘸了阳光的向日葵，落在你眼里的影子仿佛都在闪闪发亮。
E: The girl in front of you is akin to a sunflower embraced in sunlight, the shadow cast over your eyes seemingly shimmering.

C: 这只是必要条件！其余种族的幼童，制造的机械生命，或是因特殊情况而达到身高标准的…都不得进入！规则很清晰，别想在我这里钻空子。
E: That's just the minimum requirement! Children of other species, artificial mechanical lifeforms, or those who are under the height limit due to special circumstances... none of them may enter, either! The rules are crystal clear, so don't try and pull any funny stuff.

C: 等等…这不对劲。
E: Hang on... something isn't right.

C: 既然对方选择以冰原熊幼崽的模样示人，用相应的方法来接触肯定不会错。因此，你决定……
E: Seeing as they have chosen to display themselves as an arctic bear cub, it's not technically wrong to use a corresponding method of petting. Therefore, you decide to...

C: 呜呜伯自顾自地围绕你飘浮起来，速度越来越快，越来越快，直到……
E: The Wubbaboo minds its own business, hovering around you, circling faster, faster, and faster, until...

C: 带我走吧。
E: Take me with you.

C: 你是电视里那个…
E: Aren't you from that show on TV...

C: 是美梦，就要避免让里面的人被各种丧气事烦恼——你瞧，新闻在这里更像是一种「服务」，它的用处是增加大家的安全感和幸福感。
E: So in a sweet dream, people shouldn't be depressed by all kinds of troublesome things — just look, the news here is more like a kind of service with the express purpose of increasing everyone's sense of security and happiness.

C: 卡什女士哼唱起一段轻巧的旋律，和远处歌剧院飘来的乐声相得益彰。
E: Lady Cash hums a jaunty tune that harmonizes with the melody coming out of the theater in the distance.

C: 到最后，只有不会说话的道具能倾听我的诉说……
E: In the end, only voiceless props will listen to my grumbles...

C: 名誉、金钱、快乐…那些吸引我视线的东西，似乎哪样都没能握在手中。
E: Fame, wealth, happiness... all these things attract me, yet I can't seem to get hold of any of them.

C: 在我很小的时候，他们从公司旗下的孤儿院收养了我。毕竟单靠他们自己是无法生育的。
E: When I was a child, they adopted me from an IPC orphanage. After all, it's impossible for them to give birth to a child.

C: 可是出去的话，我又能做什么呢…真见鬼，我怎么会变成这副废物模样！
E: But what can I do if I leave... Darn, why did I become such a good-for-nothing!?

C: 他们为什么总是执着于解读？假如我的画作里没有值得他们分析的东西…那是不是代表着它们就一文不值了？
E: Why are they always so obsessed with interpreting it? If there is nothing in my paintings worth analyzing... does that mean they are worthless?

C: 如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 这么多年了，他走到哪儿，就把我带到哪儿…你看，就连在梦里他都没有抛下我。
E: Throughout the years, wherever he goes, he takes me along... Even in his dreams, he doesn't leave me behind.

C: 家族是梦境的缔造者和管理者，在匹诺康尼有着举足轻重的地位。
E: The Family is both the creator and administrator of the Dreamscape, and they are of decisive importance in Penacony.

C: 不过，最近我的艾迪恩代币不够了，所以…咳咳，你懂得。
E: But, I've been suffering a shortage of Aideen Tokens recently, so... *ahem* you know what to do.

C: 但随着这些年东奔西走，我渐渐明白，自己的人生未必非得绕着那条尾巴转悠。
E: But as I traveled across the lands over the years, I gradually understood that my lot in life didn't have to revolve around this tail.

C: 但现在，我终于能放下责任，用「普通人」的方式来对待钱了。
E: But now, I can finally lay down my duty, and treat money in the way that an ordinary person can.

C: 家族将这种东西放在街头，还好意思用音乐代表他们的虔诚…我真为他们感到羞愧。
E: The Family dares display these contraptions out on the streets, and they have the cheek to use music to convey their devotion... I feel ashamed on their behalf.

C: 朋友，你不知道这些东西会伤害多少人吗？他们不是乐器，是武器！是杀害艺术家的武器！
E: My friend, do you grasp the harm these things can bring to people? They're not musical instruments, they're weapons! Weapons that kill artists!

C: 布罗娜直勾勾地望着自动乐团，眼眸逐渐失神——她似乎被起舞的乐器夺走了灵魂。
E: Brona stares at the automated orchestra, her eyes slowly losing focus — her soul seems to have been hooked by the melodious instruments.

C: 给您推荐的那款新车怎么样，最近的销量挺不错，价钱也合理。您可以再考虑下。
E: How's the model that I recommended? The recent sales have been strong, and it comes at a reasonable price. It might be worth your consideration.

C: 欢迎光临！店里都是刚到的衣服，时尚潮流，款式齐全，您可以随意挑选。
E: Welcome! The store has a new season of arrivals, fashionable and stylish with an array of designs, take your pick!

C: 这些是近期颇受好评的单品，挑出来供您选购。
E: These are some of the bestsellers recently, I've picked them out for you to choose from!

C: 别那么没精神嘛~从现在起，我们就是共同进退的玩伴了！
E: Don't say it like that! From now on, we are ride-or-die party partners!

C: 再没有哪个地方比梦境更适合生活了。这里就是天堂，是抚慰人心的魔法泉。
E: There is no better place to live. This is paradise, and a magical spring that soothes our souls.

C: 什么人出身富贵，什么人白手起家，什么人是花架子——只消一眼，我就知道他是鱼目还是珍珠！
E: I can easily discern who's wealthy, who's not, and who's trying to show off! Just one glance, and I can tell whether they're a gem or a grain of sand!

C: …再说一遍？
E: ...Could you go over it again?

C: 愿您在这「美梦之城」玩得开心、玩得尽兴。
E: May you have fun and enjoy your stay in the City of Dreams.

C: 这就急着走了吗？不再看看店里的存货了？
E: Are you leaving now? Maybe you'd like to explore what's in the store?

C: 「可别*无名客粗话*再来一次了」——你内心如此念叨着。
E: You internally think to yourself "Please don't *Nameless profanity* let this happen again!"

C: 有些时候，我会被自己的情绪裹挟…甚至可能会忘记说话的礼仪。
E: I'll get so caught up in my emotions at times... that I might even forget about my manners when I speak.

C: 你盯着小鸟，誓要从它脸上挖出些许端倪。
E: You scrutinize the birdie, determined to catch some hints from its expression.

C: ——所以不如把它们都交给我！只要你能为我补充美梦能量，我也会给你准备丰厚的礼物的！
E: So, you might as well let me have them! As long as you can replenish my dream energy, I'll give you awesome gifts in return!

C: 唷嘿！真高兴能再次见到你，我的朋友！
E: Hi-ho! Nice to see you again, buddy!

C: 您与哪位「家族」成员预约了会面呢？
E: Which member of The Family did you schedule a visit with?

C: 倘若你有愧，便说出来吧。
E: If you have any guilt you carry, then speak.

C: 而且很多时候，仪式感也是必不可少的。退一万步讲，我至少可以代表自己原谅你啊。
E: And many times, ceremony is also an essential part of it. If nothing else, at least I can forgive you on behalf of myself.

C: 如此看来，她还是有一丝幽默感的…也许只是有些怕生？
E: At least she still has a sense of humor... Or maybe she's just somewhat uncomfortable with new people?

C: 好，我会始终在此，等待倾听你的心声。
E: All right. I'll be right here, waiting to listen to your heart's voice.

C: 啊啊啊，到底什么时候才能加入家族、见到真正的钟表小子啊？
E: Aaahhh, when will I get to join The Family and see the real Clockie?

C: 弹簧荷官？
E: Spring Loader?

C: 可实际上，如果失去了资本的支持与运作，所谓的「艺术」也不过是滞销的商品罢了。
E: But in reality, if we lost the support and management from corporations, our so-called "art" would be nothing but unsalable commodities.

C: 我的那位老朋友…他曾是我的向导、我的领路人，可最后…他反倒成了我前行的最大阻碍。我为此感到…遗憾。
E: That old friend of mine... He used to be my role model and mentor, but... he ended up becoming the biggest obstacle to my progress. I feel... regretful about that.

C: 结果后来，我在星际网络上搜到了一模一样的同款，就是一盘普通的磁带——才五百信用点不到！
E: In the end, I came across another cartridge that looked exactly the same on the Interastral network as the one I bought. It was just a regular cartridge worth less than <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits!

C: 喂喂，我的战甲可是装有反击电弧的，当心被烫掉手指头！
E: Hey, my armor comes with a counterattacking electric current. Be careful, or your fingers might be burned off!

C: 美梦小镇，滴答！美丽又和平的小镇，滴答！我和我的朋友们在这里快快乐乐、无忧无虑地生活着，滴答！
E: Dreamville, tick-tock! A beautiful and peaceful village, tick-tock! My friends and I live happy and carefree lives together here, tick-tock!

C: 星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
E: Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...

C: 虽然我听不懂那么高雅的东西，还半路睡着了，哈哈！但我真的非常高兴，滴答！
E: Although, I don't really understand such elegant things and I fell asleep halfway through, haha! But, I was really happy, tick-tock!

C: 给几顿剩饭，什么脏活累活都上赶着帮你做了…真是的，每次见了他，我心情都会变好不止一星半点——
E: Give him some leftovers and he'll come running to take care of your dirty work and chores... Seriously, every time I see him, I feel a lot better about myself.

C: 想了解关于你的事。
E: I want to know more about you.

C: 在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
E: To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.

C: 皮皮西笑话讲腻了，换成狗狗笑话也不错！我现场编一个啊。别急，在想了。
E: I'm bored with telling Pepeshi jokes, I am going to start telling dog jokes! I'll come up with one now... Just a second, I'm thinking.

C: 不过看它们现在过得还挺开心，希望这里的生活能长久持续下去吧。
E: But now they seem to be happy, so let's hope the life here will last long.

C: 有趣的爱情故事总能让人轻易沉陷其中，尤其是…怪物间的亲密关系。
E: Interesting love stories are always so easy to get immersed in, especially... intimate relations between monsters.

C: 黑爪女士一边递给你苏乐达，一边望向远方。她的嘴角扬起一丝不易察觉的笑意。
E: Lady Black Claw hands you the SoulGlad while gazing into the distance. A nearly imperceptible smile crosses her lips.

C: 我虽尚无法知晓「死亡」的真相究竟如何，但总有一天，我们终会回到彼此身边。
E: I may not know the truth behind "Death," but one day, we will return to each other's sides.

C: 回去好好检查你的账户吧，别以为我站在这什么都没做，你就能平安无事。超级骇客的手段总是出乎普通人的想象。
E: Go back and check over your account. Don't think that you're safe and sound just because I'm standing here doing nothing. Most super hacks are usually beyond the comprehension of normies.

C: 瞧瞧这些可笑的游艺设施，这也叫做挑战？我们朋克洛德的合家欢派对游戏比这有意思多了。
E: Just look at these ridiculous amusement facilities. Call that a challenge? Even the block parties on Punklorde are more fun than this.

C: 嗯…是骗你的。我能做到的，只有改变会场的光线而已。
E: Mmm... that was all a lie. All I'm good for is changing up the lighting at a venue.

C: 唉，我也想像站在聚光灯下，接受观众们的欢呼。但…那终究不是属于我的生活。
E: *sigh* I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on by the audience. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.

C: 当然没问题，你想问什么就只管说，就算是我不知道的，也可以帮你查……
E: Of course, no problem. Ask me anything you want. Even if I don't know the answer, I can help you check it out...

C: 这个嘛…来，深吸口气，你闻到了什么——苏乐达的味道，金钱的味道！
E: Oh, that... Come! Take a deep breath, and tell me: What can you smell? The scent of SoulGlad, the aroma of money!

C: 你知道吗，免费攻略这种东西，本身就是为爱发电的产物。我原本非常享受这种将所知信息汇总整理，推导出个相对正确的结论，然后分享给大家的过程。
E: You know, these free strategies of mine are a total labor of love. I just really enjoy this process of gathering all the information, proposing a probable hypothesis, and then sharing it with everyone.

C: ——然后你发现，发出那<unbreak>180</unbreak>分贝尖锐哨声的正是面前这位暴躁的智械女士。
E: ...before realizing that this piercing <unbreak>180</unbreak>-decibel scream is actually coming from the cranky Intellitron lady before you.

C: …算了，无伤大雅。只要能把活干好，你想怎么称呼我都行。
E: ...Whatever, no harm no foul. Call me whatever you like, as long as you get the job done.

C: 哈，你问了个好问题。
E: Hah, a fine question.

C: …好，决定了。不管梦境以后变成什么样子，我都会留在这里，非得把流梦礁建设成所有人都能自由生活的地方！
E: ...Alright. I've decided. No matter what the Dreamscape becomes in the future, I will remain here. I want to construct the Dreamflux Reef into a place where everyone can live freely!

C: 哎，美梦啊美梦…每个人都得穿上同一套精致的正装，遵守他们那套莫名其妙的规矩，不然就是没底蕴、没涵养。
E: Ah, this dream... Everyone must adorn themselves in the finest wear and follow these strange rules, or they're seen as uncultured and unrefined.

C: 马马虎虎啦，全是大家的功劳。
E: Sort of, everyone did their share.

C: 我来找你聊天了。
E: I'd like to chat.

C: 梦境对您来说意味着什么？
E: What does the Dreamscape mean to you?

C: 那么我就继续备课了。
E: Then I'll return to prepping for class.

C: 流梦礁的忆质都在朝向黑洞那端涌去……
E: The Dreamflux Reef's memoria is flowing toward the Black Hole...

C: 时间宝贵，请尽可能长话短说。
E: Time is precious. Please keep it concise.

C: 我也想见拉扎莉娜！
E: I want to meet Razalina too!

C: 况且现在居民也少了，自然清闲得多。要是今天你不来找我聊天，我肯定在和一帮老家伙下棋呢！
E: Besides, there aren't many residents now, so my job naturally becomes easier. If you hadn't dropped by here to chat with me today, I'd probably be engaged in a game of chess with a group of elderly folks!

C: 钟表小子会记得。
E: Clockie will remember.

C: 而我之后还有后人，后人亦有后人，如此往复，总有些故事能在梦中长存。
E: And there will be people after me, then more people will come after they have passed, and so forth. There will always be some stories that will live on in the dreams.

C: 以前在做什么？
E: What were you doing before?

C: 历史的悲怆之处正在于，无论有多么瑰丽，你能把握的也只有来者。
E: The pathos of history lies in no matter how magnificent it is, all we can grasp is what lies ahead.

C: 我的店员们，它们有着不同的来历、迥异的经历，但唯独有一样是共通的——大家都是优秀的乐手。
E: My staff all come from different places with different backgrounds, but they also all have one thing in common: Everyone is an outstanding musician.

C: 她用奇怪的眼神看着你，然后仿佛明白了什么……
E: She shoots you a strange look seeming to comprehend something...

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 看来人家也得表示一下呢，要好好珍惜这份礼物啾！
E: It appears I also have to express my gratitude. Please treasure this gift, tweet!

C: 美梦小镇的大家都是好人、好小鸟，虽然一个个脾气都古古怪怪的啾。
E: The folks in Dreamville are good people, good birds. Even if their tempers are eccentric, tweet.

C: 如果说美梦小镇里还有比人家更懂得「美」的鸟，那就非猫头鹰老师莫属了啾。
E: If there's anyone who knows "beauty" better than anyone in Dreamville, Professor Owl's the one and only expert, tweet.

C: 唔~客官您刚刚问过我那个孩子的去向啾？
E: Ooh, did you just ask me where that child went, tweet?

C: 原初的梦境充满了迷人的矛盾——岌岌可危中的安稳、荒芜破败下的生机、困窘狭缝里的自由……
E: The Primitive Dreamscape was filled with enchanting contradictions — peace amidst precarious predicaments, life beneath desolate destruction, freedom between the crevices of adversity...

C: 再见，愿你也能在此处找到诗意与浪漫。
E: Goodbye, may you also find the poetry and romanticism like I have here.

C: 今我离群独步、踽踽难断去留\n犹似行舟迷雾、前途未可筹谋
E: Now I walk alone, my steps not knowing to stay or go.\nHeld hostage by fogged hesitation, a future that cannot be fathomed.

C: 我自午夜美梦中惊醒，坠入愈深沉眠\n鸢尾花香随灯火暗淡，唯余清苦回甘
E: I startle awake from my twilight dream, descending into a deeper slumber.\nThe scent of iris fades with the light, leaving only the bittersweet.

C: 现在，许多世界已经开始慢慢接受苏乐达，苏乐达集团的销售额即将到达新的高峰！
E: Now, many worlds have slowly begun to accept SoulGlad. SoulGlad Enterprise's sales numbers are about to reach a new high!

C: 相似的包装、相似的口味、相似的广告词…法官如果不是盲人，就一定能看出来苏萨水就是个彻头彻尾的抄袭品牌！
E: Similar packaging, similar taste, similar tagline... Unless the judge is blind, it's so obvious Sousa Juice is a <unbreak>100%</unbreak> copycat of our brand!

C: 哎呀~你真调皮~
E: Ooh, you're so naughty!

C: 关于哈努兄弟…
E: About Brother Hanu...

C: 也不是不行，不过它的价格可不便宜……
E: I mean, you can have it, but it's not exactly cheap...

C: 不会要用星琼吧…
E: You can't possibly want Stellar Jades, do you...?

C: 在重新开口之前，他盯着你看了好一会儿。
E: He gazed at you for a long while before speaking again.

C: 说实话，被他们讨论来讨论去的那些…在这艘船上成真过的「怪癖」，倒也没什么值得恼火的。
E: Truth be told, the topics of their discussions are all strange "hobbies" that have occurred before on this ship. They're nothing to get irritated over.

C: 他似乎察觉到了你困惑的目光——的确，这根本不是什么值得恼怒的情况。
E: He seems to have noticed your confused gaze. Indeed, the situation that he is describing does not seem to be one that is worth getting exasperated over.

C: 可是我呢……
E: However, I...

C: 但此地不宜久留，你倒是清晰地感受到了。
E: What you do feel for sure is you shouldn't stay here for much longer.

C: 后面的事，为了您的心情着想，我还是不再复述了。
E: I'll spare you the details of what happened after that.
Watch. Three, two...

C: 此时你留恋的，并不是一口值千金的顶级牛排，而是母星一碗平平无奇的牛肉盖饭。」
E: "Now, what you crave most isn't the premium steak with the expensive price, but a humble bowl of beef rice from your home planet."

C: 呵呵～没办法，跟着我的狗仔队和粉丝那么多，谁知道你是不是他们的其中一员呢。
E: Heh, with so many fans and paparazzi on my tail, who's to say you're not one of them?

C: 公司派你来干什么的？
E: What did the IPC send you here for?

C: 这让我想起了我为什么会选择当律师——在复杂的世界中找到真相，然后利用这些真相为自己和客户赢得优势，这不是很有趣吗？
E: This reminds me of why I decided to become a lawyer: To seek out the truths in this complicated world, and use them to me and my client's advantage. Do you find that fun too?

C: 船长，我不是笨蛋！不要这样欺负我啦！请您好好看看我身上的画像——欺负我就约等于欺负您自己啊！
E: Captain, I'm not a fool! Don't bully me like this! Look at the portrait on me. If you bully me, it'll be just like bullying yourself!

C: 那你有考虑转行吗？
E: Have you thought of going into a new job?

C: 达夫摇晃杯身的动作流畅而自然，以至于让周遭的喧嚣都变得遥远。
E: Dahf moves effortlessly with his shaker, as though part of an orchestrated dance, making everything else in the surrounding fade into oblivion.

C: 冷芯，这是你新招的人吗？
E: Caldwick, is this the person you just recruited?

C: 我选塔塔洛夫！
E: I'll go with Tatalov!

C: 哎呀，瞧我这笨嘴，这几个都不是我的亲生孩子——我还没成家呢！
E: Ack, I should've been clearer! They're not actually my children, especially when I haven't started my own family!

C: 好的，但如果给您带来了不必要的困扰，请务必提醒我。
E: Alright, but if I cause any unnecessary inconvenience, please let me know.

C: 你不也还是大学生吗。
E: Aren't you still a university student?

C: 哟，看看，这不是我们匹诺康尼的股东嘛。来来，给你讲个好玩的事。
E: Yo, what do we have here? Aren't you one of Penacony's shareholders? Come, I'll let you in on something interesting.

C: 哼，之后再和他们算账，当务之急是想个法子混进去，我绝不接受我的派对全勤因为这种愚蠢的理由中断。
E: Hmph, I'll deal with them later. Right now, my top priority is finding a way into that party! I won't let my perfect party attendance record be ruined by such a lame excuse!

C: 我的派对有喝不完的麦芽汁，有人听你笑、陪你哭。一曲过后，一杯下肚，我们短暂忘却彼此的间隔，拥抱走失的自己，这世上便再无落单的灵魂。
E: At my party, malt juice flows without cease, where laughter and tears find their release. Let us sing and drink, let all gaps fade away. Embrace who we are, and no soul in the world is alone today.

C: 她的眼里总是映着理想，出身贫寒，双亲葬身于黑心的豆腐渣工程，却发奋苦读，誓为寰宇间穷苦的孩子们筑起安心的巢穴。
E: Her eyes always gleam with hope. Despite being born into poverty and losing her parents when their house collapsed due to unethical construction, she carved out a path in academia with tenacity. Now, she dreams of creating safe havens for underprivileged children.

C: 你问任何学生都只会得到相同的答案。每位学生只为自己的学院加油呐喊，这可是关乎学院荣耀的格拉克斯杯啊。
E: Ask any other student, and I'm sure you'll get the same answer. We're competing for the prestigious Glaux Cup, after all. Students are only going to cheer for their own academy.

C: 我当然清楚，自己在其他人眼里是什么评价。
E: Sure, I know how others think of me.

C: 你见过搞笑卡通片里，身高不够的小孩怎么开车吗？我就是那样完成比赛的——屁股下垫着三本百科全书，腿上绑着一根延长的木棍用来踩油门。
E: You've seen how children drive cars in cartoons when they're too short, right? That's how I was in the contest... I had three encyclopedias under me as a cushion and a wooden stick strapped to my leg to help me step on the gas pedal.

C: 纯粹的知识无法为他带来任何喜悦，只是他用以营生的工具、博得名利的踏板。
E: Pure knowledge brings him no joy. It is just a tool for him to make a living, a springboard for fame.

C: 出于对怪谈的敏锐嗅觉，我开始着手调查，但你猜怎么着？所有曾经的小猴粉丝都表现得——特别正常！
E: I have a very keen sense when it comes to ghost stories, so I began researching it. And do you know what I found? All of these people who were monkey fans all seemed... completely normal!

C: 就说那个电台绝对有问题，他们还不信…啊，抱歉，这件事有些危险，学校里很多人都中招了，所以我不打算邀请你一起调查。
E: I knew there was something wrong with that radio station. They still don't believe me... Ah, sorry, this matter is quite dangerous. Many students have already fallen victim. I will not invite you to help me investigate this one.

C: 属于我的音乐派对已经结束了，现在该专心准备毕业的相关事项。
E: My music party has already ended. It's now time to focus on the affairs concerning graduation.

C: 我早看出财富学院的那个代表不对劲，可我、我…我糊涂啊！
E: I knew something was off with that Fortune Academy representative, but I, I... I wasn't thinking straight!

C: 星际经济学、梦境产业分析、跨星系贸易基础…唉，这些艰深的理论我怎么读都读不懂，我都快怀疑自己是怎么考进来的了。
E: Interstellar economics, dreamscape industry analysis, intergalactic trade basics... *sigh* No matter how many times I pore through them, I can't understand any of these abstruse theories. I'm starting to doubt how I even managed to be enrolled in the first place.

C: 因为大家都写了，我们也算是同学一场嘛，就差你了。
E: Because everyone's already written in it, and we're classmates too. You're the only one left.

C: 提问：为什么罗刹可以出入无关人员不得进出的区域？答案：因为他是「有棺人员」。
E: Why does Luocha need to see a healer? Because of his coffin.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 能占卜一下风险吗？
E: Can you divine the risks?

C: 谢谢船长！没想到您的雕像看着威严，本人居然这么和善，还是个可爱的小年轻，难以置信！
E: Thank you, captain! Seeing how majestic your statue looked, I didn't expect you to be so friendly. It's completely unbelievable to me that you're such a cute youngster!

C: 船长您就收下吧，叨扰您这么久，就当是我们的一点心意！
E: Just take it, captain. It's just a little token of appreciation for bothering you for so long!

C: 我的脚悬在了空中诶~
E: My feet are standing on thin air~

C: 我用手机看了下，票已经卖光了。
E: I checked on my phone. The tickets have already sold out.

C: 让家族调节一下吧。
E: We should ask The Family to fix that.

C: 今天运气不错啊。
E: Today is a lucky day.

C: 说完了吗？
E: Are you done?

C: 现实里什么都没。
E: While I have nothing in reality.

C: 我为你买了全套潮玩！
E: I've bought you whole sets of trendy toys!

C: 队伍怎么不动了…
E: Why isn't the line moving...?

C: 那我随个薯条圣代。
E: Then I'll go for a Potato Fries Sundae.

C: 看开点，兄弟…
E: Look on the bright side, my friend...

C: 虽然这里有许多餐馆…
E: Despite all the restaurants around here...

C: 来杯草莓味机油吧。
E: Have a mug of strawberry-flavored machine oil.

C: 你在家族待这么久，都忘了自己是公司的人吗？还帮他们去做什么社区服务？
E: Have you worked for The Family so long that you've forgotten you're an IPC employee? And now you're even doing "community service" for them?

C: 光是能来到梦境，就已经证明了你的不平凡——真正的普通人既付不起房费，也不会收到邀请。
E: The fact that you're here in the Dreamscape proves you're extraordinary. Real ordinary people can't afford a room and won't get invited.

C: 赌狗赌狗，赌到最后，一无所有。
E: Foolish bets will lead to empty pockets.

C: 啊…这就是有机生物特有的美吗…毛茸茸、软乎乎……
E: Ah... Is this the beauty unique to organic organisms... So fluffy and warm...

C: 所以，我们现在是那种关系了吗？
E: So... Are we buds now or what?

C: 咱们都等了多久了，他人呢？连个影子都没见着。
E: How long has it been, where is he? There's no sign of him anywhere!

C: 这次也没能…
E: Not this time either...

C: 我想请那两位来演这部剧。
E: I'd like to cast those two in this series.

C: 您有什么想对观众说的吗？
E: do you have anything you want to tell the audience?

C: 当时我不是正好摔跤了嘛，感觉头很疼就取消了游泳计划。
E: I had a splitting headache after slipping, so I canceled any plans to swim.

C: 这小哥是个实诚人，之前那么大的响动居然还不嫌弃我，给我搭了把手。
E: This lad is an upright one. He didn't loathe me even after such a huge commotion and even gave me a hand.

C: 哎，您有所不知。之前不是紧急疏散嘛，他说他对晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号有感情，就一直坐在这儿弹琴，大家拉都拉不动，还好没出事……
E: *sigh* You don't even know. Previously, we had an emergency evacuation, but he said he's developed such an attachment to the The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand, that he just sat there and played the piano. No one could pull him away, but luckily nothing bad happened...

C: 吃饱了吗？
E: Did you eat your fill?

C: 就没个皮皮西专用款？
E: Are there no Pepeshi-only designs?

C: 也就翻了三倍吧！
E: Only threefold, that's it!

C: 真的会爆吗？
E: Will it really explode?

C: 一个小悖论：越脏的人越需要洗澡，越干净的人越不需要洗澡。因此越常洗澡的人越脏，越不常洗澡的人越干净。
E: Here's a little paradox: the dirtier a person is, the more they need to shower, while the cleaner a person is, the less they need to shower. Therefore, the ones who shower most often are the dirtiest, and those who shower less frequently are the cleanest.

C: 电脑机箱组全天候待机，等待着你的来临。识别到你虹膜的注视，它在你接近前便早早解锁开机。
E: The computer case is always on standby, waiting around for your arrival. It unlocks and powers on as soon as it detects the gaze of your irises.

C: （启动游戏）
E: (Start Game)

C: 该休息了。
E: It's time to rest.

C: 「滴~答~{NICKNAME}！早上好！美梦小镇新的一天开始了~」
E: "Tick~ tock~ {NICKNAME}! Good morning! A new day has begun in Dreamville~"

C: （捏捏它的鼻子）
E: (Squeeze its nose)

C: 是啊。阿斯忒里翁、欧斐摩斯、卡斯托尔、波鲁克斯、还有最强壮的赫拉克勒斯——个顶个的好名字。
E: Exactly. Asterion, Euphemus, Castor, Pollux, and the mightiest of them all, Heracles — all solid names.

C: 为何选择在陶罐上作画？
E: Why did you choose to paint on dolia?

C: 瞧瞧，我们店里织布用的白麻都是生命花园培育的新品种，既柔软又透气，垂感还特别好。来，摸摸看——是不是像蝴蝶一样轻盈！
E: Check this out! The white linen we carry is a new variety grown in the Garden of Life. It's soft, breathable, and drapes like a dream. Here, feel it! It's light as a butterfly, isn't it?

C: 我不会也被扔出去吧？
E: You won't throw me out too, will you?

C: 你的口腔被肉桂强势的辛香所席卷，肉排残余的油脂被一扫而空；但蜂蜜的香甜与苹果的清甜转瞬又让这味道变得柔和起来，成为一种若有似无的余韵。
E: The spiciness of cinnamon gives a sharp kick, cleansing any lingering greasiness from the lamb. But the pleasant combination of honey and apples instantly softens the experience, leaving a lingering aftertaste.

C: 「米的妮丝，我遭您擅场红补，蛮铃把这些乱恰凹的嗯字缝起哎吧！」
E: "Melody, I know you're greet at twitching, good you grease phoenix these rumbled worlds?"

C: 谢谢你哦。
E: Thank you.

C: 感谢您使用我们的服务！请为我们的服务打分：
E: Thank you for using our service! Please rate our service:

C: 有些人不是很友好。
E: Some people here seem a bit unfriendly.

C: 啊，异乡人，你好，吃了吗？
E: Ah, it's you, outlander. Have you eaten yet?

C: 以前，瑟希斯的信众，会来找我，教我怎么做菜，对身体好。
E: Cerces' disciples would come to me in the past. They told me how to cook food that is healthy for the body.

C: 《逐火者之歌》
E: Epic of the Flame-Chaser

C: 评价一下我的衣品！
E: Please rate my clothing!

C: 以我所见，阁下的仪态十分「美丽」…这并非讽喻或奉承，服装审美有高低之别而无美丑之分，穿衣之人则有美丑之分而无高低之别。
E: I can see that you are a person of "fine" bearing, {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}. This is no satire or flattery. The disparities of aesthetics lie in the choices of clothing, not the wearers, while the differences of beauty are among the wearers, not their choices of clothing.

C: 塞纳托斯在上，请指引我家人的魂灵……
E: Thanatos above, please, guide the souls of my family...

C: 那一箭，射穿了它的眼睛…不对，是心脏……
E: That arrow, it pierced its eye... No, it was its heart...

C: 行啊，给我一样东西吧，作为占卜道具，同时也是事后的报酬。
E: Very well, then give me an item. This item will be used for your divination and also kept by me as payment.

C: 身为侍者，我需要去调解一下，能请您暂时留在这里，帮我照看一下东西吗？
E: As an attendant, it is my duty to go and settle this. Could I ask you to stay here and keep an eye on things for me?

C: 如果能跟随着一股洪流，做一个体验前所未有时代的冲浪者——那就简直是世界上最伟大的冒险了呀！
E: To be a surfer that rides the waves of a great torrent to experience an unknown era... That could be the greatest adventure this world has to offer!

C: 这些都是战场上用鲜血换来的经验，务必认真对待。
E: All of my experience is earned at the cost of blood spilled on the battlefield. My words are to be taken very seriously.

C: 吉奥里亚，是怎样的泰坦？
E: What kind of Titan is Georios?

C: 原来加了魔法！
E: So it's enchanted with magic!

C: 悬锋人的武器，大多如此。万敌，不同。
E: Mostly like that, Kremnoan weapons are. Different, Mydei's is.

C: 再会，勇士。祝福你，大地。
E: Farewell, warrior. Bless you, the earth does.

C: 靠近它。
E: Get close to it.

C: 你很能打。那天见过。表达感谢。
E: You're strong. Saw it that day. Appreciate.

C: 我们从未见过刻法勒的真身，却笃定它为奥赫玛支撑起了天地；我们不理解欧洛尼斯的话语，却执着相信命定的预言；我们都未经历过死亡，却假定塞纳托斯的存在。
E: We have never seen the true form of Kephale, yet we are certain that they support the world for Okhema. We do not understand the words of Oronyx, yet we stubbornly believe their prophecy. We have never experienced death, yet we assume the existence of Thanatos.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」必然存在</color>，否则当我们谈论「阿卡索斯」的时候，为何能理解彼此想表达的内容？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Icatus" must exist</color>. Otherwise, when we discuss "Icatus," how could we possibly understand what each other is referring to?

C: 缺乏证据，只能推导出命题不能被证实，却无法证伪该命题。你该回去再跟着老师学学逻辑课了。
E: If there is a lack of evidence, the only possible deduction is that the proposition cannot be verified, but it also cannot be falsified. You should head back for more logic classes with your teacher.

C: 不错。异乡的智者果然精通辩论，你成功抓住了这番话里的薄弱环节，但还没有彻底击倒我。我将继续我的论证。
E: Not bad. You excel in the art of debate — as expected, wise one from outlands. You have successfully grasped the weaknesses within my assertions. However, you have not completely refuted my argument. Allow me to continue my point.

C: 是啊，我知道悬锋城有不少坏家伙，伤害了很多其他的城邦…但也有很多好人！像万敌哥哥和他的孤军，愿意保护我们……
E: Yeah, I know there are plenty of bad folks in Castrum Kremnos who've caused harm to many other cities... but there are also a lot of good people! Like Mydei and his detachment, who are willing to protect us...

C: 多谢惠顾，欢迎下次光临~
E: Thank you for your visit, and we look forward to seeing you again next time~

C: 能开心活着也挺好的。
E: Living happily is good enough for me.

C: 算了，既视感不是重点。
E: Forget it, that feeling's not the point.

C: 不是…为啥就咱们这么特殊啊，也没见其它学派有过什么入门考核…那个投石索也太难扔了吧……
E: That's not what I mean... Why do we have to do this? I never saw any entrance exams for the other Schools... And that sling is way too heavy to swing...

C: 为什么管石榴汁叫鲜血？
E: Why do you call pomegranate juice fresh blood?

C: 我才不给你！
E: I'm not handing this over!

C: 「对了，我给它加的那些小功能你发现没？别看它害羞，其实挺爱唱歌的，就是不好意思在人前表演。」我爱唱歌？没有！没有这回事！别听他瞎说。
E: "Notice any new functions I added? It might seem shy, but it's actually quite fond of singing, just too bashful to perform publicly." Me, love singing? No way! Ignore that, he's full of nonsense.

C: 看看其他人的留言。
E: Let's see what messages others have left.

C: 手头确实还有活没干完，那我接着维护军备了。
E: There's still work to be done. I'll get back to maintaining the armaments.

C: 可是…那可是女神们的祭司，是人神沟通的桥梁…如此神圣的大人真的会因为这种理由欺骗我吗……
E: But... He is a priest of the Goddesses, the bridge between the mortal and divine worlds... Do you really think that such a holy person would scam me just to steal a necklace...?

C: 当然，这些话咱们私下说说就算了，你可千万别传出去，影响不好。
E: But let's keep this conversation between us. It wouldn't be right to spread such personal reflections.

C: 那时候，偷窃神殿供品可是重罪。但当时的圣女大人不仅没有惩罚她，问清事由后还给了她满满一大包的小甜饼，让她平安回家了。
E: Back in those days, stealing from the temple was considered a grave offense. However, the Holy Maiden at the time chose not to punish her. After listening to her plight, she even gave my mother a bag full of sweet treats, allowing her to return home safely.

C: 哦，没关系。最近是多事之秋…您也要多注意安全。
E: Oh, that's alright. These are tumultuous times... Take care and stay safe.

C: 抱歉，我只是路过。
E: Sorry, I was just passing through.

C: 不要把我跟那些小偷混为一谈，我是塔兰顿的信徒，贪赃徇私的事我绝不做！再说，我自己也压根不缺钱，根本不会为了生计而偷窃！
E: Don't lump me in with those thieves. I am a disciple of Talanton, and I would never engage in corruption! Besides, I'm not short on money, so I wouldn't steal to make ends meet!

C: 看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！
E: It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Little Gray. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!

C: 见钱眼开的赛飞儿。
E: Money-crazed Cipher.

C: 凡人弑神，真的假的？
E: Mortal slaying gods — could that really be true?

C: 它不只是你的敌人。
E: They are not just your enemy.

C: 万敌…真令人刮目相看。
E: Mydei... is truly impressive.

C: 没错，之前我是那刻夏老师的学生。不知道您是否了解那刻夏老师，作为老师他人是挺好的，可就是说…他的课程没法转化为专业技能……
E: That's right. I studied under Professor Anaxa. Not sure if you've heard of him — he's a good person and a decent teacher, but... his courses don't exactly translate into practical skills...

C: 你是做什么生意的？
E: What kind of business are you in?

C: 「创作要付出真情实感？」那好像是小孩子们识字课本上就有的要求。
E: "Write with genuine emotions?" That's something kids learn from their first reading lessons.

C: 不打扰你思考创意了。
E: Well, I'll leave you to your creation.

C: 抱歉，我又说了这么多。初次见面就这样喋喋不休，希望没让你觉得困扰，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照耀你前行的路。
E: Sorry for rambling so much. I hope it didn't trouble you. May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s light guide your way forward.

C: 当然，侍奉它的远不止我一位祭司，我与同僚们分工合作，共同侍奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}。
E: Of course. I'm not the only one who serves {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. My colleagues and I work together, fulfilling our respective roles.

C: 你的另一只手里也多了一把硬币。
E: Now you also have a handful of coins in your other hand.

C: 祭仪究竟是什么？
E: What exactly are rituals?

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者重视荣誉。金丝带来消息，它正率领着忠实的仆从<color=#dbc291ff>飞天坛递</color>践行求索之旅，追寻着真理的足迹呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver values honor. The golden thread brings news that it is leading its loyal servant, the <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, on a journey of discovery that follows the footsteps of truth.

C: 但是，风堇小姐已经把昏光庭院托付给我了。
E: But Miss Hyacine has entrusted the Twilight Courtyard to me.

C: 抛下一切，迎来新的世界——我求而不得。
E: To abandon everything and welcome a new world, that is a wish I can never attain.

C: 哎…是您呀，有空再来听利波吟唱一曲吗？
E: Ah... it's you. Care to come back sometime and hear Lipos sing a song?

C: 唉…实不相瞒，作为一个自认合格的「扎格列斯信徒」，我始终都被自己的好奇心牵着鼻子走。
E: Ah... Truth be told, as a self-proclaimed follower of Zagreus, I'm forever led by my insatiable curiosity.

C: 连听到「神谕」这样的巧合，也是因为天父心怀仁慈，愿意让我怀抱着希望，并把希望传递给大家……
E: Even hearing the prophecy was sky father's mercy – letting me cradle hope and pass it onward...

C: 你也配对我指手画脚？我刚修剪过指甲，所以上次理发掉了不少头发。你要是惹我，可算是踢到了大地兽！
E: You dare lecture me? My trimmed nails caused hair loss during last haircut. Provoke me, and I'll show you the wrath of a dromas!

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，回应你的子民啊…为何弃我们于黑暗？我曾为你献上无数祭品，日夜诵念祷词…可如今，你在哪里？
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, answer cries of your people! Why have you left us in darkness? I have offered I have offered, prayed day and night... but where are you now?

C: 我曾在元老院面前大言不惭地宣扬祭仪的力量，号召人们跟随我的指引，但现在只剩下这片废墟和无尽的疑问……
E: There was a time when I preached before the Council of Elders about ritual power, demanding others follow my guidance. Now all I have are ruins and endless questions...

C: 例如雅努萨波利斯！虽然黑潮四伏，但它们肯定对我这些破玩意儿不感兴趣。
E: Like Janusopolis! Sure, it's swarming with the black tide, but they definitely won't care about my old junk.

C: 嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，希望逃遁进另一个世界呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, hoping to escape into another world.

C: 嗯…有位织者因亲族失散而心怀不安。金丝带来消息，它就在<color=#dbc291ff>我们身边</color>，希望你的到来能带给它安慰。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver feeling uneasy because of losing contact with their family. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>near us</color>, hoping your arrival will bring them comfort.

C: 嗯…有位织者践行职责千年之久。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>通往天空的大门</color>前守候，是时候唤它回到我们之间了。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has carried out duties for a thousand years. The golden thread brings tidings: They are waiting at the <color=#dbc291ff>gate to the sky</color>. It's time to call them back to our midst.

C: 嗯…有位织者登高望远。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>能看到彩虹桥的悬台上</color>，感慨于景色的壮观呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is looking far and wide. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a suspended platform where one can see the Rainbow Bridge</color>, marveling at the breathtaking view.

C: 嗯…有位织者独自踏上了求索之旅。金丝带来消息，它正沿着<color=#dbc291ff>纹路光带</color>前行，不知它又会有怎样的体悟呢？
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who embarked alone on a journey of seeking. The golden threads brought news, it is now following a <color=#dbc291ff>patterned light band</color>. I wonder what kind of enlightenment it will find this time?

C: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
E: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

C: 等我离开村庄后…
E: Once I leave the village...

C: 我还有事，回见。
E: I've got to run. See you around.

C: 说好了，这是我们之间的小秘密，你可别提前告诉她哦！
E: Pinky promise! It's our super-duper secret. Don't spoil the surprise!

C: 太生气了，迷！我让妖精们间隔一段时间就给田地间浇些水，它们竟然说我异想天开。
E: I'm furious, memi! I told the fairies to water the fields regularly, and they called me a delusional dreamer!

C: 桌上不是很宽敞嘛？
E: And that table's plenty big!

C: 还有多久？
E: Are we there yet?

C: 唔…睡得好沉……
E: Mmm... that was a long nap...

C: 别担心。这一路走来，没什么能难倒{NICKNAME}，对不对？人家都看在眼里，相信我吧。
E: Hey, nothing has been able to stop you so far, right? I've witnessed your journey and I have faith in you.

C: 从一介学子晋为导师，再成为教授、最后当上贤人，似乎都是顺其自然的事情。
E: Rising from student to mentor, then professor, and finally sage... it all unfolded as if destined.

C: 海、海…嗝…当然是海瑟音大人！海洋的守护者，我等唯一当侍奉的半神——
E: The—*hic*—the sea... of course, it's Lady Hysilens! Guardian of the tides, the only demigod worthy of our devotion—

C: 不能重复拨号喀。
E: Stop redialing, crrk.

C: 也可能，是我的心已经不复年轻了迷……
E: Or maybe... it's just that my heart is no longer as young as it used to be, mem...

C: 为了时刻提醒自己寻觅它的使命，我就以它为名了。是不是很好听迷？
E: To keep my mission of finding it close to heart, I took its name as my own. It sounds lovely, doesn't it, mem?

C: 什么！瑟希斯听完都要枯了！菜品不考虑外观却注重味道？这不是本末倒置吗！
E: What!? Cerces would wither just hearing you say that! Placing the priority in a dish on flavor over appearance? Do you not think that's backwards?

C: …真是伤脑筋，说了又不听。
E: ...What a headache. He never really listens.

C: 怎么会？我明明听大人们说，什么池的硬币会收集起来献给法吉娜。
E: Why? I clearly heard the grown-ups saying that all the coins from the pool are collected and offered to Phagousa.

C: 人如其名…多美呀。
E: You're as beautiful... as a fleeting butterfly.

C: 都是阿格莱雅玩剩下的。
E: Aglaea went through all these styles ages before.

C: 猫头鹰老师最爱讲这五只折纸小鸟的故事：黄金公子、赤红大哥、草绿经理、妃色夫人、湛蓝爵士…所有小鸟都是听着这些名字长大的啾。每次提到他们，老师都可骄傲了啾。
E: Professor Owl loves telling the story of the five origami birds: Young Master Gold, Boss Red, Verdant Manager, Lady Vermilion, and Dr. Blues... All the birds grew up hearing these names, tweet. Each time they are mentioned, the Professor's always beams with pride.

C: 为什么会选择研究珍稀物种
E: What made you study rare species?

C: 希望你可以独立地认识我，不要和其他人一样，老是把我和那个女人扯上关系。
E: I hope you can get to know me as an independent individual, instead of associating me with that woman, like everybody else.

C: 还是关于莱斯莉。
E: Still about Lesley.

C: 不过，不过应物科工作繁忙，你就算不相信，也别去打听了。省得给我们添麻烦。
E: Anyway, the Department of Implement Arts is very busy. Don't ask around even if you don't believe me. Save us some troubles.

C: 之后或许我还需要联络一些密卷科的老同事，一起想办法转录一些材料。只有存放在大脑里的东西，或许才是最长久的吧。
E: I may have to contact some ex-colleagues to transcribe some of the files. Things stored in our heads last the longest.

C: 你的时尚品味很赞。
E: You have great fashion sense.

C: 心脏爆炸了，世界就毁灭了！
E: The heart's exploding! The world is ending!

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 您这就冤枉人了——我们放着前景大好的黎明机器灯罩不做，搞起现在的买卖，不就是为了让两位的英雄事迹广为流传嘛！
E: Now that's not fair. We gave up making the promising Dawn Device lampshades to start this business, and it's all to spread the word about your heroic deeds!

C: 哈哈，这个我作证。咱们老费贝尔可是那届唯一一个见过所有导师的学生家属。
E: Haha, I can vouch for that. Old Fabio here was the only parent in that student cohort who met every single teacher.

C: 别唉了！这不是告诉你们了吗？
E: How many times do I have to tell you!? Stop sighing!
Grumphhhhh—

C: 我还没吃呢！我是在惊讶，你已经认识我了？
E: I haven't eaten yet! I was just surprised you already knew who I was.

C: 该享受漫长的假期啦。
E: Time to enjoy a long vacation!

C: 下次再来看你。
E: I'll come see you next time.

C: 外面的世界好玩吗？
E: Is the world out there fun?

C: 千万不要告诉村长，我都不想回迷境去了迷。
E: Please don't tell the village chief, but I almost don't want to go back to the Maze anymore, mem.

C: 呵呵，没问题。你的身材匀称，无论穿什么都很精神。这是来自织者的判断，并非客套的场面话。
E: Hehe, no problem. You have a well-proportioned figure, which looks great in anything you wear. That's a weaver's professional judgment, not just empty flattery.

C: 祝你们创业顺利。
E: Good luck with your startup!

C: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
E: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

C: 不如，尝试教些其他课程吧！
E: Maybe we could try teaching different classes!

C: 我也还没亲眼见过白厄阁下穿黄戴紫的模样，的确很好奇呢。
E: I haven't seen Lord Phainon dressed in yellow and purple either. I'm quite curious indeed.

C: 那么，我有一个建议，为了胃部健康，等看完白厄的时装搭配再吃饭吧。
E: Well, I have a suggestion: for the good of your stomach, let's eat after we've seen Phainon's outfit.

C: 只有像她那样的人才配得上星穹列车——我是这么想的——姬子一定有个非常重要的梦想，构成了她整个人生的愿景。
E: Only someone like her is worthy of the Astral Express. I think Himeko's vision of her whole life revolves around... a very important dream.

C: 把她封进六相冰里的人…不论是谁…要么是为了保护小三月，要么就是为了放逐她。我觉得，那块冰在宇宙中漂流的时间应该很久了。
E: Whoever sealed her inside the Six-Phased Ice... No matter who it is... did so either to protect or banish her. I believe she had been floating through space for some time.

C: 冒险故事就是会有吸引力。
E: Adventure stories are indeed fun to read.

C: （原来是在这里，看来是这把椅子挡住了尾随者。）
E: (So here it is. This chair seems to have blocked the person from view.)

C: （既然在这里捡到了缺失的书页，那么跟货箱、货架有关的谜题就在前面吧…）
E: (Since the missing pages were found here, the riddles about the crates and shelves should be up ahead...)

C: 道理很简单，像我刚才说的那样操作控制器，道岔上原本并不相连的轨道就接在一起了。
E: The principle is very simple. Operate the controller like I just told you, and the disconnected tracks on the turnout will then be connected together.

C: 行，有什么事就随时问啊！
E: Great, come find me if you have any questions!

C: 来，这是这道谜题的报酬——然后是下一道题……
E: Here you are, your reward for this puzzle — and onto the next one...

C: 滴、答！知道我是谁吗？我是钟表小子…不对，我就是未来的梦主，还不快快给我行礼！
E: Tick, tock! Do you know who I am? I'm Clockie... Wait, I'm the future Dreammaster! What're you waiting for? Pay your respects!

C: 看时间？
E: To tell the time?

C: 在那场骚乱中，各舱段的主控系统也因为爆炸产生的脉冲瘫痪了，我的工作就是协助修复这些设备，确认空间站的网络安全。
E: During the riot, the main control system for each module was paralyzed by the explosion. My job was to provide support for repairing these devices, and ensure network security of the space station.

C: 「但《太空大战争》是个多人协作游戏，只靠我一人玩不下去，还得有朋友才行，越多越好。我正发愁呢，没想到有人自己送上了门。」
E: "But Cosmic Warfare is a multiplayer co-op game, so I can't play it alone. I need friends to play it — the more the merrier. I was just worrying about this, and never expected the answer to fall right into my lap."

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 不，你去工作室肯定找不着他。他平生最痛恨的就是闭门造车——但凡有机会，他是一定会出门写生的。
E: No, I'm sure he won't be there. He hates doing his work in isolation. If possible, he will definitely paint outdoors.

C: 好名字！
E: A great name!

C: 现在，我要想办法在有限的时间内再赶出一幅同样的画了…有缘再见，陌生人！
E: Now then, I have to figure out a way to put together another painting before my deadline... May we meet again, stranger!

C: 这次，我希望你能够帮忙收集<color=#dbc291ff>「自动机兵•蜘蛛」</color>的机体数据……
E: This time around, I hope you can help us retrieve some data from <color=#dbc291ff>Automaton Spider</color>...

C: 不不不，我也是刚知道这事…
E: Oh, it's nothing, I was here anyway...

C: 重点描述「性格转变」吧。
E: Emphasize on her change in personality.

C: 我确定。
E: I'm sure about it.

C: 看看娜塔莎的简历。
E: Check out Natasha's resume.

C: 看看希儿的简历。
E: Check out Seele's resume.

C: 太厉害了……
E: This is awesome...

C: 他们凭借自身的本领，为这座城市重拾了希望——在他们的帮助下，贝洛伯格的居民这才重新得见晴朗的天空，这才得以重新走进无际雪原，探索全新的天地。
E: With their own abilities, they brought solace and aspiration back to the city. With their help, Belobogians were finally able to see the clear skies once again, and were inspired to revisit the boundless snow plains to explore a whole new world.

C: 有点意思，还有后续吗？
E: Interesting. Is there any more?

C: 我看看…不错嘛，{NICKNAME}，你很有摄影天赋诶。
E: Let me see... Not bad, {NICKNAME}. You've got quite the knack for photography.

C: 再拍一张。
E: Take another photo.

C: …你想起来了，在危险拍摄的过程中，你被行驶中的叮叮车撞到了路边。
E: ...You suddenly recall that during a dangerous photo-taking session that you got hit by a moving tram.

C: 看你拿着相机，是想要记录虎克大人的英姿吗？那就尽情拍吧，这是你救下虎克的奖赏！
E: That's a nice camera. Do you want to capture the mighty figure of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great? Go ahead, that's your prize for saving me!

C: 什么嘛，你到了长乐天都还没有去过金人巷吗？
E: Wait, you've been to Exalting Sanctum before but you never visited Aurum Alley?

C: 才刚来，还谈不上喜欢。
E: It's my first visit here, I can't say yet.

C: 哎！豆汁？呃，不、不用了！唉，好吧。谢谢高阿姨。
E: Huh!? W—Wait, Auntie, I—I'm not thirsty, please... *sigh* Thank you, Auntie...

C: 然后为拖欠租金的日期数字给我响响亮亮地磕头，向代表公司的我道歉啊！
E: Better yet — get down on your knees and beg for forgiveness!

C: 按照现在的情况来看，金人巷码头经营不善，暂时还不上租金。
E: As things stand now, the Merchant Guild is in no position to pay back the lease.

C: 是啊，虽然金人巷的每一寸土地都在，但属于它的味道、它的游客，还有大家对它繁荣景象的记忆都将不复存在了。
E: Correct. The physical space will still exist, but the Aurum Alley we all know — its fragrances, its bustling tourists — will be nothing more than a memory.

C: 你好，我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: Hi, I'm {NICKNAME}!

C: 公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
E: The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.

C: 斯科特代表垂头丧气地离开码头。
E: Skott leaves the dock with his head hanging low.

C: 我有事要找金人巷商会商议，不过，你们先说吧。
E: I also have something I wish to discuss with the Merchant Guild, but I'll wait for you to finish.

C: …我读书少，你可别骗我！真的是这样的吗？
E: ...Ugh, historical data isn't my forte. You better be telling the truth!

C: 我们是为了金人巷而奔走？
E: Everything we do is for Aurum Alley?

C: 材料我都确认过一遍了。
E: I've looked over everything.

C: 这能说明什么？请不要浪费时间。
E: What am I looking at? Please don't waste our time.

C: 先是怒怼公司代表，现在又让会长哑口无言，{NICKNAME}你好厉害。
E: First challenging an IPC rep, and now winning over the president of the guild! {NICKNAME}, you're pretty good!

C: 等到公司拿下金人巷之后，希望大家还能聚在一起复兴金人巷。
E: When the IPC wins the bidding, I'm sure we can continue to work together for a brand-new Aurum Alley.

C: 霄翰看上去信心满满，还是把交锋留在谈判桌上吧。
E: Xiaohan seems pretty confident. You should save the confrontation for when the debate begins.

C: 这是金人巷商会和尚滋味一起做的联动活动。
E: We organized a crossover between the Merchant Guild and Spices Supreme.

C: 我才不要什么都不做干等着，我先回金人巷了，再会！
E: Anyway, no point in standing around here worrying. I'm heading back to the Alley. Talk to you soon!

C: 想起来，最开始我只是想「日行一善、急人所急」而已，没想到，我们竟然做了这么多……
E: "Be eager to help those in need and do one good deed a day..." I like to practice what I preach, but I never thought we'd accomplish so much.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 我踩你脚了？
E: Did I step on your foot?

C: 放心老爷，都是正规正经的货物。
E: Relax, these are perfectly authentic goods.

C: 谈不上是疑虑吧，阿姨就是有一些小小的请求……
E: I wouldn't call them concerns, more like a small request.

C: 这种话不要当着我的面说呀…
E: Don't say that kind of thing around me...

C: 没有电子菜单让客人点吗？
E: Can't customers order digitally?

C: （听说过美馔阁的客人不少，但是没想到会有这么多……）
E: (I knew Delicacy Pavilion was popular, but I never thought there'd be this many people...)

C: 紫芋扣肉来一份。
E: One purple taro with pork.

C: 豉油蒸鸡，不要香菜。
E: Steamed soy sauce chicken. No coriander.

C: （罗盘归位的话应该就会招来豺狼吧……）
E: (When the compass resets, it will attract those jackals...)

C: 而一些更加高档的服装店里，专业的裁缝要给客人量体裁衣，给出对应的设计，就是所谓「客制运单」——根据客户的需求进行特别的定制，以满足其需要。
E: But in fancier stores, they have professional tailors take your measurements to make suits tailored just for you — those are "custom orders." In short, we need to customize our services to meet the unique needs of our customers.

C: 你好，我自己会飞，你给我带个路就行。
E: Hello, I can fly. Just show me where to go.

C: 啊？{F#她}{M#他}还没来吗？我看看…还真是！
E: Hmm? {F#She}{M#He} isn't back yet? Let me see... Golly gee, you're right!

C: 嘎？
E: Huh?

C: 来抓你考勤的人。
E: I'm a cycrane supervisor.

C: 就是就是，你可得看仔细了，别抓错好鸟。
E: That's right — carry out your investigation carefully, or you'll find the wrong cycrane.

C: 好了不装了，在这里聊了半天也累了，我也该回去休息了！走吧，记住了，我是「自愿且主动提出」回去的，不是被你抓回去的！
E: Alright, I'll stop playing innocent. I suppose it's time to get back to work. Just to clarify, I'm "taking the initiative" to "voluntarily" follow you back. You didn't catch me at all!

C: 你们十王司挺会差遣人…
E: The Ten-Lords Commission sure loves to delegate chores...

C: 看起来…这「残卷」并没有发挥出它应有的作用。感觉被史考特这老东西给骗了。
E: Looks like... this "fragmented record" has not served its intended purpose. Feels like a trick from that old clown Scott.

C: 真是一场酣畅淋漓的战斗！
E: What a sumptuous fight that was!

C: 搏击俱乐部全新赛季现已开始！若您想要了解详情，或是参加比赛，都请随时告诉我！掘掘博士竭诚为您服务！
E: An all-new season of the Fight Club has begun! If you want more information or to join the matches, feel free to ask me about it! I will do my best to provide you with all you need!

C: 要不还是走吧……
E: We should go...

C: 你有什么不方便？
E: What's so inconvenient?

C: 这个宣传海报…我之前怎么没看到过？
E: This poster... Was it there before?

C: 建议直接撕了。
E: Tear it down.

C: 哎哟年轻人！有钱也不能这么瞎折腾啊！
E: Young one, don't spend your money like that.

C: 谢谢你出手相助…不然…不然我想都不敢想啊！
E: Thank you for your help... Or I... I can't even think about what would happen otherwise!

C: 每天只把我一个人留在家里…好想出去玩哦！
E: They just kept leaving me at home alone... I want to go out and play!

C: 看着您工作的身姿，让我又找回了最初申请来博物馆工作时的热情。谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
E: Watching you work, I feel like I've re-ignited the passion I had when I first applied to work at the museum. Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!

C: （吃绿色花纹的）
E: (Eat the candy with green swirls)

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 还挺有意思的。
E: It's quite interesting.

C: 他们还扬言要揭露家族的丑行，戳穿匹诺康尼电视台捏造出来的假象——唔，实际上都是些恶心观众的内容。
E: They threatened to expose The Family's scandals and debunked the illusions fabricated by Penacony TV. In reality, the content they have shown so far has been nothing but disgusting crap.

C: 屏幕中正在播放一档名为「匹诺康尼偶像」的选秀节目，一位选手真诚地笑着等待评委给出结果。
E: A talent show titled "Penaconian Idol" is playing on the screen. A contestant is waiting for the evaluation result with a sincere smile.

C: 我是怪物保护协会的成员。
E: I'm a member of the Monster Protection Society.

C: 能接纳这些怪物，和它们平等交流…我就很感激了。
E: I'm already grateful because you can accept these monsters and treat them as equals.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎，你看，要是它比地板更硬，是不是不会有事了？对吧！
E: Woah, woah, woah. Did you hear him? It wouldn't have happened if the radio was harder than the floor, would it?

C: 恐怖的搞笑的正经的不适宜播出的，我啥都能讲，哇嘎嘎，尤其擅长讲狗狗的笑话！
E: I can talk about all kinds of stuff: Scary, funny, serious, or even the kind of stuff you can't put on the airwaves. Whoa now, I'm also quite the expert when it comes to canine jokes!

C: 这是你该问的问题吗？客人的话就是对的，要是连这点都做不到，就别站在那了。
E: Is that what you should be asking? The customer is always right, and if you can't even get that, then why are you even here?

C: 酒吧里明明还有那么多怪物，打烊后单独约我到角落里，是要欺凌我吧？然后明天会到处宣传我的糗事，联合同伴排挤我。
E: There are so many other monsters, but she asked me to sit alone in this corner after business hours. Is she trying to bully me or something? And tomorrow she'll go around spreading my embarrassing story and ostracize me, right?

C: 我们就先回去了汪。新来的调饮师…你也要好好保护自己哇。
E: We'll go back for now, woof. As for you, new drinksmith... stay safe, alright?

C: 或许吧。有时候也止不住地会去想，自己究竟想做的是什么。
E: Perhaps. Sometimes I can't help but wonder what my true desire is.

C: 您先去忙吧。人家就在这等着。
E: Please go ahead. I'll be waiting here.
Woof...

C: 把这里的怪物全部清除掉，一个都不许留！
E: Get rid of all the monsters here. Don't leave anyone behind!

C: {F#她}{M#他}是{NICKNAME}，是列车组的新加入的成员。
E: This is {NICKNAME}, a new member of the Express Crew.

C: 看来列车长没有告诉你要做什么呢，你尽管问，我会回答的。
E: Looks like the conductor hasn't told you what you're supposed to do. Well, ask away. I'll answer your questions.

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 导演，鸢尾花家系的电影审查工作在<color=#dbc291ff>匹诺康尼大剧院</color>进行，封禁的作品应该都保存在那里。
E: Director, the Iris Family conducts the movie review at the <color=#dbc291ff>Penacony Grand Theater</color>. The reels of banned movies are kept there.

C: 但非常抱歉，我不能把最后一部影片的胶卷给你——这部影片是由梅芙恩家主亲自封禁的，它的内容不符合家族制定的规范，需要导演「钟表匠」出面解释。
E: I'm very sorry, but I can't give you the reel of this film. The decision to ban it was made by Maeven herself because its content didn't comply with The Family's standards. Its director, the Watchmaker, needs to come forward with an explanation.

C: 米莫萨攥紧拳头，颤抖了起来。
E: Mimosa clenches her fists and starts shaking.

C: 真对不住，{NICKNAME}，米莫萨，你们没事吧？
E: My apologies, {NICKNAME} and Mimosa. Are you guys alright?

C: 啊！导演，原来您已经回来了，这是去哪了，花了这么长时间？
E: Ah! Director, you're back! Where did you go? What took you so long?

C: 一定会一直转下去的！
E: I'm sure it will continue turning!

C: 道具损耗、用人成本、拍摄经费…对了，还得算上工期……
E: Item wear and tear, manpower costs, filming expenses... Oh right, also gotta factor in the duration...

C: 有钱赚吗？
E: Is there any money in it?

C: 啧，行吧，反正工期也挺紧的。
E: Tsk, it's fine. We're on a tight schedule anyway.

C: 先来一口！
E: Have a sip first!

C: 滴答？好奇怪的房间，石头老板似乎利用苏乐达布置了许多<color=#dbc291ff>能在墙上行走的机关</color>……
E: Tick-tock? What a strange room, Boss Stone appears to have used SoulGlad to lay down many <color=#dbc291ff>mechanisms that allow wall walking</color>...

C: 天呐，一定是那位新导演的功劳……
E: My word, that must be the work of the new director...

C: 推行民主制度。
E: Push for democracy.

C: 不知道「钟表匠」先生这样设计有什么深意，或许哈努努也是一个人狠话不多的家伙吧。
E: I wonder what Mr. Watchmaker meant by this design. Perhaps Hanunue is also someone of very few words.

C: 咳咳，我并未亲眼见过梦主，只是在电视节目与家族的宣传中了解过他。据说在匹诺康尼即将毁灭的时刻，是他带领家族到访，挽救了这场即将毁灭的噩梦。
E: Ahem, I haven't met the Dreammaster in person before. I only know him from TV shows and The Family's promotions. They say that when Penacony was facing destruction, it was him who led The Family here and saved that nightmare situation from impending doom.

C: 按照《钟表小子》过去的故事，仓鼠球骑士是个除了球笼什么也不在乎的大笨蛋，总是因为比赛让自己陷入险境之中……
E: Based on old Clockie lore, Hamster Ball Knight was this big doofus who didn't care about anything except Spheroids. He was always putting himself into dangerous situations in the name of a race...

C: 仓鼠球骑士每次都能在球笼比赛中得到第一名，并通过比赛挫败坏人的阴谋，就连钟表小子都是他的粉丝！
E: Hamster Ball Knight always places first in Spheroid races while thwarting the bad guy's scheme throughout the race. Even Clockie is one of his fans!

C: 你怎么不说话？
E: Say something!

C: 一般，有点困。
E: It's mid, and a little uninspired.

C: 其实吧，就是有个叫波提欧的「星际牛仔」，最近干了几票大的，闹得人仰马翻的，连带我们空间站也倒了霉。
E: Actually, there's this "interstellar cowboy" called Boothill who's recently done a few big jobs and really caused a lot of trouble. He even got one over on our space station.

C: 就是这里啦。
E: We're here.

C: 二位选手，你们即将面对的，是原初梦境的怪物！彼时，匹诺康尼还处于一无所有的荒芜年代，梦境混乱无序，忆域迷因四处横行！
E: Contestants, you are about to confront the monsters of the Primordial Dreamscape! During this period, Penacony was nothing but a barren wasteland — the Dreamscape was fraught with strife and disorder, with Memory Zone Memes running rampant!

C: 这就是所谓的入戏吗…我好像有点明白了……
E: Is this what they call embodying the role? I think I'm starting to understand...

C: 恭喜你们，用战斗为我们重现了《逐梦往事》中精彩的动作表演！
E: Well done! You brought to life the thrilling action scenes from Once Upon a Time in Dreams with your fighting skills!

C: 还真是方便的流程啊…要是主办方允许穿装甲参赛就更好了。
E: What a coincidentally convenient plot twist... It'd be even more awesome if the organizers allowed me to wear armor.

C: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
E: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

C: 噢，不！这可不行，你必须直面自己内心的恐惧！
E: Hmph, no! This is unacceptable. You have to face your fears!

C: 两位朋友，你们还有重要的事要做，对吧？
E: My friends, you still have other important things to do, right?

C: 它是在…喊加拉赫先生吗？
E: Is it calling for Mr. Gallagher?

C: 我也不知道发生了什么。
E: I don't know what happened either.

C: 迎接命定的邂逅，然后向无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}发问——
E: To welcome my fated encounter. Then, I'll ask the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#} some questions.

C: 当前，差分宇宙正在运行某位博识学会的学者提出的课题。结论：思想的碰撞总是令人喜悦，我乐于见到更多学术伙伴。
E: Currently, the Divergent Universe is exploring a topic proposed by a certain scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild. Conclusion: It is always a delight to see a clash of thoughts, and I am pleased to have more research partners.

C: 感谢你的建议，我会考虑的。
E: Thank you for your suggestion. I will take it into account.

C: 小铁片子、小铁片子…真正决定胜利的可从来不是什么武器，是人！
E: Scrap metal, huh?... The key to victory is never the weapon. It's the person wielding it!

C: 哼哧哼哧呼噜噜——
E: Oink, oink, oink...!

C: 你这个引用疑似是有点不吉利了……
E: March, I don't think that poem is about you...

C: 嗷嗷呜！呜——
E: Owoo! Hohohohohow awoo...

C: 为了帮助藿藿解决「僵尸谜案」，你与三月七来到夜半的绥园之中。
E: To help Huohuo resolve the "zombie case," you and March 7th arrived in Fyxestroll Garden in the middle of the night.

C: 嗯…斯科特，我想和你成为恋人。
E: Yeah... I want to be your girlfriend, Skott.

C: 小神医你是不知道，那公司的机甲，打起人来可疼了！
E: You don't know the half of it! Those IPC mechs pack a huge punch!

C: 弟兄们！弟兄们！还有能动的弟兄吗！快来救我！
E: Guys! Fellas! Anyone else who can still move! Help me!

C: 姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
E: Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?

C: 三月七，你来晚了。我还以为你不敢来了，正发愁该怎么找你算账呢～
E: March 7th, you're late. Here I was thinking you were too chicken to show your face. I was thinking I might have to track you down and settle the score~

C: 也不知道银狼到底在我的剑上动了什么手脚，真能赢过斯科特吗？
E: I wonder what Silver Wolf did to my sword. Can I really defeat Skott?

C: 控制系统…重启…侦测到程序故障。
E: Operating system... rebooting... Program failure detected.

C: 学猪叫和学狗叫有什么本质区别吗？他又不是没叫过，玩家都听腻了。还是来点新花样吧…比如，用猪叫唱苏乐达广告歌？
E: That's pretty much the same as barking like a dog, right? He's already barked like a dog, players are bored of it. Let's come up with something new... How about singing the SoulGlad jingle, but with a pig's squeal?

C: 啊？写信报平安？你没有手机的吗？
E: Huh? Writing a letter just to let the Crew know you're doing alright? Do you guys not have phones?

C: 我猜你喜欢将自己代入乐子人的身份，到处口出狂言，为的就是假装客观，以便在任何时候做出事不关己的姿态。
E: In my opinion, you enjoy playing the role of a joker, spouting off outrageous opinions just to seem objective and indifferent whenever you feel like it.

C: 你是不是觉得凌晨的手机很好玩？你是不是觉得早上的觉真的很好睡？你是不是成天赚着窝囊费，还要听着领导说着你干啥都多余……
E: Do you find it hard to fall asleep without scrolling through your phone? Do you hit the snooze button every morning? Do you feel useless at work, hearing your bosses complaining about your incompetence...?

C: 哎，好累，我好久都没有这么累了。三月，你们得请我吃点好的。
E: Ah, I'm so tired... haven't felt this exhausted in ages. You guys better treat me to something nice, March.

C: 你是特地来消遣三月的吧？
E: You here to make a mockery of March or something?

C: 恕我直言，这些菜有些过于创新了……
E: If you don't mind me saying, these dishes seem a little too... creative...

C: 柔滑浓稠，果香清甜中透着恰到好处的微酸，伴着沙瓤口感顺喉而下。
E: Smooth and thick, the sweet fruit aroma carries a hint of just the right amount of acidity, accompanied by a grainy texture that goes down smoothly.

C: 嗯，合理。人类的灵魂也可能只是另一种形式的AI。
E: Yes, that makes sense. A human's soul might just be another form of AI.

C: 不合理的现象自有合理的解释。
E: There's a rational explanation for all irrational phenomena.

C: 械灵学派的机械降灵术依然留有记录！换句话说，我可以把它的机械灵魂降临在其他金人上！
E: The Mechanical Soul School left a record of their Mechanical Seance Arts! This means I can transfer its soul to another aurumaton!

C: 公输师傅故弄玄虚地掏出了一只机巧鸟。
E: Master Gongshu dramatically pulls out a cycrane.

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 我想想怎么跟你解释…你一定有喝过苏乐达吧？匹诺康尼的汽水饮料，我用它打个比方。
E: How should I explain this... I'm sure you must have tried SoulGlad before, right? It's Penacony's signature soda. I'll try and use that as a comparison.

C: 眼下可能还需要麻烦你再帮我拍摄那些离散「忆质」。
E: I may have to ask you to help me go and photograph some more scattered memoria for now, though.

C: 我亲爱的助手{NICKNAME}！你是来帮我搜集数据的么？偶尔也好好休息休息，你也要保重身体啊。别像我这样总胃疼。
E: My beloved assistant, {NICKNAME}! Are you here to help me collect data? It's important to get some rest every now and then. You have to take care of your health, you know? You don't want to end up with a stomach ache like me.

C: 能不能整点成年人看的节目？
E: Can't we do something a bit less childish?

C: 我本无人问津，一桶蜷缩在角落，默默承受着这个城市吐出的尾气。
E: No one ever paid me any mind. I was curled up in a corner as a can, silently at the mercy of the city's exhaust fumes.

C: 你望着眼前这个男人，十分惊讶小桶宝力会找上他——他也算得上是你的「朋友」吗？
E: Looking at the man before you, you're shocked that Litter Pony would call him along for this... Would you consider him your "friend"?

C: 虽然听起来一点都不纯粹，但我确实在这里感知到了…苦涩与甜蜜参半的友谊。
E: I can't say that sounds pure to me, but I still sense... a bittersweet friendship between you.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得这「友谊凭证」要怎么弄到手？
E: {NICKNAME}, how do you think you would be able to obtain your Proof of Friendship?

C: 趁着比赛还没开始，去看看你第一场比赛的对手吧。枯坐在这里只会越想越焦虑。
E: Why not check out who your first opponent is before the competition starts? It's better than wallowing here, as it'll just make you more anxious.

C: 确实，好人还是挺多的。
E: You're right. There are many good people here.

C: 你夸得我都心虚了…难道说，我们真的很厉害？
E: Your praise is making me all confused now... Wait, could it be that... we're actually pretty strong?

C: 那你可要注意哦，很多运动员晚年都会受脑部疾病的困扰。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。
E: You should be more careful then. Many athletes suffer from brain complications in their later years. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.

C: 感谢，帮大忙了。
E: Thank you. You're a huge help.

C: 劫持人质是吧？
E: Holding her hostage, hmm?

C: 能帮我缓解症状的小东西？
E: Something that can help alleviate my symptoms?

C: 杰帕德先生，请不要施舍我。机会要靠自己用实力堂堂正正地赢来！
E: Mr. Gepard, please don't pity me. Chances must be earned fairly through our own strength!

C: 第二天，我搭乘着星际和平公司的运输舰来到了罗浮仙舟。
E: The next day, I hitched a ride with an IPC transport vessel and arrived on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 别气馁啊！记得吗？演武仪典有「人气复活」机制！现在全银河的观众都很喜欢你，他们会让你人气复活的！
E: Don't give up! Do you remember? The Wardance has a "popularity revival" mechanic! Now the entire cosmos loves you — they'll definitely revive you!

C: 能振作起来就好！
E: It's good that you've snapped out of it!

C: 卢卡！走过来！揍我一拳！你敢吗！
E: Luka! C'mon! Get over here and take a swing at me! You got the guts?

C: 喔！玲可快看，{NICKNAME}和卢卡来了～
E: Lynx, look! {NICKNAME} and Luka are here!

C: 波爷，您来了～请上座～
E: Mr. Boothill, welcome! Please take a seat!

C: 那你能徒手捏爆一颗恒星吗？
E: Well, can you crush a star with your bare hands?

C: 没想到…会以这种方式结束我在演武仪典上的比赛。
