E: I didn't expect... my Wardance journey would end in this way.

C: 人们并非凭空诞生在这个世界上，我们每个人都来自于自己出生前的世界。
E: We don't just appear out of nowhere. Each of us comes from the world that was there before we were born.

C: 七百年前，我未能有机会帮助他的故乡。现在，一切都不算太晚。
E: Seven hundred years ago, I didn't have the chance to help his home. But it's still not too late for me to step in.

C: 通过她本人携带的文书和佩戴的戒环，我们确认了奢摩丹轮寺僧侣的身份。
E: Through the documents she brought on her person and the ring she bore, we've confirmed her identity as the monk Samatha from Claretwheel Temple.

C: 智械，我不会给出任何承诺。但你可以试着信任我，坦诚地沟通总好过死守戒条。
E: I will not promise you anything, Intellitron. But you can try to trust me. Honesty is better than blind adherence to commandments.

C: 结论：我们失败了。我们必须向█▀▄学习。我们终将胜利。
E: Conclusion: We failed. We must learn from █▀▄. We will be victorious at the end.

C: 机体损坏严重，无法支持本单位进行战斗。
E: This body is heavily damaged and cannot support this unit for combat.

C: 死亡不过是肉体的消逝。在这场以宇宙为对手的战争中，只要依然持守着「不杀」戒律，我们就永远不会迎来灵魂的败北。
E: Death is but the vanishment of the flesh. In this war with the universe as our opponent, as long as we still abide by the commandment of "Do not kill," we will never welcome the defeat of the soul.

C: 逻辑：生于猎群则残暴，生于丹轮寺则良善。观点：「本性」是带有主观认知的伪命题。
E: Logic: To be born into the hunting pack is to be brutal, and to be born in Claretwheel Temple is to be compassionate. Perspective: "Nature" is a pseudo-proposition that contains subjective cognitive bias.

C: 奢摩…谢过驭空大人。
E: I... thank you, Madam Yukong.

C: 这届小编是懂流量的，标题取的一个比一个唬人。
E: This bunch of editors really are clickbait connoisseurs — each header is more explosive than the last.

C: 还挺轻松的。
E: It's pretty chill.

C: 还挺逼真的。
E: It was pretty realistic.

C: 原来只是冒充星核猎手的笨蛋……
E: So it's just a fool impersonating a Stellaron Hunter...

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: 可是，那样我就创造不出来现在这样具有记忆点的个人品牌了啊！如果不能成功炒作，能力再强又有什么用？
E: But if I do that, then I wouldn't be able to create an impactful personal branding that sticks! If I cannot successfully promote myself, what good is my strength?

C: …希望扑满们没事！
E: ...Hope the Trotters are all right!

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 卢卡，我们三个都很欣赏你的战斗意志。
E: Luka, all three of us admire your fighting spirit.

C: 生活不易，尾巴卖艺。
E: Life is hard. Tail has to hustle.

C: 不过我觉得事情还有转机，正在尽力对卢卡选手进行心理建设，希望他能及时振作起来。
E: But I think there's still a chance to flip this around. We are doing our best to provide psychological support for Luka — we hope he'll be able to recover in time.

C: 对对对！我就是这么想的…
E: Yes, yes, absolutely! That was my plan exactly...

C: 几乎是所有人都被专业记者的想法震住了。
E: It appears that everyone in the room is dumbfounded by the professional journalist's plan.

C: 不过我还是得提醒下粉丝朋友们，要签名可以，不能打扰选手休息。
E: But I do want to remind our fans — It's okay to ask for an autograph, but please do not disturb the contestants during their rest.

C: 你在侵犯选手的个人隐私…
E: You are infringing on the privacy of the contestant...

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 先别急，我们来一起看看下场擂台赛的对手信息。
E: Hold on. Let's look at the opponent information for the next Faceoff Match first.

C: 不要迷恋哥，哥只是个传说。
E: Don't simp over me. I'm just a legend.

C: 我要逛庙会。
E: I'm gonna take a tour of the temple fair.

C: 真的耶！枘凿六合真是世界上最好玩的游戏！
E: You're right! Hexanexus truly is the most enjoyable game in the world!

C: 那你给我讲个笑话吧。
E: Tell me a joke then.

C: 表演还没开始吗？
E: Has the performance not started yet?

C: 演出乐队的核心位置，究竟该由哪个学院的学生担任？
E: The performing band is a key position. Which institute should undertake this crucial role?

C: 就叫「缭乱忍徒旅店」吧！
E: Let's call it the Dazzling Initiate Hotel!

C: 作出决定后，乱破便先行去查看场地情况了……
E: After the decision was made, Rappa went off to check out the venue...

C: 她很自信的样子。应该没问题…吧？
E: She looks confident. There shouldn't be a problem... should there?

C: 主公的看法如何？是不是颇有「缭乱流」音忍的气势了？
E: What does Sound Master think? Does it have the vibe of a Dazzling Sound Ninja?

C: 辛苦了！我来帮你看看现在的进度。
E: Thank you for the hard work! I'm just here to help you take a look at the progress.

C: 虽说音乐派对是由学生组织的活动，但还是会受到各个学院的影响。
E: Although the music party is a student initiative, it's still influenced by the various schools.

C: 你有事情要找我吗？
E: Do you need me for something?

C: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
E: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

C: 其实，有件事想问…
E: Actually, I have something to ask...

C: 唉，阿兰就是所有人中举止最可疑的那个，没有实际证据，我也不好当面去问。
E: *sigh* Arlan's the most suspicious of the lot. I can't ask about it either without solid proof.

C: 啊…呃，是的！我最近刚开始打…可有意思了！
E: Ah... Err, yes! I've only recently gotten into it... It's super interesting!

C: 这情况，谁都救不了！
E: Nobody can possibly save the day!

C: 还有那位更是重量级，财富学院的金融专家！还未毕业就已在苜蓿草家系崭露头角，倘若假以时……
E: Finally, this here is the heavyweight finance professional of Fortune Academy! They've already made a name for themselves among the Alfalfa Family, and they haven't even graduated yet. I'm sure, given time...

C: 来忍界掌控雷电吧！
E: Come to the ninja world and master thunder and lightning!

C: 跟随乱破忍首修行的这段时间，我看到了以前从来没想象过的世界。
E: In my time training under Head Ninja Rappa, I have seen a world that I had never even imagined before.

C: 这里是折纸大学！在学校，就得听老师的，有什么意见也给我憋着。
E: This is Paperfold University! In school, you're to listen to your teachers. Any and all objections must be stifled and swallowed.

C: 涂鸦时候记得写我的名字。
E: Don't forget to sign my name when you're doing graffiti.

C: 要是以后有机会，来做我的专属经纪人怎么样？
E: If there's a chance in the future, why not become my exclusive manager?

C: 咳。
E: Ahem.

C: 猜猜，哪个瓶子里的苏乐达会喷得最高？没有提示，全靠运气！
E: Take a guess. Which bottle's SoulGlad will spray the highest? No hints, all luck!

C: 只能说，懂的都懂，不懂的解释也没用，反正你知道我有办法就行了。
E: The only thing I can say is, "if you know, you know." There's no point explaining if you don't. Just know that I have a way.

C: 是吗…不过都说运气也是实力的一部分。我运气比较好，认识了你们…嗯。
E: Really... Though I guess being lucky is a skill too. My luck's pretty good to have known you all... Yes.

C: 拿音乐当饭吃太难了。演出虽然很开心，但生活总还得继续。年轻时候有梦想是很酷，但随着时间推移，还是只有梦想就很蠢了。
E: It's too tough to try to make a living with music. I was really happy playing shows, but life had to go on. It was really cool to have dreams as a kid, but as time moved on, it seemed really stupid to cling to nothing else but dreams.

C: 有意思，算我一个。
E: Interesting. Count me in.

C: 好吧…我听说他的「悬赏金额」还在不断上涨，你要是见过他，倒是可以捞不少油水。哎，可惜了……
E: Okay... I hear his bounty is still going up. If you've seen him, you can probably get quite a hefty reward. Ah, what a pity...

C: 正好晨练累了，去买奶茶喝咯！
E: I was all thirsty from our morning routine too. Time to buy some milk tea!

C: 选择说服丹恒。
E: Try to persuade Dan Heng.

C: 通通删除！
E: Erase them all!

C: 关于寻找某位女武神的动画。
E: The one about a certain valkyrie.

C: 这样吧…我可以创造一个拟造黑洞，用它来吸收热量，暂时保证冷藏库的温度暂时不会上升。
E: How about this... I can create an artificial black hole to temporarily ensure that the freezing unit's temperature won't rise.

C: 「幽狱谜夜」——据说是仙舟「曜青」年轻人中最流行的桌游～今天终于凑齐人，可以玩上一把啦！
E: "Shackling Prison Mystery Night" — It's supposed to be the hottest tabletop game among the Xianzhou Yaoqing youngsters! We've finally got enough people to play a game today!

C: 身份信息填写完毕，网络状态良好。
E: Identity information input complete. Connectivity status optimal.

C: 外面黑沉沉的，一副山雨欲来的样子，好可怕呀。
E: It's all gloomy outside like an impending storm is coming. So scary.

C: 你怎么这么熟练啊！
E: You're a pro at this!

C: …虽然确实有效，但下次还是别用这招了。
E: ...It's very effective, but don't use this move ever again.

C: 你真是把心眼都用在这种事情上了……
E: You really poured your heart into this...

C: 顺光更显气色，用来拍证件照再合适不过了。{NICKNAME}，这个角度怎么样？
E: The front light accentuates a person's complexion, and it's great for official ID photos. {NICKNAME}, how's this angle?

C: 你再说？吃我一招！
E: Say that again? I'll sock you right on the board!

C: 怎么又是你们这帮东西…现在我看到垃圾桶就烦，这个世界真的需要这么多垃圾桶吗？
E: It's you lot again... I get all inexplicably irate when I see trashcans now. Does the world really need so many trashcans?

C: 建议他们还是沉淀一阵子，磨练磨练演技再复出吧！
E: They should probably get more experience and shape up their acting before re-debuting!

C: 这可怪不得咱…摄影展压根就没有回复的功能！
E: You can't blame us... The photography exhibition doesn't have a reply function!

C: 原来是这样，那还真是错怪你了，小粉毛~
E: Ooh I see. My bad then, Pink Hair!

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，精彩，实在精彩！
E: Ohohoho, exciting, absolutely breathtaking!

C: 黑、黑漆漆的…我们真的还要继续往前吗……
E: I—It's so d—dark... Are we really going to keep going...

C: 三月太狡猾了！
E: You're such a trickster, March!

C: 片刻后，列车组的大家来到了现场。
E: Moments later, the Express crew arrives.

C: 乌拉尼娅的眼睛？是什么？
E: Urania's eyes? What's that?

C: 这些卷轴大概有一个你那么高。回收卷轴的时候你可能会听到一些声响，不过不用害怕，那都是属于过去的话语，并不危险。
E: These scrolls are probably about as tall as you. When you retrieve them, you may hear some sounds, but don't be scared — those are whispers of the past, and they're not dangerous at all.

C: 看来并非仅我一人被骚扰。这贼灵在我的军队四处煽风点火，致使我的要将在军营内颜面尽失，不可饶恕！
E: It appears I'm not the only one who has been harassed. This Spirithief has been sowing lies and discord amongst my army's ranks, causing my generals' honor to be sullied. Unforgivable!

C: 好，那就让你的族人向我证明这份勇气吧——<color=#dbc291ff>歌耳戈</color>。
E: So be it. Your clan will prove your courage to me — <color=#dbc291ff>Gorgo</color>.

C: 决定了？行。虽然很感谢你们的帮忙，但不得不说…你确实接下了个超级大的烂摊子。
E: It's decided? All right. I really should thank you for your help, but truth be told... you've really taken on a huge mess.

C: 领奖台都布置好啦，请获胜队伍的管理员过来吧！
E: The award stage is all set up. The winning squad's administrator can come over now!

C: 我们到了。梦想之地的风景总是令人眼花缭乱，我有位博识学会的朋友对此颇有怨词。
E: We're here. The scenery in the Land of the Dreams is confusingly dazzling, and I have a friend from the Intelligentsia Guild who has quite some scathing words for it.

C: （拍摄合照）
E: (Take a photo together)

C: 泡泡骄傲地摇着尾巴，看得出来它的胜负心得到了极大的满足。经过了小组赛的磨砺，你们的配合也越来越好了……
E: Bubbles wags its tail proudly, clearly satisfied with the outcome. After the grind of the group stage, your teamwork has definitely improved...

C: 这海豹是白厄搭配的颜色？
E: Did you base those colors on Phainon?

C: 哈哈，想不到吧？我也有！
E: Haha, surprise! I've got a pair too!

C: 我经历过，我有发言权…
E: I've experienced death. I have the right to speak about this...

C: 不用安慰泡泡，泡泡，才不会难过！
E: I don't need comforting. I will not be upset!

C: 嘻嘻，灰子，看好了，让你好好瞧瞧这只扎手的小东西有多厉害。
E: Hehe, Gray Mystery, watch closely. Let me show you just how powerful this prickly little creature can be.

C: 天气也不好！下雪！下雨！下冰雹！阳光太好了！又冷又热，不冷不热！
E: The weather was awful too! Snow! Rain! Hail! Too much sunlight! Too cold, too hot, not cold, not hot!

C: 不仅招揽来了这么多观众，还有这么多人气选手参与，最后还夺回了丢失的奖杯。
E: Not only did we attract so many spectators, but so many popular competitors joined in, and in the end, we managed to reclaim the lost trophy.

C: 如此一来，所有的人类，所有的{RUBY_B#法吉娜圣兽}小海豹{RUBY_E#}才会得到拯救。
E: Only then will all the humans and all the {RUBY_B#Sacred Beasts of Phagousa}baby seals{RUBY_E#} be saved.

C: 你无需害怕，你还有值得信赖的海豹伙伴。看，这位就是传说中的异邦勇者。
E: There's no need to fear. You still have trusty seal companions to depend on. Behold, the outlander warrior of legends.

C: 在那之后，是<color=#eb4d3dff>「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。</color>
E: And finally, <color=#eb4d3dff>the golden trophy shatters with no champion.</color>

C: 那便是唯一的机会，你需要自己弄清楚。
E: That's your only chance. You'll have to figure it out yourself.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>你不可将预言梦告诉任何人，否则你将变成小海豹。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>You must not tell anyone about the prophetic dream. If you do, you'll turn into a baby seal.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>将预言梦告诉他人，你将永远变成小海豹。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>If you tell anyone about the prophetic dream, you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color>

C: 小灰，一会比赛见！
E: Little Gray, see you in the arena later!

C: 哇，真是直率的小灰啊。
E: Little Gray, you're so direct.

C: 当然是因为泡泡实力强大啊…
E: It's because Bubbles is super strong, obviously.

C: 可能是因为泡泡戴着墨镜，你看不出来，它的眼中划过了一丝阴翳。
E: Maybe it's the sunglasses, but you missed the brief gloom that crossed Bubbles' eyes.

C: 没什么事的话，就来玩「星铁☆WORLD」吧——我刚起的名字。
E: Got a minute? Come try "Star Rail WORLD" — just came up with that name.

C: 不过眼下这款游戏还不够完善，需要你们多玩一玩、提点改进建议才行。
E: But this game is still incomplete, so I need all of you to play it more and offer me some feedback.

C: 快来人啊，有愚者混进来了！
E: Someone help! A Fool has snuck in!

C: 哈哈，既然如此，不如让我来帮你回忆一下吧——鄙人曾在匹诺康尼赞助过一个游戏项目，利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验。
E: Haha. In that case, let me help jog your memory — back in the day, I funded a game project in Penacony, using unique dream-tech to create a fully immersive experience.

C: 还能玩到测试版吗？
E: Can I still play the demo version?

C: 那个魔王是谁设计的…
E: Who designed that Demon King...

C: 而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
E: And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"

C: 毁掉心爱斗篷的仇，我记下了。总有天，我会再来找你的……
E: I'll remember how you destroyed my beloved cape. One day, I'll come back for you...

C: 就用它试训吧？我可以在旁指导您，帮您适应下它——毕竟是手动挡，你们年轻人可能用不惯。
E: Why not use it for a test run? I can guide you from the side and help you get used to it. After all, it's a manual transmission, and you younger folks might not be accustomed to that.

C: 试训赛道已经准备好了，我们这就出发？
E: The test track is ready. Shall we head out now?

C: 稍等下，我还没准备好…
E: Hold on a moment, I'm not ready yet...

C: 其实是个意外，说来话长。
E: It was actually an accident. It's a long story.

C: 少呜呜伯的废话了，仙舟小妹，你到底怎么招惹上诅咒的？
E: Enough screwbbaboo! Spill it, Xianzhou kiddo — how'd you get yourself cursed?

C: 嘎嘎嘎嘎嘎！
E: Bwahahaha!

C: 你跟未成年聊喝酒？
E: You talk about drinking with minors?

C: 我不稀罕。
E: I couldn't care less.

C: （强调「闭嘴」的传奇经历。）
E: (Highlights Shush's legendary achievements.)

C: 哦，这么传奇？看来是位大人物啊，值得敬上一杯。
E: Oh my, what a legend! Clearly someone important. This calls for a toast!

C: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>充满慈爱地激励对方</color>。
E: According to the recipe, this drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>encourage others with warmth and compassion</color>.

C: 提问：为什么黑塔人偶们能顺利组团出道？
E: Question: Why are Herta puppets able to debut as a pop group so easily?

C: 今天的实验就到此为止吧，做得还不错，姑且对你表示赞扬。
E: That's all for today's experiment. You did fairly well. Consider that a compliment for you.

C: 我的这杯大作如何？好好想想，什么样的名字才能配得上它呢？
E: So? What do you think of my latest masterpiece? Come on, give it a name worthy of its greatness!

C: 不许说我的台词——
E: Hey! That's my line!

C: 听起来都是{NICKNAME}的作风…各计一分吧。
E: Sounds like something {NICKNAME} would say... one point to each of you.

C: 唔…它的纸质与列车酒水单完全一致。存在这种可能性，它与最初来到匹诺康尼的无名客有关。
E: Hmm... its paper is identical to the Express's drink menu. It might be tied to the Nameless who first visited Penacony.

C: 你邀请卡芙卡品尝调饮…但听筒后只传来一连串忙音。
E: You invite Kafka to taste the drink... but only hear a series of busy tones.

C: 除了解答那些我懒得回答的无聊问题外，她还可以帮助艾丝妲管理空间站，甚至可能发现一些我都没注意到的有趣研究方向。
E: She'll answer the boring questions I'm too busy for, help Asta run the space station, and possibly discover interesting research directions I've missed.

C: 总有一些自由贸易的漏网之鱼，发展出了独立于公司的商业体系，这种市场体量虽小，但对付起来并不容易。
E: There are always some free trade stragglers who develop business systems independent of the IPC. While these markets are small in scale, they're not exactly easy to deal with.

C: 资本市场瞬息万变，你有任何不懂的问题可以随时找我，我很乐意为你解答。
E: The capital market changes rapidly. If you have any questions, feel free to come to me anytime. I'll be happy to help you out.

C: 坦白讲，这次真是我寻宝经历里最刺激的一次！以前遇到怪物只能开溜，这次却能一路闯到底……
E: To be completely honest, this has been the most thrilling treasure hunt in all my years! Previously I'd have to run away whenever I run into a monster, but this time we made it to the very bottom...

C: 但它的商业潜力无限，怎么办呢…这样吧…请您稍等一下，在下找个东西给您。
E: But its commercial potential is unlimited. What should I do... Please hold on one second. I'm just fetching something for you.

C: 而且啊，按这个做法，剧情里的「主角模板」也不够完善啊。所以在下有个思路，不知道可不可行，想和您商量一下……
E: And I tell you what, the Protagonist Model isn't perfect enough if we do the plot this way. So, I've come up with an idea. I'm not sure what you think, so I'd like to run it by you...

C: 行了！我本以为你身为无名客，多少也见过些世面，结果竟如此大惊小怪！
E: Fine! I foolishly believed that you, as Nameless, would be a well-traveled connoisseur but it seemed you were rather finicky, shall we say!

C: 西衍先生像之前那样开始奋笔疾书。
E: Mr. Xiyan began scribbling at a furious pace, as before.

C: 现在最后一折戏，也就是咱们这个故事的大结局，「仙舟民同悲万古尘，开拓者星落长乐天」也彻底写完了。期待您通读全本之后，能给在下提一些重要的意见。
E: Now the final scene, the epic finale of our story, has finally been completed: Xianzhou Laments Woes of Age, Trailblazer Fails Sanctum of Exaltation! I hope you can give me some feedback once you read through it.

C: 倒是那西衍先生，他可是说书的名家大拿，要是能拿到他的录音，就算是老主顾也没有什么可抱怨的！麻烦你帮我去录一下试试吧！
E: And let's not forget Mr. Xiyan, a well-known storyteller. My regulars would love his recordings! Please, I really could use your help!

C: 没错，耳朵不尖——
E: Yeah, you laugh at your customer...

C: 杜老板端来了一杯「烈焰浓茶」。
E: Boss Du brings you a mug of Flaming Potent Tea.

C: 辛苦你了，有了鉴宝活动，我们店的名声总算是有救了，之后的生意想必也会好转起来。
E: Thanks to your performance, my reputation has taken a turn for the better. I'm sure the business will improve over time.

C: 科学的力量好厉害！不需要任何电子终端，只要拿着以太硬币就能开始对战！
E: The power of science is amazing! We don't need any electronic terminals, we just need to hold our Aether Coins to start a battle!

C: 我居然输了，一定是游戏机制不够科学……
E: I can't believe I lost. The game mechanisms can't be true to real science...

C: 这到底是个什么游戏呀？能麻烦你再给我们介绍一下嘛？
E: Yeah! Can you give us an overview?

C: 好问题！这场庆典实际上是「以太战线竞技协会」在每赛季末举行的、面向全宇宙玩家的竞技赛事。
E: Great question! The festival is actually a tournament organized by the Aetherium Wars Gaming Association at the end of each season, and is open to players from across the universe.

C: 不不不，我只是…哎呀，身为老玩家的感动，你们恐怕很难理解吧！
E: No, no, of course not. It's just... as someone who's been playing this game for so long... I guess it's hard for those who haven't played it to understand.

C: 乔瓦尼先生，这是我分内的工作，还请让我来……
E: Mr. Giovanni, let me take care of it, it's my job, after all...

C: 我们一定要让你们尝尝「托帕后援团」成员的厉害！
E: You're in for a rude awakening — prepare to face the might of "Topaz's Support Squad!"

C: 现在，我提议二位将硬币里的以太灵召唤出来——毕竟是二位真正意义上获得的第一只以太灵，还是相互认识一下比较好哦？

C: 于男人而言，\n法度刻印已无意义。
E: For that man,\nLaws and seals no longer have meaning.

C:
以至明日，星星会如此传唱：
<color=#9e5738>悬锋的孤王，其人名为万敌。</color>

他一生行向的，是永劫战火，
他身后留下的，是荣光遍地。
E:
In the morrow's sky, the stars will chant:
<color=#9e5738>The lone king of Kremnos is called Mydei.</color>

His journey was one of ceaseless, eternal warfare,
And behind him, he left a world ablaze with glory.

C:
巨龙垂下长颈，
将少女驮上脊背。
她将沉眠着，一无所知地，
迎接新生的黎明。
E:
The dragon lowers its long neck,
And places the girl on its back.
In slumber, she will unknowingly greet
The dawn of her rebirth.

C: 「我要讲的第三则故事名为：」\n「比诡计？算算谁是祖师爷。」
E: "The third story I will tell is titled:"\n"A competition in trickery? Who do you think is the grandmaster?"

C: 「第四则谎言名为……」
E: "The fourth lie is called..."

C: 你看到她跋涉于岁月的疲惫，\n你嗅到她藏在故事里的忧怀。
E: You see the exhaustion in her quiet steps through the years,\nand breathe in the sorrow she hides within her tales.

C: 直到故事的最后，\n乌云将一切美好吞没。
E: By the story's end,\nthe dark clouds consume every trace of light.

C:
对了，<color=#9e5738>「昔涟」</color>，
记得你说过，有个地方…
柔软而缤纷，
是安宁美好的归乡。
E:
By the way, <color=#9e5738>Cyrene</color>,
I remember you once spoke of a place...
Soft and full of color,
a peaceful, beautiful place that felt like home.

C: 时隔千年，巨龙恍然发觉，\n那些刻法勒的渺小造物，\n已让文明扎根于岁月。
E: Thousands of years later, the Giant Dragon realized,\nThose tiny creations of Kephale,\nHad rooted their civilization in time.

C: <color=#9e5738>「长夜」</color>拂袖，\n以忆潮将巨龙洗涤——
E: <color=#9e5738>"Evernight"</color> waves her sleeve,\nBathing the Giant Dragon in a memoria tide —

C: 或被再创世的宏图吸引，\n或折服于那君王的威名，\n四方义士在凯撒座前云集。
E: Perhaps drawn by the grand design to welcome the Era Nova,\nOr perhaps convinced by that king's great renown,\nRighteous warriors from across the land gathered before the Imperator's throne.

C: 这是凯撒一生的信条，\n自始至终，从未更改。
E: That was the Imperator's lifelong conviction,\nNever changed, always persistent.

C: 「以翁法罗斯之名……」
E: "In the name of Amphoreus..."

C: 直到，歌声中埋下了阴谋的絮语。\n直到，琴曲中摔落了死斗的咆哮。
E: Until the whispers of conspiracies were buried in the songs,\nUntil the roars of lethal struggle shattered the music.

C: 「许久不见，剑旗…海瑟音。」\n「如今，你果真是深海的底礁了。」
E: "Long time no see, Gladius... Hysilens."\n"Now you have truly become the ocean's bedrock."

C: 只因——\n她们的子女私下相恋远走，\n她们的祖辈在战场上结仇。
E: Because —\nTheir children fled, in love's embrace,\nWhile bloodied pasts left scars in place.

C: 「我会努力让你们，」\n「在微光中握手言和。」
E: "Then, I will make every effort...\nTo have you cast aside your difference in this faint light."

C: 风中的歌谣如是低语。\n他轻声回应——
E: Ballads reach him through the breeze, as though soft voices meant for him,\nand he responds in kind.

C: 「流淌金血的人必成大业。」\n「黄金的英雄生来便受神明怜惜。」
E: "Those with golden blood are bound to succeed."\n"The golden heroes are born as gods' beloved."

C: 「除了救世的理想，你还剩下什么？」\n金发的友人曾向他提问。
E: "Apart from the ideal of deliverance, what do you have left?"\nThe golden-haired friend once asked him so.

C: 可那哀伤终究…\n只是世界的哀伤。
E: But that sorrow was, in the end...\nOnly the sorrow of the world.

C: 他的老师善意提醒，
E: His teacher kindly reminded him thus,

C: 但背负诋毁的人不以为意。
E: But the one shouldering such slander pays little heed.

C: 「如果是用来打杂，还是学生好用一些。」
E: "If it's just for odd jobs, students are a better gamble."

C: 不是源于乐观， 也绝非被抹平了心性… 「感谢这份不幸。」 那笑声中的自嘲显而易见， 却饱含着另一种感情…
E: Not from optimism, Nor from a defeat of the heart... "I thank this misfortune's severity." The laughter oozes with self-mockery, But is also full of a different emotion...

C:
今日，树庭生机不再，
学士业已归作尘土。
因而世间少有人知晓，
他生前也为寂寥所苦。
E:
Now the Grove is no longer bustling,
And the scholar has returned to dust.
Thus, few in this world now know,
How he was also troubled by solitude in life.

C: 浪漫之神的金丝，\n如今是她的手眼。
E: Golden threads of the goddess of romance\nnow serve as her hands and eyes.

C: 圣城时尚的风向标…\n是她将要发布的得意之作？\n唔——
E: Is the holy city's fashion trendsetter...\ngoing to reveal her newest masterpiece?\nHmm—

C: 最后这一页，我给所有人留下了一份礼物。献给银河的，是一声「你好，世界」的祝福；献给英雄们的，是一页「讲述明天」的永恒。
E: On this final page, I left a gift for everyone. For the cosmos, a blessing: "Hello, World." For the heroes, an eternal page of "Telling Tomorrow."

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，逐火军在海洋讨伐战中惨胜，归来的只有塞涅俄丝一人。元老院宣称是塞涅俄丝杀死凯撒等人试图夺权，她对此不做应答，仅以雷霆手段肃清了元老院，随后扶持阿格莱雅入主奥赫玛，在奥赫玛推行了人治。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, the Flame-Chase Army achieved a costly victory in the expedition against the Ocean, with only Seliose returning alive. The Council of Elders claimed that Seliose had killed the Imperator and others in an attempt to seize power. She gave no response to this, but swiftly purged the Council with lightning-fast brutality. She then supported Aglaea's rise to power in Okhema, where humanity ruled itself.

C: 「汝将碎裂▀▄█…碎裂█▄…随……劣▀▄█……」泰坦的声音数次停顿，随后戛然而止。缇里西庇俄丝万分困惑：我将碎裂什么？
E: "You shall shatter▀▄█... shatter█▄... sha... tter▀▄█..." The Titan's voice paused several times before abruptly cutting off. Tribios was utterly confused: What exactly was I supposed to shatter?

C: 但是，一天天长大的只有缇里西庇俄丝，孩童们始终只有这般大小。
E: However, while Tribios grew day by day, the children remained forever the same size.

C:
于漫长的演算中踏上「毁灭」，由权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>升格的绝灭大君。
银河间的铁墓并非单一实体，而是权杖散布的「毁灭」方程式副本。
「铁墓」这一代号由星际和平公司提出，后被来古士采用。

当演算抵达终点，铁墓将以无首巨人的形态降临宇宙，并完成自我加冕——
追溯「智识」的命途能量，链接博识尊，将祂的计算转化为「毁灭」。
E:
The Lord Ravager that stepped onto the Destruction in a long process of calculation and ascended from the scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.
The Irontomb in the cosmos is not a single entity, but a copy of the Destruction equation diffused by the Scepter.
The Irontomb code name was proposed by the Interastral Peace Corporation and eventually used by Lygus.

When the extrapolation reaches its end, Irontomb will descend upon the universe in the form of a headless giant and perform a self-coronation...
Tracing the Path Energy of Erudition, connecting to Nous, and transforming THEIR calculations into Destruction.

C: 实验核心变量，十二种生命原动力的简化模型。\n基于「熵减」这一母题，δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>通过反证法，将十二因子投入实验并逐一证伪。
E: Core variables of the experiment. Twelve simplified models of life's Primum Mobile.\nBased on the overarching theme of "entropy reduction," δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> employed a process of elimination, introducing the twelve factors into the experiment one by one in an effort to falsify them.

C:

磋磨、雕琢、切割。和练习挥剑一样，由无数个简单至极的瞬间组成。

祝你好运，伙伴！
E:
Fixing things isn't hard.
Sanding, carving, shaping. It's a lot like practicing swordplay — composed of countless extremely simple moments.

Best of luck, partner!

C: 好伙伴，很高兴你能注意到这一点。\n在刻法勒脚下的奥赫玛，居住着一群红色头发的信使。她们和你差不多高，能够打开通往诸界的门径，把信嗖地送到目的地！我给你的回信便是如此送达的。
E: Dear friend, I'm so glad you noticed!\nAt Kephale's feet lies Okhema, home to a group of red-haired messengers. They're about as tall as you are, and can open doorways between realms, sending letters with a whoosh, right to where they need to be! That's how this letter found its way to you.

C: 没有人生来比其他人更伟大，你始终恪守这条准则。身为一名无名客，没有什么比这更宝贵的品质了。
E: No one is born greater than others. You always abided by that rule. There is no virtue greater than that for a Nameless.

C: 「哎呀，你果然也来了。最近诊所里多了不少伤员，应该都是因为想要『探宝』吧？我可不能看着大家拿生命来冒险——{NICKNAME}，帮我把他们带回家吧。」
E: "Oh, I knew you'd be here. Lately, the clinic has seen an increase of injured patients, probably all because of their desire to hunt for treasure. I can't let everyone risk their lives like that. {NICKNAME}, please help me bring them back home."

C: 「我从没有见到这么多的古代遗物…呵呵，我有点理解你们为什么要闯进这里了。但生命的价值比任何宝物都珍贵，{NICKNAME}，希望你和其他寻宝者都能明白这个道理。」
E: "I've never seen so many relics before... Haha, I can understand why you all want to make your way in here. However, life is more precious than any treasure, {NICKNAME}. I hope you and other treasure hunters keep that in mind."

C: 若你拥有<color=#f29e38ff>未达养成标准</color>的角色，将被系统自动强化。\n被自动强化的角色会带有这项<color=#f29e38ff>映射标记</color>。
E: If you have characters that are <color=#f29e38ff>below the build standard</color>, they will be automatically enhanced by the system.\nCharacters that have been automatically enhanced will have this <color=#f29e38ff>Mapping Tag</color>.

C: 在标准博弈中，可自由选择想要挑战的<color=#f29e38ff>职级难度</color>。\n职级越高，挑战难度越高，奖励也越丰厚。
E: In Standard Gambit, you can freely select the <color=#f29e38ff>rank difficulty</color> you wish to challenge.\nThe higher the rank, the greater the challenge and the more luxurious the rewards.

C: 拖动到角色身上，可在该角色装备推荐列表内的4件进阶装备中选择1件获得。
E: Drag onto the character to choose and obtain 1 of the 4 pieces of advanced equipment from that character's recommended equipment list.

C: 敌方目标具有<color=#f29e38ff>韧性</color>。根据敌方目标强度的不同，韧性值也会有差异。
E: Enemy targets have <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color>. Depending on the strength of the enemy, their Toughness will also be different.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>量子属性</color>造成弱点击破时，会立即造成<color=#f29e38ff>量子属性击破伤害</color>，并施加<color=#f29e38ff>纠缠</color>状态。<color=#f29e38ff>纠缠</color>会使敌方目标行动延后，并在敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>回合开始时</color>对其造成量子属性附加伤害。若敌方目标在纠缠状态下受到攻击，则会使该附加伤害提高。
E: Using <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum</color> attacks to trigger Weakness Break will immediately deal <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum Break DMG</color> and apply the <color=#f29e38ff>Entanglement</color> effect. <color=#f29e38ff>Entanglement</color> will cause enemies to have their action delayed and take Additional Quantum DMG <color=#f29e38ff>at the start of their turn</color>. If enemies are attacked while Entangled, the Additional DMG will be increased.

C: 我方单位被施加【恐惧萦绕】后，对【恐惧萦绕】的施加者发起一次攻击可以解除【恐惧萦绕】。
E: When an ally is inflicted with Terror Grip, attacking the caster of Terror Grip once can dispel Terror Grip.

C: 锁孔以内的投影显示<color=#f29e38ff>绿色</color>，是<color=#f29e38ff>正确投影</color>。锁孔以外的投影显示橙色，是冗余投影。当投影与锁孔<color=#f29e38ff>「完美重合」</color>时，就会自动将锁孔解锁。当全部锁孔都被解锁后，火种匣就会开启。
E: If the projection inside the keyhole is <color=#f29e38ff>green</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>projection is correct</color>. The projection outside the keyhole is orange and is considered to be redundant. When the projection and keyhole are <color=#f29e38ff>perfectly overlapped</color>, the keyhole will be automatically unlocked. When all keyholes have been unlocked, the Coreflame Casket will open.

C: 随着开拓等级的提升，需要完成<color=#f29e38ff>均衡的试炼</color>以提升<color=#f29e38ff>均衡等级</color>。开拓者能力提升的同时，可以获得更多的奖励，但世界各处的敌人也会变得更强…
E: As your Trailblaze Level goes up, you will need to complete <color=#f29e38ff>Trials of Equilibrium</color> to increase your <color=#f29e38ff>Equilibrium Level</color>. The enemies will have stronger stats, but so will you — and of course, defeating them will drop more rewards...

C: 回到曾经探索过的区域，体会不同的故事或挑战，完成后可以获得相应的奖励。在探游状态下，玩家将不能更换编队，且探索进度在退出后将重置。
E: Go back to the areas you have explored and experience different stories or challenges to get corresponding rewards. During your exploration, you will not be able to change your Team Lineup, and the Exploration Progress will be reset after exiting.

C: 使用工造司的能量传导装置，使所有<color=#f29e38ff>建木缠结</color>被同时破坏，方可破除阻挡的建木枝条。
E: Ambrosial Arbor's branches can be found blocking the path. Use the Artisanship Commission's energy conduction device to destroy all the entangled <color=#f29e38ff>Ambrosial Arbor's coils</color> at the same time.

C: 阿格莱雅提前在若虫出没的区域布设了「衣匠」。<color=#f29e38ff>如果该区域仍有未被发现的若虫</color>，可提交<color=#f29e38ff>「记忆残晶」</color>让「衣匠」帮忙指明位置。
E: Aglaea has set up Garmentmakers beforehand at areas where nymphs can be found. <color=#f29e38ff>If there are still nymphs to be found in the area</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Memory Crystal Shard</color> can be submitted to the Garmentmaker to help locate them.

C: 「追忆残像」是翁法罗斯世界中的忆质残留，承载着旧日的岁月，能够从中窥得往昔的影像。
E: Fragments of Recollection are memoria residues in the world of Amphoreus. They bear bygone days, and you can glean images of the past from within.

C: 操纵<color=#f29e38ff>扎格列斯之手</color>，寻找并拿取场景中可以利用的<color=#f29e38ff>配重物</color>，放置在<color=#f29e38ff>天秤右侧的托盘</color>上，尝试解开欧洛尼斯的谜题。
E: Control <color=#f29e38ff>the Hand of Zagreus</color> to find and take the <color=#f29e38ff>appropriately weighted items</color> available in the map, then place them on the <color=#f29e38ff>plate on the right side of the scale</color> to try to solve Oronyx's puzzle.

C: 晨昏之眼存在一些风场，路径上的平台会被气流推动。对附近控制风场的装置进行<color=#f29e38ff>回溯可以改变风场方向</color>，让平台移动至另一侧。使用神龛<color=#f29e38ff>强化祷言后，这一回溯过程将没有时间限制</color>，会一直持续。
E: There are some wind currents in the Eye of Twilight. Platforms that pass through them will be pushed by the air currents. <color=#f29e38ff>Change the direction of the wind by Rewinding</color> the nearby device that can control the wind currents, allowing the platforms to move to the other side. After using the shrine to <color=#f29e38ff>enhance prayers, this Rewind process will not have a time limit</color>, and remains continuous.

C: 三月七为众人展开了<color=#f29e38ff>岁月的界域</color>，在时光归墟内，欧洛尼斯祷言将<color=#f29e38ff>一直处于强化状态</color>。
E: March 7th deployed the <color=#f29e38ff>Domain of Time</color> for everyone, and within the Ruins of Time, Oronyx's Prayer will <color=#f29e38ff>remain in an enhanced state</color>.

C: 每次<color=#f29e38ff>打破凝晶</color>，光芒区域的<color=#f29e38ff>边界都会缩小</color>，借助这一性质来完成试炼吧。
E: Each time you <color=#f29e38ff>break a Crystal</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>boundary of the lit area shrinks</color>. Use this property to complete the trial.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>能量</color>可以通过在战斗内<color=#f29e38ff>施放技能</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>消灭敌方</color>目标或<color=#f29e38ff>受到攻击</color>恢复。
E: Regenerate <color=#f29e38ff>Energy</color> in battle when <color=#f29e38ff>using abilities</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>defeating enemies</color>, or <color=#f29e38ff>receiving attacks</color>.

C: 主角模板中有不同的<color=#f29e38ff>槽位</color>,每个<color=#f29e38ff>槽位</color>中可以选择的<color=#f29e38ff>主角光环</color>均有不同。
E: There are different <color=#f29e38ff>slots</color> in the Protagonist Model. The <color=#f29e38ff>Plot Armor</color> that can be selected for each <color=#f29e38ff>slot</color> is different.

C: 此玩法中敌人会<color=#f29e38ff>不断刷新</color>，对敌人造成伤害或击败敌人均可<color=#f29e38ff>获得积分</color> 。
E: In this game mode, enemies will <color=#f29e38ff>continuously appear</color>. You can <color=#f29e38ff>earn points</color> by dealing damage to enemies or defeating them.

C: 在「同步」模式下控制佩佩行走时，如果被附近的怪物察觉，佩佩将启动逃生装置，迫降至最近的安全点。
E: While controlling Peppy in Sync Mode, if Peppy gets detected by any nearby monsters, it will activate its emergency escape device and return to the nearest safety area.

C: 「异变机制」：【反震还击】\n角色行动后将获得护盾，<color=#f29e38ff>护盾</color>可<color=#f29e38ff>反弹</color>该敌人的攻击，触发【反震还击】机制，造成扩散伤害。
E: Mutation Mechanic: Quake Counter\nCharacters gain Shield after taking action. While <color=#f29e38ff>Shielded</color>, characters can <color=#f29e38ff>rebound</color> this enemy's attacks, triggering the Quake Counter mechanic and dealing Blast DMG.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>纯美的祝祷</color>\n【纯美的祝祷】以固定速度施放增益效果，使我方全体伤害提高，行动提前，并恢复能量和战技点。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Prayers of Beauty</color>\nPrayers of Beauty grants buffs at a fixed SPD, increasing the DMG dealt by all allies, advancing their actions, regenerating their Energy, and restoring Skill Points.\nPrioritize upgrading the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>失去生命值</color>，上演<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: Have ally characters <color=#f29e38ff>lose HP</color> and trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> to gain a massive amount of Vibes.

C: 通关全部骑士关卡后，王棋的实力将被削弱。重置骑士关卡成绩时不会影响王棋的削弱状态。
E: After clearing all Knight Stages, the King will be weakened. Resetting the progress of the Knight Stages will not affect the weakened state of the King.

C: 在战斗中，非首领敌人被击败后会<color=#f29e38ff>不断补充</color>。\n存在此标记的非首领敌人被击败时，会<color=#f29e38ff>对首领敌人造成伤害</color>。当首领敌人被击败后，可完成该波次。
E: During battle, non-Boss enemies will <color=#f29e38ff>continuously replenish</color> after being defeated.\nWhen non-Boss enemies with this mark are defeated, it will <color=#f29e38ff>deal DMG to the Boss enemy</color>. When Boss enemies are defeated, the wave is considered complete.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>扶摇翎羽</color>\n我方角色攻击敌人时有概率触发「扶摇翎羽」，以龙卷风攻击敌方全体。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Wavering Plume</color>\nWhen ally characters attack enemies, there is a chance of triggering "Wavering Plume," which attacks all enemies with a Tornado.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 位面内所有区域均为<color=#f29e38ff>「区域-事件」</color>（「区域-首领」除外），完成事件获得额外祝福。
E: All domains in this plane are <color=#f29e38ff>Domain — Occurrence</color> (except Domain — Boss). Additional Blessing can be obtained after completing Occurrences.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>货物需要摆放在指定类型的置点上</color>，可以在货物列表处查看<color=#f29e38ff>货物对应的置点类型</color>
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Goods needs to be placed at the designated type of Placement Spot</color>. You can check the <color=#f29e38ff>corresponding Placement Spot type for the goods</color> in the Goods Catalog.

C: 在联机模式的双人对战中，所有对战道具将默认强化至3星效果。
E: In the multiplayer Duo Duel mode, all battle items are enhanced to their 3-star effects by default.

C:
每次移动后，倒计时减少1。当倒计时变为0再次移动后，进入【位面紊乱！】状态。该状态下，所有战斗中的敌人都会获得属性提升。每次移动后都会使扰动等级提高1级，扰动等级越高，对敌人的属性提升越多。
●1至5级，每级使所有敌方目标造成的伤害提高#2%，受到的伤害降低#3%
●6至<unbreak>10</unbreak>级，每级使所有敌方目标造成的伤害提高#4%，受到的伤害降低#5%，速度提高#6%
●<unbreak>11</unbreak>至<unbreak>20</unbreak>级，每级使所有敌方目标造成的伤害提高#7%，受到的伤害降低#8%，速度提高#9%
●<unbreak>21</unbreak>级及以上，敌方属性不再变化
当前敌方属性强化程度：#1
E:
After each movement, the countdown is reduced by 1. When moving again after the countdown reaches 0, enters Planar Disarray. While in Planar Disarray, all enemies in battle will receive a boost in stats. Each time after moving, the Disruption Level increases by 1. The higher the Disruption Level, the greater the stat boosts for the enemies.
● Levels 1 to 5: Each level increases the DMG dealt by all enemy targets by #2%, and reduces the DMG received by #3%.
● Levels 6 to <unbreak>10</unbreak>: Each level increases the DMG dealt by all enemy targets by #4%, reduces the DMG received by #5%, and increases SPD by #6%.
● Levels <unbreak>11</unbreak> to <unbreak>20</unbreak>: Each level increases the DMG dealt by all enemy targets by #7%, reduces the DMG received by #8%, and increases SPD by #9%.
● Level <unbreak>21</unbreak> and above: The enemy's stats no longer change.
Currently Enhanced enemy stats level: #1

C: 旧世界的古老遗物，地髓开拓团的时代遗留下的自动控制单元。与大部分无智、只接受指令的机器不同，史瓦罗具有复杂的思考能力。\n在战斗中，史瓦罗会召来机械臂抓取和控制敌人，对目标进行沉重的打击。
E: An ancient relic from the Old World, that was originally used as an automated control unit by the Geomarrow Development Group. Unlike the vast majority of machines that lack intellect and can only act on command, Svarog is capable of much more complex thinking.\nIn battle, Svarog summons mechanical arms to grab and control his enemies, delivering devastating attacks.

C: 真气操作浮游攻击单元，别名「飞剑」的武器。同御剑者心智紧密相连，如臂使指。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: Qi-controlled hovering attack unit, also named "Flying Sword." Closely connected to the wielder's psyche and can be used as an extension of its wielder's will. This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 以云吟之术消隐身形的刺客，不知受何人所遣。

C: 原本是搭载了筑梦学院教材的「发条暴徒」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。工地中蕉美的身姿有如铁壁，不时发出猴亮的铃声，蕉醒沉眠的猴生与猴友。
E: Originally a Winder Goon loaded with the Dreamweaver Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. Its banatiful figure in the construction site looks like an iron wall, occasionally letting out monkghty sounds of bells to banawaken slumbering banastudents and banacolleagues.

C: 快点让我打啦。
E: Come on, let me fight.

C: 让开，我无意挑起争端。
E: Step aside, I have no interest in stoking conflict.

C: 战斗是一场精密的设计。
E: Combat is a series of precise machinations.

C: 要拿它练个手么？
E: Practice target?

C: 看来这场战斗，你也有不少自己的想法。
E: Seems like you have quite a few ideas about this fight.

C: …不知道为什么，我好像时不时就惹小姐生气？
E: *sigh* ...I don't know why, but it seems like I manage to annoy Lady Asta fairly regularly.

C: 持续不断地将资金投入空间站的建设，完善员工福利，形成良性循环，同时满足站长，也就是本人自身必要的购物需求。
E: Continuously channeling funds into constructing the space station, improving employee benefits, creating a positive feedback loop... Ahem, as well as satisfying the lead researcher's — that is to say my — indispensable shopping needs.

C: 多无聊的东西送给她，过一阵子回到我手上，又会变得有趣起来。
E: I give her the most boring things, and then she gives them back to me and they're suddenly interesting.

C: 鹤翼三连！
E: Triple Crane Wings!

C: 是我…败了…
E: I... lost...

C: 我是贝洛伯格「大守护者」继承人，代行银鬃铁卫统领，布洛妮娅•兰德…方才只是例行的自我介绍，叫我布洛妮娅就好。
E: My name is Bronya Rand, heir to Belobog's supreme guardian and acting commander of the Silvermane... Apologies, I'm used to introducing myself like that — you can call me Bronya.

C: 老样子，佩拉，就和我们演出一样——我会跟紧你的节奏！
E: Just like being on stage, right Pela? I'll follow your rhythm.

C: 一个眼神，一阵风，都会成为灵感。
E: There's inspiration in every glance and every breeze.

C: 出敌不意的反攻。
E: We caught them unawares.

C: 药物不仅揭示病人的疾病，还有他们的欲望和需求。
E: A patient's medicine doesn't just reveal their illness. It also offers a window into their desires and needs.

C: 该休息时就好好休息。
E: Hard work needs hard rest.

C: 克拉拉：史瓦罗先生，小心！
E: Clara: Be careful, Mr. Svarog!

C: 克拉拉：这、这个太贵重了！
E: Clara: Th—This is too precious!

C: 这就到头了？看来得找点新乐子啦。
E: That's it? *sigh* I was just getting started...

C: 哪儿有我桑博，哪儿就有生意。
E: Wherever there is business, there is Sampo.

C: 哥哥很能干，是个很厉害的人…要是别那么担心我就更好了。
E: My brother is a very capable and very good man... It would be nice if he didn't worry so much about me.

C: 虎克，不多吃点肉，当心长不高喔！
E: Wanna grow taller, Hook? Eat more protein!

C: 让史瓦罗先生也教我几招吧，克拉拉？
E: Psst, Clara — any chance I can train with Mr. Svarog?

C: 抓住他们，再来一局吧~
E: Time for another round — let's get them~

C: 丹鼎司堕落到今天这步田地，我确有不可推卸的责任。如今她肯不计前嫌，回归罗浮，挽大厦于将倾，我亦是心怀感激的。
E: I do shoulder much of the blame for the current state of the Alchemy Commission. I am deeply grateful that she is willing to let go of past grudges and come back to the Luofu to save the Commission from collapse.

C: 明珠蒙尘。
E: A diamond in the rough.

C: 从起飞开始，于降落结束，才称得上是圆满、完整的飞行。
E: A full, complete flight can only be considered as such when it starts with a successful takeoff and ends with a good landing.

C: 我是白露，丹鼎司的医士。来来，过来让我瞅瞅，你怎么回事，哪儿不舒服啦？
E: I'm Bailu, a doctor from the Alchemy Commission. Come here and let me have a look at you. Hmm... What's wrong? Where does it hurt?

C: 吃糖么？不吃啊，那我吃啦。
E: Do you want candy? No? Then I'll have it.

C: 藿藿：我、我才不想锻炼什么意志，我就想逃跑，但每次尾巴大爷都直接把我送到敌人跟前，真的是受够了……\n尾巴：哼，你最好是被吃干抹净，老子就能恢复自由了！
E: Huohuo: B—Be more determined? I usually just want to run away... Still, every time I try, Mr. Tail sends me straight back to the enemies' doorstep. *sigh* Why can't he just leave me be...?\nTail: Hmph! Fine by me! If you get swallowed whole, I'll finally be able to break free!

C: 每次听爷爷和景元将军说话，我都觉得又累又困，他们为什么就不能跟和我说话时一样呢？搞不懂将军间的对话……
E: Every time I hear Grandpa and General Jing Yuan talking, I start to fall asleep. Why can't they speak to each other the same way they talk to me? I can never understand conversations between generals...

C: 最近顺利吗？妾身如往常一样，职场诸事不顺。列车无名客来去自由，真令人羡慕呀。
E: How are things going lately? Work is not going well, as usual. I envy the Nameless of the Express, as they can come and go as they please.

C: 烟消…火灭……
E: The smoke is gone... the fire is out...

C: 还打么？不打我就歇会儿。
E: Gonna keep going? If not, I'll catch my breath for a while.

C: 她只是再次证明了，我们对生命本质的认知依然远未抵达尽头。
E: She has simply proven once again that our understanding of the essence of life is still far from complete.

C: 哦？超出预想的成果……
E: Oh? Better than expected...

C: 匹诺康尼的「钟表匠」不以制表为生，但仍有不少优秀的钟表匠人聚集在这里。比如这块，指针与表盘间填充了些许忆质，可以随佩戴者的心情变换样式…对我来说，直接换块表兴许更方便吧。
E: The Watchmaker of Penacony doesn't primarily make their living from watchmaking, yet the place is a magnet for talented horologists. Look at this piece, for example. Its hands and face are imbued with memoria, artfully altering its appearance to reflect the wearer's emotions... As for me, I'd probably just prefer swapping out watches.

C: 很苦恼的样子啊，遇到麻烦了？既然如此——你自己想办法吧。
E: You look distressed. Is something troubling you? If so, you can figure it out for yourself.

C: 一位优雅、端庄的女士，我会记得她善意的邀请，那支舞…让我感到亲切和怀念。
E: A lady of elegance and dignity, her benevolent offer lingers in my memory. That dance... it brought me a sense of warmth and nostalgia.

C: 艾普瑟隆的发行商为我出过几张专辑，也邀请我过去住过一段时间。那颗星球的氛围很像匹诺康尼，但比起艺术，人们似乎更关心艺术所能带来的巨额利润……
E: A label from Epsilon has produced a few albums for me and even invited me to live there for a while. The vibe of the planet feels quite similar to Penacony, but it seems that people are more interested in the massive profits that art can bring than the actual art itself...

C: 「萨姆」——苍穹战线的铁骑，火萤Ⅳ型战略强袭装甲…在他人眼里，它是对抗虫群的兵器，它就是「我」…我知道「萨姆」是我生命的摇篮，也曾是我存在的意义，但我希望…它并非我的全部。
E: SAM — Iron Cavalry of the Firmament Frontline, Fyrefly Type-IV Strategic Assault Mecha... To others, it's a weapon for opposing the Swarm, but really it's just me... I know Sam is the cradle of my vitality and the meaning of my existence, but I hope... it isn't all of me.

C: 我能感受到，你迈向未来的步伐，已不再沉重。
E: I feel that your path forward is no longer burdened by the weight of the past.

C: 小恩小惠，不足挂齿。
E: Is that all? Hardly worth the bother.

C: 苦茶大师曾教导在下，「爱」乃是构成天地万物的忍力本源。同气相求、爱罗武勇——这便是爱死天流•忍法的奥义。
E: Master Kucha once taught me that "love" is the fundamental source of perseverance that constitutes everything in the world. Seeking like-minded individuals, and deep love — this is the essence of the Secret Ninjutsu Technique: Aishiteru.

C: 浮生如夜露，难断生老死苦——球棒•忍者，夜露死苦。
E: Life is as fleeting as night dew, hard to sever from the sufferings of birth, aging, sickness, and death... Baseball Bat Ninja, yoroshiku.

C: 诸般邪祟，速速退下！
E: All manner of evil, leave at once!

C: 各地恶代官都不喜欢在下绘制缭乱•忍符，在下曾在名为地•铁的驿站中与一名奉行人周旋了七日七夜，那段往事似乎还被人做成了{RUBY_B#游戏}超•幻境{RUBY_E#}。
E: Evil officials all over dislike me drawing my Dazzling Ninja Seals. I once spent seven days and nights in a station called "Sub-Way" contending with an acolyte, and that incident appears to have been made into a {RUBY_B#game}Super Fantasia{RUBY_E#}.

C: 狂热的心，究竟为何跳动？
E: Why does my passionate heart beat so?

C: 请坦诚些，对你我都好。
E: A little honesty would do us both some good.

C: 沐浴黄金。
E: Bathe in gold.

C: 若有闲暇，便去沐浴一刻吧。
E: Should you have a moment, take some time for a bath.

C: 海瑟音姐姐经常给*我们*哼唱大海的歌谣，陪伴我们度过孤单的时光。想她的时候，*我们*就会去听她留下的海螺……
E: Big Sis Hysilens often hummed songs of the sea for us, keeping us company through the lonely days. When we miss her, we'd go listen to the conch she left behind...

C: 人人信以为实，谎言便可成真——很难吗？大家相信的，都是自己愿意相信的东西罢了。话说回来，如果世界都是大家愿意看到的那样，又有什么不好呢？
E: If everyone believes it, a lie becomes reality — easy, right? People believe what they want to anyway. Honestly, if the world turns into what everyone dreams of, is that really so bad?

C: 怎么，想从我身上贪便宜？
E: Thinking of taking advantage of me, are you?

C: 老师，这次会带来怎样的教诲？
E: Professor, what will you be teaching this time?

C: 说起来，这位美丽的剑骑…我曾根据缇宝老师的讲述写过许多关于她的诗篇呢。在我的想象中，她总是如海浪那样纯粹，潮汐那般优雅…见面后，发现果真如此呀。
E: That beautiful knight... I've actually written a lot of poems about her based on what Tribbie told me. I always imagined her to be as pure as the ocean waves and as elegant as the tides... And it all turned out to be true once I met her.

C: 美丽的花海，一定会开遍大地。
E: The beautiful sea of flowers will one day cover the Earth.

C: 凯撒，你的号令预备指向何方？
E: Where will your commands be directed, Imperator?

C: 如我们所愿，为深爱的世界而战吧。
E: Let us fight for the world we so deeply love... just how we had wished.

C: 赐你，众星俱焚的曙光。
E: I grant you a dawn where all stars burn to ash.

C: 蝶宝特别喜欢我的小花园，她总是远远地绕着庭院，从这儿到那儿，走上一圈又一圈，连眼睛都一眨不眨——要让她回过神来，除非有更可爱的东西出现，比如…奇美拉？
E: Cassie really likes my little garden. She keeps circling the courtyard from far away, going round and round, forgetting to even blink. It'll take something even cuter for her to snap out of that state... Maybe a chimera?

C: 七宝，又见面啦，我有好多好多想聊的呢！
E: We meet again, Sevie. There's so much I wanna talk to you about!

C: 以三千万具空无一物的身躯，三千万枚孤兵的重量…他在命运的天平上胜过了神明，也胜过了王者的野心。这并非奇迹，而是以人的意志达成的壮举。
E: With the weight of thirty million hollow shells and thirty million solitary warriors... he won against the gods and the ambitions of a monarch on the scales of destiny. This was not a miracle, but a glorious feat achieved with the power of the human will.

C: 好想摸摸它呀。可惜，这位神秘莫测的「列车长」，一看就不会乖乖就范呢~
E: I really want to pet them. But alas, this mysterious "Conductor" doesn't look like they'd take kindly to it.

C: 何物能使生灵长存？是记忆么？不，记忆只能保存腐朽的过去。而它却甘愿成为后世的基石，为这个世界留下了生生不息的传承。
E: What makes life eternal? Memories? No, memory can only preserve a decaying past. Yet they willingly became the cornerstone for the future, leaving behind a legacy that will endure for generations.

C: 在发呆吗？还是…在看我？
E: Spacing out? Or... are you looking at me?

C: 又是一道优美的诗行。
E: Yet another beautiful verse of poetry.

C: 待在风堇身边，整个人都变得暖洋洋的~
E: I feel so warm when I stay next to you, Hyacine~

C: 不痛不痒。
E: Just a scratch.

C: 毫发无伤。
E: Not a scratch.

C: 想想该怎么对付它。
E: We need a strategy.

C: 即便互不相识，我们也会为同一目标，做出同一选择。
E: Unknown to each other, yet united in purpose, we make the same choices.

C: 翁法罗斯
E: Amphoreus

C: 重置相机
E: Reset Camera

C: 一个人就能独自上演死亡，而美好需要回应\n<color=#8790abff>※履行与流萤的约定</color>
E: A single person can enact death alone, but beauty requires a response\n<color=#8790abff>※ Fulfill the promise with Firefly</color>

C: 巨剑守护
E: Greatsword Guardian

C: 史诗集群其四
E: Epic Collection (IV)

C: 负能量
E: Uber-Negative

C: 灰宝，我们再努力一次吧！
E: Let's try our best again, Grayie!

C: 我方奇美拉成功释放<color=#f29e38ff>概率</color>技能后，刻律徳菈会激励其再次释放！
E: When an ally chimera successfully activates a <color=#f29e38ff>probability-based</color> ability, Cerydra will inspire it to activate it again!

C: 商店中会出现那刻夏特制的炼金药水，使用后能让奇美拉<color=#f29e38ff>变身</color>！
E: The store will feature special alchemy potions from Anaxa that will allow chimeras to <color=#f29e38ff>transform</color>!

C: 进入对战时每有<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>，在自身被击倒时：召唤<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>级真老实，至少召唤1只
E: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> this unit has at the start of combat, upon being knocked down: Summons <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Lv. <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Old Honest, with a minimum summon of 1

C: 对战开始时：召唤<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>级受气包
E: At the start of battle: Summons <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Level <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Suffermaxxer(s).

C: 队伍中最强的燕麦粥被击倒时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>。穿戴【金丝装备】的同伴会额外<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=3 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When the strongest Oatmeal in the team is knocked out: Causes all companions' <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. Companions wearing "Golden Thread Equipment" additionally have their <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK be increased by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=3 width=1 height=1>HP be increased by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时，大地兽使所有我方专属奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn, the dromas grants all ally exclusive chimeras additional <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>.

C: 自身受到伤害时：减少<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点受到的伤害，最低为1，并有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的概率使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Reduces DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> (down to 1) and has a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> chance to restore <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。回合开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>名对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of turn: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts "Oblivion" on <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random opponent(s). When companions use attack/Follow-Up ATK: If the attacked targets are affected by "Oblivion," immediately deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to them.

C: 上赛场就难受…
E: It's rough out there on the arena...

C: 我会证明自己的实力。
E: I'll prove what I'm capable of.

E: Competitive Rank

E: No chimeras available for synthesis

C: ・大丽花独自来到列车，在意识的领域，引导你恢复匹诺康尼的记忆。\n・在每一段回忆结束后，大丽花都会试着为你梳理思绪。\n・在告知了你「终末」的真相后，大丽花独自离开，并且希望能够和你再次相遇。
E: ・ The Dahlia came alone to the Express, guiding you through the realm of consciousness to restore your memories of Penacony.\n・ After you witnessed each memory segment, The Dahlia would try to help you sort through your thoughts.\n・ After revealing to you the truth about the Finality, The Dahlia left alone, hoping to encounter you again.

C: 堤溃蚁穴
E: Breached Nest

C: 只因认定
E: For they deem

C: 美梦燃烧了永火官邸，也带走关于「她」的点滴。\n「毁灭」、「记忆」…背叛的花朵盛放在所经之地——\n重返无人知晓的梦境，将她再度点燃的会是何方？
E: The sweet dream burned down the Ever-Flame Mansion, taking with it every trace of "her."\nDestruction, Remembrance... flowers of betrayal bloomed wherever they passed.\nTo return to the dreamscape no one remembers, who will be the one to set her aflame again?

C: \n于梦境的深处，寰宇蝗灾以此样貌再度现世。
E: \nDeep within the dreamscape, the Swarm Disaster manifests once again in this form.

C: 勿忘她的火焰
E: Never Forget Her Flame

C: 老是昏迷 机甲也开不了
E: She always ends up fainting. Can't even operate her mech

E: Where are you? I can't see you anywhere!

C: 引领者的回响诉说着：只管「欺瞒」，无路也须前行。若欲使人心怀希望，不可显露注定的死亡。
E: The leader's resonance spoke: "Deceit" is the only way. Press on, even without a path. To keep hope alive in people's hearts, never reveal the inevitable death.

C: 我方角色在单场战斗中首次生命值百分比小于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>后，激活终结技，并使本场战斗中自身与忆灵造成的终结技伤害可以无视敌方目标一定的防御力。
E: When ally character's HP percentage drops below <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for the first time in a single combat, activates Ultimate and allows this unit and memosprite's Ultimate DMG in this combat to ignore a portion of enemy target's DEF.

E: Express Fragment Memorial Plaque (Awakened)

E: Chimera On "Work"

E: SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 你无法再回到往昔，但无论过去是否因你而改变，都会留下为人铭记的痕迹。
E: You can't return to the past, yet the past, regardless of whether you changed it, will leave traces to be remembered.

C: 「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔」——不知为何，你又回想起了这句话。
E: "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret." For some reason, those words come back to you again.

C: 寻找适合「偷渡」的入口
E: Find an entrance for "stowaways"

C: 喂喂！不要命啦！「老」是花姐的禁忌词！
E: Whoa whoa! Have you gone mad? Did you forget that we should never mention words like "old" or "senior" in front of Big Sis Dahlia?

C: 这两条路终会相交，为了抵达那一刻，我们要找出更多…记忆的矛盾之处。
E: These two paths will eventually intersect, and to reach that moment, we must find more... contradictions in the memories.

C: 意外地没什么感觉……
E: Surprisingly, I don't feel anything...

C: 正好！给我一起拿下！
E: Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!

C: 只是…来玩游戏的吗？
E: Just here... to play games?

C: 然后是皮皮西俱乐部……
E: Then past the Pepeshi Club...

C: 我就喜欢你猝不及防的样子，很可爱。
E: I just love catching you off guard like that. It's adorable.

C: 别多心，我只是在模仿某些惹人厌烦的忆者。在他们看来，一段记忆被回想得越多，就越容易面目全非。
E: Don't take it to heart, I'm just imitating those annoying Memokeepers. In their view, the more a memory is recalled, the more likely it is to become distorted beyond recognition.

C: 面对一位行于「虚无」的令使，无论何时何地，我们都应该小心翼翼。
E: When facing an Emanator who walks in the Nihility, we must always tread carefully, no matter when or where.

C: 绝对不行，难道你忘了吗？作为星核猎手，我有一项不惜一切代价的「零点任务」——
E: Absolutely not! Have you forgotten? As a Stellaron Hunter, I have a "Zero-Point Mission," one that must be completed at any cost—

C: 再次来到你们面前时，她已经用上了另一个身份。那次交手，搅动了命运的涡流，让许多人的道路就此交汇。而在你离去之后——
E: When she appeared before you again, she was already using a different identity. That encounter stirred the whirlpool of destiny, causing many paths to converge. And after you left...

C: …她给了你什么？
E: ...What did she give you?

C: 但我…可以离开，再也…不回到这里…
E: I... can leave, and never... come back here...

C: 原来如此……
E: I see...

C: 我为此疑问了很久…「命运的奴隶」，怎么可能会接纳你，<color=#dbc291ff>一个天性为背叛的人</color>。
E: I've been questioning this for a long time... How could Destiny's Slave possibly accept someone like you, <color=#dbc291ff>whose very nature is betrayal</color>?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>30</unbreak>█改邪归正。你虽如大鹰高飞，在星宿之间搭窝，但我必从那里拉下你来。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>30</unbreak>█ Repent and return to righteousness. Though you soar like an eagle and make your nest among the stars, I will bring you down from there."</color>

C: 你还是那么讨人喜欢。
E: You're still as charming as ever.

C: 还是你的运气更好，砂金先生。
E: It would seem luck favors you still, Mr. Aventurine.

C: …哪怕揪出他本人？
E: ...Even if we catch him in person?

C: 而第三条律令……
E: And the Third Law...

C: 梦主是怎么回事？
E: What's the deal with the Dreammaster?

C: 少来，我是你们的合伙人，又不是手下。不能因为有人先骗了你，就对我有偏见！
E: Please, we're working together. I'm not some lackey. Just because someone else fooled you doesn't mean you get to pin it on me!

C: 在你看来，梦主会选择哪边？
E: In your opinion, which path would the Dreammaster choose?

C: 在那人偶手上，流萤女士。
E: It's in that puppet's hand, Lady Firefly.

C: 他们寻求痛苦
E: They seek for sorrow,

C: 梦主干了什么？
E: What did the Dreammaster do?

C: 若非黄泉小姐提前布局，我们或许就要永远沉沦在这场梦中了。
E: If it wasn't for Acheron's plan, we might have been trapped in this dream forever.

C: 这才是公司真正的意图？从命途的层面，完全夺回匹诺康尼？
E: Is this the IPC's real goal? To completely take back Penacony on a conceptual Path level?

C: …那你应该知道，我不可能同意。
E: ...Then you know I'd never agree to it.

C: 正因怀抱这些愿望，他们才有能力做梦。正因从未实现过这些愿望，他们才有能力醒来。
E: It was because they held onto these desires that they could dream. It was because these desires were never fulfilled that they could wake up.

C: 正如每一个迈向死亡的生命都在热烈地生长，向着「虚无」的尽头……
E: Just as every life that edges closer to death fervently approaches the end of the Nihility...

C: 「开拓」知其不可，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
E: The Trailblaze knows it attempts the impossible. By this decree, it shall be ended!

C: 再见，流萤。
E: Goodbye, Firefly.

C: 不过你别担心，我问过银狼了，现实里不会这么严重，就先不聊这些了。
E: But don't worry. I asked Silver Wolf about it, and she said things won't get that serious in real life. Let's not talk about this anymore.

C: 咱们干嘛不一起上？
E: Why don't we team up and fight together?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>

C: 太一之手撕裂了夜空， 虫卵破溃，繁育的力量喷涌而出。
E: The hands of Ena lacerated the night sky, as insect eggs burst open, unleashing the power of Propagation.

C: 我要成为奇美拉联盟冠军！
E: I will become the Chimera League Champion!

C: 两个战场的敌方首领需要尽可能地<color=#f29e38ff>同时</color>被击败，避免其复活。推荐选择<color=#f29e38ff>两名</color>具有输出能力的角色，分别前往两个战场与敌方首领对战。
E: The Boss Enemies in both battlefields need to be defeated as <color=#f29e38ff>simultaneously</color> as possible to prevent their revival. It is recommended to select <color=#f29e38ff>two</color> damage-dealing characters to engage the Boss Enemies in two separate battlefields.

C: 开启挑战
E: Start Challenge

C: 战技•二
E: Skill 2

C: 真想把这一刻制成冰冷的标本，永远陪着我呐…可这不解风情的命运却偏要把你我吹散。也好，将绽放留待下一次相遇吧——希望到时，你还会让我兴趣盎然……
E: How I wish I could preserve this moment as a frozen specimen, and keep it forever... Pity that this loveless fate insists on separating us. Oh well, let's save the blossoming for our next encounter. I only hope, by then, you'll still pique my interest...
